senses.definition: adj.双语的，两种语言的，能说两种语言的
senses.contextMeaning: 双语的，两种语言的，能说两种语言的
senses.sentence: She works as a **bilingual** secretary for an insurance company.
senses.translation: 她为一家保险公司做双语秘书.

senses.definition: n.十亿 , 数以十亿计,大量
senses.sentence: Exports in June rose 1.5% to a record $30.91 **billion**.
senses.translation: 6月份的出口额上升了1.5%，创下309.1亿美元的历史最高纪录。

senses.definition: n.箱子，容器,二进制,垃圾箱,（地下室）葡萄酒贮藏库
senses.sentence: He decided to **bin** his paintings.
senses.translation: 他决定把他的画扔掉。

senses.definition: vt.约束,装订,捆绑,（用长布条）缠绕
senses.sentence: It is expensive to buy and a **bind** to carry home.
senses.translation: 买这个费用很贵，搬回家也费劲。

senses.definition: n.生物化学,生物化学成份
senses.sentence: There are two main types of uses of radioactive isotopes in **biochemistry**.
senses.translation: 在生物化学中,放射性同位素主要有两方面的应用.

senses.definition: n.传记,档案,传记体文学,个人简介
senses.sentence: He has written a speculative **biography** of Christopher Marlowe.
senses.translation: 他写了一篇关于克里斯托弗·马洛的推测性传记。

senses.definition: adj.生物学的,生物的,与生物学相关的,有血亲关系的
senses.sentence: Most young women feel a **biological** need to procreate.
senses.translation: 大多数的年轻妇女都有生儿育女的生理需要。

senses.definition: n.生物学,生物
senses.sentence: An A-level pass in **Biology** is preferred for all courses.
senses.translation: 不管读什么课程，生物学高级证书考试最好都要及格。

senses.definition: n.生物圈,生物界,生物层
senses.sentence: **Biosphere** 2 was ultimately ridiculed as a research debade, as exfravagant pseudoscience.
senses.translation: 生物圈2号最终被讥讽为科研上的大失败, 代价是昂贵的伪科学.

senses.definition: n.鸟，禽,<俚>少女，姑娘，人，家伙，东西,<口>飞机，火箭，导弹
senses.sentence: The sand martin is a brown **bird** with white underneath.
senses.translation: 崖沙燕是一种褐羽白腹的鸟。

senses.definition: n.出生,分娩,起源,出身
senses.sentence: I had obtained the authentic details about the **birth** of the organization.
senses.translation: 我已经掌握了有关该组织诞生的可靠的详细资料。

senses.definition: n.生日,诞辰,成立纪念日
senses.sentence: I might buy one for a friend's **birthday** as a giggle.
senses.translation: 我可能会买一件送给朋友当生日礼物，逗他开心。

senses.definition: n.<英>饼干,<美>软烤饼,松饼（食用时常佐以肉汁）,淡黄褐色
senses.sentence: He wolfed down the rest of the **biscuit** and cheese.
senses.translation: 他把剩下的饼干和奶酪一扫而光。

senses.definition: n.一点，一块,少量，少许,一会儿，一转眼,[计] 比特（二进位制信息单位）
senses.sentence: I get a **bit** uptight these days. Hormones, I suppose.
senses.translation: 这些天我有点焦躁。我看是荷尔蒙在作怪。

senses.definition: n.苦,苦味物,苦啤酒,[航]系缆柱上的一圈缆索
senses.sentence: They drink **bitter** on draught in the local bar.
senses.translation: 他们在当地的酒吧里喝桶装的苦啤酒。

senses.definition: adj.离奇的,奇特的（指态度，容貌，款式等）,奇怪的,奇幻
senses.sentence: The allegations ranged from the banal to the **bizarre**.
senses.translation: 从平淡无奇到离奇百怪的各种说法都有。

senses.definition: n.黑色,黑人,黑颜料,黑暗
senses.sentence: I slowly zipped and locked the heavy **black** nylon bags.
senses.translation: 我慢慢地把那些沉重的黑色尼龙袋的拉链拉上并锁好。

senses.definition: n.黑板
senses.sentence: There was a **blackboard** with seven names chalked on it.
senses.translation: 黑板上用粉笔写着7个人名。

senses.definition: n.敲诈，勒索,（盗匪征收的）保护费，免抢税
senses.sentence: That was a terrible case of **blackmail** in the paper today.
senses.translation: 今天报上登的那宗勒索案真可怕。

senses.definition: n.刀片，剑,（壳、草等的）叶片,桨叶,浮华少年
senses.sentence: A **blade** guard is fitted to protect the operator.
senses.translation: 为保证操作人员的人身安全安装了桨叶保护罩。

senses.definition: n.责备,责任,过失
senses.sentence: She seemed to be placing most of the **blame** on her mother.
senses.translation: 她好像把大部分责任都推到了母亲身上。

senses.definition: adj.空白的,空的，无信息的，未填写的,茫然的,空虚的
senses.sentence: They shot him at point **blank** range with an automatic rifle.
senses.translation: 他们用自动步枪近距离开枪射杀了他。

senses.definition: n.毛毯，毯子,毯状物,厚的覆盖层
senses.sentence: Wrap your baby snugly in a shawl or **blanket**.
senses.translation: 拿一条披巾或毯子把宝宝舒舒服服地裹起来。

senses.definition: n.爆炸,一阵（疾风等）,（吹奏乐器、哨子、汽车喇叭等突然发出的）响声,突如其来的强劲气流
senses.sentence: It's thought that the **blast** occurred when volatile chemicals exploded.
senses.translation: 人们认为，易挥发的化学物质爆炸时产生了冲击波。

senses.definition: n.火焰,光辉,爆发,光彩
senses.sentence: I wanted the front garden to be a **blaze** of colour.
senses.translation: 我想让门前的花园变得五彩缤纷。

senses.definition: adj.暗淡的，昏暗的,没有指望的,寒冷的，刺骨的,无遮蔽的，荒凉的
senses.sentence: Her book paints a **bleak** picture of the problems women now face.
senses.translation: 她的书是女性当下所面临问题的凄凉写照。

senses.definition: vi.流血
senses.sentence: If you cut your finger, it will **bleed**.
senses.translation: 如果你割破手指, 它会流血.

senses.definition: vt.混合,把…掺在一起,（使）调和,协调
senses.sentence: **Blend** the butter with the sugar and beat until light and creamy.
senses.translation: 把糖掺入黄油然后搅拌至滑软细腻。

senses.definition: vt.祝福,保佑,赞美,为…祈福
senses.sentence: During his visit, the Pope will also **bless** the new hospital.
senses.translation: 在访问期间，教皇还将为新医院祈福。

senses.definition: adj.失明的,盲目的，轻率的,供盲人用的,隐蔽的
senses.sentence: West was wilfully **blind** to the abuse that took place.
senses.translation: 韦斯特对发生的虐待行为故意视而不见。

senses.definition: n.块,街区,<英>大楼，大厦,障碍物，阻碍
senses.sentence: A **block** up the street I found a parking lot.
senses.translation: 沿着街道往北过了一个街区，我找到了一个停车场。

senses.definition: n.血，血液,流血，杀戮，杀人（罪），牺牲,有…类型的血的，血统,血气，气质
senses.sentence: The victim suffered a dreadful injury and lost a lot of **blood**.
senses.translation: 受害者受了重伤，大量失血。

senses.definition: n.（常指供观赏的）花,开花期,最盛期,健康有精神的面貌
senses.sentence: The flowers in the garden are now in full **bloom**.
senses.translation: 花园里的花盛开.

senses.definition: n.花，群花,开花时期，（发育的）初期,兴旺时期
senses.sentence: The cherry **blossom** came out early in Washington this year.
senses.translation: 今年华盛顿的樱花开得很早。

senses.definition: n.殴打，打击,吹风，一阵风,意外的灾害,吹奏（声）
senses.sentence: He killed his tyrannical father with a **blow** to the head.
senses.translation: 他冲着暴戾的父亲的头部猛击了一下，把他打死了。

senses.definition: n.蓝图，设计图,计划大纲,原本
senses.sentence: The country's president will offer delegates his **blueprint** for the country's future.
senses.translation: 该国总统会向代表们展示他构想的国家未来发展的蓝图。

senses.definition: n.（因无知、粗心等造成）的错误,大错，失策，疏忽
senses.sentence: The government committed a double **blunder**.
senses.translation: 政府重蹈覆辙。

senses.definition: adj.钝的，不锋利的,迟钝的,直率的,呆板的
senses.sentence: She couldn't stand his **blunt**, graceless manner.
senses.translation: 她无法忍受他的唐突和粗鲁。

senses.definition: n.污迹，污斑,模糊不清的事物,暧昧不明
senses.sentence: His arm was a rapid **blur** of movement as he struck.
senses.translation: 他出击时胳膊快速一晃，令人眼花缭乱。

senses.definition: vi.脸红，惭愧,变红,害臊，怕羞
senses.sentence: His remark brought a **blush** into the girl's cheeks.
senses.translation: 他的话使这姑娘两颊红晕.

senses.definition: n.板,董事会,甲板,膳食
senses.sentence: Make sure the draining **board**, sink and plug hole are regularly disinfected.
senses.translation: 滴水板、水槽和塞孔一定要定期消毒。

senses.definition: vt.自夸，自吹自擂,夸口说,以有…而自豪,自负有
senses.sentence: This year's festival can **boast** a decently long list of sponsors.
senses.translation: 今年该活动节将会拥有相当多的赞助商。

senses.definition: n.小船，小艇,轮船
senses.sentence: They had almost reached the **boat** when a figure shot past them.
senses.translation: 他们差不多快到船边时，一个人影从他们旁边飞奔而过。

senses.definition: n.煮沸，沸腾,疔，疖子,[医]疡肿，脓肿
senses.sentence: I'll put on the kettle for tea. Or **boil** up some coffee.
senses.translation: 我要烧壶水沏茶，或者煮些咖啡。

senses.definition: adj.明显的，醒目的,勇敢的，无畏的,莽撞的,陡峭的
senses.sentence: The book's 85 colour lithographic plates look staggeringly fresh and **bold**.
senses.translation: 这本书的85张彩色平版看起来异常鲜艳醒目。

senses.definition: n.螺栓，螺钉,闪电，雷电,门闩,弩箭
senses.sentence: Loosen the **bolt** so the bars can be turned.
senses.translation: 松一松插销，好转动门闩。

senses.definition: n.纽带,联系,债券,保释金
senses.sentence: The threat of inflation is already evident in **bond** prices.
senses.translation: 通货膨胀的危险在证券价格上已经表现得很明显。

senses.definition: n.骨头,尸骨,骨质物,有…样的骨头的
senses.sentence: Our **bone** marrow contains fat in the form of small globules.
senses.translation: 我们的骨髓中含有小球状的脂肪。

senses.definition: n.奖金，额外津贴,红利，额外股息,退职金,额外令人高兴的事情
senses.sentence: We felt we might finish third. Any better would be a **bonus**.
senses.translation: 我们感觉我们可能会获得第三名，要是能比这个名次更好那就是意外的惊喜了。

senses.definition: n.预约，预订,挂号,演出契约,订货
senses.sentence: Those **booking** a block of seats get them at reduced rates.
senses.translation: 团体订座可享受折扣价。

senses.definition: n.隆隆声,繁荣,激增
senses.sentence: This **boom** has been engineered by the Chancellor for short-term political reasons.
senses.translation: 这片繁荣景象是总理为了短期政治利益而精心安排的。

senses.definition: vt.促进，提高,增加,吹捧,向上推起
senses.sentence: Without a major **boost** in tourism, the economy will suffer even further.
senses.translation: 旅游业如果没有大的起色，经济状况会每况愈下。

senses.definition: n.售货棚，摊位,公用电话亭,隔开的小间,（选举）投票站
senses.sentence: **Booth** was a revivalist intent on his Christian vocation.
senses.translation: 布思是一个坚定不移地奉行其基督徒天职的宗教复兴运动者。

senses.definition: n.边,镶边,包边,边界
senses.sentence: This very careful attitude to money can sometimes **border** on meanness.
senses.translation: 这种对待金钱的过分谨慎的态度有时几近于吝啬。

senses.definition: vt.令人厌烦,钻孔,用钻、挖或掘的方式打通
senses.sentence: Hugo **bore** his illness with great courage and good humour.
senses.translation: 雨果以巨大的勇气和良好的精神状态面对疾病。

senses.definition: vt.bear的过去分词,支撑，支持,亲自携带，运输
senses.sentence: She was **born** in the middle of a rain storm.
senses.translation: 她出生在一场暴风雨中。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.借入,借钱，借用,[数]由上位借,抄袭
senses.sentence: Most people here cannot **borrow** from banks because they lack collateral.
senses.translation: 由于拿不出东西作为抵押，这里大部分人无法从银行贷款。

senses.definition: n.植物学,精纺毛纱,细羊毛
senses.sentence: Until 1982 he was senior lecturer in **botany** at Durham University.
senses.translation: 1982年以前他一直是达勒姆大学生物系的高级讲师。

senses.definition: adj.二者，两者都
senses.sentence: The vehicle that permitted **both** communication and acceptability was social revolution.
senses.translation: 既能实现交流又能被广为接受的手段就是社会革命。

senses.definition: vi.操心,麻烦,烦恼
senses.sentence: Mr Brooke is undoubtedly in a spot of **bother**.
senses.translation: 布鲁克先生肯定遇到了点小麻烦。

senses.definition: n.瓶子,一瓶（的量）,（婴儿）奶瓶,酒
senses.sentence: As I sidestepped, the **bottle** hit me on the left hip.
senses.translation: 我侧一步要躲闪的时候，瓶子打中了我的左髋部。

senses.definition: n.底部,末端,臀部,尽头
senses.sentence: She lay at the **bottom** of the stairs, whimpering in pain.
senses.translation: 她躺在楼梯底部，痛得呜咽着。

senses.definition: vi.跳，反弹,急促地动,拒付，退票
senses.sentence: It was good to **bounce** ideas off another mind.
senses.translation: 与别人谈谈自己的想法是有益的。

senses.definition: vi.跳，弹跳,限制,接壤
senses.sentence: They are **bound** to take time to readjust after a holiday.
senses.translation: 他们肯定需要时间重新适应假期结束后的生活。

senses.definition: n.分界线,范围,（球场）边线
senses.sentence: Just before the town **boundary** fork left onto a minor road.
senses.translation: 快到城镇边界时要走岔路的左边一条小路。

senses.definition: n.弓,鞠躬,船头,艏
senses.sentence: We should not have to **bow** down to anyone.
senses.translation: 我们不必向任何人示弱。

senses.definition: n.肠,内部,同情心，怜悯心
senses.sentence: The boy was suffering from a **bowel** obstruction and he died.
senses.translation: 这个男孩因患肠梗阻死去了。

senses.definition: n.碗,一碗东西,碗状物,[体]木球
senses.sentence: Everyone wanted to **bowl**, hence everyone wanted to open a **bowling** alley.
senses.translation: 大家都想玩保龄球，因此大家都想开保龄球馆。

senses.definition: n.保龄球运动,滚木球戏
senses.sentence: I can't see the point of **bowling** a ball like that.
senses.translation: 我看不出那样投球用意何在。

senses.definition: n.盒,箱状物,包厢,哨房
senses.sentence: The film opened to healthy **box** office receipts before rapidly falling off.
senses.translation: 这部影片的票房收入开始的时候持续上涨，但是后来急剧下降。

senses.definition: n.男孩，少年,儿子,小伙子，家伙,服务员
senses.sentence: As a **boy** he was a Manchester United fan.
senses.translation: 小时候，他是曼联队的球迷。

senses.definition: vt.联合抵制,抵制（货物等）,拒绝参加
senses.sentence: Rosie **Boycott** was not involved editorially with Virago.
senses.translation: 罗西·博伊科特不属于维拉戈出版公司的编辑队伍。

senses.definition: vt.支撑,系紧,准备，预备,振作起来
senses.sentence: You had better **brace** yourself for some bad news.
senses.translation: 有些坏消息,你最好做好准备.

senses.definition: n.支架，悬臂,括弧,类别，等级,[数]同类项
senses.sentence: He picked the telephone off the wall **bracket**.
senses.translation: 他从墙上的固定托架上摘下电话。

senses.definition: n.脑,智慧,聪明的人,（群体中）最聪明的人
senses.sentence: Hallucination is common in patients who have suffered damage to the **brain**.
senses.translation: 脑部受损的病人常会产生幻觉。

senses.definition: n.制动器，闸,刹车,阻碍
senses.sentence: More than 3,000 cars were recalled yesterday because of a **brake** problem.
senses.translation: 3,000多辆汽车因为刹车问题昨天被召回。

senses.definition: n.树枝,分支,部门，分科,支流
senses.sentence: A thrush alighted on a **branch** of the pine tree.
senses.translation: 一只鸫落在松树的树枝上。

senses.definition: n.[商]商标，牌子,烙印,〈比喻〉污名，耻辱,燃烧着的木头
senses.sentence: The Sunday Times remains the **brand** leader by a huge margin.
senses.translation: 《星期日泰晤士报》仍以巨大的优势稳居报业龙头的地位。

senses.definition: n.黄铜,铜管乐器,钱,黄铜饰品（尤指马挽具上的黄铜圆片）
senses.sentence: Copper, **brass** and aluminium are separated and remelted for reuse.
senses.translation: 铜、黄铜和铝被分门别类重新熔化以进行再利用。

senses.definition: adj.勇敢的,需要勇气的,华丽的,漂亮的
senses.sentence: Greg lost his **brave** battle against cancer two years ago.
senses.translation: 格雷格在与癌症进行了勇敢的斗争之后于两年前去世。

senses.definition: n.勇敢，勇气,辉煌，华丽,刚毅
senses.sentence: They had faced one difficulty after another with **bravery** and dedication.
senses.translation: 他们以无畏和无私奉献的精神迎接了一个又一个的困难。

senses.definition: n.破坏,破裂,缺口,违背
senses.sentence: They have a case against their directors for **breach** of fiduciary duty.
senses.translation: 他们掌握了足够的证据控告董事违犯信托责任。

senses.definition: n.面包,食物,营养，营养物,生计
senses.sentence: Try to eat at least four slices of **bread** a day.
senses.translation: 每天尽量至少吃4片面包。

senses.definition: vt.（使）破,打破（纪录）,（常指好天气）突变,开始
senses.sentence: I feel as if I should **break** into song.
senses.translation: 我觉得自己应该放声歌唱。

senses.definition: n.崩溃，倒塌,损坏，故障,分解,垮，衰竭
senses.sentence: She is not herself. She came near to a **breakdown**.
senses.translation: 她身体不舒服，简直要崩溃了。

senses.definition: n.早餐，早饭,早餐食物
senses.sentence: At **breakfast** next morning my two grandsons were clamouring to go swimming.
senses.translation: 第二天早饭时，我那两个孙子嚷嚷着要去游泳。

senses.definition: n.乳房，乳腺,胸脯，胸部,心窝，胸怀
senses.sentence: The **breast** can be cut into portions for grilling.
senses.translation: 胸脯肉可以切成小块烧烤。

senses.definition: n.呼吸,一口气,呼吸力,微量
senses.sentence: I held my **breath** and sank under the water.
senses.translation: 我屏住呼吸沉入水底。

senses.definition: vi.呼吸,活着，生存,小憩一会儿，歇歇气,散发香气
senses.sentence: Hold your breath for a count of five, then slowly **breathe** out.
senses.translation: 屏住气息数五下，然后慢慢地呼气。

senses.definition: vt.产（后代），生,产生，导致,优生交配,养育，训练
senses.sentence: If they are unemployed it's bound to **breed** resentment.
senses.translation: 如果他们失去工作，一定会产生怨恨。

senses.definition: n.微风,轻而易举的事
senses.sentence: The tops of the trees rippled in the **breeze**.
senses.translation: 树冠在微风中婆娑摇曳。

senses.definition: n.贿赂,诱惑物
senses.sentence: I didn't have to **bribe** anyone; it was all open and aboveboard.
senses.translation: 我没有必要贿赂任何人, 这完全是光明正大的.

senses.definition: n.砖，砖块,砖块状物体,一砖的厚度,〈口〉大好人
senses.sentence: On South Main Street, a huge **brick** building looms into view.
senses.translation: 在南大街上，一座巨大的砖砌建筑赫然出现在人们的视线中。

senses.definition: n.桥,桥牌,鼻梁,起联系作用的东西
senses.sentence: Ahead, he saw the side railings of First **Bridge** over Crooked Brook.
senses.translation: 他看见了克鲁克德河上第一大桥的桥栏就在前面。

senses.definition: adj.短暂的,（衣着）短的,简洁的,简明的
senses.sentence: Now please be **brief** — my time is valuable.
senses.translation: 请长话短说——我的时间宝贵。

senses.definition: n.公文包,手提包,公事包,手提箱
senses.sentence: I should not leave my **briefcase** and camera bag unguarded.
senses.translation: 我不该把我的公文包和相机包留在那儿无人看管。

senses.definition: adj.明亮的，鲜亮的,聪明的,辉煌的,活泼的，机灵的，乖巧的
senses.sentence: Ford had the **bright** idea of paying workers enough to buy cars.
senses.translation: 福特公司想出了付给工人足够的薪水去购买汽车这一绝妙的主意。

senses.definition: adj.明亮的,<非正式>美好的,闪耀的,才华横溢的
senses.sentence: Jackie was running around with all these **brilliant** people.
senses.translation: 杰姬混迹于这些才华横溢的人之间。

senses.definition: vt.带来，引来,促使，引起,提供,导致
senses.sentence: They were anxious to **bring** the washing in before it rained.
senses.translation: 他们急于在下雨前把洗好的衣服收进屋子。

senses.definition: adj.快的,轻快的,爽快而清新的,兴隆的
senses.sentence: He felt strangely exhilarated by the **brisk**, blue morning.
senses.translation: 那个凉爽而晴朗的早晨让他异常兴奋。

senses.definition: adj.易碎的,难以相处的，尖刻暴躁的,冷淡的,声音尖利的
senses.sentence: This may help to undermine the **brittle** truce that currently exists.
senses.translation: 这也许会火上浇油，破坏当前脆弱不稳的休战局面。

senses.definition: adj.宽阔的,广泛的,概括的,明显的
senses.sentence: The hills rise green and sheer above the **broad** river.
senses.translation: 这些小山碧绿陡峭，矗立在这条宽阔的河流之上。

senses.definition: vt.广播,播放,使广为人知,尤指用手播（种）
senses.sentence: The BBC Radio 2 Roadshow will **broadcast** live from the exhibition.
senses.translation: 英国广播电台第二频道的路演将会进行现场直播。

senses.definition: n.广播,电台、电视节目,播放时间,播种
senses.sentence: **Broadcast** news was accurate and reliable but deadly dull.
senses.translation: 新闻广播准确可靠但却非常枯燥。

senses.definition: n.小册子，手册
senses.sentence: Every member will receive their own "Welcome to Labour" **brochure**.
senses.translation: 每个党员都将收到一本名为《欢迎加入工党》的小册子。

senses.definition: n.青铜,青铜色,铜牌,青铜艺术品
senses.sentence: On the mantelpiece are a pair of **bronze** Ming vases.
senses.translation: 壁炉台上是一对明代的青铜花瓶。

senses.definition: n.小溪
senses.sentence: In our room we could hear the murmur of a distant **brook**.
senses.translation: 在我们房间能听到远处小溪汩汩的流水声.

senses.definition: n.扫帚,金雀花,[无线]自动搜索干扰振荡器
senses.sentence: She is sweeping with a **broom**.
senses.translation: 她在用扫帚扫地.

senses.definition: n.兄弟,同事，同胞,同志
senses.sentence: He shouted at his **brother**, his neck veins bulging.
senses.translation: 他朝他的兄弟吼叫，脖子上青筋暴突。

senses.definition: adj.棕色的,褐色的,被晒黑的,未去壳的
senses.sentence: Ms **Brown** is still no shoo-in for the November election.
senses.translation: 布朗夫人在11月的选举中仍然没有十足的胜算。

senses.definition: n.浏览,吃草,放牧
senses.sentence: Slow music encourages supermarket-shoppers to **browse** longer but spend more.
senses.translation: 舒缓的音乐会促使超市购物者花更长的时间浏览商品的同时花更多的钱。

senses.definition: n.刷子，画笔,灌木丛,小冲突
senses.sentence: When it's dry, **brush** the hair using a soft, nylon baby **brush**.
senses.translation: 当头发干后，用柔软的婴儿用尼龙发刷梳理头发。

senses.definition: adj.野蛮的,残忍的,不讲理的,无情的
senses.sentence: The dip in prices this summer will be **brutal**.
senses.translation: 今年夏天价格的大幅下跌将会很残酷。

senses.definition: n.泡，水泡,冒泡，起泡,泡影，妄想,（欲表达的）一点感情
senses.sentence: As she spoke she felt a **bubble** of optimism rising inside her.
senses.translation: 当她讲话时，她感到内心的乐观情绪越来越高涨。

senses.definition: v.用桶装，用桶运,倾盆而下,〈美俚〉骗,猛开车，猛划船
senses.sentence: As soon as we were inside, the rain began to **bucket** down.
senses.translation: 我们刚进屋，大雨便倾盆而下。

senses.definition: n.芽，萌芽,蓓蕾，骨朵,未成熟的人，少男少女,〈美〉刚进社交界的姑娘
senses.sentence: **Bud** turned the truck around, and started back for Dalton Pond.
senses.translation: 巴德把卡车掉头，开始返回多尔顿池。

senses.definition: n.预算,预算案,预算拨款,一束
senses.sentence: The **Budget** does expose the lies ministers were telling a year ago.
senses.translation: 预算案无疑揭穿了部长们一年前所说的谎话。

senses.definition: n.自助餐,火车饮食柜台,车站快餐部
senses.sentence: At lunchtime, there's a choice between the **buffet** or the set menu.
senses.translation: 午餐可以吃自助餐，也可以选套餐。

senses.definition: n.昆虫,陷，瑕疵,细菌，病菌,窃听器
senses.sentence: He heard that they were planning to **bug** his office.
senses.translation: 他得知他们打算在他办公室安装窃听器。

senses.definition: n.建筑物,楼房,房屋,建筑（艺术或行业）
senses.sentence: Sloping walls on the bulk of the **building** create an optical illusion.
senses.translation: 大楼主体的斜墙给人造成一种视错觉。

senses.definition: n.球茎，块茎植物,电灯泡,[解剖学]肿块
senses.sentence: A 40 watt **bulb** would be quite sufficient and would not obtrude.
senses.translation: 40瓦的灯泡完全够亮了，并且不会晃眼。

senses.definition: n.（大）体积,大块，大量,大多数，大部分,主体
senses.sentence: Sloping walls on the **bulk** of the building create an optical illusion.
senses.translation: 大楼主体的斜墙给人造成一种视错觉。

senses.definition: n.公牛,股市看涨的人,力大如牛的人,大型雄性动物
senses.sentence: The origins of **bull**-riding, which serves no practical purpose, are murkier.
senses.translation: 骑牛赛没有实际意义，其起源比较令人费解。

senses.definition: n.子弹，弹药,弹丸,[印]着重号
senses.sentence: Everywhere building facades are pitted with shell and **bullet** holes.
senses.translation: 任一处的建筑物正面都布满了弹洞。

senses.definition: n.公告，公报,新闻快报,小报,期刊
senses.sentence: We'll be going live to Nottingham later in this **bulletin**.
senses.translation: 在本次新闻快报中,我们稍后将有来自诺丁汉的现场报道.

senses.definition: n.仗势欺人者，横行霸道者,暴徒,打手,情人
senses.sentence: The aggression of a **bully** leaves people feeling hurt, angry and impotent.
senses.translation: 暴徒的侵犯令人们感到痛心、愤怒却又无能为力。

senses.definition: adv.突然地，猛烈地,扑通一声
senses.sentence: The child took five steps, and then sat down with a **bump**.
senses.translation: 小孩走了5步，接着扑通一声坐到了地上。

senses.definition: n.束，串，捆,一串，一群,一帮，一伙,[非正式用语]大量
senses.sentence: We don't want to look like a **bunch** of cowboys.
senses.translation: 我们不想看上去像一帮奸商。

senses.definition: n.捆,一批（同类事物或出售的货品）,一大笔钱,风趣的人
senses.sentence: You can have it, but it'll cost you a **bundle**.
senses.translation: 你可以买下它，不过你要花一大笔钱。

senses.definition: n.负担，包袱,责任，义务,载货量,（诗歌，发言等的）重点
senses.sentence: A vastly disproportionate **burden** falls on women for child care.
senses.translation: 照料孩子的重担落在了女性身上。

senses.definition: n.局,（提供某方面信息的）办事处,（美国政府部门）局,（附抽屉及活动写字台的）书桌
senses.sentence: FBI demands its employees absolute allegiance to this **bureau**.
senses.translation: 联邦调查局要求其雇员对该局绝对忠诚.

senses.definition: n.官僚主义,官僚机构,官僚政治
senses.sentence: People usually complain about having to deal with too much **bureaucracy**.
senses.translation: 人们经常抱怨不得不应付太多的繁文缛节。

senses.definition: n.窃贼,破门盗窃者,夜盗
senses.sentence: I might today hesitate to turn in a **burglar**.
senses.translation: 现在让我把入室窃贼送交警方，我可能会有所顾虑。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.&link-v.（使）燃烧
senses.sentence: The power stations **burn** coal from the Ruhr region.
senses.translation: 发电站烧的煤产自鲁尔地区。

senses.definition: vi.爆裂，炸破,使爆炸,充满，塞满,爆发
senses.sentence: A brilliant shaft of sunlight **burst** through the doorway.
senses.translation: 一束耀眼的阳光从门口照射进来。

senses.definition: vt.埋葬，葬,为…举行葬礼,隐藏，埋藏，遮盖，掩蔽,专心致志于，埋头于，沉溺于
senses.sentence: His reaction was to withdraw, to **bury** himself in work.
senses.translation: 他的反应是抽身而退，埋头于工作。

senses.definition: n.公共汽车，巴士，客机,（口）汽车，机器脚踏车，飞机,[计]（电脑的）总线,[电]信息转移通路，悔流条，母线
senses.sentence: I saw Louise walking slowly to the **bus** stop.
senses.translation: 我看见路易丝慢慢地走向公共汽车站。

senses.definition: n.灌木（丛）,[机械学]（金属）衬套,[电学]（绝缘）套管,类似灌木的东西（尤指浓密的毛发或皮毛）
senses.sentence: He raced ahead up into the **bush**, barking and snarling.
senses.translation: 它嗥叫着冲向前，一头钻进了灌木丛。

senses.definition: n.商业，交易,生意,事务，业务,职业，行业
senses.sentence: Very likely he'd told them he had American **business** interests.
senses.translation: 很可能他已经告诉他们自己拥有美国商业利益.

senses.definition: adj.忙碌的,占线,繁华的,爱管闲事的
senses.sentence: There has been a **busy** start to polling in today's local elections.
senses.translation: 今天地方选举的投票一开始就人头攒动。

senses.definition: conj.但是,而是,除了,只因为
senses.sentence: A miracle is something that seems impossible **but** happens anyway.
senses.translation: 奇迹就是看似不可能，却发生了。

senses.definition: n.屠夫，屠户,屠杀者，刽子手,残酷的人,肉铺
senses.sentence: Ask the **butcher** for soup bones (marrow bones are best).
senses.translation: 跟肉铺老板要煲汤用的骨头（最好是髓骨）。

senses.definition: n.黄油,黄油状的食品,奉承话,焊膏
senses.sentence: Blend the **butter** with the sugar and beat until light and creamy.
senses.translation: 把糖掺入黄油然后搅拌至滑软细腻。

senses.definition: n.蝴蝶,蝶泳,轻浮的人,游手好闲的人
senses.sentence: It is a very pretty **butterfly**, with a 2 inch wing span.
senses.translation: 这是一只非常美丽的蝴蝶，翼展2英寸。

senses.definition: n.按钮，电钮,纽扣，扣子,扣状物,[植]芽
senses.sentence: Information is called up at the push of a **button**.
senses.translation: 按一个键信息就会被调出来。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.购买，购得
senses.sentence: I might **buy** one for a friend's birthday as a giggle.
senses.translation: 我可能会买一件送给朋友当生日礼物，逗他开心。

senses.definition: n.嗡嗡声,电话,乱哄哄的说话声,醉酒
senses.sentence: We'll give him a **buzz** when we get to Maybury Street.
senses.translation: 我们到了梅贝里街的时候会给他打电话.

senses.definition: prep.在…旁边,表示方式,由于,经过
senses.sentence: He was hand-picked for this job **by** the Admiral.
senses.translation: 他是由海军上将精心挑选出来担任这项工作的。

senses.definition: n.旁道，支路,迂回管道,[电]分路迂徊,[医]导管
senses.sentence: A growing number of employers are trying to **bypass** the unions altogether.
senses.translation: 越来越多的雇主试图完全绕过工会行事。

senses.definition: n.旁道,间道,偏僻小路,（研究、学问等的）次要（或冷僻）的领域
senses.sentence: Now the king watched every road and **byway** in search of new wealth.
senses.translation: 贪婪的国王守候着每一条大路和小径,寻找新的财富.

senses.definition: n.出租车,（公共汽车、火车等的）司机室,驾驶室,出租马车
senses.sentence: The **cab** pulled up and the driver jumped out.
senses.translation: 出租车减速停下，司机跳了出来。

senses.definition: n.<美>小木屋,客舱,（轮船上工作或生活的）隔间
senses.sentence: He paid for and was assigned a **cabin** in first class.
senses.translation: 他付完钱后被安排到了头等舱。

senses.definition: n.内阁,柜橱,（有特殊用途的）小房间,展览艺术品的小陈列室
senses.sentence: The announcement came after a three-hour **Cabinet** meeting in Downing Street.
senses.translation: 在唐宁街进行了长达3个小时的内阁会议后发布了这份公告。

senses.definition: n.缆绳，绳索,[电学]电缆,（系船用的）缆绳,（船只、桥梁等上的）巨缆
senses.sentence: Steel **cable** will be used to replace worn ropes.
senses.translation: 将用钢缆替换磨损的绳索。

senses.definition: n.咖啡馆，小餐厅
senses.sentence: They stopped at a little **cafe** and had a fondue.
senses.translation: 他们在一家小餐馆歇脚，吃了顿干酪火锅。

senses.definition: n.食堂,自助餐厅
senses.sentence: People are sprawled on makeshift beds in the **cafeteria**.
senses.translation: 人们懒散地躺在食堂里搭起的临时床铺上。

senses.definition: n.笼子,牢房,升降车,[棒]练球场
senses.sentence: **Cage** changed his name to deflect accusations of nepotism.
senses.translation: 凯奇改了名字以避免别人指责他搞裙带关系。

senses.definition: n.蛋糕,糕饼,块状物,沉积物
senses.sentence: I would like my wedding **cake** decorated with cupids.
senses.translation: 我想在我的结婚蛋糕上装饰一些丘比特的造型。

senses.definition: n.<化>钙
senses.sentence: Be sure you get your daily quota of **calcium**.
senses.translation: 要确保每天的钙摄入量。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.计算,估计,打算，计划,旨在
senses.sentence: Use the formula to **calculate** the volume of the container.
senses.translation: 用公式计算容器的容积。

senses.definition: n.日历,历法,日程表,（一年之中的）重大事件（或重要日期）一览表
senses.sentence: It is one of the British sporting **calendar**'s most prestigious events.
senses.translation: 这是英国体坛大事表上最负盛名的赛事之一。

senses.definition: v.呼唤，喊叫,召唤，叫来，召集,下令，命令,打电话给
senses.sentence: Melanie promised that she would **call** them in the morning.
senses.translation: 梅拉妮许诺第二天上午给他们打电话。

senses.definition: adj.镇定的,平静的,（海洋，天气等）安静的，平静的,（人）从容不迫的
senses.sentence: She sighed, then continued in a soft, **calm** voice.
senses.translation: 她叹了口气，然后继续用温柔、平静的声音说下去。

senses.definition: n.大卡,千卡（食物所产生的能量单位）,卡路里,卡（热量单位）
senses.sentence: Nutritionists say only 33% of our **calorie** intake should be from fat.
senses.translation: 营养学家说我们所摄入的卡路里中只应有33％来自脂肪。

senses.definition: n.骆驼
senses.sentence: The **camel**'s feet, well adapted for dry sand, are useless on mud.
senses.translation: 骆驼的蹄子虽然非常适合于在干沙上行走，碰到泥泞时却无计可施。

senses.definition: n.照相机,摄影机
senses.sentence: The **camera** combines rugged reliability with unequalled optical performance and speed.
senses.translation: 这款相机既坚固耐用，又有超凡的光学性能和快门速度。

senses.definition: n.营地，工地宿舍,阵营（指观点相同且与持不同观点者对立的集团）,兵营,（度假者、旅游者，尤指青少年的）野营地
senses.sentence: The rebels attempted a surprise raid on a military **camp**.
senses.translation: 叛军试图突袭一处军营。

senses.definition: n.运动,竞选运动,战役,季节性竞赛
senses.sentence: It condemned in extremely strong language what it called Britain's iniquitous **campaign**.
senses.translation: 它言辞激烈地谴责了这场它所谓的英国极不公正的竞选活动。

senses.definition: n.校园,校区
senses.sentence: From what I hear, half the **campus** is lusting after her.
senses.translation: 从我听到的来看，半个学校的人都想和她上床。

senses.definition: aux.能,能够,可以,可能
senses.sentence: You **can** improve your chances of profit by sensible planning.
senses.translation: 你可以通过合理计划来提高盈利的机会。

senses.definition: adj.加拿大人的,加拿大的,加拿大语言的,加拿大文化的
senses.sentence: **Canadian** libel law is based on English common law.
senses.translation: 加拿大的诽谤法是以英国的习惯法为基础的。

senses.definition: n.运河，沟渠,管道,气管,食道
senses.sentence: Hearing can be affected by ear wax blocking the ear **canal**.
senses.translation: 耳垢堵塞耳道可能会影响听力。

senses.definition: vt.取消，注销,抵消，偿还,〈数〉约去
senses.sentence: He wonders if the different influences might not **cancel** each other out.
senses.translation: 他在想，各种影响能不能相互抵消。

senses.definition: n.癌症，恶性肿瘤,弊病，社会恶习,迅速蔓延的恶劣的或危险的事物,[天]巨蟹座，巨蟹宫
senses.sentence: She spent a period of time working with people dying of **cancer**.
senses.translation: 她有一段时间曾帮助垂危的癌症患者。

senses.definition: n.报考者,申请求职者,攻读学位者,最后命运或结局如何已显然可见者
senses.sentence: The Democratic **candidate** is still leading in the polls.
senses.translation: 民主党候选人的得票数依然领先。

senses.definition: n.蜡烛,烛光,蜡烛状物
senses.sentence: Under the pretence of lighting a **candle**, she evades him and disappears.
senses.translation: 她假装点蜡烛，避开他消失了。

senses.definition: n.糖果,冰糖,〈美俚〉古柯碱，可卡因,巧克力
senses.sentence: Back then, women on TV were mostly seen as eye **candy**.
senses.translation: 那时候，电视中的女性大多都被看作花瓶。

senses.definition: n.大炮,机关炮,榴弹炮,加农炮
senses.sentence: The stillness of night was broken by the boom of a **cannon**.
senses.translation: 夜晚的寂静被隆隆的炮声打破。

senses.definition: n.独木舟，轻舟
senses.sentence: Let's fingerprint the **canoe**, see if we come up with anything.
senses.translation: 让我们提取一下独木舟上的指纹，看看能不能有什么发现。

senses.definition: n.小卖部,食堂，小饭馆,水罐,餐具盒，炊具箱
senses.sentence: Rennie had eaten his tea in the **canteen**.
senses.translation: 伦尼已经在餐厅吃过茶点了。

senses.definition: n.帆布,油画（布）
senses.sentence: She sat down cautiously on the red **canvas** cushions, knees modestly together.
senses.translation: 她小心翼翼地在红帆布垫上坐下，膝盖矜持地并拢着。

senses.definition: n.盖,帽子,军帽,求交运算
senses.sentence: He wears a **cap** to cover a spot of baldness.
senses.translation: 他戴帽以遮斑秃。

senses.definition: adj.能干的,有才能的,有才华的,能胜任的
senses.sentence: I believe I am **capable** of calculating the political consequences accurately.
senses.translation: 我觉得我能准确预料此事的政治后果。

senses.definition: n.容量,才能,性能,生产能力
senses.sentence: Grease 6 ramekin dishes of 150 ml (5-6 fl oz) **capacity**.
senses.translation: 将6个容量为150毫升（5至6液盎司）的烤盘涂上油。

senses.definition: n.斗篷, 披肩,海角,岬
senses.sentence: A Delta II rocket was launched from **Cape** Canaveral early this morning.
senses.translation: 今天一早，一枚“德尔塔”Ⅱ型火箭在卡纳维拉尔角发射升空。

senses.definition: n.首都,资本,资源,大写字母
senses.sentence: The President's unescorted vehicle was ambushed just outside the **capital**.
senses.translation: 刚出首都，总统无人护卫的汽车就遭到了伏击。

senses.definition: n.资本主义（制度）,资本（或财富）的拥有,资本（私人占有和生产盈利）的支配地位
senses.sentence: His article is, predictably, a scathing attack on **capitalism**.
senses.translation: 可想而知，他的文章是对资本主义的严厉抨击。

senses.definition: n.胶囊,航天舱,（植物的）荚,小容器
senses.sentence: The police say he swallowed a cyanide **capsule** to avoid arrest.
senses.translation: 警察说他为了逃避逮捕就吞了一颗氰化物胶囊。

senses.definition: n.船长，机长,领袖，首领,上尉,（美国警察局的）副巡长
senses.sentence: "Ah, **Captain** Fox," Martin McGuinness said affably. "Nice to see you again."
senses.translation: “啊，福克斯上尉，”马丁·麦吉尼斯亲切地说，“很高兴再次见到您。”

senses.definition: adj.被俘的,被监禁的,被关押的,无法逃离的
senses.sentence: Children come to zoos precisely to see **captive** animals.
senses.translation: 孩子们到动物园就是为了看圈养的动物。

senses.definition: vt.俘获,夺取,夺得,引起（注意、想像、兴趣）
senses.sentence: The photographers managed to **capture** Jane in an unguarded moment.
senses.translation: 摄影师抓拍到了简不经意的瞬间。

senses.definition: n.汽车,车厢,轿车
senses.sentence: He slewed the **car** against the side of the building.
senses.translation: 他的车滑到了大楼的一侧，抵住了。

senses.definition: n.碳水化合物，糖类,淀粉质或糖类食物
senses.sentence: Athletes usually eat a high **carbohydrate** diet.
senses.translation: 运动员通常吃高碳水化合物食物.

senses.definition: n.[化学]碳,（一张）复写纸,[电]碳精棒[片，粉]，碳精电极,复写的副本
senses.sentence: The two principal combustion products are water vapor and **carbon** dioxide.
senses.translation: 两种主要的燃烧产物是水蒸气和二氧化碳。

senses.definition: n.卡片,纸牌,明信片,信用卡
senses.sentence: Send your details on a **card** to the following address.
senses.translation: 在明信片上写明你的近况寄到下面的地址。

senses.definition: n.基数,红衣主教,大红色，深红色,女式斗篷
senses.sentence: They were encouraged by a promise from **Cardinal** Winning.
senses.translation: 红衣主教温宁的许诺使他们受到鼓舞。

senses.definition: v.关心,担心,照顾,喜爱
senses.sentence: She denied the murder of four children who were in her **care**.
senses.translation: 她否认杀害了她所照管的4个孩子。

senses.definition: n.生涯,职业,事业,速度，全速
senses.sentence: Somehow Karin managed to cope with the demands of her **career**.
senses.translation: 卡琳设法达到了其职业的要求。

senses.definition: adj.无忧无虑的，快乐舒畅的,逍遥自在,宽畅,闲逸
senses.contextMeaning: 无忧无虑的，快乐舒畅的
senses.sentence: She had made their childhood so joyous and **carefree**.
senses.translation: 她使他们的童年充满欢乐，无忧无虑。

senses.definition: adj.仔细的，小心的,周到的,慎,心细
senses.sentence: You have to be **careful** what you say on telly.
senses.translation: 在电视上说话时你必须很谨慎。

senses.definition: n.（船或飞机装载的）货物,负荷，荷重
senses.sentence: Fire may have breached the **cargo** tanks and set the oil ablaze.
senses.translation: 大火当时有可能把货船上的油罐烧漏了，从而引燃原油。

senses.definition: n.木工，木匠
senses.sentence: They are sleeping in the **carpenter**'s shop directly above.
senses.translation: 他们正在正上方的木匠铺子里睡觉。

senses.definition: n.地毯，桌毯,毛毯，绒毯,地毯状覆盖物,（装在飞机上的）雷达电子干扰仪
senses.sentence: While the water was heating she decided to shake out the **carpet**.
senses.translation: 趁着烧水的时候，她决定将地毯抖抖干净。

senses.definition: n.搬运人,运输公司,搬运器,[医学]带菌者
senses.sentence: He had returned to England in an aircraft **carrier** no less.
senses.translation: 他竟然坐航空母舰回的英格兰。

senses.definition: n.胡萝卜,〈非正式〉好处，回报,不能兑现的报酬
senses.sentence: The government is proclaiming a **carrot**-and-stick approach to the problem.
senses.translation: 对于这个问题，政府宣布要采取软硬两手应对。

senses.definition: vt.支撑,携带,输送,运载
senses.sentence: The indisputable fact is that computers **carry** out logical operations.
senses.translation: 不容置疑的事实是，电脑执行逻辑操作指令。

senses.definition: n.运货马车，手推车,一车之量
senses.sentence: Where we use tractors, obviously they used **cart**-horses in those days.
senses.translation: 显然，我们如今用拖拉机的地方，他们以前用的是役马。

senses.definition: n.漫画,讽刺画,动画片,草图
senses.sentence: a Walt Disney **cartoon**
senses.translation: 迪斯尼动画片

senses.definition: vi.切，切开,雕刻,创制，开创
senses.sentence: He wanted to go into the street and **carve** someone's face up.
senses.translation: 他想上街去把别人的脸刮花。

senses.definition: n.（实）例，事例,情况，状况,诉讼（事件），案件，判例,容器（箱，盒）
senses.sentence: The Government is anxious to keep the whole **case** out of court.
senses.translation: 政府迫切希望整件事能够在庭外解决。

senses.definition: n.现金,支付金额
senses.sentence: This, after all, is a company which is awash with **cash**.
senses.translation: 这毕竟是一家现金充裕的公司。

senses.definition: n.出纳员
senses.sentence: One brother is a **cashier** and the other sells.
senses.translation: 两个兄弟一位当出纳,另一位当店员.

senses.definition: n.盒式录音带,摄影胶卷暗匣，弹夹,珠宝箱，宝匣
senses.sentence: I dis-covered a mutilated **cassette** stuffed in a waste-basket.
senses.translation: 我发现一盘被弄坏的盒式磁带丢在废纸篓里。

senses.definition: vt.铸造,投掷,投射,脱落，脱皮
senses.sentence: Burke **cast** a cursory glance at the menu, then flapped it shut.
senses.translation: 伯克匆匆地瞥了一眼菜单，然后啪地合上了。

senses.definition: n.城堡，堡垒,象棋中的车
senses.sentence: The island is surmounted by a huge black **castle**.
senses.translation: 岛的最高处耸立着一座巨大的黑色城堡。

senses.definition: adj.偶然的,临时的,随便的,非正式的
senses.sentence: Lust now seems to be associated with **casual** sex and loose morals.
senses.translation: 色欲如今似乎与性生活随便和道德放纵联系在一起了。

senses.definition: n.伤亡（人数）,事故，横祸,受害者，死伤者,损坏
n.目录，目录册，目录簿,[美]大学概况一览,登记，记载,产品样本
senses.sentence: The Americans cut back the word " **catalogue** " and it became " **catalog** " .
senses.translation: 美国人把catalogue这个词加以缩短,成了 catalog.

senses.definition: n.目录，一览表,（美）大学情况便览,展览目录,产品样本
senses.sentence: Their full **catalogue** costs $5, redeemable against a first order.
senses.translation: 他们的完整目录售价5美元，第一次订购时可返还这5美元。

senses.definition: n.大灾难,惨败,悲剧的结局,地表突然而猛烈的变动，灾变
senses.sentence: They suffered an electoral **catastrophe**, winning a paltry 3 seats.
senses.translation: 他们在选举中惨败，仅获得微不足道的3个席位。

senses.definition: vt.赶上,接住,引起,看见
senses.sentence: He missed the **catch** and the match was lost.
senses.translation: 他没有接住球，比赛输了。

senses.definition: n.类型，部门，种类，类别，类目,[逻，哲]范畴,体重等级
senses.contextMeaning: 类型，部门，种类，类别，类目
senses.sentence: The judges could not decide which **category** it belonged in.
senses.translation: 评委们无法判定它属于哪一类。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.提供饮食及服务
senses.sentence: They maintain a database of hotels that **cater** for businesswomen.
senses.translation: 他们维护着一个服务于商界女性的酒店资料库。

senses.definition: n.总教堂，大教堂
senses.sentence: The **cathedral** was destroyed by the Great Fire of 1136 AD.
senses.translation: 大教堂在公元1136年的大火中被付之一炬。

senses.definition: n.（总称）牛，牲口,畜生,无价值的人,〈美俚〉女学生
senses.sentence: The old stone **cattle** trough still sits by the main entrance.
senses.translation: 陈旧的石制牛食槽仍然放在大门口。

senses.definition: vt.成为…的原因,导致,引起,使遭受
senses.sentence: Investment could dry up and that could **cause** the economy to falter.
senses.translation: 投资可能会中断，而这会引起经济衰退。

senses.definition: n.小心,警告,〈英〉担保,〈口〉须警惕的事或人
senses.sentence: There was a note of **caution** for the Treasury in the figures.
senses.translation: 统计数字向财政部亮出了警告。

senses.definition: vt.警告,提醒
senses.sentence: Television broadcasters were warned to exercise **caution** over depicting scenes of violence.
senses.translation: 电视台受到警告，要求对暴力场面的描绘采取谨慎态度。

senses.definition: adj.小心的，谨慎的,兢,恮,持重
senses.sentence: Australia, put in to bat, made a **cautious** start.
senses.translation: 轮到澳大利亚队出场击球，他们开始打得很谨慎。

senses.definition: n.洞穴,〈方〉地窖
senses.sentence: Most of the mouth of the **cave** was submerged in the lake.
senses.translation: 洞口大半都淹没在湖里。

senses.definition: vt.停止，终止，结束
senses.sentence: It hurt so badly he wished to **cease** to be.
senses.translation: 他觉得疼痛难忍，恨不得死了算了。

senses.definition: n.天花板,最高限度,云幕高度,隔板，舱室垫板
senses.sentence: Flavell had accidentally discharged a pistol, firing it into the **ceiling**.
senses.translation: 弗拉维尔不小心扳动了一把手枪的扳机，子弹射入了天花板。

senses.definition: v.庆祝,祝贺,举行宗教庆典,歌颂
senses.sentence: The banks have had precious little to **celebrate** recently.
senses.translation: 银行最近没几件值得庆贺的事。

senses.definition: n.名人，知名人士,名流,名声,名誉
senses.sentence: He was more than a footballing superstar, he was a **celebrity**.
senses.translation: 他不仅仅是足球场上的巨星，也是一位社会名流。

senses.definition: n.<生>细胞,小牢房,电池,<诗>墓穴
senses.sentence: He is cooped up in a cramped **cell** with 10 other inmates.
senses.translation: 他和其他10名犯人被囚禁在一间狭窄的牢房里。

senses.definition: n.地下室，地窖,酒窖,<英>（都市住宅的）地下煤窖,[机]油盒
senses.sentence: The period of maturation is determined by the **cellar** master.
senses.translation: 酿熟期的长短由地窖的主人决定。

senses.definition: n.水泥,胶合剂,胶接剂,粘固粉
senses.sentence: The gym teachers lined us up against the **cement** walls.
senses.translation: 体育老师让我们靠着水泥墙排好。

senses.definition: n.审查制度,审查机构,审察员的职权,[心]潜意识中的抑制力
senses.sentence: There was never an official institution of **censorship** in Albania.
senses.translation: 在阿尔巴尼亚从未设立过官方审查制度。

senses.definition: n.人口普查，统计,人口财产调查
senses.sentence: Of these, 40% told **census**-takers they were Muslims.
senses.translation: 这些人当中，有40%的人告诉人口普查员说自己是穆斯林。

senses.definition: n.分,一分钱的硬币,零钱,（作单位的）百
senses.sentence: By 1973 the government deficit equalled thirty per **cent** of GNP.
senses.translation: 到1973年，政府财政赤字相当于国民生产总值的30%。

senses.definition: n.中心,（球队的） 中锋,中心区,中枢
senses.sentence: He is currently being held in a metropolitan correctional **center**.
senses.translation: 他现在被关在一个大城市的改造中心。

senses.definition: n.摄氏
senses.sentence: The temperature in this room is twenty degrees **centigrade**.
senses.translation: 这个房间里的温度是摄氏20度.

senses.definition: n.厘米
senses.sentence: A **centimeter** can be infinitely divided into smaller units.
senses.translation: 一厘米可以无穷尽地分成更小的单位。

senses.definition: n.厘米，公分,=“centimeter”（美）
senses.sentence: The snails are no larger than one **centimetre** across.
senses.translation: 这些蜗牛体宽不超过1厘米。

senses.definition: adj.中央的，中心的,重要的，核心的
senses.sentence: What drew him to the area was its proximity to **central** London.
senses.translation: 吸引他到该地区的原因是那里靠近伦敦市中心。

senses.definition: n.中心,（市镇的）中心区,中心点,中枢
senses.sentence: Now we live further away from the city **centre**.
senses.translation: 现在我们住得离市中心更远了。

senses.definition: n.百年，一世纪,百个,（板球）一百分,<美>百元钞票
senses.sentence: The first British attempt to colonize Ireland was in the twelfth **century**.
senses.translation: 英国最早尝试在爱尔兰开拓殖民地是在12世纪。

senses.definition: n.谷类植物,谷物,粮食,荞麦食品
senses.sentence: Fibre is found in **cereal** foods, beans, fruit and vegetables.
senses.translation: 谷类食品、豆类、水果和蔬菜中含有纤维素。

senses.definition: n.典礼，仪式,礼仪，礼节,虚礼，客气
senses.sentence: At Miss Garbo's request there was a crema-tion after a private **ceremony**.
senses.translation: 应嘉宝小姐的要求，在私人悼念仪式结束后将进行火葬。

senses.definition: adj.某一,必然的,已确定的
senses.sentence: I feel **certain** that it will all turn out well.
senses.translation: 我觉得最后肯定会皆大欢喜。

senses.definition: adv.无疑,当然,确定,肯定
senses.sentence: It is **certainly** worth checking up on your benefit entitlements.
senses.translation: 查清楚你可以享受哪些福利是绝对有必要的。

senses.definition: n.确定性，确实性,确定的事，必然的事
senses.sentence: Such attitudes are valueless unless they reflect inner cognition and **certainty**.
senses.translation: 这种态度如果不能反映内心的认知和把握就毫无价值。

senses.definition: n.证明书,文凭，结业证书
senses.sentence: A senior **certificate** with matric exemption is required for entry to university.
senses.translation: 上大学需要有中学毕业的资格证书。

senses.definition: vt.（尤指书面）证明,发证书给…,证明（某人）患有精神病,颁发（或授予）专业合格证书
senses.sentence: This swimming certificate is to **certify** that I swim one hundred metres.
senses.translation: 这张游泳证证明我可以游100米.

senses.definition: n.链子，链条,连锁，连续,拘束,连锁店或旅馆系列的事物
senses.sentence: Whenever recession strikes, a **chain** reaction is set into motion.
senses.translation: 只要经济不景气，连锁反应就开始了。

senses.definition: n.椅子,大学教授职位,主持会议的主席（的席位或职位）,讲座
senses.sentence: Bob slid from his **chair** and lay prone on the floor.
senses.translation: 鲍勃从椅子上滑下来，趴在了地板上。

senses.definition: n.（主持会议的）主席,委员长,（委员会的）委员长,（公司等的）董事长
senses.sentence: Candidates are urgently sought for the post of Conservative party **chairman**.
senses.translation: 保守党主席的职位急寻候选人。

senses.definition: n.粉笔，白垩,用粉笔画的记号,〈英〉（比赛）得分纪录，记入借方的款项,〈美俚〉牛奶
senses.sentence: With a stick of **chalk** he wrote her order on a blackboard.
senses.translation: 他用一截粉笔将她的指示写在黑板上。

senses.definition: n.挑战,盘问,质疑,怀疑
senses.sentence: This **challenge** will occupy Europe for a generation or more.
senses.translation: 这将是欧洲在未来二三十年或者更长的时间里所要面临的挑战。

senses.definition: n.室，卧室，会客室,内庭,[多用于英国]律师的办公室,议事厅
senses.sentence: He thought he saw someone lurking above the **chamber** during the address.
senses.translation: 他觉得自己看见有人在演讲时潜藏在会议厅顶上。

senses.definition: n.冠军,捍卫者，拥护者,战士
senses.sentence: The heavyweight **champion** will be given a shot at Holyfield's world title.
senses.translation: 这名重量级拳击冠军将尝试挑战霍利菲尔德的世界冠军头衔。

senses.definition: n.机会，机遇,概率，可能性,偶然，运气
senses.sentence: He did not get a **chance** to deepen his knowledge of Poland.
senses.translation: 他没有机会更深入地了解波兰。

senses.definition: n.大臣,（某些美国大学的）校长,（德国或奥地利的）总理,（英国大学的）名誉校长
senses.sentence: The new **Chancellor** has the guts to push through unpopular tax increases.
senses.translation: 新总理有勇气推动不受欢迎的增税方案获得通过。

senses.definition: vt.改变，变更,交换，替换,兑换,换衣服（床单）
senses.sentence: These large institutions make — and **change**—the rules to suit themselves.
senses.translation: 这些大机构总是随意制定规定，而且说变就变。

senses.definition: n.频道，波道,渠道,途径,海峡
senses.sentence: The **Channel** Tunnel project is the biggest civil engineering project in Europe.
senses.translation: 英吉利海峡隧道是欧洲最大的土木工程。

senses.definition: n.混乱，紊乱,（天地未出现的）浑沌世界,〈古〉无底深渊,一团糟
senses.sentence: Whatever troubles arise, we'll have peace of mind amidst seeming **chaos**.
senses.translation: 无论出现什么样的麻烦，我们都会在貌似混乱的情形中保持平和的心态。

senses.definition: n.章，回,（俱乐部、协会等的）分会,人生或历史上的重要时期
senses.sentence: This point is developed further at the end of this **chapter**.
senses.translation: 这一点在本章结尾处有进一步阐释。

senses.definition: n.性格,特点,字母,角色
senses.sentence: He is the least appealing **character**, to me at any rate.
senses.translation: 他是其中最没有吸引力的角色，至少对我来说是这样。

senses.definition: vt.是…的特征,以…为特征,描述（人或物）的特性,描绘
senses.sentence: History will **characterise** all these transactions as insane.
senses.translation: 历史将判定所有这些做法是属于疯狂行为.

senses.definition: adj.特有的,独特的,表示特性的,显示…的特征的
senses.sentence: This book is suffused with Shaw's **characteristic** wry Irish humour.
senses.translation: 这本书充满了萧伯纳独特的爱尔兰式幽默与嘲讽。

senses.definition: vt.描述（人或物）的特性,具有…的特征
senses.sentence: We ordinarily **characterize** an action as responsible if it was intended.
senses.translation: 如果行为是有意的,我们一般将其特征归为应负责任的.

senses.definition: n.费用,指示,掌管,指责
senses.sentence: Customers who arrange overdrafts will face a monthly **charge** of £5.
senses.translation: 透支的客户每月要缴纳5英镑的费用。

senses.definition: n.慈善（行为）,施舍，捐助,慈善机关,仁爱，宽容
senses.sentence: Mr Dudley has pledged to give any award to **charity**.
senses.translation: 达德利先生已承诺将任何所获的损害赔偿额都捐给慈善机构。

senses.definition: n.魔力,魅力,咒文,（表链等的）小装饰品
senses.sentence: Johnson's easy **charm** contrasted sharply with the prickliness of his boss.
senses.translation: 约翰逊的亲和力和他老板易怒的性格形成了鲜明的对比。

senses.definition: n.图表,航海图,排行榜
senses.sentence: Consult the **chart** on page 44 for the correct cooking times.
senses.translation: 翻到44页的图表，查一下正确的烹饪时间。

senses.definition: n.许可证,纲领,宪章,包租
senses.sentence: This new law amounts to a tax evader's **charter**.
senses.translation: 这项新法律简直成了为逃税者开的许可证.

senses.definition: vt.追捕,追求,追寻,镂刻
senses.sentence: The **chase** is always much more exciting than the conquest anyway.
senses.translation: 不管怎么说，追求的过程总比得手更为刺激。

senses.definition: vi.聊天,闲谈,参加网络闲聊
senses.sentence: You can **chat** to other people who are online.
senses.translation: 你可以和其他在线的人聊天。

senses.definition: adj.便宜的，廉价的,劣质的，低劣的,小气的，可鄙的
senses.sentence: **Cheap** goods are available, but not in sufficient quantities to satisfy demand.
senses.translation: 有一些廉价的商品，但是数量不足以满足需求。

senses.definition: n.欺骗（行为）,骗子,雀麦,〈美俚〉反光镜
senses.sentence: He raised his right fist and declaimed: "Liar and **cheat**!"
senses.translation: 他举起右拳高喊：“骗子，骗子！”

senses.definition: vt.检查，核对,制止，抑制,在…上打勾
senses.sentence: Someone comes in every day to **check** all is in order.
senses.translation: 每天都有人来检查是否一切都井然有序。

senses.definition: n.脸颊，脸蛋,无礼而放肆的行为，厚颜,半边屁股,两侧相对的物体
senses.sentence: She knelt and brushed her lips softly across Michael's **cheek**.
senses.translation: 她跪了下来，轻吻迈克尔的脸颊。

senses.definition: vi.欢呼,感到高兴
senses.sentence: The colonel was rewarded with a resounding **cheer** from the men.
senses.translation: 士兵对上校报以震天的欢呼声。

senses.definition: n.奶酪,<俚>微笑
senses.sentence: She offered Molly tidbits: a chicken drumstick, some **cheese**.
senses.translation: 她给了莫莉一些吃的：一根鸡腿下段和一些奶酪。

senses.definition: n.厨师，大师傅
senses.sentence: Rabbit stew is one of **chef** Giancarlo Moeri's signature dishes.
senses.translation: 炖野兔是厨师詹卡洛·莫里的招牌菜之一。

senses.definition: adj.化学的,用化学方法制造的，化学作用的
senses.sentence: The **chemical** structure of this particular molecule is very unusual.
senses.translation: 这个特殊分子的化学结构很不寻常。

senses.definition: n.化学家,药剂师,药商,药房
senses.sentence: **Chemist** stores upped sales by 63 percent.
senses.translation: 药店销量增加了63％。

senses.definition: n.化学,物质的化学组成（或性质），化学作用（现象）,（常指有强烈性吸引力的）两人间的关系,〈比喻〉神秘的变化（过程）
senses.sentence: The Oxford **Chemistry** Primers aim to cover important topics in organic **chemistry**.
senses.translation: 《牛津化学初级读本》丛书旨在论述有机化学中的重要问题。

senses.definition: n.<英>支票
senses.sentence: Then I remembered the **cheque**, which cheered me up.
senses.translation: 然后我想起了那张支票，这让我精神大振。

senses.definition: vt.珍爱,怀有,爱护,抚育
senses.sentence: The president will **cherish** the memory of this visit to Ohio.
senses.translation: 总统将铭记这次俄亥俄之行。

senses.definition: n.樱桃,樱桃树,樱桃色,处女膜
senses.sentence: The **cherry** blossom came out early in Washington this year.
senses.translation: 今年华盛顿的樱花开得很早。

senses.definition: n.棋，国际象棋
senses.sentence: Great **chess** players have a reputation for being both eccentric and argumentative.
senses.translation: 国际象棋大师们以性格怪异和好与人争辩而闻名。

senses.definition: n.胸部，胸腔,箱子,金库,资金
senses.sentence: I feel it's done me good to get it off my **chest**.
senses.translation: 我感觉吐吐苦水对我有好处。

senses.definition: n.咀嚼,咀嚼物
senses.sentence: **Chew** your food well and do not rush meals.
senses.translation: 充分咀嚼食物，吃饭不要太快。

senses.definition: n.鸡,鸡肉,胆小鬼,懦夫
senses.sentence: I'm scared of the dark. I'm a big **chicken**.
senses.translation: 我怕黑，是个十足的胆小鬼。

senses.definition: adj.级别最高的,总的,主要的,最重要的
senses.sentence: In the squash court his **chief** aim is to flatten me.
senses.translation: 在壁球场上他的主要目标就是击败我。

senses.definition: n.小孩，孩子,幼稚的人,产物,弟子
senses.sentence: His house was the only settled home I had as a **child**.
senses.translation: 他的房子是我儿时唯一固定的家。

senses.definition: n.童年，儿童时代,早期
senses.sentence: His parents' obsession with keeping up appearances haunted his **childhood**.
senses.translation: 父母过于爱面子的做法在他儿时一直困扰着他。

senses.definition: adj.幼稚的,孩子气的,不复杂的
senses.sentence: We eventually ran out of patience with his **childish** behaviour.
senses.translation: 我们终于对他幼稚的行为忍无可忍.

senses.definition: adj.孩子般的,天真的
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **childlike** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【childlike】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.（使）变冷,使很冷,使冰冷,使恐惧
senses.sentence: September is here, bringing with it a **chill** in the mornings.
senses.translation: 9月到了,早晨已有了寒意.

senses.definition: n.烟囱,玻璃灯罩,烟囱状东西,壁炉
senses.sentence: A thin twist of smoke curled from the cottage's single **chimney**.
senses.translation: 一缕盘旋的轻烟从农舍唯一的烟囱里缭绕升起。

senses.definition: n.（尤指人的）颏，下巴,聊天,引体向上动作
senses.sentence: He put his hand under her **chin** in an almost paternal gesture.
senses.translation: 他以近乎父亲的姿态用手托着她的下巴。

senses.definition: n.瓷器,瓷餐具,杯、盘、碟等的总称,陶器
senses.sentence: **China** enters a new five-year plan period next year.
senses.translation: 中国明年开始进入新一个五年计划期。

senses.definition: n.中国人,华人,中文,汉语
senses.sentence: Her **Chinese** friends referred to the Empress as their venerable ancestor.
senses.translation: 她的中国朋友们说这位女皇是他们值得敬仰的祖先。

senses.definition: n.碎片,缺口,（作赌注用的）筹码,（足球）高球
senses.sentence: He used a hammer and chisel to **chip** away at the wall.
senses.translation: 他用榔头和凿子铲墙。

senses.definition: n.巧克力,巧克力糖,巧克力色
senses.sentence: When depressed, they dramatically overindulge in **chocolate** and sweets.
senses.translation: 情绪低落的时候，她们就疯狂地猛吃巧克力和糖果。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.阻止，扼止,填塞,使窒息,哽咽
senses.sentence: The brandy made him **choke**, but it restored his nerve.
senses.translation: 虽说白兰地呛了他一下，却让他恢复了勇气。

senses.definition: vt.挑选,认为…比其它更可取,决定或选定
senses.sentence: **Choose** a soft, medium or firm mattress to suit their individual needs.
senses.translation: 针对他们各人不同的需要挑选柔软、软硬适中或者坚硬的床垫。

senses.definition: v.切碎，砍,向下猛击,降低,终止
senses.sentence: Roughly **chop** the tomatoes and add them to the casserole.
senses.translation: 把西红柿大致切一切，然后放到炖锅里。

senses.definition: n.合唱,合唱队,（歌曲的）副歌,合唱歌（曲）
senses.sentence: Caroline sang two verses and the **chorus** of her song.
senses.translation: 卡罗琳唱了她歌曲中的两段和副歌部分。

senses.definition: adj.慢性的,长期的,习惯性的,痼
senses.sentence: Those who suffer from narcissism become self-absorbed or **chronic** show-offs.
senses.translation: 被自恋症折磨的人会变得只专注于自己的事情，或者不断地自我炫耀。

senses.definition: adj.教会的,礼拜的
senses.sentence: He was confirmed as a member of the **Church** of England.
senses.translation: 他领受了坚振礼，成为英国国教会的一员。

senses.definition: n.雪茄,叶卷烟
n.<美>纸烟，香烟
senses.sentence: He lit a **cigaret** in order to calm his mind.
senses.translation: 他点燃一支香烟，镇定一下情绪。

senses.definition: n.纸烟，香烟
senses.sentence: Over coffee, she lit a **cigarette**, her eyes daring him to comment.
senses.translation: 喝咖啡时，她点燃了一支烟，用挑衅的眼神看着他，谅他也不敢吭声。

senses.definition: n.电影院,电影艺术,电影业,电影
senses.sentence: Working with Ford closely, I fell in love with the **cinema**.
senses.translation: 与福特的密切合作开始令我爱上了电影。

senses.definition: n.圆,圆状物,一圈,圈子
senses.sentence: He is a cultured man with a wide **circle** of friends.
senses.translation: 他为人文雅，结交广泛。

senses.definition: n.电路，线路,巡回,唤醒，环形道,〔电〕电流
senses.sentence: There's a closed-**circuit** television camera in the reception area.
senses.translation: 接待处有一个闭路电视摄像头。

senses.definition: adj.圆形的,环行的,迂回的，绕行的,供传阅的，流通的
senses.sentence: The work interposes a glass plate between two large **circular** mirrors.
senses.translation: 该艺术品在两面圆形大镜子中间插入一块玻璃板。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.（使）循环,（使）流通,（使）流传,散布
senses.sentence: Let me get you something to drink, then I must **circulate**.
senses.translation: 我给你找点喝的，然后我得去应酬一下。

senses.definition: n.环境，境遇,事实，细节,典礼，仪式
senses.sentence: Any unexpected **circumstance** that arises may catalyze a sudden escalation of violence.
senses.translation: 任何突如其来的情况都可能造成暴力骤然升级。

senses.definition: n.马戏，马戏团,马戏表演（常在大帐篷里进行）,环形广场，（用于某些地名）圆形广场,<口>乱哄哄的热闹场面
senses.sentence: The couple married in the Caribbean to avoid a media **circus**.
senses.translation: 为了摆脱媒体的关注，这对新人在加勒比喜结连理。

senses.definition: vt.引用，引证,[法]传讯,表扬,[军事]传（或通）令嘉奖
senses.sentence: It would be an endless task to **cite** such living examples.
senses.translation: 这样的实例举不胜举.

senses.definition: n.公民,国民,市民,平民
senses.sentence: I invite every **citizen** to carefully study the document.
senses.translation: 我请每位市民都仔细研读该文件。

senses.definition: n.城市,全市居民,（由国王或女王授予特权，通常有大教堂的）特许市,（由政府授予特权的）特权市
senses.sentence: After years of neglect and decline the **city** was cleaning itself up.
senses.translation: 多年的玩忽职守和经济萧条过后，这个城市在进行自我整顿。

senses.definition: adj.公民的，市民的,文明的，有礼貌的,民用的，国民间的,[法]民事的，根据民法的
senses.sentence: The strike has taken on overtones of a **civil** rights campaign.
senses.translation: 罢工带上了民权运动的意味。

senses.definition: n.平民，百姓,市民,文官,民法学者
senses.sentence: Attempts to find **civilian** volunteers have met with embarrassing failure.
senses.translation: 寻找平民志愿者的种种尝试都遭遇了令人难堪的失败。

senses.definition: n.文明，文化
senses.sentence: We wanted to single out the main threat to **civilisation**.
senses.translation: 我们想特别指出威胁文明的主要因素。

senses.definition: vt.使文明，使开化
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **civilise** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【civilise】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.文明，文化,开化，教化,修养,文明社会
senses.sentence: I think we can date the decline of Western **Civilization** quite precisely.
senses.translation: 我认为我们可以相当准确地确定西方文明开始衰落的年代。

senses.definition: vt.使文明,使开化,教化,启发
senses.sentence: Those facilities are intended to **civilize** people.
senses.translation: 那些设施的目的在于教化民众.

senses.definition: vt.声称,断言,需要,索取
senses.sentence: You must **claim** your prize by telephoning our **claims** line.
senses.translation: 您必须通过拨打我们的领奖电话来领取奖品。

senses.definition: vt.（尤指通过加热使黄油）纯净,说明,使（头脑、神智等）清醒
senses.sentence: I am happy to **clarify** any points that are still unclear.
senses.translation: 我愿意说明任何仍然不清楚的地方.

senses.definition: n.清楚，明晰,透明,明确,清晰度
senses.sentence: He always put his point of view with **clarity** and with courage.
senses.translation: 他总是清楚而勇敢地提出自己的观点。

senses.definition: n.冲突,不协调,撞击声
senses.sentence: Don't make any policy decisions which **clash** with official company thinking.
senses.translation: 所作的任何决策都不要和公司官方理念相冲突。

senses.definition: n.扣钩，扣环,握紧,拥抱
senses.sentence: She had sat there twiddling nervously with the **clasp** of her handbag.
senses.translation: 她坐在那里紧张地摆弄着手提包的扣钩。

senses.definition: n.班,等级,阶级,种类
senses.sentence: There was very little snobbery or **class**-consciousness in the wartime navy.
senses.translation: 战时的海军中很少有势利眼，阶级意识也不强。

senses.definition: adj.典型的,传统式样的,著名的,有趣的
senses.sentence: The group's debut album was immediately acclaimed a hip hop **classic**.
senses.translation: 这个组合的首张专辑一经推出便被盛赞为嘻哈乐的经典之作。

senses.definition: n.古典音乐
senses.sentence: The radio station has to include a substantial proportion of **classical** music.
senses.translation: 该电台不得不播放大量的古典音乐。

senses.definition: n.分类,分级,类别,（动植物等的）分类学
senses.sentence: These things belong in a different **classification**.
senses.translation: 这些东西属于不同的类别.

senses.definition: vt.分类，归类,把…列为密件
senses.sentence: It is necessary initially to **classify** the headaches into certain types.
senses.translation: 首先，必须将头痛分为几个类型。

senses.definition: n.（同班）同学,级友
senses.sentence: He made a profession of friendship to his **classmate** Mary.
senses.translation: 他向他的同学玛丽表白了他的友情.

senses.definition: n.教室，课堂,教学活动，教学方法
senses.sentence: The **classroom** teacher must be sensitive to a child'sneeds.
senses.translation: 班主任必须对小学生的需求体察入微。

senses.definition: n.从句，分句,条款，款项
senses.sentence: The sentence consists of a main **clause** and a subordinate **clause**.
senses.translation: 这句中有一个主句和一个从句.

senses.definition: n.黏土，泥土,（相对于灵魂而言的）人体，肉体,似黏土的东西,克莱（男子名，Clayton 的昵称）
senses.sentence: When the **clay** feels like putty, it is ready to use.
senses.translation: 黏土摸起来像油灰时，就可以用了。

senses.definition: adj.干净的,无污染的,空白的,文明的
senses.sentence: They were more concerned about the dogs' welfare than a **clean** getaway.
senses.translation: 他们更加关心那些狗的安危，而非自己如何干净利落地脱身。

senses.definition: adj.清楚的，明白的,清晰的，明亮的,清澈的,明确的
senses.sentence: Dig over any ground that is **clear** of crops and plants.
senses.translation: 把没种庄稼和植物的土地都深翻一遍。

senses.definition: n.店员,办事员，职员,书记员,<古>牧师，教士
senses.sentence: A stupid medical **clerk** had slipped the wrong tab on his X-ray.
senses.translation: 一个蠢笨的医护人员一不留神在他的X光片上贴错了标签。

senses.definition: adj.聪明的，灵巧的,英俊的，风采优雅的,性情温良的,油腔滑调的
senses.sentence: Northbridge is a cool, calculating and **clever** criminal who could strike again.
senses.translation: 诺思布里奇是个头脑冷静、诡计多端、阴险狡诈的罪犯，他可能还会犯案。

senses.definition: n.喀哒声,爪，掣子,[计]（鼠标）点击,[语言学]吸气音
senses.sentence: Double **click** on the icon to open the file.
senses.translation: 双击图标打开文件。

senses.definition: n.顾客,当事人,诉讼委托人,[计算机]客户端
senses.sentence: Enviros Consulting has a **client** base of more than 2,000 organisations worldwide.
senses.translation: EnvirosConsulting公司在全世界拥有逾2,000家组织机构的客户群。

senses.definition: n.悬崖，峭壁
senses.sentence: A pall of oily black smoke drifted over the **cliff**-top.
senses.translation: 一团油腻的黑色烟雾飘到悬崖顶上。

senses.definition: n.气候,氛围,状况,局势
senses.sentence: If **climate** changes continue, we will suffer the consequences.
senses.translation: 如果气候变化继续下去，我们将自食其果。

senses.definition: n.气候学
senses.sentence: Meanwhile, the annual precipitation of China is slightly less than **climatology**.
senses.translation: 与此同时, 全国平均年降水量较常年略偏少.

senses.definition: n.顶点，极点,高潮,层进法,[生物学]顶极群落
senses.sentence: Lambing is the **climax** of the sheep farmer's year.
senses.translation: 一年之中，产羔期最令羊农高兴。

senses.definition: v.攀登,爬,登山,上升
senses.sentence: The boys lifted up their legs, indicating they wanted to **climb** in.
senses.translation: 男孩们抬起腿，示意想要爬进来。

senses.definition: vi.附着于，紧贴,抓紧或抱住,坚持,沿（岸）前进，贴着（墙）走
senses.sentence: She had to **cling** onto the doorhandle until the pain passed.
senses.translation: 她不得不抓紧门把手，直到那阵疼痛过去。

senses.definition: n.诊所，门诊部,特殊病例分析,临床讲授,临床实习课
senses.sentence: Charles was at the **clinic** recovering from an operation on his arm.
senses.translation: 查尔斯的胳膊动了手术，正在这家诊所进行康复治疗。

senses.definition: n.（塑料或金属的）夹子,回纹针,修剪,剪报
senses.sentence: The BBC World Service Television news showed the same film **clip**.
senses.translation: 英国广播公司对外电视频道的新闻节目播放了同样的电影剪辑片段。

senses.definition: n.钟，时钟,计时器,秒表,仪表
senses.sentence: He sat listening to the tick of the grandfather **clock**.
senses.translation: 他坐在那儿，听着落地式大摆钟嘀嗒作响。

senses.definition: adj.顺时针方向的,右旋的,正转的
senses.sentence: The dance moves in a counter-**clockwise** direction.
senses.translation: 这支舞是按逆时针方向跳的。

senses.definition: adj.紧密的,亲密的,亲近的
senses.sentence: Three mortar shells had landed **close** to a crowd of people.
senses.translation: 3枚迫击炮弹落在人群旁。

senses.definition: n.壁橱,盥洗室,议事室，密室,贮藏室
senses.sentence: It's just an old rag I had in the **closet**.
senses.translation: 这只不过是我挂在壁橱里的旧衣服罢了.

senses.definition: n.（永久的）停业，关闭,结束,[电]闭合,[数]闭包
senses.sentence: The **closure** of the project is bad news for her staff.
senses.translation: 项目终止对她的雇员来说是一个不幸的消息。

senses.definition: n.布，织物,一块布,用作某种用途的布，桌布，擦布，揩布,（统称）牧师
senses.sentence: He was holding a **cloth** that dripped pink drops upon the floor.
senses.translation: 他正拿着一块布，布上粉红色的水滴落在地板上。

senses.definition: vt.给…提供衣服，把衣服穿（在身上）,<文>覆盖,赋予
senses.contextMeaning: 给…提供衣服，把衣服穿（在身上）
senses.sentence: They **clothe** their children in the latest fashions.
senses.translation: 他们给他们的孩子穿最时髦的服装。

senses.definition: n.衣服，衣物,寝具
senses.sentence: His work **clothes**, having become saturated with oil, had to be cleaned.
senses.translation: 他的工作服已经被油浸透，该洗洗了。

senses.definition: n.衣服,服装,[航]帆装
senses.sentence: Alexandra looked plump and awkward in her cast-off **clothing**.
senses.translation: 亚历山德拉穿着那身过时的衣裳，显得臃肿笨拙。

senses.definition: n.云,云状物,一团,阴影
senses.sentence: The powdery dust rose in a **cloud** around him.
senses.translation: 一团粉尘在他周围扬起。

senses.definition: adj.多云的,阴天的,朦胧的,愁容满面的
senses.sentence: Only a tiny patch of blue was visible in the **cloudy** sky.
senses.translation: 多云的天空中只见到一小块儿湛蓝.

senses.definition: adj.俱乐部的
senses.sentence: People at the **club** think very highly of him.
senses.translation: 俱乐部的人很佩服他。

senses.definition: n.线索,提示,（帮助警方破案的）线索,（纵横填字谜、游戏或问题的）提示词语
senses.sentence: The vital **clue** to the killer's identity was his nickname, Peanuts.
senses.translation: 查明杀手身份的重要线索是他的外号叫“花生”.

senses.definition: adj.笨拙的,复杂难懂的,得罪人的,（文体等）臃肿的
senses.sentence: The action seemed a **clumsy** attempt to topple the Janata Dal government.
senses.translation: 这一试图推翻人民党政府的行动似乎缺乏策略。

senses.definition: n.丛,簇，串,群,[语言]辅音群
senses.sentence: A **cluster** of vultures crouched on the carcass of a dead buffalo.
senses.translation: 一群秃鹫蹲伏在一具野牛的尸体上。

senses.definition: n.紧抓,控制,离合器,紧要关头
senses.sentence: Laura let out the **clutch** and pulled slowly away down the drive.
senses.translation: 劳拉松开离合器踏板，沿车道慢慢驶离。

senses.definition: n.教练,（铁路）旅客车厢,长途客运汽车,四轮大马车
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **coach** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【coach】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.煤,煤块,煤堆,木炭
senses.sentence: The power stations burn **coal** from the Ruhr region.
senses.translation: 发电站烧的煤产自鲁尔地区。

senses.definition: n.结合体,联合,同盟,（两党或多党）联合政府
senses.sentence: The Liberal leader has announced his party's withdrawal from the ruling **coalition**.
senses.translation: 自由党领袖已宣布该党退出执政联盟。

senses.definition: adj.粗鄙的,粗糙的,粗野的,粗制滥造的
senses.sentence: The voice, less **coarse** now, stirred her as it had then.
senses.translation: 现在那声音已不那么刺耳，它又如当年一样让她怦然心动。

senses.definition: n.海岸,滑坡
senses.sentence: The Atlantic **coast** is within sight of the hotel.
senses.translation: 从宾馆可以看见大西洋海岸。

senses.definition: n.上衣，外套
senses.sentence: A black **coat** always looks smart and will never date.
senses.translation: 黑色外套看起来总是很潇洒，而且永远也不会落伍。

senses.definition: vt.合著
senses.sentence: They also introduced me to Tera Thomas, friend, **coauthor**, and editor of Bringers of the Dawn.
senses.translation: 他们也将我介绍给特拉?托马斯, 他是黎明的带来者朋友 、 合著者和编辑.

senses.definition: n.<药>可卡因,古柯碱
senses.sentence: The police moved in, arrested him and impounded the **cocaine**.
senses.translation: 警察冲进去将他拘捕并没收了可卡因。

senses.definition: n.公鸡,成熟雄鸟,首领，领导,龙头
senses.sentence: This was just an administrative **cock**-up.
senses.translation: 这纯粹是管理上的混乱。

senses.definition: n.行为准则,代码，密码,法典,信号
senses.sentence: The newspaper breached the **code** of conduct on privacy.
senses.translation: 该报违反了保护隐私的行为准则。

senses.definition: vi.同时共存，和平共处
senses.sentence: Pockets of affluence **coexist** with poverty.
senses.translation: 少数富裕地区与贫困地区并存。

senses.definition: n.咖啡豆,咖啡粉,（一杯）咖啡,非正式的社交集会
adj.认知的,认识的
senses.sentence: As children grow older, their **cognitive** processes become sharper.
senses.translation: 孩子们越长越大，他们的认知过程变得更为敏锐。

senses.definition: adj.一致的,连贯的,条理分明的,清楚明白的
senses.sentence: He appeared hardly capable of conducting a **coherent** conversation.
senses.translation: 他好像连话都说不清楚。

senses.definition: n.（一）卷，（一）盘,盘卷之物,线圈,纷乱，纠缠不清
senses.sentence: The heated gas is piped through a **coil** surrounded by water.
senses.translation: 受热气体通过水中的盘管输送。

senses.definition: n.硬币,金属钱币,[建筑]拐角，墙角石
senses.sentence: Thirteen per cent of Christie's **coin** and banknote auction went unsold.
senses.translation: 佳士得13%的硬币和纸币拍卖流拍。

senses.definition: vi.与…一致,想法、意见等相同,相符,极为类似
senses.sentence: A referendum next year would **coincide** explosively with the election campaign.
senses.translation: 明年的全民公决将和竞选活动同时进行，届时局势会十分紧张。

senses.definition: n.巧合,一致,同时存在,并存
senses.sentence: What an odd **coincidence** that he should have known your family.
senses.translation: 他居然认识你的家人，真是太巧了。

senses.definition: n.焦炭，焦煤
senses.sentence: The children kept dripping **Coke** on the carpets.
senses.translation: 孩子们老往地毯上滴可乐。

senses.definition: n.寒冷,感冒，伤风
senses.sentence: The **cold**, misty air felt wonderful on his face.
senses.translation: 雾蒙蒙的寒冷空气使他脸上感觉很舒爽。

senses.definition: vi.合作，协作,（国家间的）协调，提携,勾结，通敌
senses.sentence: The two men met and agreed to **collaborate**.
senses.translation: 这两个人见了面，并同意进行合作。

senses.definition: vi.折叠,倒塌,崩溃,（尤指工作劳累后）坐下
senses.sentence: Do they realize we are racing towards complete economic **collapse**?
senses.translation: 他们意识到我们的经济马上要彻底崩溃了吗？

senses.definition: n.同事,同僚,同行
senses.sentence: He was fired from his job after roughing up a **colleague**.
senses.translation: 他因为对一位同事动粗而被开除了。

senses.definition: vt.收集,收藏,接走,聚积
senses.sentence: Methane gas does **collect** in the mines around here.
senses.translation: 周围的矿井里的确有沼气聚积。

senses.definition: n.收集，采集,征收,收藏品,募捐
senses.sentence: The District Council made a weekly **collection** of refuse.
senses.translation: 区政务委员会每周收取一次垃圾。

senses.definition: adj.集体的,共同的,集合的,集体主义的
senses.sentence: Social science is a **collective** name, covering a series of individual sciences.
senses.translation: 社会科学是一个统称，涵盖一系列的独立学科。

senses.definition: n.大学,（英国）学院,学会,（尤指必须交费的）中学
senses.sentence: I've had the hots for him ever since he came to **college**.
senses.translation: 自从他来上大学后，我就对他春心萌动。

senses.definition: vi.相撞,碰撞,冲突,抵触
senses.sentence: What happens when the two interests **collide** will make a fascinating spectacle.
senses.translation: 两种利益发生冲突时将会上演一场好戏。

senses.definition: n.碰撞,冲突,（意见，看法）的抵触,（政党等的）倾轧
senses.sentence: He heard tires squeal as the car braked to avoid a **collision**.
senses.translation: 为避免相撞而刹车时，他听到了轮胎与地面刺耳的摩擦声。

senses.definition: n.排列，配置，词的搭配
senses.sentence: To check the information convenient, please add the **collocation** to your favorites.
senses.translation: 为了查找方便, 您可以将搜索出的食物组合加入收藏夹.

senses.definition: adj.殖民地的,殖民地化的,[生]群体的，集群的,英领殖民地时期的
senses.sentence: New states were born out of the wreckage of old **colonial** empires.
senses.translation: 新生国家从老殖民帝国的废墟中诞生。

senses.definition: n.殖民地,聚居地,群体,聚居人群
senses.sentence: The newly-occupied Italian **colony** of Libya rose in revolt in 1914.
senses.translation: 意大利新占领的殖民地利比亚于1914年发生叛乱。

senses.definition: n.<美>颜色，色彩,肤色，脸色，血色,颜料，染料,本质
senses.sentence: He denies making off-**color** remarks about women.
senses.translation: 他否认曾口出对女性不敬的污言秽语。

senses.definition: n.颜色,肤色,彩色,（用于服装、旗帜等代表团队、学校、政党或国家的）色彩
senses.sentence: The only difference between us is the **colour** of our skins.
senses.translation: 我们之间唯一的差别就是肤色。

senses.definition: n.纵队，列,圆柱,专栏
senses.sentence: She also writes a regular **column** for the Times Educational Supplement.
senses.translation: 她也定期为《泰晤士报高等教育增刊》写专栏文章。

senses.definition: n.梳子,梳棉机,鸡冠状的东西,蜂窝状的东西
senses.sentence: She bent to retrieve her **comb** from the floor.
senses.translation: 她弯腰从地上捡起她的梳子。

senses.definition: vt.梳理,彻底搜查
senses.sentence: Your hair needs a good **comb**.
senses.translation: 你的头发得好好梳理一下。

senses.definition: n.格斗，搏斗，战斗,〈美〉竞赛，比赛,论战
senses.sentence: The seagulls swirled in aerial **combat** over the barges.
senses.translation: 海鸥盘旋在驳船上方，展开空中的搏斗。

senses.definition: n.结合,联合体,密码组合,连裤内衣
senses.sentence: You can cobble it together from any old **combination** of garments.
senses.translation: 把以前的衣服随便搭配一下就能拼凑出一套。

senses.definition: v.使结合,使化合,兼有,用联合收割机收割
senses.sentence: I am partial to desserts that **combine** fresh fruit with fine pastry.
senses.translation: 我偏爱加有新鲜水果的精致油酥甜点。

senses.definition: vi.来,开始,出现,发生
senses.sentence: We'll go to a meeting in Birmingham and **come** straight back.
senses.translation: 我们将去伯明翰参加会议，然后马上回来。

senses.definition: n.喜剧,喜剧性,喜剧体裁,有趣的事情
senses.sentence: Paul is a thoroughly likeable man with an unerring sense of **comedy**.
senses.translation: 保罗十分讨人喜欢，开玩笑时很有分寸。

senses.definition: n.[天]彗星,孛
senses.sentence: They observed the **comet** for 70 days before it faded from sight.
senses.translation: 他们观察了这颗彗星70天，直至其慢慢从视线中消失。

senses.definition: n.安慰,舒适,使人舒服的事物,给予援助或安慰的人或事
senses.sentence: This new design will offer undreamed-of levels of **comfort**, safety and speed.
senses.translation: 这种新设计将会给您带来意想不到的舒适、安全和快捷。

senses.definition: adj.舒适的,安逸的，处于轻松的,充裕的
senses.sentence: We don't live in the lap of luxury, but we're **comfortable**.
senses.translation: 我们的生活虽然并非锦衣玉食，也算是衣食无忧。

senses.definition: n.连环漫画,喜剧演员,滑稽人物,滑稽新闻
senses.sentence: She has carved a niche for herself as a **comic** actor.
senses.translation: 她作为喜剧演员已经闯出了一片天地。

senses.definition: n.命令，指挥,司令部，指挥部,[计算机]指令,控制力
senses.sentence: I left a sergeant in **command** and rode forward to reconnoitre.
senses.translation: 我留下一名中士指挥，自己策马前去侦察敌情。

senses.definition: vt.纪念， 庆祝,成为…的纪念
senses.sentence: A series of movies will be shown to **commemorate** the 30th anniversary of his death.
senses.translation: 为纪念他逝世30周年，有一系列的电影要上映。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.开始,着手,获得学位
senses.sentence: The meeting is scheduled to **commence** at noon.
senses.translation: 会议定于午间召开。

senses.definition: vt.推荐,表扬,托付,受到赞同
senses.sentence: I **commend** Ms. Orth on writing such an informative article.
senses.translation: 我对奥思太太写出内容如此翔实的文章表示赞许。

senses.definition: n.评论,注释,意见,说明
senses.sentence: It was just a passing **comment**, he didn't go on about it.
senses.translation: 那只是一笔带过的评论，他没有继续论述。

senses.definition: n.商业,商务,贸易
senses.sentence: There were notable jousts with the Secretary of **Commerce**.
senses.translation: 和商业部长之间明显存在竞争。

senses.definition: adj.商业的,贸易的,营利的,靠广告收入的
senses.sentence: There has always been a difference between community radio and **commercial** radio.
senses.translation: 社区广播电台和商业广播电台一直是有区别的。

senses.definition: n.委员会，委员,[商]佣金，手续费,任命，委任,委任状
senses.sentence: If the **Commission** has its way, the entire deal will be scuppered.
senses.translation: 如果委员会我行我素的话，整个交易将化为泡影。

senses.definition: vt.犯罪，做错事,把…托付给,保证（做某事、遵守协议或遵从安排等）,承诺，使…承担义务
senses.sentence: He should not **commit** American troops without the full consent of Congress.
senses.translation: 没有国会的完全同意，他不应该调遣美国军队。

senses.definition: n.承诺，许诺,委任，委托,致力，献身,承担义务
senses.sentence: He waxed lyrical about the skills and **commitment** of his employees.
senses.translation: 他津津乐道于员工的技能和敬业精神。

senses.definition: n.委员会
senses.sentence: This **committee** will enable decisions to be made democratically.
senses.translation: 该委员会将实现民主决议过程。

senses.definition: n.商品,日用品,有价值的物品,有利，有益
senses.sentence: Many brokers were charged with cheating customers in **commodity** trades.
senses.translation: 许多经纪人被指控在商品交易中欺骗顾客。

senses.definition: adj.普通的,通俗的,[数学]公共的,共有的
senses.sentence: Canadian libel law is based on English **common** law.
senses.translation: 加拿大的诽谤法是以英国的习惯法为基础的。

senses.definition: adj.平凡的，陈腐的,平庸的，普通的
senses.sentence: Wacky ideas are **commonplace** among space scientists.
senses.translation: 太空科学家想法古怪是不足为奇的。

senses.definition: n.共和国,联邦,团体,协会
senses.sentence: The **Commonwealth** Development Corporation has agreed to reschedule Tanzania's debt.
senses.translation: 英联邦开发公司已经同意推迟坦桑尼亚的债务偿还时间。

senses.definition: vt.传达，表达,显示：清晰地揭示,表明,传染：扩散
senses.sentence: He was unprepared to co-operate, or indeed to **communicate**.
senses.translation: 他不愿意合作，甚至拒绝交流。

senses.definition: n.通讯，通信,交流,书信,传达
senses.sentence: The vehicle that permitted both **communication** and acceptability was social revolution.
senses.translation: 既能实现交流又能被广为接受的手段就是社会革命。

senses.definition: n.共产主义,共产主义制度
senses.sentence: He was a politically conscious fighter for **communism**.
senses.translation: 在政治上,他是个自觉的共产主义战士.

senses.definition: n.社区,社会团体,共同体,[生态] 群落
senses.sentence: There has always been a difference between **community** radio and commercial radio.
senses.translation: 社区广播电台和商业广播电台一直是有区别的。

senses.definition: vi.通勤,代偿
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **commute** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【commute】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.压紧，（使）坚实,把…弄紧密，把…弄结实,使（文体）简洁，简化,变紧密，变结实
senses.sentence: He looked physically very powerful, athletic in a **compact** way.
senses.translation: 他看上去非常强壮，像个敦实的运动员。

senses.definition: n.公司，商号,作伴，伴侣，客人,连队，中队,（社交）集会，聚会
senses.sentence: Doctors are complaining about being barraged by drug-**company** salesmen.
senses.translation: 医生们抱怨他们疲于应付医药公司的销售人员。

senses.definition: adj.可比较的,比得上的
senses.sentence: In other **comparable** countries real wages increased much more rapidly.
senses.translation: 在其他具有可比性的国家，实际工资上涨更快。

senses.definition: adj.比较（上）的,按比较估计的,相当的，还可以的
senses.sentence: After many hardships, he now lives in **comparative** ease.
senses.translation: 经过许多困难之后, 他现在的生活相对舒适.

senses.definition: n.比较
senses.sentence: He programmed his computer to **compare** all the possible combinations.
senses.translation: 他给他的计算机编制了一套程序，以比较所有可能的组合。

senses.definition: n.比较，对照,[语]比喻,比较级
senses.sentence: The **comparison** of her life to a sea voyage simplifies her experience.
senses.translation: 把她的人生比作一次海上航行不足以说明她丰富的经历。

senses.definition: n.隔间（尤指火车车厢中的）,区划
senses.contextMeaning: 隔间（尤指火车车厢中的）
senses.sentence: There wasn't enough room in the baggage **compartment** for all the gear.
senses.translation: 行李舱没有足够的空间放下所有的工具。

senses.definition: n.罗盘,指南针,圆规,界限
senses.sentence: You can go anywhere and still the **compass** points north or south.
senses.translation: 无论走到哪里，罗盘仍然指向北或南。

senses.definition: n.怜悯，同情,恻隐之心
senses.sentence: The president insisted that he was acting out of **compassion**, not opportunism.
senses.translation: 总统坚持说他如此做是出于同情而不是为了投机。

senses.definition: adj.兼容的，相容的,和谐的，协调的,[生物学]亲和的,可以并存的，能共处的
senses.sentence: Free enterprise, he argued, was **compatible** with Russian values and traditions.
senses.translation: 他认为自由企业制并不违背俄罗斯的价值观和传统。

senses.definition: vt.强迫，迫使,强制发生，使不得不
senses.sentence: The law can **compel** fathers to make regular payments for their children.
senses.translation: 这项法律可强制父亲定期支付子女费用。

senses.definition: vt.补偿，赔偿,报酬,抵消
senses.sentence: He did not have the means to **compensate** her.
senses.translation: 他没有钱来补偿她。

senses.definition: n.补偿，赔偿,修正,补救办法
senses.sentence: He was given a conditional discharge and ordered to pay **compensation**.
senses.translation: 他被有条件地释放了，被责令支付赔偿款。

senses.definition: vi.竞赛,竞争,比得上,参加比赛（或竞赛）
senses.sentence: They are now trying to **compete** on an equal footing.
senses.translation: 他们现在想要公平竞争。

senses.definition: adj.有能力的，能胜任的,能干的，称职的,足够的，充足的,有决定权的
senses.sentence: I had always considered myself a strong, **competent** woman.
senses.translation: 一直以来，我始终认为自己是个女强人。

senses.definition: n.竞争,比赛,竞争者,[生]生存竞争
senses.sentence: Malvolio becomes, in default of **competition**, the play's moral centre.
senses.translation: 因为没有与其竞争者，马伏里奥自然成了该剧的道德核心。

senses.definition: adj.竞争的，比赛的,（价格等）有竞争力的,（指人）好竞争的,[生化] 抑制酶作用的
senses.sentence: He is respected as a very aggressive and **competitive** executive.
senses.translation: 他是一位锐意进取、竞争意识很强的主管，颇受尊敬。

senses.definition: vt.汇编,编辑,编制,编译
senses.sentence: We are trying to **compile** a list of suitable people for the job.
senses.translation: 我们在努力编制一份适合做这项工作的人员名单。

senses.definition: vi.抱怨，诉苦,申诉，控诉，抗议
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **complain** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【complain】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.抱怨，控诉,委屈，怨言,平平的来由,痛苦根源
senses.sentence: Eczema is a common skin **complaint** which often runs in families.
senses.translation: 湿疹是一种常见的皮肤病，通常具遗传性。

senses.definition: n.补充,补足语,补充物,补集（数）
senses.sentence: Rice makes an excellent **complement** to a curry dish.
senses.translation: 有咖喱的菜配米饭最棒.

senses.definition: adj.（用以强调）完全的,完成的,达到结尾的,完整的
senses.sentence: Telling a **complete** stranger about your life is difficult.
senses.translation: 要对一个素昧平生的人谈自己的生活经历是比较困难。

senses.definition: adj.复杂的,难懂的,复合的
senses.sentence: In this new book, Harrison brilliantly disentangles **complex** debates.
senses.translation: 在这本新作中，哈里森巧妙地理顺了那些纷繁复杂的争论。

senses.definition: adj.复杂的,麻烦的,（昆虫的翅）纵折的
senses.sentence: To **complicate** matters further, everybody's vitamin requirements vary.
senses.translation: 更麻烦的是，每个人对维生素的需求量是不同的。

senses.definition: adj.结构复杂的,混乱的，麻烦的
senses.sentence: The situation was **complicated** by the spread of a serious forest fire.
senses.translation: 一场严重的森林大火的蔓延使得形势更加复杂。

senses.definition: n.[医]并发症,错杂，纠纷,混乱，精神错乱
senses.sentence: An added **complication** is the growing concern for the environment.
senses.translation: 还有个问题就是对环境的日益关注。

senses.definition: vt.向…道贺,称赞,向…致意
senses.sentence: His lips curved up in the obligatory smile, acknowledging the **compliment**.
senses.translation: 他嘴边礼节性地挤出一个微笑，以示对称赞致谢。

senses.definition: vi.遵从,依从，顺从,应允，同意
senses.sentence: Some beaches had failed to **comply** with European directives on bathing water.
senses.translation: 有些海滩未能遵守欧洲有关浴场的指令。

senses.definition: n.成分,零件,[数]要素,组分
senses.sentence: Gorbachev failed to keep the **component** parts of the Soviet Union together.
senses.translation: 戈尔巴乔夫没能把苏联各成员国团结在一起。

senses.definition: vt.组成，构成,调解,[印刷]排（字）,使安定
senses.sentence: They must each **compose** a poem in strict alliterative metre.
senses.translation: 他们必须每人作一首严格押头韵的诗。

senses.definition: adj.混合成的，综合成的,[建]综合式的,[数]可分解的,[植]菊科的
senses.sentence: English is a **composite** of many languages.
senses.translation: 英语是多种语言混合而成的.

senses.definition: n.作文，作曲,创作,构图，布置,妥协，和解
senses.sentence: The course is designed to help students with colour and **composition**.
senses.translation: 设置这门课程是为了指导学生如何运用色彩和构图。

senses.definition: n.场地,复合物,（筑有围墙的）院子,复合词
senses.sentence: Police fired on them as they fled into the embassy **compound**.
senses.translation: 当他们逃进使馆大院时，警察向他们开了枪。

senses.definition: vt.理解，领会,包含
senses.sentence: They can neither read nor write, nor can they **comprehend** such concepts.
senses.translation: 他们不会读，不会写，也理解不了这样的概念。

senses.definition: n.理解，理解力,包含的能力,[逻辑学]内涵
senses.sentence: It's a devastating and barbaric act that defies all **comprehension**.
senses.translation: 这种行为野蛮凶残、令人震惊，简直是不可理喻。

senses.definition: adj.广泛的,综合的,有理解力的，悟性好的,[保险业]总体担保的
senses.sentence: The Rough Guide to Nepal is a **comprehensive** guide to the region.
senses.translation: 《尼泊尔概况》是一本全面介绍该地区的旅游指南。

senses.definition: vt.压紧,压缩,精简
senses.sentence: He never understood how to organize or **compress** large masses of material.
senses.translation: 他从来就不懂如何对大篇的材料进行整理或精简。

senses.definition: vt.包含，包括,由…组成,由…构成
senses.sentence: The funds of the association shall **comprise** of members'subscriptions.
senses.translation: 协会的基金将由会员的捐款构成.

senses.definition: n.妥协,（名誉等的）损害,妥协（或折中）方案,折中物
senses.sentence: Mr Clarke has shown himself to be resolutely opposed to **compromise**.
senses.translation: 克拉克先生已表示自己坚决反对妥协。

senses.definition: adj.必须做的，强制性的,义务的,必修的
senses.sentence: Britain did not introduce **compulsory** primary education until 1880.
senses.translation: 直到1880年，英国才开始实行初等义务教育。

senses.definition: n.计算
senses.sentence: The measures we **compute** for a sample are called statistics.
senses.translation: 根据样本计算的量叫做统计量.

senses.definition: n.（电子）计算机，电脑
senses.sentence: He programmed his **computer** to compare all the possible combinations.
senses.translation: 他给他的计算机编制了一套程序，以比较所有可能的组合。

senses.definition: n.同志,战友,忠实伙伴
senses.sentence: Mr Meridor's father was a **comrade**-in-arms of the party's founder.
senses.translation: 梅里多先生的父亲是该党创始人的战友。

senses.definition: vt.隐藏，隐瞒，遮住
senses.sentence: Frances decided to **conceal** the machine behind a hinged panel.
senses.translation: 弗朗西斯决定把机器藏在带铰链的嵌板的后面。

senses.definition: v.承认,让步，容许,承让
senses.sentence: He will not **concede** what anything ails his business.
senses.translation: 他不允许任何事情来干扰他的工作.

senses.definition: vi.怀孕,设想,考虑
senses.sentence: You may **conceive** a new world in the atomic age.
senses.translation: 你可以设想出原子时代的新世界.

senses.definition: vt.& vi.专心于,注意,集中,聚集
senses.sentence: They will **concentrate** on teaching the basics of reading, writing and arithmetic.
senses.translation: 他们将集中教授阅读、写作和算术基础知识。

senses.definition: adj.同一中心的，同轴的
senses.sentence: The street plan of the city has evolved as a series of **concentric** rings.
senses.translation: 该城市的街道平面图像一圈圈的同心圆环.

senses.definition: n.观念，概念,观点,思想，设想，想法,总的印象
senses.sentence: The snowcoach **concept** in Yellowstone provides low-impact, low-pollution access.
