senses.translation: 在黄石公园里使用雪车这一想法，为人们提供了一种对环境低影响、低污染的游览方式。

senses.definition: n.受精，怀孕,胚胎,概念,设想，构想
senses.sentence: **Conception** occurs when a single sperm fuses with an egg.
senses.translation: 当一个精子和一个卵子结合时受孕就发生了。

senses.definition: n.关心,关系，有关,顾虑,公司或企业
senses.sentence: A good relationship involves **concern** and sensitivity for each other's feelings.
senses.translation: 一段美满的恋情需要彼此关心并体恤对方的情感。

senses.definition: prep.（表示论及）关于，就…而论
senses.sentence: Sikhs were expected to adhere strictly to the religious rules **concerning** appearance.
senses.translation: 锡克教徒应当严格遵守该教对外表的规定。

senses.definition: n.音乐会,一致，和谐
senses.sentence: In the end, we all decided to organize a **concert** for Easter.
senses.translation: 最终，我们一致决定组织一场复活节音乐会。

senses.definition: n.让步，迁就,（尤指由政府或雇主给予的）特许权,租借地,承认或允许
senses.sentence: We can not make heavy **concession** to the matter.
senses.translation: 我们在这个问题上不能过于让步.

senses.definition: adj.简明的，简洁的,,简约,精炼
senses.sentence: Burton's text is **concise** and informative.
senses.translation: 伯顿的文章语言简洁，信息丰富。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.结束，终止,推断,议定
senses.sentence: The competitors cantered into the arena to **conclude** the closing ceremony.
senses.translation: 选手们慢跑进入竞技场，为闭幕式画上了句号。

senses.definition: n.结论,结局,断定，决定,推论
senses.sentence: It's almost a foregone **conclusion** that you'll get what you want.
senses.translation: 你将得到你想要的，这几乎是确定无疑的。

senses.definition: n.混凝土,具体物,（图案式）有形诗,〔建〕钢筋混凝土
senses.sentence: The builders have perched a light **concrete** dome on eight slender columns.
senses.translation: 建筑工人在8根细柱上架起轻巧的混凝土穹顶。

senses.definition: adj.〈正式〉同时发生的,同时完成的,同时存在的
senses.sentence: He was imprisoned for two **concurrent** terms of 30 months and 18 months.
senses.translation: 他被判处30个月和18个月的监禁，合并执行。

senses.definition: vt.（通常因道义上的原因而）谴责,宣判,宣布…不能使用,迫使…陷于不幸的境地
senses.contextMeaning: （通常因道义上的原因而）谴责
senses.sentence: Bankers are quick to **condemn** retrospective tax legislation.
senses.translation: 银行家们立即声讨有追溯效力的税收立法。

senses.definition: v.（使）冷凝,（使）凝结,精简,压缩
senses.sentence: We have learnt how to **condense** serious messages into short, self-contained sentences.
senses.translation: 我们已经学会了如何把重要的信息压缩成简短独立的句子。

senses.definition: n.状态,环境,健康状况,条款
senses.sentence: He was concerned with the enhancement of the human **condition**.
senses.translation: 他关心人类生存环境的改善。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.引导,带领,控制,传导
senses.sentence: The evaluation of **conduct** involves some amount of generalization.
senses.translation: 对操行的评价会含有一些泛泛之论。

senses.definition: n.<电>导体,售票员,（乐队）指挥,导管（套管的一种）
senses.sentence: The **conductor**'s eyes darted to Wilfred, then fixed on Michael again.
senses.translation: 乐队指挥飞快地扫了威尔弗雷德一眼，然后视线又落回到迈克尔身上。

senses.definition: n.结盟,联盟,同盟国
senses.sentence: The European Builders **Confederation** has a membership of over 350,000 building companies.
senses.translation: 欧洲建筑商联合会拥有逾35万家建筑公司会员。

senses.definition: vt.授予，颁与,比较，对照
senses.sentence: He withdrew to **confer** with his teacher before announcing a decision.
senses.translation: 他先去请教他的老师然后再宣布决定.

senses.definition: n.会议,讨论,（正式）讨论会,[工会、工党用语]（每年的）大会
senses.sentence: But at the annual party **conference** he always made the right noises.
senses.translation: 但在每年政党会议上，他总是随声附和。

senses.definition: v.供认,坦白,承认,悔过
senses.sentence: You just go to the church and **confess** your sins.
senses.translation: 你干脆去教堂忏悔自己的罪过吧。

senses.definition: n.信心,信任,秘密
senses.sentence: Hopes of an early cut in interest rates bolstered **confidence**.
senses.translation: 利率有望早日下调，从而增强了人们的信心。

senses.definition: adj.确信的，深信的,有信心的，沉着的,大胆的，过分自信的,厚颜无耻的
senses.sentence: She has now changed into a happy, self-**confident** woman.
senses.translation: 如今她已经变成一个快乐、自信的女人。

senses.definition: adj.秘密的,机密的,表示信任的,亲密的
senses.sentence: National security is the stock excuse for keeping things **confidential**.
senses.translation: 国家安全常被用作对一些事情保密的挡箭牌。

senses.definition: vt.限制,局限于,禁闭,管制
senses.sentence: Doctors are trying to **confine** the disease within the city.
senses.translation: 医生正试图将此病控制在城内.

senses.definition: n.境界,限度,范围,区域
senses.sentence: It is beyond the **confines** of human knowledge.
senses.translation: 这超出了人类的知识范围。

senses.definition: vt.[法]确认，批准,证实,使有效,使巩固
senses.sentence: His new role could **confirm** him as one of our leading actors.
senses.translation: 他的新角色会确保他跻身我们的一流演员之列。

senses.definition: n.冲突,战斗,相互干扰,矛盾
senses.sentence: The time has come to put an end to the **conflict**.
senses.translation: 结束冲突的时候到了。

senses.definition: vi.符合,遵照,适应环境
senses.sentence: Taxis must **conform** to the rigorous standards laid down by the police.
senses.translation: 出租车必须遵守警方的严格规定。

senses.definition: vt.面对,使面对面，使对质,碰到，遇到,比较
senses.sentence: She had decided to **confront** Kathryn with what she had learnt.
senses.translation: 她决定拿自己了解的事实与凯瑟琳当面对证。

senses.definition: vt.使困窘,使混乱,使困惑,使更难于理解
senses.sentence: This is an attempt to **confuse** form and [ with ] substance.
senses.translation: 这是企图把形式同实质混 淆.

senses.definition: n.混乱,混淆,困惑
senses.sentence: His mind was a haze of fear and **confusion**.
senses.translation: 由于害怕和困惑，他当时处于一种混沌状态。

senses.definition: vt.向（某人）道贺,祝贺,（为成就或成功）感到高兴
senses.sentence: He was generous enough to **congratulate** his successor on his decision.
senses.translation: 他十分大度地祝贺他的继任者做出了决定。

senses.definition: n.祝贺，恭喜,贺词
senses.sentence: This is not a matter for self-**congratulation**.
senses.translation: 你不应该为此事沾沾自喜。

senses.definition: n.国会,代表大会,（用于某些国家的政党名称）国民大会,社交
senses.sentence: The American **Congress** has agreed to forgive Egypt's military debt.
senses.translation: 美国国会同意免除埃及的军事债务。

senses.definition: n.连词,连接,联合，结合物,（恒星、行星等的）合
senses.sentence: The **conjunction** of low inflation and low unemployment came as a very pleasant surprise.
senses.translation: 低通货膨胀与低失业的同时出现是一大惊喜。

senses.definition: vt.连接，联结,使…有联系,为…接通电话,插入插座
senses.sentence: You can **connect** the machine to your hi-fi.
senses.translation: 你可以把机器连在高保真音响上。

senses.definition: n.连接,联系，关系,连接点,亲戚
senses.sentence: The minister denied there was a direct **connection** between the two issues.
senses.translation: 部长否认两者之间有直接的联系。

senses.definition: n.联系，连结
senses.sentence: There was a direct intimate **connexion** between chastity and political orthodoxy.
senses.translation: 纯洁身心跟政治正统,真有种直接又紧密的联系.

senses.definition: vt.征服,攻克,打败（敌人）,克服
senses.sentence: They became overheated nationalists, militarists, and they were out to **conquer**.
senses.translation: 他们变成了过分狂热的民族主义分子和军国主义分子，并想要征服别国。

senses.definition: n.良心,道德心
senses.sentence: I'm so glad he had a pang of **conscience**.
senses.translation: 我很高兴他会有负疚感。

senses.definition: adj.认真负责的,本着良心的,谨慎的,正大光明
senses.sentence: He was quiet, **conscientious**, a bit of a plodder.
senses.translation: 他做事闷声不响，小心谨慎，有点死气沉沉的。

senses.definition: adj.连续的，连贯的,[语]表示结果的
senses.sentence: Between 1940 and 1943 he had a string of 62 **consecutive** victories.
senses.translation: 他在1940年至1943年间连续62次获胜。

senses.definition: n.一致,舆论,一致同意，合意
senses.sentence: I realize there's no **consensus** on what are male or female values.
senses.translation: 我意识到人们对什么是男性价值观和什么是女性价值观并无共识。

senses.definition: n.准许，赞同,同意,（意见等的）一致
senses.sentence: At approxi-mately 11:30 p.m., Pollard finally gave his **consent** to the search.
senses.translation: 大概晚上11点半的时候，波拉德最终同意进行搜查。

senses.definition: n.结果，成果,[逻]结论,重要性,推论
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **consequence** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【consequence】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: adj.随之发生的,必然的，合乎逻辑的,继起的,[地]顺向的
senses.sentence: Overproduction and **consequent** low market prices for wine caused economic tremors.
senses.translation: 葡萄酒生产过剩及由此造成的市价低迷引起了经济波动。

senses.definition: adv.所以，因此,因此，因而,终于，这样,合乎逻辑的推论是
senses.sentence: They had children and were **consequently** tied to the school holidays.
senses.translation: 他们有孩子，当然就受学校假期的束缚。

senses.definition: n.保存,保护,避免浪费,对自然环境的保护
senses.sentence: In time these new excavations will require **conservation**.
senses.translation: 这些刚发掘出来的物品需要及时保护。

senses.definition: n.保守的人,（英国）保守党党员，保守党支持者
senses.sentence: In recent months many **conservative** politicians have jumped on the anti-immigrant bandwagon.
senses.translation: 最近几个月，很多保守政客都搭上了“反移民”这班车。

senses.definition: vt.考虑,认为,看重,以为
senses.sentence: After a year we will sympathetically **consider** an application for reinstatement.
senses.translation: 一年后我们会对复职申请予以考虑和批准。

senses.definition: adj.相当大（或多）的,该注意的，应考虑的
senses.sentence: He brought to the job not just **considerable** experience but passionate enthusiasm.
senses.translation: 他不仅给这一工作带来了不少经验，而且倾注了极大的热情。

senses.definition: adj.体贴的，体谅的,深思熟虑,到,慎重
senses.sentence: The patient has the right to **considerate** and respectful care.
senses.translation: 病人有权得到周到而礼貌的照顾。

senses.definition: n.考虑，考察,照顾，关心,报酬,尊敬
senses.sentence: Several proposals are under **consideration** by the state assembly.
senses.translation: 有几个提案州议会正在讨论中。

senses.definition: vi.由…组成,在于,符合
senses.sentence: The division will **consist** of two tank companies and one infantry company.
senses.translation: 这个师的组成部队将包括两个坦克连和一个步兵连。

senses.definition: adj.一致的,连续的,不矛盾的,坚持的
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **consistent** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【consistent】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: vt.安慰，慰问
senses.sentence: Nothing could **console** him when his wife died.
senses.translation: 他妻子去世后，什么事情也不能使他感到宽慰。

senses.definition: vi.统一,合并,联合
senses.sentence: Judge Charles Schwartz is giving the state 60 days to disband and **consolidate** Louisiana's four higher education boards.
senses.translation: 查尔斯·施瓦茨法官将给路易斯安那州60天时间来解散然后合并该州的4个高等教育委员会。

senses.definition: adj.明显的,显而易见的,惹人注意的,显目
senses.sentence: You may feel tearful in situations where you feel **conspicuous**.
senses.translation: 觉得自己身处众目睽睽之下时，你可能会有想哭的感觉。

senses.definition: n.阴谋,反叛,共谋
senses.sentence: At first, he was blissfully unaware of the **conspiracy** against him.
senses.translation: 起初，他幸好不知道那些针对他的阴谋。

senses.definition: adj.不断的，持续的,永恒的，始终如一的,坚定,忠实的
senses.sentence: It's a **constant** struggle to try to keep them up to par.
senses.translation: 要让他们达标，需要不断努力。

senses.definition: n.选民,成分，构成部分,委托人
senses.sentence: Over time, the protein in the eggshell breaks down into its **constituent** amino acids.
senses.translation: 时间久了，蛋壳中的蛋白质就会分解为其构成成分氨基酸。

senses.definition: vt.构成，组成,制定，设立,等同于,指派
senses.sentence: Volunteers **constitute** more than 95% of The Center's work force.
senses.translation: 该中心95%以上的工作人员是志愿者.

senses.definition: n.建立，组成,体格,构成方式,宪法
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **constitution** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【constitution】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: vt.强迫,强使,限制,约束
senses.sentence: The police used horses to **constrain** the crowd from violence.
senses.translation: 警察骑着马阻止那群人诉诸暴力.

senses.definition: vt.修建，建造,构成,创立,[数]作图
senses.sentence: Any attempt to **construct** an ideal society is foredoomed to failure.
senses.translation: 任何构建理想社会的努力都注定要失败。

senses.definition: n.建筑物,建造,解释,建造物
senses.sentence: The demand generated by one factory required the **construction** of another.
senses.translation: 一家工厂产生的需求使得必须再建造一家工厂。

senses.definition: vi.商议，商量,[医]会诊,咨询,充当顾问
senses.sentence: It is recommended that you should **consult** your doctor.
senses.translation: 建议你去咨询医生。

senses.definition: n.（受人咨询的）顾问,会诊医生，（顾问）医生,求教者，（与人）商议者，征求意见者，查阅者，咨询者
senses.sentence: Shirley's brother is now a **consultant** heart surgeon in Sweden.
senses.translation: 雪利的兄弟现在在瑞典做心脏外科高级顾问医师。

senses.definition: vt.消耗，消费,耗尽，毁灭,吃光，喝光,烧毁
senses.sentence: Classically, overweight people underestimate the volume of food that they **consume**.
senses.translation: 一般来说，超重的人往往低估自己摄入食物的量。

senses.definition: n.消费者，顾客,[生态]取食者，食物链中以其他生物为食物的生物
senses.sentence: Once wholesale prices are deregulated, **consumer** prices will also rise.
senses.translation: 一旦批发价格放开，零售价格也会随之上涨。

senses.definition: n.消费,肺病,耗尽,[医学]消耗性疾病
senses.sentence: Most of the wine was unfit for human **consumption**.
senses.translation: 这些酒中大部分都不适于人类饮用。

senses.definition: n.接触,触点,[医]（传染病）接触人,门路
senses.sentence: The college has brought me into **contact** with western ideas.
senses.translation: 上大学使我接触了西方的思想。

senses.definition: vt.包含，容纳,克制，遏制,牵制,包括或由…构成
senses.sentence: Our range of herbal teas **contain** no preservatives, colourings or artificial flavourings.
senses.translation: 我们这一系列的药草茶不含防腐剂、色素以及人工调味品。

senses.definition: n.容器,箱，匣,集装箱，货柜
senses.sentence: Place them in a jam jar, porcelain bowl, or other similar **container**.
senses.translation: 将它们装入果酱罐、瓷碗或其他类似容器中。

senses.definition: vt.弄脏，污染,损害，毒害
senses.sentence: One secret military unit tried to **contaminate** the drinking water of the refugees.
senses.translation: 一个秘密军事分队企图污染难民的饮用水。

senses.definition: vt.注视，凝视,盘算，计议,周密考虑
senses.sentence: We don't **contemplate** his [ him ] opposing our plan.
senses.translation: 我们预料他不会反对我们的计划.

senses.definition: adj.当代的，现代的,同时代的，同属一个时期的
n.轻视,轻蔑,（对规则、危险等的）藐视,不顾
senses.sentence: Mr. Kelly was sentenced to six months in prison for **contempt**.
senses.translation: 凯利先生因藐视法庭被判6个月监禁。

senses.definition: vi.争夺,竞争,奋斗,争斗
senses.sentence: His firm must **contend** with the unwieldy Russian bureaucracy.
senses.translation: 他的公司必须与俄罗斯庞大的官僚机构周旋。

senses.definition: n.内容,（书等的）目录,满足,容量
senses.sentence: There are reports of widespread dis-**content** in the capital.
senses.translation: 有报道称首都弥漫着不满的情绪。

senses.definition: vt.竞争，为…而奋争,辩驳
senses.sentence: The **contest** was as much about personalities as it was about politics.
senses.translation: 竞赛比手段策略，也比个性。

senses.definition: n.上下文,背景,环境,语境
senses.sentence: I would qualify that by putting it into **context**.
senses.translation: 我会将它放入上下文中进行具体解释。

senses.definition: n.大陆，陆地,欧洲大陆,<美>北美洲大陆
senses.sentence: The American **continent**'s geography severely limited the lines of attack.
senses.translation: 美洲大陆的地形严重限制了进攻路线。

senses.definition: adj.不间断的,不停的,多次重复的,频繁的
senses.sentence: The school has been in **continual** use since 1883.
senses.translation: 自1883年以来，该校从未停办过。

senses.definition: vi.持续,逗留,维持原状
senses.sentence: I too am committing myself to **continue** the fight for justice.
senses.translation: 我本人也保证将继续为正义而战。

senses.definition: adj.连续的,延伸的,绵,联绵
senses.sentence: At the horizon the land mass becomes a **continuous** pale neutral grey.
senses.translation: 陆地在地平线处变成了一片浅灰。

senses.definition: n.合同,契约,协议
senses.sentence: A formal **contract** is signed which is renewable annually.
senses.translation: 正式签订了每年可续签的合同。

senses.definition: vi.反驳,否认,发生矛盾
senses.sentence: She waxes righteously indignant if anyone tries to **contradict** her.
senses.translation: 如果有人想反驳她,她说起话来就会义愤填膺.

senses.definition: n.矛盾,否认，反驳
adj.违背自然的
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **contranatural** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【contranatural】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: adj.相反的,违反的，反对的,对立的,顽固的，任性的
senses.sentence: Dena looked appealingly at Blair, hoping to hear a **contrary** opinion.
senses.translation: 德娜恳切地看着布莱尔，希望听到相反的观点。

senses.definition: n.对比，对照,差异,对照物，对立面,[摄]反差
senses.sentence: The boy's room is a complete **contrast** to the guest room.
senses.translation: 这个男孩的房间和客房截然不同。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.贡献出,捐赠（款项）,投稿（给杂志等）,出力
senses.sentence: Heat, cold, tactile and other sensations **contribute** to flavour.
senses.translation: 热、冷、触觉和其他感觉构成了食物风味的一部分。

senses.definition: n.贡献，捐赠，捐助,捐赠，捐助物,投稿，来稿,[军]（向占领地人民征收的）军税
senses.sentence: Her **contribution** to the research went largely unacknowledged.
senses.translation: 她对这项研究的贡献大都被忽略了。

senses.definition: vt.设计，发明,创造,策划,设法做到
senses.sentence: She found it difficult to **contrive** when prices of everything went up.
senses.translation: 百物涨价时,她觉得料理家务很难.

senses.definition: vt.控制,管理,限制,支配
senses.sentence: Condoms are an effective method of birth **control** if used with care.
senses.translation: 如果使用得当，避孕套是很有效的避孕手段。

senses.definition: adj.有争议的，引起争议的，被争论的,好争论的
senses.sentence: The committee backtracked by scrapping the **controversial** bonus system.
senses.translation: 委员会改变主意，放弃了有争议的奖金制度。

senses.definition: n.公开辩论,论战
senses.sentence: Legislation to that effect created fierce **controversy** both in Parliament and outside.
senses.translation: 那类立法在议会内外都引起了激烈的争论。

senses.definition: n.方便，便利,便利设施,个人的舒适或利益,（公共）厕所
senses.sentence: Like working women anywhere, Asian women are buying **convenience** foods.
senses.translation: 像其他地方的职业女性一样，亚洲女性也购买方便食品。

senses.definition: adj.方便的,[废语]适当的,[口语]近便的,实用的
senses.sentence: There wasn't even a **convenient** place for students to assemble between classes.
senses.translation: 在课间，学生们连一个方便凑在一起的地方都没有。

senses.definition: n.会议,全体与会者,国际公约,惯例，习俗，规矩
senses.sentence: The action is an open violation of the Vienna **Convention**.
senses.translation: 该行为公然违背了《维也纳公约》。

senses.definition: adj.传统的,习用的，平常的,依照惯例的,约定的
senses.sentence: He hates the wheeling and dealing associated with **conventional** political life.
senses.translation: 他对传统政治生活中的权术钻营深恶痛绝。

senses.definition: vi.（线条、运动的物体等）会于一点,聚集,人或车辆汇集
senses.contextMeaning: （线条、运动的物体等）会于一点
senses.sentence: As they flow south, the five rivers **converge**.
senses.translation: 5条大河在南边交汇。

senses.definition: n.交谈，会话,交往，交际,会谈,（人与计算机的）人机对话
senses.sentence: He finished his **conversation** and stood up, looking straight at me.
senses.translation: 他说完话站起来，直视着我。

senses.definition: adv.相反地，颠倒地,倒地,反之,反过来
senses.sentence: You can add the fluid to the powder, or, **conversely**, the powder to the fluid.
senses.translation: 可把液体加入粉末，或者相反，把粉末加入液体。

senses.definition: n.变换，转变,改装物,财产转换，兑换,[逻] 换位（法）
senses.sentence: Currency-**conversion** costs remain one of the biggest obstacles to cross-border trade.
senses.translation: 货币兑换成本仍是跨境贸易的最大障碍之一。

senses.definition: vt.（使）转变,使皈依,兑换，换算,侵占
senses.sentence: We would like to **convert** the loft into another bedroom.
senses.translation: 我们想把阁楼改造成又一间卧室。

senses.definition: vt.传达，传递,运送，输送,[法]让与，转让（财产等）,表达
senses.sentence: Euclid was trying to **convey** his idea of a geometrical point.
senses.translation: 欧几里得试图表达他的一个几何学观点。

senses.definition: n.罪犯
senses.sentence: The **convict** was pardoned after serving five years of his sentence.
senses.translation: 罪犯服刑5年才获赦免.

senses.definition: n.定罪,说服,确信,信念
senses.sentence: No amount of reasoning could shake him out of his **conviction**.
senses.translation: 再怎样跟他讲道理都不能让他放弃自己认准的事。

senses.definition: vt.使相信，说服，使承认,使明白,使确信,使悔悟，使认错[罪]
senses.sentence: I'm not going to believe it myself, never mind **convince** anyone else.
senses.translation: 我自己都不会相信，更别提说服别人了。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.烹调,编造,篡改,密谋
senses.sentence: He said that what they were up to would **cook** Krasky's goose.
senses.translation: 他说他们暗中进行的阴谋可能会使克拉斯基的计划流产。

senses.definition: adj.冷静的,凉爽的,一流的,孤傲冷漠的
senses.sentence: In warm weather, you should wear clothing that is **cool** and comfortable.
senses.translation: 在热天里，应该穿凉快舒适的衣服。

senses.definition: vi.合作，配合，协助
senses.sentence: We want to **cooperate** with both the admi-nistration and Congress.
senses.translation: 我们既想与政府合作，也想与国会合作。

senses.definition: vt.使协调，使调和,整合,使（身体各部份）动作协调,（衣服、布料等）搭配
senses.sentence: The army, navy and air forces are **coordinate** armed services.
senses.translation: 陆军 、 海军和空军是并行的军种.

senses.definition: vi.成功地应付，对付,对抗
senses.sentence: Depression lowers the human ability to **cope** with disease.
senses.translation: 抑郁症会降低人体对疾病的抵抗力。

senses.definition: n.铜,铜币,紫铜色,警察
senses.sentence: The combination of sex and treachery proved a **copper**-bottomed circulation booster.
senses.translation: 事实证明，性和背叛的话题结合起来无疑大大增加了发行量。

senses.definition: vt.模仿,仿造…的样式或图案,抄写,复制
senses.sentence: The second-hand version is a poor **copy** of the original.
senses.translation: 盗版版本是对原版的低劣复制。

senses.definition: adj.受版权保护的,版权的
senses.sentence: A phrase jumped out at me in a piece about **copyright**.
senses.translation: 在一篇有关版权的文章中，有一个短语引起了我的注意。

senses.definition: n.（细）绳,灯心绒裤
senses.sentence: A quick-thinking ticket inspector yanked an emergency **cord**.
senses.translation: 一个反应迅速的查票员猛地拉下了紧急刹车索。

senses.definition: adj.热诚的,诚恳的,兴奋的
senses.sentence: We maintain **cordial** relations with our neighbors.
senses.translation: 我们与邻里保持亲切友好的关系.

senses.definition: n.中心，核心，精髓,果心，果核,[地质学]地核,[计] 磁心
senses.sentence: We've got a hard **core** of customers that have stood by us.
senses.translation: 我们拥有一批一直支持我们的忠实顾客。

senses.definition: n.<英>谷物,<美>玉米,鸡眼
senses.sentence: They are offering farmers $2.15 a bushel for **corn**.
senses.translation: 他们向农民出价每蒲式耳2.15美元收购玉米。

senses.definition: n.角落，角,拐角,困境,[商]囤积
senses.sentence: The man with the umbrella turned the **corner** again.
senses.translation: 拿伞的人又拐进了拐角处。

senses.definition: adj.法人的，团体的，社团的,公司的，总体国家的,〈古〉团结的,共同的，全体的
senses.sentence: Increasingly, **corporate** clients are seeking to outsource the management of their facilities.
senses.translation: 越来越多的公司客户寻求将设施的管理外包出去。

senses.definition: n.公司,法人,社团，团体,〈口〉（凸出的）大肚子
senses.sentence: The Commonwealth Development **Corporation** has agreed to reschedule Tanzania's debt.
senses.translation: 英联邦开发公司已经同意推迟坦桑尼亚的债务偿还时间。

senses.definition: adj.正确的,合适的,符合公认准则的,得体的
senses.sentence: The club specialises in videoing its student golfers to **correct** their faults.
senses.translation: 俱乐部专门为高尔夫学员制作录像，以纠正他们的错误。

senses.definition: v.使互相关联,联系
senses.sentence: Try to **correlate** your knowledge of history with your knowledge of geography.
senses.translation: 试着把你的历史知识和地理知识联系起来.

senses.definition: vi.符合，一致,相应,通信
senses.sentence: Her expression is concerned but her body-language does not **correspond**.
senses.translation: 她满脸关切之情，但她的肢体语言并非如此。

senses.definition: n.一致，符合,对应,通信，信件,[艺]通感
senses.sentence: A selection of **correspondence** from P G Wodehouse realised £ 1,232. P.G.
senses.translation: 沃德豪斯的书信选集卖了1,232英镑。

senses.definition: n.通讯员，记者,通信者
senses.sentence: Frank Deford is a special **correspondent** for Newsweek magazine.
senses.translation: 弗兰克·德福特是《新闻周刊》杂志的特派记者。

senses.definition: adj.相当的，对应的,通信的,符合的，符合。。,一致的
senses.sentence: What we required you to do is **corresponding** to the contract.
senses.translation: 我们要你做的事情符合合同规定.

senses.definition: n.走廊，通道,走廊（一国领土通过他国境内的狭长地带）,[建]覆道
senses.sentence: The young man led Mark Ryle along a **corridor**.
senses.translation: 那个年轻人领着马克·赖尔沿走廊而去。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.使腐蚀，侵蚀
senses.sentence: The tools will **corrode** with rust if never used.
senses.translation: 这些工具如长期不用会长铁锈而损坏.

senses.definition: adj.堕落的，道德败坏的,贪污的，腐败的,腐烂的,（文献等）错误百出的
senses.sentence: He has been scathing in his denunciation of **corrupt** and incompetent politicians.
senses.translation: 他抨击起那些腐败无能的政客来一直都很尖刻犀利。

senses.definition: adj.宇宙的,极广阔的
senses.sentence: NASA plans to launch a satellite to study **cosmic** rays.
senses.translation: 美国国家航空航天局计划发射一颗卫星上天，对宇宙射线进行研究。

senses.definition: n.价钱，代价,花费，费用,牺牲,[用复数][法律]诉讼费
senses.sentence: Companies are moving jobs to towns with a lower **cost** of living.
senses.translation: 各公司正在把工作岗位转移至生活费用较低的城镇。

senses.definition: adj.昂贵的,代价高的
senses.sentence: Psychometric tests can save organizations from grim and **costly** mistakes.
senses.translation: 心理测试能够使组织机构避免犯下损失惨重的大错。

senses.definition: n.（戏剧或电影的）戏装，演出服,服装，衣服,泳装，常用于英式英语,（某地或某历史时期的）服装
senses.sentence: The performers, in **costume** and make-up, were walking up and down backstage.
senses.translation: 上了妆穿着戏服的演员在后台走来走去。

senses.definition: adj.舒适的，惬意的,畅快的,亲切友好的
senses.sentence: The overall ambience of the room is **cosy**.
senses.translation: 房间整体的感觉是温暖舒适。

senses.definition: n.小屋，村舍,（农舍式的）小别墅,（郊外的）新式住宅，（大院内的）单幢住宅,乡下房子，小房子
senses.sentence: The studio is midway between his aunt's old home and his **cottage**.
senses.translation: 工作室就在从他姑姑的老宅到他的小屋的中途。

senses.definition: n.棉,棉线,棉织物,（其他植物所生的绒毛状的）棉状物
senses.sentence: Some of the food crops failed. However, the **cotton** did quite well.
senses.translation: 有些粮食作物歉收。但棉花的收成仍相当不错。

senses.definition: n.长沙发椅，睡椅,（病人受检查时躺的）长榻,麦芽床,涂底，涂层
senses.sentence: She slipped out of the jacket and tossed it on the **couch**.
senses.translation: 她麻利地脱下夹克，扔在了沙发上。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.咳嗽,（引擎等）发噗噗声,咳出
senses.sentence: His **cough** grew more persistent until it never stopped.
senses.translation: 他咳嗽持续的时间越来越长，直到咳个不停。

senses.definition: aux.“can”的过去式,能够，打算,用于假设语气的条件句,用于虚拟语气的结论句
senses.sentence: He **could** just about see the little man behind the counter.
senses.translation: 他勉强能看到柜台后面的小个子男人。

senses.definition: n.委员会,（郡、镇等）政务会,（尤指旧时讨论特定步骤的）协商会议,市政（或地方管理）服务机构
senses.sentence: The **council** recently drew fire for its intervention in the dispute.
senses.translation: 委员会最近因为介入该起争端而遭到批评。

senses.definition: n.协商，讨论,建议,策略,法律顾问，辩护人
senses.sentence: The defence **counsel** warned that the judge should stop the trial.
senses.translation: 被告辩护律师强烈建议法官应该休庭。

senses.definition: n.柜台,对立面,计数器,（某些棋盘游戏的）筹码
senses.sentence: The shop assistant received me indifferently while leaning on a **counter**.
senses.translation: 商店售货员靠在柜台上漫不经心地招呼我。

senses.definition: vt.抵消,阻碍,中和
senses.sentence: My husband has to take several pills to **counteract** high blood pressure.
senses.translation: 我丈夫不得不吃几片药来降压。

senses.definition: n.&v.反攻，反击,逆袭
senses.sentence: The General was massing his troops for a **counterattack**.
senses.translation: 将军正在集结部队准备反攻。

senses.definition: n.配对物,副本,相对物,极相似的人或物
senses.sentence: The Foreign Minister held talks with his Chinese **counterpart**.
senses.translation: 外交部长与中国外交部长举行了会谈。

senses.definition: n.国家,国民,乡下,地区
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **country** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【country】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.乡村,郊野,乡下的全体居民
senses.sentence: They will be in raptures over the French **countryside**.
senses.translation: 他们会深深爱上法国的乡村。

senses.definition: n.县，郡,县民，郡民
senses.sentence: For a local bus timetable, contact Dyfed **County** Council.
senses.translation: 若要当地公共汽车时刻表，请与达费德郡政务委员会联系。

senses.definition: n.对，双,配偶，夫妻,<口>几个，两三个
senses.sentence: She had hoped the **couple** would put on a show of unity.
senses.translation: 她曾经希望那对夫妇会表现出和睦相处的样子。

senses.definition: n.优惠券,息票，通票,试样，试件,配给券
senses.sentence: To enter, simply complete the **coupon** on page 150.
senses.translation: 要想参加，只需填写第150页的参赛表格。

senses.definition: n.勇气,胆量,魄力,肝胆
senses.sentence: He showed great **courage** by admitting that he is an alcoholic.
senses.translation: 他以极大的勇气承认自己酗酒。

senses.definition: n.课程,航线,行动方向,一道菜
senses.sentence: She'd half expected him to withdraw from the **course**.
senses.translation: 她多少已经预料到他会中途就退出这门课程。

senses.definition: n.法院，法庭,院子，天井,宫廷,网球场
n.谦恭有礼，礼貌，请安,有礼貌的举止[言词],承蒙
senses.sentence: The air was fresh, **courtesy** of three holes in the roof.
senses.translation: 房顶有3个洞，所以空气很清新。

senses.definition: n.庭院，院子,天井
senses.sentence: Dena took them into the **courtyard** to sit in the sun.
senses.translation: 德娜带他们到院子里晒太阳。

senses.definition: n.堂[表]兄弟姊妹,远亲，同辈
senses.sentence: I tried again to get ahold of my **cousin** Joan.
senses.translation: 我再次尝试联系我的表妹琼。

senses.definition: v.遮盖,掩蔽,涉及,洒上
senses.sentence: Pack the fruits and nuts into the jars and **cover** with brandy.
senses.translation: 把水果和坚果放进罐子里，用白兰地酒浸泡。

senses.definition: n.奶牛，乳牛,母兽,雌（象，鲸等）,<侮辱>对女性的蔑称
senses.sentence: I'm not kidding, Frank. There's a **cow** out there, just standing around.
senses.translation: 我没有开玩笑，弗兰克。外面有一头母牛，就站在附近。

senses.definition: adj.舒适的，安逸的，惬意的
senses.sentence: We spent a **cozy** evening chatting by the fire.
senses.translation: 我们在炉火旁聊天度过了一个舒适的晚上。

senses.definition: n.蟹，蟹肉,阴虱,脾气乖戾的人,[植]沙果，沙果树
senses.sentence: The claws of a **crab** are used for grasping things, especially food.
senses.translation: 螃蟹用钳抓东西, 特别是食物.

senses.definition: vt.破裂，打开,（使…）开裂,说（笑话）,开瓶
senses.sentence: She's calm and strong, and she is just not going to **crack**.
senses.translation: 她镇定而且坚强，绝不会垮掉。

senses.definition: n.摇篮,发源地，发祥地,吊架，支架,婴儿时期
senses.sentence: I dropped the receiver back in the **cradle**.
senses.translation: 我把听筒放回听筒架上。

senses.definition: n.手艺,诡计,飞行器,船
senses.sentence: The frail **craft** rocked as he clambered in.
senses.translation: 他爬进来的时候，那件易碎的工艺品摇晃起来。

senses.definition: n.吊车，起重机,鹤
senses.sentence: **Crane** is a kind of bird with very long legs and neck.
senses.translation: 鹤是一种腿和脖子都很长的鸟.

senses.definition: v.碰撞,使发出巨响,暴跌,睡觉
senses.sentence: I just want to **crash** out on the sofa.
senses.translation: 我只想在沙发上睡会儿。

senses.definition: vi.爬行,缓慢行进,巴结
senses.sentence: I was heading on a secret mission that made my flesh **crawl**.
senses.translation: 我正要执行一项让我心惊肉跳的秘密任务。

senses.definition: adj.疯狂的,不理智的,离奇的,生气的
senses.sentence: Some people can diet like **crazy** and not lose weight.
senses.translation: 有些人拼命节食也不能减肥。

senses.definition: n.乳霜,精英,奶油色,乳脂，奶油
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **cream** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【cream】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: vt.创造，创作,产生,封爵，把…封为（贵族）
senses.sentence: The superglue may not **create** a bond with some plastics.
senses.translation: 强力胶水可能无法粘住某些塑料。

senses.definition: adj.创造性的，有创造力的,有创意的，创新的，创造的
senses.sentence: **Creative** people are usually very determined and thrive on overcoming obstacles.
senses.translation: 富有创造力的人一般都意志非常坚定，能不断克服困难，事业蒸蒸日上。

senses.definition: n.生物，动物,人,创造物,（他人的）工具
senses.sentence: Alaskan Eskimos believe that every living **creature** possesses a spirit.
senses.translation: 阿拉斯加的爱斯基摩人认为每一个活着的生物都有灵魂。

senses.definition: n.信誉，信用,[金融]贷款,荣誉,学分
senses.sentence: You're a nice girl, Lettie, and your kind heart does you **credit**.
senses.translation: 你是个好女孩儿，莱蒂，你的善良值得称赞。

senses.definition: vi.爬行，匍匐,缓慢地行进
senses.sentence: I would **creep** in and with stealthy footsteps explore the second-floor.
senses.translation: 我会偷偷溜进去，轻手轻脚地查看一下二楼。

senses.definition: n.全体船员,全体乘务员,一群，一帮
senses.sentence: The ship's **crew** were now exhausted and utterly demoralized.
senses.translation: 这艘船上的船员现在都已精疲力竭，彻底丧失了信心。

senses.definition: n.蟋蟀,板球,矮木凳
senses.sentence: There was precious little about the **cricket** to animate the crowd.
senses.translation: 板球比赛能激起观众热情的地方很少。

senses.definition: vi.打板球
senses.sentence: The pity of it was that the Americans didn't play **cricket**.
senses.translation: 可惜的是美国人不打板球。

senses.definition: n.罪行，犯罪,罪恶
senses.sentence: The sum of evidence points to the **crime** resting on them.
senses.translation: 所有证据都表明该犯罪乃他们所为.

senses.definition: n.罪犯，犯人
senses.sentence: Northbridge is a cool, calculating and clever **criminal** who could strike again.
senses.translation: 诺思布里奇是个头脑冷静、诡计多端、阴险狡诈的罪犯，他可能还会犯案。

senses.definition: vt.使跛,受伤致残,严重削弱,使陷于瘫痪
senses.sentence: A total cut-off of supplies would **cripple** the country's economy.
senses.translation: 全面切断物品供应会使该国经济陷入瘫痪。

senses.definition: n.危机,危难时刻,决定性时刻，紧要关头,转折点
senses.sentence: The Kremlin is still insisting on a diplomatic solution to the **crisis**.
senses.translation: 俄罗斯中央政府依然坚持通过外交方式解决危机。

senses.definition: adj.脆的,干冷的,易碎的,新鲜的，爽快的
senses.sentence: Her house is light and airy, **crisp** and clean.
senses.translation: 她的房子光线充足，空气流通，清新整洁。

senses.definition: n.（批评、判断等的）标准，准则,规范
senses.sentence: Senior managers stipulated work-life balance as their main **criterion** when choosing jobs.
senses.translation: 高级经理人把工作与生活的平衡作为择业的主要标准。

senses.definition: n.批评家,评论员,批评者,挑剔的人
senses.sentence: He was a stern **critic** but an extremely kindly man.
senses.translation: 他是个苛刻的批评家，但却是个非常善良的人。

senses.definition: adj.批评的，爱挑剔的,关键的,严重的,极重要的
senses.sentence: I gather his report is highly **critical** of the trial judge.
senses.translation: 据我所知，他在报道中毫不留情地批评了初审法官。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.评论，批评
senses.sentence: You can **criticise** him until you're blue in the face, but you'll never change his personality.
senses.translation: 即使你苦口婆心地批评他，也改变不了他的个性。

senses.definition: n.批评，批判,鉴定，审定，考证，校勘,苛求，[哲]批判主义,评论，评论文章
vt.& vi.分析，评估,批评,挑剔
senses.sentence: They would **criticize** me, or worse yet, pay me no attention.
senses.translation: 他们会指责我，或者更糟糕的是，干脆对我毫不理睬。

senses.definition: n.农作物,产量,庄稼,平头
senses.sentence: I let the horse drop his head to **crop** the spring grass.
senses.translation: 我让马低下头啃吃春天的青草。

senses.definition: n.杂交动物,杂种
senses.sentence: Unfortunately attempts to **crossbreed** it with other potatoes have been unsuccessful.
senses.translation: 不幸的是，将它与其他土豆品种杂交的尝试均告失败。

senses.definition: n.人群,群众,一群
senses.sentence: Three mortar shells had landed close to a **crowd** of people.
senses.translation: 3枚迫击炮弹落在人群旁。

senses.definition: n.王冠,花冠（有时象征胜利）,王权,（某物的）顶部
senses.sentence: She says the sovereignty of the **Crown** must be preserved.
senses.translation: 她说必须维护王国政府的主权。

senses.definition: adj.关键性的，极其显要的,决定性的,十字形的
senses.sentence: Talent, hard work and sheer tenacity are all **crucial** to career success.
senses.translation: 事业要成功，才能、勤奋和顽强的意志都至关重要。

senses.definition: n.原[生]材料，天然物质,原油
senses.sentence: A **crude** oil slick quickly spreads out over water.
senses.translation: 原油泄露后的浮油很快在水面上扩散开来。

senses.definition: adj.残酷的，残忍的,使人痛苦的，让人受难的,无情的，严酷的
senses.sentence: He is still the butt of **cruel** jokes about his humble origins.
senses.translation: 他仍然因出身低微而被人无情嘲笑。

senses.definition: n.残忍,残忍的行为,残酷行为,虐待
senses.sentence: War turns morality inside out: killing and **cruelty** are virtues.
senses.translation: 战争颠倒是非：杀戮与残忍成了美德。

senses.definition: vi.巡游,漫游,巡航
senses.sentence: Don's story unfolded as the **cruise** got under way.
senses.translation: 随着航行的开始，唐的故事也随之展开。

senses.definition: vt.压破，压碎,镇压,弄皱,挤榨，榨出
senses.sentence: Franklin and his thirteen-year-old son somehow got separated in the **crush**.
senses.translation: 富兰克林和他13岁的儿子在人群中被挤散了。

senses.definition: n.面包皮,外壳,硬外皮,地壳
senses.sentence: The pastry **crust** was always underdone.
senses.translation: 馅饼的壳皮常常烤得不透.

senses.definition: vt.& vi.哭,喊，叫
n.结晶（体）,晶体,水晶,水晶饰品
senses.sentence: Some of the finest drinking glasses are made from lead **crystal**.
senses.translation: 一些最高档的酒杯是用铅晶质玻璃制成的。

senses.definition: n.立方形，立方体,立方，三次幂,小房间
senses.sentence: Remove the seeds and stones and **cube** the flesh.
senses.translation: 把籽和果核弄掉，将果肉切成小方块。

senses.definition: n.黄瓜，胡瓜
senses.sentence: **Cucumber** is good for soothing tired eyes.
senses.translation: 黄瓜有助于舒缓眼部疲劳。

senses.definition: n.暗示，提示,线索,[台]球杆,情绪，心情
senses.sentence: Kevin arrived right on **cue** to care for Harry.
senses.translation: 凯文到的正是时候，可以照顾哈丽。

senses.definition: n.犯人，罪犯,肇事者，被告人
senses.sentence: He knows the **culprit** but is not letting on.
senses.translation: 他知道罪犯是谁，但却闭口不说。

senses.definition: vt.耕作，种植,教养，栽培,改善,交朋友
senses.sentence: Estonia has done much to **cultivate** the friendship of western European countries.
senses.translation: 爱沙尼亚努力发展与西欧国家的友谊。

senses.definition: n.文化,[生物学]（微生物等的）培养,修养,养殖
senses.sentence: Our **culture** is more complex than he knows. Wheels within wheels.
senses.translation: 我们的文化比他所知道的要复杂得多，相当庞杂。

senses.definition: adj.狡猾的,奸诈的,灵巧的
senses.sentence: Enrico was too good, an old fox, **cunning**.
senses.translation: 恩里科很有心计，是一只狡猾的老狐狸。

senses.definition: n.狡猾,诡诈,狡黠
senses.sentence: Intelligence and **cunning** emanated from him.
senses.translation: 他透着一种智慧和狡黠。

senses.definition: n.杯子,一杯（的量）,（胸罩的）罩杯,优胜杯
senses.sentence: His next job is to get us to the World **Cup** finals.
senses.translation: 他接下来的任务是带领我们闯入世界杯决赛圈。

senses.definition: n.橱柜,衣柜,食物柜,壁橱
senses.sentence: There's an extra blanket in the bottom drawer of the **cupboard**.
senses.translation: 壁橱最下面的抽屉里还有一条多余的毯子。

senses.definition: n.限制，抑制,勒马绳，马衔索,（人行道的）镶边,（证券的）场外市场
senses.sentence: A large, shiny black limo pulled up to the **curb**.
senses.translation: 一辆闪亮的黑色豪华大轿车在路边停下。

senses.definition: n.治愈,药物,疗法,措施
senses.sentence: A permanent **cure** will only be effected by acupuncture, chiropractic or manipulation.
senses.translation: 只有针灸、脊椎指压治疗或者推拿术才能实现彻底治愈。

senses.definition: n.好奇心，爱打听的癖性,奇人,奇物，古玩,奇特性
senses.sentence: She also stimulated his **curiosity** and opened his mind to other cultures.
senses.translation: 她还激发了他的好奇心，使他愿意了解其他文化。

senses.definition: adj.好奇的, 好求知的,奇妙的, 稀奇的
senses.sentence: The interior was shielded from the **curious** gaze of passersby.
senses.translation: 屋子内部被挡住了，以防路人好奇地张望。

senses.definition: n.一绺鬈发,卷曲物,螺旋状物,（指头发）拳曲
senses.sentence: Raise one foot, **curl** the toes and point the foot down-wards.
senses.translation: 抬起一只脚，弯曲脚趾，使脚尖朝下。

senses.definition: n.货币,通用，流通，流传，传播,市价，行情,流通时间
senses.sentence: You need hard **currency** to get anything halfway decent.
senses.translation: 你得有硬通货才能买到还算不错的东西。

senses.definition: adj.现在的,最近的,流行的,流传的
senses.sentence: He must sell the house for the **current** market value.
senses.translation: 他必须以目前的市价出售这座房子。

senses.definition: n.全部课程，课程
senses.sentence: The national **curriculum** must be a guide, not a straitjacket.
senses.translation: 国家课程设置必须是指导性的，而不是约束性的。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.诅咒,咒骂,使苦恼，使困苦,把（某人）逐出教门
senses.sentence: Joanna heard him bump into the table and **curse** again.
senses.translation: 乔安娜听见他撞到了桌子上，又骂骂咧咧的。

senses.definition: n.窗帘，门帘,帐幕之物，幕布,启幕，落幕
senses.sentence: The shops also offer a keenly priced **curtain**-making service.
senses.translation: 这些商店也提供价格优惠的窗帘制作服务。

senses.definition: n.弧线，曲线,曲线状物,弯曲物,[棒]曲线板
senses.sentence: The slope increases as you go up the **curve**.
senses.translation: 上了弯道以后，路越来越陡。

senses.definition: n.（隔离两个表面的）垫,垫子,起保护（或缓冲）作用的事物,（台球等运动）（台球桌内侧边缘的）弹性衬里
senses.sentence: He sat on a tapestry **cushion** next to the hearth.
senses.translation: 他坐在壁炉边上的一块绣花软垫上。

senses.definition: n.习惯，惯例,海关，关税,经常光顾,[总称]（经常性的）顾客
senses.sentence: Furniture can also be **custom**-made to suit your own requirements.
senses.translation: 你也可以按照自己的要求定制家具。

senses.definition: adj.习惯的,通常的,照惯例的
senses.sentence: The king carried himself with his **customary** elegance.
senses.translation: 国王保持着一贯的温文尔雅。

senses.definition: n.顾客，客户,主顾,<口>家伙
senses.sentence: In some stores we were undermanned and **customer** service was suffering.
senses.translation: 有些店我们人手不足，对顾客照顾不周。

senses.definition: vt.削减,剪切,切成,删剪
senses.sentence: Serve the cake warm or at room temperature, **cut** in squares.
senses.translation: 等蛋糕温热或凉至室温时切成四方块端上桌。

senses.definition: n.循环，周期,自行车,时代，一段时间,整套
senses.sentence: Eddie parked his **cycle** against a lamp post and padlocked it.
senses.translation: 埃迪把他的自行车靠在路灯柱上，用挂锁锁好。

senses.definition: n.圆柱,圆筒,圆柱体,气缸
adv.每日,逐日,每周日,日复一日地
senses.sentence: The **Daily** Mail has the headline "The Voice of Conscience"
senses.translation: 《每日邮报》的头版标题为“良知的声音”。

senses.definition: n.牛奶场,乳品店,牛奶及乳品业
senses.sentence: They ran the general store and the farm **dairy**.
senses.translation: 他们经营着杂货店和农场的乳品店。

senses.definition: n.水坝，堰,水库,（牙科用的）橡皮障,〈比喻〉障碍
senses.sentence: Breaking the **dam** could submerge downstream cities such as Wuhan.
senses.translation: 摧毁大坝可能会淹没下游城市，比如武汉。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.损害，毁坏
senses.sentence: The radiation can **damage** microprocessors and computer memories, causing them to malfunction.
senses.translation: 辐射会损坏微处理器和电脑内存，使之失灵。

senses.definition: adj.该死的,（表示厌烦）可恶的
senses.sentence: I couldn't get any purchase with the screwdriver on the **damn** screws.
senses.translation: 我用螺丝刀拧那些该死的螺丝钉时一点也使不上劲儿。

senses.definition: n.潮湿,消沉，失望,矿井瓦斯,有毒气体
senses.sentence: They all walked barefoot across the **damp** sand to the water's edge.
senses.translation: 他们全都光着脚走过潮湿的沙地来到水边。

senses.definition: n.跳舞,舞会,舞蹈艺术,舞曲
senses.sentence: They will **dance** two performances of Ashton's "Romeo and Juliet".
senses.translation: 他们将表演阿什顿的《罗密欧与朱丽叶》中的两场舞。

senses.definition: n.危险,危险物，威胁
senses.sentence: Subconsciously I had known that I would not be in personal **danger**.
senses.translation: 我潜意识里已经知道我不会有人身危险。

senses.definition: adj.危险的
senses.sentence: Such laws could protect the consumer from harmful or **dangerous** remedies.
senses.translation: 这样的法规可以保护消费者免受有害或者危险药品的威胁。

senses.definition: vt.敢,敢做,激（某人做某事）,问（某人）有没有胆量（做某事）
senses.sentence: People always think I'm a fool, and I **dare** say they're right.
senses.translation: 人们总认为我是个傻瓜，想必他们是对的。

senses.definition: adj.黑暗的,乌黑的,忧郁的,神秘的
senses.sentence: He stared into the **dark** void where the battle had been fought.
senses.translation: 他凝望着那片漆黑的空旷之地，那次战役就是在这里进行的。

senses.definition: n.黑暗,阴郁,模糊,无知
senses.sentence: The light went out, and the room was plunged into **darkness**.
senses.translation: 灯熄了，屋里陷入一片漆黑。

senses.definition: vi.猛冲,赶紧离开
senses.sentence: He's in a **dash** to get Russia back into Europe.
senses.translation: 他急于让俄罗斯回归欧洲。

senses.definition: n.资料，材料,datum的复数,[计算机]数据，资料,从科学实验中提取的价值
senses.sentence: If they value these **data**, let them pay for them.
senses.translation: 他们要是看重这些数据，就让他们出钱买。

senses.definition: n.数据库,资料库,信息库
n.日期，日子,约会,时代，年代,（北非和西亚常见的海枣树的）海枣
senses.sentence: A black coat always looks smart and will never **date**.
senses.translation: 黑色外套看起来总是很潇洒，而且永远也不会落伍。

senses.definition: n.女儿,产物，后代,（某地的）妇女,[生]子代
senses.sentence: She even claimed the couple's **daughter** was possessed by the devil.
senses.translation: 她甚至宣称那对夫妇的女儿被魔鬼附了体。

senses.definition: vt.使（某人）气馁，威吓
senses.sentence: Even a greater natural calamity cannot **daunt** us.
senses.translation: 再大的自然灾害也压不垮我们.

senses.definition: n.黎明，拂晓,开端,醒悟
senses.sentence: I started work at **dawn** and returned only at nightfall.
senses.translation: 我披星戴月地工作。

senses.definition: n.一天,白天,时期,节日
senses.sentence: Try these toning exercises before you start the **day**.
senses.translation: 在开始一天的活动之前，试着做做这些强身健体的体操。

senses.definition: n.日光，白昼,清早，黎明,公开，发表,<俚>眼睛，视力
n.白天，日间,昼日,昼
senses.sentence: **Daytime** television tended to remind her too forcefully of her own situation.
senses.translation: 日间电视节目往往使她深刻地认识到自身的境况。

senses.definition: vt.使目眩,使惊异不已
senses.sentence: The movie's special effects fail to **dazzle**.
senses.translation: 这部电影的特效未能出彩。

senses.definition: adj.死去的,完全的,无感觉的,呆板的
senses.sentence: But that doesn't mean this brand of politics is **dead** or dying.
senses.translation: 但那并不意味着这种政治主张已经或正在消亡。

senses.definition: n.最后期限,截止期限,死线,原稿截止时间
senses.sentence: One month before the **deadline** we see the hollowness of these promises.
senses.translation: 离最后期限只有一个月时，我们认识到了这些许诺都是空头支票。

senses.definition: adj.极端的，非常的,致命的，致死的,非常有效的,如死一般的
senses.sentence: His mother's voice was one he knew; ice cold and **deadly**.
senses.translation: 母亲的声音是他很熟悉的：冰冷、无情。

senses.definition: adj.聋的,不愿听的
senses.sentence: I hope that our appeals will not fall on **deaf** ears.
senses.translation: 我希望我们的呼吁不会没人理睬。

senses.definition: vt.[牌戏]分,分配,经营,施予
n.（大学的）学院院长，系主任,教务长,[宗]主任牧师,（大学，尤指牛津、剑桥大学的）学监
senses.sentence: Stan **Dean**, easily identifiable by his oddly-shaped hat, sat in a doorway.
senses.translation: 斯坦·迪安坐在门口，他那顶奇形怪状的帽子一下子就让人认出他来。

senses.definition: adj.亲爱的,敬爱的,昂贵的,严厉的
senses.sentence: "Could I have a word?" — "Oh **dear**, if you must."
senses.translation: “我能说一句吗？”——“亲爱的，如果你非说不可的话，好吧。”

senses.definition: n.死亡,（某种）死法，死亡方式,病危,死神
senses.sentence: It was a crime of espionage and carried the **death** penalty.
senses.translation: 这是间谍罪，应判死刑。

senses.definition: n.讨论,辩论,争论,辩论
senses.sentence: There needs to be a properly informed public **debate**.
senses.translation: 有必要让公众在充分知情的状况下展开辩论。

senses.definition: n.债务,负债情况,义务,罪，过失
senses.sentence: The plan is designed to reduce some of the company's mountainous **debt**.
senses.translation: 该计划旨在减少公司堆积如山的债务。

senses.definition: n.十年，十年间,十个一组,十年期
senses.sentence: These developments were foreseen in embryo more than a **decade** ago.
senses.translation: 这些发展早在十多年前的萌芽阶段就已预见到。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.（使）腐烂，腐朽
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **decay** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【decay】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: v.欺诈,误导
senses.sentence: The boys, if my eyes did not **deceive** me, were praying.
senses.translation: 如果我没有看错的话，那些男孩子正在祈祷。

senses.definition: n.12月
senses.sentence: Their first car rolls off the production line on **December** 16.
senses.translation: 他们的第一辆车于12月16日下线。

senses.definition: adj.正派的,得体的,（服装等）相称的，合宜的,相当好的
senses.sentence: I went to Brooks Brothers and bought myself a **decent** shirt.
senses.translation: 我去布鲁克斯兄弟专卖店给自己买了一件体面的衬衫。

senses.definition: vi.决定,下决心
senses.sentence: He might **decide** that it is best to induce labour.
senses.translation: 他也许决定最好引产。

senses.definition: n.小数
senses.sentence: The **decimal** 0.61 stands for 61 hundredths.

senses.definition: n.决定,果断,决议,（法院的）判决
senses.sentence: There has been a very mixed reaction to the **decision**.
senses.translation: 对于这个决定的反应非常不一致。

senses.definition: adj.决定性的,坚定的,果断的，决断的
senses.sentence: They were outplayed by the Colombians' slick passing and **decisive** finishing.
senses.translation: 哥伦比亚队凭借流畅的传球和终场前的制胜进球击败了他们。

senses.definition: n.甲板，舱板,[建]平屋顶，桥面,[铁路]客车车顶,〈俚〉地面
senses.sentence: Steamers tooted at us as sailors on **deck** waved in amusement.
senses.translation: 汽船向我们嘟嘟鸣笛时，甲板上的水手们饶有趣味地挥着手。

senses.definition: n.宣言，布告，公告，声明,（纳税品在海关的）申报,[法]（原告的）申诉，（证人的）陈述，口供,[牌]摊牌，叫牌
senses.sentence: On the customs **declaration**, the sender labeled the freight as agricultural machinery.
senses.translation: 在报关单上，寄货人将货物列为农用机械。

senses.definition: vt.宣布,声明，声称,申报,[法]供述
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **declare** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【declare】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.下降,（力量、健康、品格、权力、价值等的）衰退,下倾,（人、生命等的）衰退期
senses.sentence: The electoral fortunes of the Liberal Democratic party may **decline**.
senses.translation: 自由民主党的选举运势可能会下降。

senses.definition: vt.译（码），解（码）,分析及译解电子信号
senses.sentence: About 60,000 subscribers have special adapters to receive and **decode** the signals.
senses.translation: 大约6万用户拥有特殊的适配器来接收和转换信号。

senses.definition: vi.装饰,布置
senses.sentence: Use any pastry trimmings to **decorate** the apples.
senses.translation: 用剩余的油酥面皮装饰苹果。

senses.definition: n.减少，减小,减少量
senses.sentence: The demand for tea is on the **decrease** ( each year ).
senses.translation: 茶叶的需求量 ( 逐年 ) 递减.

senses.definition: vt.奉献，献身,（为表示感情或敬意将著作、乐曲、艺术作品等）题献给（某人、某事业等）(to),（在书、音乐或作品的前部）题献辞,以…供奉
senses.sentence: He felt that medicine was the most important cause to which he could **dedicate** himself.
senses.translation: 他觉得医学是他能够为之献身的最重大的事业.

senses.definition: vt.推论，推断,演绎,追溯根源
senses.sentence: The police were able to **deduce** where the fugitive was hiding.
senses.translation: 警方成功地推断出那逃亡者躲藏的地方.

senses.definition: vt.扣除，减去,演绎
senses.sentence: If you will just sign here, we will arrange for your bank to **deduct** your payments automatically.
senses.translation: 麻烦您在这里签一下字，我们将联系您的银行自动扣除您的付款。

senses.definition: n.行为,行动,<律>契约,证书
senses.sentence: A man's **deed** is the touchstone of his greatness or littleness.
senses.translation: 行动是一个人伟大或者渺小的试金石.

senses.definition: vt.认为，视为,主张，断定
senses.sentence: I **deem** it advisable to purchase the shares in the railway now.
senses.translation: 我认为现在购买铁路股票是明智的.

senses.definition: adv.深深地，深入地
senses.sentence: The economy remains **deep** in recession with few signs of a pick-up.
senses.translation: 经济仍深陷衰退之中，几乎没有好转的迹象。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.变深，加深,低沉
senses.sentence: The music room had been made to reflect and **deepen** sounds.
senses.translation: 这间音乐室经过特殊设计处理，能够反射声音，使声音变得低沉厚重。

senses.definition: vi.未履行任务或责任,受传唤时未出庭,由于不到庭而败诉,弃权
senses.sentence: Malvolio becomes, in **default** of competition, the play's moral centre.
senses.translation: 因为没有与其竞争者，马伏里奥自然成了该剧的道德核心。

senses.definition: n.战胜,失败,[法]废除
senses.sentence: Initially the government was unwilling to accept the **defeat**.
senses.translation: 最初政府不愿意承认失败。

senses.definition: n.瑕疵，毛病,欠缺，缺点
senses.sentence: The **defect** in the drainage must be remedied.
senses.translation: 这排水系统的缺陷该设法补救.

senses.definition: n.辩护,防御,防御工事,后卫
senses.sentence: The **defence** counsel warned that the judge should stop the trial.
senses.translation: 被告辩护律师强烈建议法官应该休庭。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.辩护,保卫,（足球、曲棍球等）防守,进行辩护
senses.sentence: Those people who took up weapons to **defend** themselves are political prisoners.
senses.translation: 那些拿起武器自卫的人是些政治犯。

senses.definition: vi.服从,延期,推迟
senses.sentence: We wish to **defer** our decision until next week.
senses.translation: 我们希望推迟到下星期再作出决定.

senses.definition: n.缺乏，不足,缺点，缺陷,不足额
senses.sentence: Symptoms of anaemia include weakness, fatigue and iron **deficiency**.
senses.translation: 贫血的症状包括虚弱、疲劳和缺铁。

senses.definition: n.不足额,赤字,亏空,亏损
senses.sentence: These will be very constrained budgets designed to get the **deficit** down.
senses.translation: 这些预算旨在减少赤字，将会大大受限。

senses.definition: vt.规定,使明确,精确地解释,画出…的线条
senses.sentence: It's hard to **define** exactly what has changed.
senses.translation: 很难解释清楚到底发生了什么变化.

senses.definition: adj.明确的,一定的,肯定,有把握
senses.sentence: Her Royal Highness has **definite** views about most things.
senses.translation: 女王陛下对大多数事情都有明确的观点。

senses.definition: n.定义,规定，明确,[物]清晰度,解释
senses.sentence: The legal **definition** of "know" often presumes mental control.
senses.translation: “知晓”的法律定义通常假定存在思维控制能力。

senses.definition: vt.不服从,公然反抗,蔑视,向…挑战
senses.sentence: The towering pine and cypress trees **defy** frost and snow.
senses.translation: 松柏参天傲霜雪.

senses.definition: vi.退化,堕落
senses.sentence: Inactivity can make your joints stiff, and the bones may begin to **degenerate**.
senses.translation: 长期不活动会导致关节僵硬，骨骼也可能开始退化。

senses.definition: n.[乐]音阶，度,[数]度，度数,程度,学位
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **degree** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【degree】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.延迟，拖延,耽搁,被耽搁或推迟的时间
senses.sentence: He hates **delay** and procrastination in all its forms.
senses.translation: 他讨厌任何形式的拖延和耽搁。

senses.definition: n.代表，代表团成员
senses.sentence: The Chinese people **delegate** their power to the People's Congress.
senses.translation: 中国人民授权人民代表大会.

senses.definition: vt.& vi.删除
senses.sentence: We will be pleased to **delete** the charge from the original invoice.
senses.translation: 我们决定将这笔费用从原始发票上删去。

senses.definition: adj.故意的,蓄意的,深思熟虑的,慎重的
senses.sentence: The Deputy Commander has condemned this weekend's protest as **deliberate** provocation.
senses.translation: 副指挥官谴责本周末的抗议活动是蓄意挑衅。

senses.definition: adj.微妙的,熟练的,纤弱的,易损的
senses.sentence: Although the coral looks hard, it is very **delicate**.
senses.translation: 珊瑚虽然看上去坚固，实际上非常易碎。

senses.definition: adj.美味的，可口的,有趣的,,喷香
senses.sentence: This **delicious** variation on an omelette is quick and easy to prepare.
senses.translation: 这种稍加变化的可口煎蛋卷做起来又快又容易。

senses.definition: n.快乐，高兴,使人高兴的东西或人
senses.sentence: Psychotherapists often take a perverse **delight** in criticizing other psychotherapists.
senses.translation: 精神治疗师们经常幸灾乐祸地批评自己的同行。

senses.definition: n.传送，投递,[法]（正式）交付,分娩,讲演
senses.sentence: The doctor worked busily beneath the blinding lights of the **delivery** room.
senses.translation: 这位医生在产房刺目的灯光下忙碌着。

senses.definition: n.需求,需要,要求，请求,销路
senses.sentence: The **demand** generated by one factory required the construction of another.
senses.translation: 一家工厂产生的需求使得必须再建造一家工厂。

senses.definition: n.民众,民主国家,民主主义,民主政治
senses.sentence: He said parliament and the process of **democracy** had been debased.
senses.translation: 他说议会和民主程序已遭贬值。

senses.definition: adj.民主的,民主政体的,民主主义的,<美>民主党的
senses.sentence: The **Democratic** candidate is still leading in the polls.
senses.translation: 民主党候选人的得票数依然领先。

senses.definition: vt.证明，证实,论证,显示，展示,演示，说明
senses.sentence: The best and the brightest pupils competed to **demonstrate** their intellectual prowess.
senses.translation: 最出色、最聪明的学生们竞相展示他们的才智。

senses.definition: vt.指代,预示,代表,意思是
senses.sentence: Sometime the term artesian is used to **denote** a confined aquifer.
senses.translation: 有时候人们也用自流含水层这一术语表示承压含水层.

senses.definition: vt.公开指责,正式指控,告发,通告废除
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **denounce** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【denounce】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: adj.密集的，稠密的,浓密的，浓厚的,愚钝的
senses.sentence: **Dense** smoke swirled and billowed, its rank fumes choking her.
senses.translation: 滚滚浓烟盘旋翻腾，恶臭味呛得她喘不过气来。

senses.definition: n.密度,稠密，浓厚,[物]浓度，比重,愚钝
senses.sentence: The population **density** of that country is 685 per square mile.
senses.translation: 那个国家的人口密度为每平方英里685人.

senses.definition: adj.牙齿的,牙科的,（辅音）齿音的
senses.sentence: The fees offered by the NHS do not recompense **dental** surgeons for their professional time.
senses.translation: 国民医疗保健系统所支付的费用中不涵盖牙科诊疗费用。

senses.definition: n.牙科医生
senses.sentence: A **dentist** may decide to extract the tooth to prevent recurrent trouble.
senses.translation: 牙医可能会决定拔掉那颗牙，以免反复发作。

senses.definition: vt.拒绝,拒绝承认,拒绝…占有,否认知情
senses.sentence: They appeared at court yesterday to **deny** charges of murder.
senses.translation: 他们昨天出庭，否认谋杀的指控。

senses.definition: v.离开，出发,去世,离职,脱轨
senses.sentence: My connecting plane didn't **depart** for another six hours.
senses.translation: 我搭乘的联运航班又过了6个小时才起飞。

senses.definition: n.部门，部,系，学部,知识范围,车间
senses.sentence: She was the only woman in Shell's legal **department**.
senses.translation: 她是壳牌公司法律事务部唯一的女性。

senses.definition: n.离开，离去,起程,背离,东西距离
senses.sentence: They checked in their luggage and found seats in the **departure** lounge.
senses.translation: 他们办完行李托运，到候机室找了座位坐下。

senses.definition: vi.依靠,依赖,信赖,决定于
senses.sentence: Whether such properties are a good deal will **depend** on individual situations.
senses.translation: 这样的地产是否可获得大笔收益还要视具体情形而定。

senses.definition: adj.依靠的,依赖的,取决于…的,有瘾的
senses.sentence: Political selection is more **dependent** on sophistry and less on economic literacy.
senses.translation: 政治选举更多地取决于诡辩的能力，而不在于是否懂经济。

senses.definition: vt.描绘，描画,描述
senses.sentence: The media **depict** him as a left-wing bogeyman.
senses.translation: 媒体把他描述成一个左翼大反派。

senses.definition: vt.悲悼，哀叹,谴责，强烈反对
senses.sentence: We **deplore** this lamentably ill-advised decision.
senses.translation: 我们强烈反对这个拙劣的、欠考虑的决定。

senses.definition: n.储蓄，存款,保证金,沉淀物,寄存，寄存品
senses.sentence: Dermot's putting his money by, in a **Deposit** Account.
senses.translation: 德莫特把钱存在一个定期存款账户里。

senses.definition: vt.压下，压低,使沮丧,使萧条,使跌价
senses.sentence: I know he is too optimistic but I don't want to **depress** him.
senses.translation: 我知道他太过乐观了，但我不想令他灰心丧气。

senses.definition: n.萎靡不振，沮丧,下陷处，坑,衰弱,减缓
senses.sentence: The movie sees Burton psychoanalysing Firth to cure him of his **depression**.
senses.translation: 在电影中伯顿对弗思进行了精神分析，想要治愈他的抑郁症。

senses.definition: vt.剥夺，夺去，使丧失
senses.sentence: This law will **deprive** us of our most basic rights.
senses.translation: 这条法律将剥夺我们最基本的权利.

senses.definition: n.深度,深处，深海,深奥，奥妙,进深
senses.sentence: Mr Gibson is clearly intellectually out of his **depth**.
senses.translation: 吉布森先生显然才智不逮。

senses.definition: n.副手,代理人,代表
senses.sentence: He was given the title of **deputy** prime minister.
senses.translation: 他被授予副总理之职。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.得到，导出,源于，来自,（从…中）提取
senses.sentence: Most patients **derive** enjoyment from leafing through old picture albums.
senses.translation: 大多数病人都很喜欢翻看旧相册。

senses.definition: v.下来，下降 ,下斜,降临,突然造访
senses.sentence: She's got too much dignity to **descend** to writing anonymous letters.
senses.translation: 她是个自尊心很强的人，绝不会自贬身份去写匿名信。

senses.definition: n.后代,后裔,（由过去类似物发展来的）派生物,弟子
senses.sentence: He was an O'Conor and a direct **descendant** of the last High King of Ireland.
senses.translation: 他属于奥康纳家族，是爱尔兰最后一位君王的嫡系后裔。

senses.definition: n.下降,血统,倾斜
n.描述,形容,种类,类型
senses.sentence: We were in a disaster situation that defies **description**.
senses.translation: 我们陷入了难以言表的糟糕处境。

senses.definition: n.沙漠,荒地,应得的赏罚,功劳，美德
senses.sentence: The paper'sprice rise will encourage readers to **desert** in even greater numbers.
senses.translation: 报纸价格的上涨将导致更多的读者不再订阅。

senses.definition: vt.应受,应得,值得
senses.sentence: His children's books are classics that **deserve** to be much better known.
senses.translation: 他的儿童书非常经典，应该为更多人所知晓。

senses.definition: n.设计,图案,结构,计划
senses.sentence: The intelligence service conceived a grand **design** to assassinate the War Minister.
senses.translation: 情报机构策划了一项暗杀陆军部长的重大计划。

senses.definition: vt.指明，指出,指派,表明，意味着,把…定名为
senses.sentence: There are efforts under way to **designate** the bridge a historic landmark.
senses.translation: 人们正在努力将这座桥定为历史遗迹。

senses.definition: adj.令人满意的,值得拥有的,可取的,性感的
senses.sentence: The most **desirable** properties necessarily command astonishingly high prices.
senses.translation: 最值得拥有的财产必然要价不菲。

senses.definition: n.愿望,欲望,希望,请求
senses.sentence: She confessed to her parents her **desire** to act.
senses.translation: 她向父母坦言了自己想演戏的愿望。

senses.definition: n.书桌，办公桌,服务台,部门,（美）讲道台
senses.sentence: They will need a reasonable amount of **desk** area and good light.
senses.translation: 他们将需要一个面积较大的摆放办公桌的地方和充足的照明。

senses.definition: adj.无人的,荒凉的,孤独的，凄凉的,荒废的
senses.sentence: a bleak and **desolate** landscape
senses.translation: 一片荒凉的景色

senses.definition: n.绝望,使人绝望的人（或事物）
senses.sentence: I would overcome any weakness, any **despair**, any fear.
senses.translation: 我要克服所有的软弱、绝望和恐惧。

senses.definition: vi.绝望
senses.sentence: As his energy drained away, his **despair** and worry grew.
senses.translation: 当他的精力耗尽时，他的绝望和担心也增加了。

senses.definition: n.&v.派遣
senses.sentence: He feels we should act with **despatch**.
senses.translation: 他觉得我们应该迅速行动。

senses.definition: adj.绝望的,由绝望而引起的,铤而走险的，孤注一掷的,急切的，极度渴望的
senses.sentence: Car firms are **desperate** to achieve economies of scale.
senses.translation: 汽车厂商拼命想要实现规模经济。

senses.definition: vt.鄙视，看不起
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **despise** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【despise】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: prep.不管,尽管（自己）不愿意,不在乎,虽有
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **despite** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【despite】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.餐后甜食,甜点
senses.sentence: Scott was obviously inebriated by the time the **dessert** was served.
senses.translation: 到了上甜点的时候，斯科特显然已经喝醉了。

senses.definition: n.目的，目标,目的地，终点,[罕用语]预定，指定
senses.sentence: His **destination** was Chobham Common, a long way from his Cotswold home.
senses.translation: 他的目的地是乔伯姆公地，那里和他在科茨沃尔德的家离得很远。

senses.definition: n.命运,天命，天数,命运的三女神,主宰事物的力量
senses.sentence: **Destiny** has ordained that they are who they are.
senses.translation: 命运已经决定了他们的性格为人。

senses.definition: vt.破坏，摧毁,消灭，歼灭（敌人）,杀死,使失败
senses.sentence: They can't **destroy** truth without **destroying** each and every one of us.
senses.translation: 除非他们将我们赶尽杀绝，否则真理不灭。

senses.definition: n.破坏，毁灭，消灭，灭亡，扑灭，驱除,摧毁,毁灭的原因，破坏手段,杀害
senses.contextMeaning: 破坏，毁灭，消灭，灭亡，扑灭，驱除
senses.sentence: There is worldwide concern about the **destruction** of the rainforests.
senses.translation: 全世界都在关注热带雨林遭到破坏的问题。

senses.definition: adj.破坏性的,毁灭性的,有害的
senses.sentence: He was unable to contain his own **destructive** feelings.
senses.translation: 他无法抑制自己消极的情绪。

senses.definition: vt.分离，拆开,派遣,分派,使超然
senses.sentence: It helps them **detach** themselves from their problems and become more objective.
senses.translation: 这有助于他们从所面临的问题中跳出来，变得更客观一些。

senses.definition: n.详述,（照片、绘画等的）细部,细目，琐碎,各种细节
senses.sentence: The painting had been executed with meticulous attention to **detail**.
senses.translation: 画这幅画的时候，画家非常注意细节。

senses.definition: vt.留住，阻住,耽搁,拘留，扣留
senses.sentence: He caught her arm in a subconscious attempt to **detain** her.
senses.translation: 他下意识地抓住她的胳膊想挽留她。

senses.definition: vt.查明，发现,洞察,侦察，侦查,[电子学]检波
senses.sentence: He conjectured that some individuals may be able to **detect** major calamities.
senses.translation: 他猜测说有些人也许能够察觉重大灾难。

senses.definition: n.侦探
senses.sentence: Joan Smith's **detective** stories are a cut above the rest.
senses.translation: 琼·史密斯的侦探小说比其他侦探小说都要出色。

senses.definition: vt.使恶化
senses.sentence: Police, weary and increasingly sour in mood, wonder aloud why the situation has been allowed to **deteriorate**.
senses.translation: 警察们疲惫不堪，心情也越来越糟糕，他们不禁满腹狐疑地问：为什么听凭情况不断地恶化下去？

senses.definition: vt.& vi.（使）下决心，（使）做出决定
senses.sentence: A debriefing would follow this operation, to **determine** where it went wrong.
senses.translation: 这次行动之后将会有一个任务执行情况报告会，以便确定是哪里出了问题。

senses.definition: vt.使（货币）贬值,降低（某事物）的价值，贬低
senses.sentence: If we dig more diligently we must not **devalue** so - called routine reporting.
senses.translation: 如果我们能更加努力地去调查,我们就不应贬低所谓的例行报道的价值.

senses.definition: vi.发展,生长,形成,发达
senses.sentence: You have to **develop** your capabilities to the maximum.
senses.translation: 你必须尽你所能。

senses.definition: v.脱离，越轨，违背，误入歧途,使脱离常轨
senses.contextMeaning: 脱离，越轨，违背，误入歧途
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **deviate** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【deviate】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.装置，设备,方法,策略,手段
senses.sentence: The **device** had been used operationally some months previously.
senses.translation: 该设备几个月之前曾投入运行。

senses.definition: v.设计,发明,策划,想出
senses.sentence: White supremacists **devise** new Methods: To disenfranchise Negroes.
senses.translation: 白人至上论者想出新的方法以剥夺黑人的公民权.

senses.definition: vt.把…奉献（给），把…专用（于）,奉献
senses.sentence: Faculty members **devote** most of their time to scholarly research.
senses.translation: 全院教师大部分时间都用来从事学术研究。

senses.definition: vt.诊断,判断
senses.sentence: The test is used to **diagnose** a variety of diseases.
senses.translation: 此项化验可用于诊断多种疾病。

senses.definition: n.图表,图解,示意图,[数]线图
senses.sentence: Like any such **diagram**, it is a simplification.
senses.translation: 像其他这种表格一样，这是简化了的。

senses.definition: n.日晷,钟（表）面，标度盘,拨号盘,表盘
senses.sentence: At the center of the **dial** is a piece of smoky glass.
senses.translation: 表盘的中央是一块烟灰色的玻璃。

senses.definition: n.方言，土语,语调,[语]语支,专业用语
senses.sentence: In the fifties, many Italians spoke only local **dialect**.
senses.translation: 在20世纪50年代，许多意大利人只会说当地方言。

senses.definition: v.对话,用对话表达
senses.sentence: Modeless **dialog** boxes frequently have several buttons that immediately invoke various functions.
senses.translation: 不要忘记非模态对话框中经常会有几个按钮,可以立即激活不同的功能.

senses.definition: n.对话,（文学、戏剧、电影等中的）对话,对白,意见分歧者之间的意见交换
senses.sentence: The consulate will carryon a political **dialogue** with Indonesia.
senses.translation: 领事馆将和印度尼西亚举行政治对话。

senses.definition: n.直径，直径长,放大率
senses.sentence: This hole was a scant .23 inches in **diameter**.
senses.translation: 这个洞眼的直径只有0.23英寸。

senses.definition: n.钻石，金刚石,菱形,方块
senses.sentence: The **diamond** towns are gradually being reclaimed by the desert.
senses.translation: 这些钻石城镇正逐渐重归沙漠。

senses.definition: n.日记，日志,日记簿
senses.sentence: In his **diary** of 1944 he proclaims unswerving loyalty to the monarchy.
senses.translation: 他在1944年的日记里声称对君主忠贞不贰。

senses.definition: vi.口述,命令
senses.sentence: It took him a long time to **dictate** this letter.
senses.translation: 口述这封信花了他很长时间.

senses.definition: n.口授，听写,听写测验,命令
senses.sentence: She is transcribing, from his **dictation**, the diaries of Simon Forman.
senses.translation: 她正根据他的口述记录西蒙·福曼的日记。

senses.definition: n.词典，字典,[自]代码字典
senses.sentence: The **dictionary** is a vast treasure trove of information.
senses.translation: 那本词典是个巨大的信息宝库。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.死亡，熄灭,凋零，枯萎,渴望，盼望
senses.sentence: You stay here, you **die**. No two ways about it.
senses.translation: 你若留在这里，必死无疑。

senses.definition: n.日常饮食,规定饮食
senses.sentence: Some cases of arthritis respond to a gluten-free **diet**.
senses.translation: 无麸质饮食对一些关节炎患者有疗效。

senses.definition: vi.不同，相异,不同意，意见相左,争吵
senses.sentence: Your needs can **differ** from day to day.
senses.translation: 你的需要每天可能都会不同。

senses.definition: n.差别，差异,[数]差数，差额,意见分歧,特色
senses.sentence: For a beach resort with a **difference**, try Key West.
senses.translation: 如果想去一个与众不同的海滨度假胜地，那就去基韦斯特吧。

senses.definition: adj.不同的,各式各样的,个别的,不平常
senses.sentence: Things might have been **different** if I'd talked a bit more.
senses.translation: 如果当时我再多说一点的话，结果或许会不一样。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.区分，区别，辨别
senses.sentence: It's difficult to **differentiate** between the two varieties.
senses.translation: 这两个品种很难辨别。

senses.definition: adj.困难的,难做的,难解的,不易相处的
senses.sentence: He had a reputation for being bloody-minded and **difficult**.
senses.translation: 他为人刻薄、难相处是出了名的。

senses.definition: n.困难，麻烦，难事,难度,异议，争论，纠葛,财政困难，（经济）拮据
senses.sentence: He was going red in the face and breathing with **difficulty**.
senses.translation: 他涨红了脸，费力地喘着气。

senses.definition: vt.（如用铲、锨或推土机等）挖掘,探究，发掘,刺，戳,喜欢，欣赏
senses.sentence: **Dig** a largish hole and bang the stake in first.
senses.translation: 挖一个大点儿的洞，先把木桩敲进去。

senses.definition: vi.消化,吸收食物,[化学]加热
senses.sentence: She couldn't **digest** food properly.
senses.translation: 她无法正常消化食物。

senses.definition: n.文摘,摘要,法律汇编,罗马法典
senses.sentence: The organization publishes a regular **digest** of environmental statistics.
senses.translation: 该组织定期出版一份环境统计数据摘要。

senses.definition: n.手指,（钢琴等的）琴键,数字
senses.sentence: Manufacturers are working on a new generation of cheaper **digital** radios.
senses.translation: 制造商正在研制价格更便宜的新一代数字收音机。

senses.definition: n.尊严,高尚,自豪,自尊
senses.sentence: It's an affront to human **dignity** to keep someone alive like this.
senses.translation: 如此维持一个人的生命是对人类尊严的冒犯。

senses.definition: n.窘境，困境,进退两难
senses.sentence: Public policy on the family presents liberals with a **dilemma**.
senses.translation: 有关家庭的公共政策使自由主义者陷入了进退两难的境地。

senses.definition: adj.勤奋的,勤勉的,用功的,费尽心血的
senses.sentence: He was careful and **diligent**. I was all over the place.
senses.translation: 他细心且勤奋，我则稀里糊涂。

senses.definition: vt.稀释，冲淡
senses.sentence: The water will **dilute** the wine.
senses.translation: 水能使酒变淡.

senses.definition: adj.暗淡的，昏暗的,不光明的,看不清的,（性质和特征上）不显著的
senses.sentence: His punishing schedule seemed to **dim** his fire at times.
senses.translation: 繁忙的日程似乎有时让他精力不济。

senses.definition: n.尺寸,[复]面积，范围,[物]量纲,[数]次元，度，维
senses.sentence: There was undeniably a strong theoretical **dimension** to his thinking.
senses.translation: 不可否认，他的思想很有理论深度。

senses.definition: vt.（使）减少，缩小,减弱…的权势,[乐]减半音
senses.sentence: We should try to **diminish** the cost of production.
senses.translation: 我们应尽力减少生产成本.

senses.definition: vi.吃饭，进餐
senses.sentence: I wish I could afford to **dine** off fresh meat every day.
senses.translation: 我要是能天天吃到新鲜的肉就好了.

senses.definition: n.正餐，主餐,宴会,晚餐
senses.sentence: Guess what? I'm going to **dinner** at Mrs. Combley's tonight.
senses.translation: 你猜怎么着？今晚我要去康伯利夫人家里赴宴。

senses.definition: n.[生]恐龙,守旧落伍的人，过时落后的东西
senses.sentence: The fossils at **Dinosaur** Cove are embedded in hard sandstones.
senses.translation: 恐龙峡谷中的化石都嵌在坚硬的砂岩中。

senses.definition: n.[化]二氧化物
senses.sentence: The two principal combustion products are water vapor and carbon **dioxide**.
senses.translation: 两种主要的燃烧产物是水蒸气和二氧化碳。

senses.definition: n.毕业文凭,学位证书,公文,奖状
senses.sentence: The course leads to a **diploma** in psychiatric nursing.
senses.translation: 读完这门课程可以获得精神病护理文凭.

senses.definition: adj.外交上的,外交人员的,有手腕的,策略的
senses.sentence: The Kremlin is still insisting on a **diplomatic** solution to the crisis.
senses.translation: 俄罗斯中央政府依然坚持通过外交方式解决危机。

senses.definition: adj.直接的,直的,直系的,率直的
senses.sentence: The **direct** marketing industry has become adept at packaging special offers.
senses.translation: 直接邮寄广告业在特卖品的包装方面已经变得非常熟练了。

senses.definition: n.方向,趋势,方面,用法说明
senses.sentence: Adjust the aerial's position and **direction** for the best reception.
senses.translation: 调整天线的位置和方向以达到最佳接收效果。

senses.definition: adv.直接地,不久，立即,正好地，恰好地,坦率地
senses.sentence: Catherine saw to it that the information went **directly** to Walter.
senses.translation: 凯瑟琳确保这条消息直接传达给了沃尔特。

senses.definition: n.主管，主任,董事，理事,负责人，监督者,导演
senses.sentence: He was hauled before the managing **director** and fired.
senses.translation: 他被叫去见总裁，然后就被解雇了。

senses.definition: n.人名地址录，（电话）号码簿,（计算机文件或程序的）目录
senses.contextMeaning: 人名地址录，（电话）号码簿
senses.sentence: Yahoo is the oldest and best-known Web **directory** service.
senses.translation: 雅虎是最早且最知名的因特网目录服务网站。

senses.definition: n.泥土,污垢，污泥,下流想法,恶意中伤的话
senses.sentence: He claims Pasolini overtook and tackled him, pushing him into the **dirt**.
senses.translation: 他声称帕索利尼追上去打他，把他推倒在烂泥里。

senses.definition: adj.恶劣的,肮脏的,卑劣的,下流的
senses.sentence: They chased down the stairs into the narrow, **dirty** street.
senses.translation: 他们冲下楼梯，来到狭窄、肮脏的街上。

senses.definition: vt.使无能力,使残废，使伤残,使无资格,使不中用
senses.sentence: Job applications from **disable** workers poured in at a staggering rate.
senses.translation: 残废工人求职申请书大批涌来、数量惊人.

senses.definition: n.不利，劣势，短处,损失
senses.sentence: Depression is the third thing that works to my patients' **disadvantage**.
senses.translation: 抑郁是威胁我的病人健康的第三大杀手。

senses.definition: vi.不同意,不一致,不适合,不符
senses.sentence: You and I are going to have to agree to **disagree** then.
senses.translation: 那你我只能各自保留不同意见了。

senses.definition: vi.不见，消失,不复存在，灭绝
senses.sentence: She stood watching the car's tail-lights **disappear** down the drive.
senses.translation: 她站在那儿，望着小汽车的尾灯消失在车道尽头。

senses.definition: vt.使失望,使破灭，使落空
senses.sentence: I'm sorry to **disappoint** your hope.
senses.translation: 对不起,我使你失望了.

senses.definition: n.灾难,彻底的失败,不幸,祸患
senses.sentence: An airliner came close to **disaster** while approaching Heathrow Airport.
senses.translation: 一架大型客机在飞近希思罗机场时差点儿发生空难。

senses.definition: adj.灾难性的,损失惨重的,极坏的,悲惨的
senses.sentence: The first four years of government were completely **disastrous**.
senses.translation: 政府前4年的执政彻底失败。

senses.definition: n.圆盘,唱片,磁盘
senses.sentence: Carl slipped a **disc** in his back while warming up.
senses.translation: 热身时卡尔腰椎间盘不慎错位了。

senses.definition: vt.丢弃，抛弃,解雇,出牌
senses.sentence: Einstein had the chutzpah to **discard** common sense and long-established theory.
senses.translation: 爱因斯坦敢于抛弃常识和长期公认的理论。

senses.definition: vt.看出,理解，了解,识别，辨别
senses.sentence: It is possible to **discern** a number of different techniques in her work.
senses.translation: 从她的作品中可以识别出许多不同的创作手法。

senses.definition: vt.下（客）,卸船,免除（自己的义务、负担等）,执行
senses.sentence: He was given a conditional **discharge** and ordered to pay compensation.
senses.translation: 他被有条件地释放了，被责令支付赔偿款。

senses.definition: n.训练,纪律,学科,符合行为准则的行为（或举止）
senses.sentence: The **discipline** of studying music can help children develop good work habits.
senses.translation: 音乐学习中的训练可以帮助孩子们培养好的工作习惯。

senses.definition: vt.公开,揭露,使显露,使暴露
senses.sentence: They contend that the company failed to **disclose** material information.
senses.translation: 他们坚持认为该公司并未透露实质性的信息。

senses.definition: vi.折扣,贴现率,贴现
senses.sentence: In 1979, Liquor Barn thrived as a **discount** merchandiser.
senses.translation: 1979年，LiquorBarn烈酒折扣店的生意十分红火。

senses.definition: vt.使气馁,使沮丧,阻碍,劝阻
senses.sentence: The Swiss wanted to **discourage** an inflow of foreign money.
senses.translation: 瑞士人想要阻止外资流入。

senses.definition: vt.发现,碰见,撞见,获得知识
senses.sentence: **Discover** the delights and luxury of a private yacht.
senses.translation: 体验私人游艇的乐趣和奢华。

senses.definition: n.发现，发觉,（剧情的）发展,被发现的事物,[法]显示证据
senses.sentence: The **discovery** is being hailed as The Holy Grail of astronomy.
senses.translation: 这一发现圆了天文学界的一个梦想。

senses.definition: adj.谨慎的，慎重的,考虑周到的,小心的,持重
senses.sentence: She had meant to make a **discreet** entrance, but conversation stopped dead.
senses.translation: 她本打算悄悄进去，但谈话却突然中断了。

senses.definition: n.矛盾,不符合（之处）
senses.sentence: At other times the **discrepancy** was of the order of 20%.
senses.translation: 往常的出入约为20%。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.歧视,区别,辨出
vt.讨论，谈论,论述，详述,商量
senses.sentence: The Politburo has been meeting in Peking to **discuss** the situation.
senses.translation: 政治局已在北京召开会议讨论形势。

senses.definition: n.疾病,弊端,不安
senses.sentence: The **disease** wiped out 40 million rabbits at a stroke.
senses.translation: 该疾病一下子就使4,000万只兔子丧命。

senses.definition: vt.隐瞒，掩饰,伪装，假装,化装,掩盖
senses.sentence: The British team did not **disguise** their delight at their success.
senses.translation: 英国队毫不掩饰他们获胜的喜悦。

senses.definition: n.反感，厌恶，嫌恶
senses.sentence: He rolled his eyes heavenward in **disgust**.
senses.translation: 他厌恶地翻着白眼。

senses.definition: n.盘,餐具,一盘食物,外貌有吸引力的人
senses.sentence: I'll **dish** up and you can grate the Parmesan.
senses.translation: 我来上菜，你把帕尔马干酪磨碎。

senses.definition: adj.不诚实的，不老实的,不正直的,狡猾的，阴险的,不可靠的
senses.sentence: **Dishonest** importers would be able to pocket the VAT collected from customers.
senses.translation: 不诚实的进口商将会能够把从顾客那里收取的增值税据为己有。

senses.definition: n.磁盘,唱片,圆盘,光盘
senses.sentence: One CD-ROM **disk** can hold over 100,000 pages of text.
senses.translation: 一张光盘可以存储十多万多页的文字资料。

senses.definition: vt.不喜欢,厌恶
senses.sentence: Norma is said to **dislike** the glare of publicity.
senses.translation: 据说诺尔玛不喜欢被人过多关注。

senses.definition: vt.使惊愕，使焦虑，使气馁
senses.sentence: The European Court's decision has been greeted with **dismay** by fishermen.
senses.translation: 渔民对欧洲法庭的裁决感到失望。

senses.definition: vt.解雇，把…免职,遣散，解散（队伍等）,驳回，拒绝受理,搁置
senses.sentence: I would certainly **dismiss** any allegations of impropriety by the Labour Party.
senses.translation: 对于工党指责我行为不正当，我当然不会理会。

senses.definition: n.混乱，凌乱,动乱，骚乱,不正当行为,（身心机能的）失调
senses.sentence: Inside all was **disorder**: drawers fallen out, shoes and boots scattered.
senses.translation: 屋内凌乱不堪：抽屉都掉落出来，鞋靴东一只西一只满地都是。

senses.definition: vt.派遣，调度,（迅速地）发出,迅速处理，迅速了结,处决（罪犯等）
senses.sentence: The victory inspired him to **dispatch** a gleeful telegram to Roosevelt.
senses.translation: 胜利促使他给罗斯福发了封喜报。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.（使）分散，（使）散开,散播，传布（如知识）,使（光）色散,使粒子分散
senses.sentence: Police fired shots and used teargas to **disperse** the demonstrators.
senses.translation: 警方鸣枪并使用催泪弹来驱散示威者。

senses.definition: vt.移动，移走,替换，取代,排水,撤职
senses.sentence: At present , obviously, nevertheless, he was not likely to **displace** himself.
senses.translation: 但时至今日, 很清楚, 他不可能再迁徙了.

senses.definition: n.展览，陈列,陈列品，展览品,显示器,炫耀
senses.sentence: Normally, such an outward **display** of affection is reserved for his mother.
senses.translation: 通常，只有在母亲面前他的情感才会如此外露。

senses.definition: n.（事情的）处置,（自由）处置权,清理,排列
senses.sentence: A few hours later bomb **disposal** experts defused the devices.
senses.translation: 几小时以后拆弹专家拆除了该爆炸装置的引信。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.处理，处置,安排
senses.sentence: They have no way to **dispose** of the hazardous waste they produce.
senses.translation: 他们没有办法处理掉自己产生的有害废料。

senses.definition: n.性情，性格,意向，倾向,安排，配置,<军>部署，战略（战术）计划
senses.sentence: He was a nice lad — bright and with a sunny **disposition**.
senses.translation: 他是个不错的小伙子——聪明伶俐而且性格开朗。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.辩论，争论
vt.不顾,不理会,漠视，忽视,蔑视，轻视
senses.sentence: He drove with blithe **disregard** for the rules of the road.
senses.translation: 他开车时全然不顾交通法规。

senses.definition: vt.使混乱,使分裂，使瓦解,破坏,使中断
senses.sentence: The war seemed likely to **disrupt** the state.
senses.translation: 战争可能使这个国家分裂.

senses.definition: n.专题论文，学位论文,学术演讲
senses.sentence: I'm supposed to have handed in a first draft of my **dissertation**.
senses.translation: 我本该把论文的初稿交上去了。

senses.definition: vt.驱散,使消散,浪费，挥霍,耗尽
senses.sentence: He wound down the windows to **dissipate** the heat.
senses.translation: 他摇下窗子来散热。

senses.definition: vi.溶解,融化，液化,解散，散去,分裂，分解
senses.sentence: Warm the sugar slightly first to make it **dissolve** quicker.
senses.translation: 先将糖稍稍加热，以使其溶解得更快些。

senses.definition: n.距离，路程,远处,疏远,（时间的）间隔，长久
senses.sentence: By half **distance** we held a comfortable two-lap lead.
senses.translation: 到半程时，我们轻松领先两圈。

senses.definition: adj.遥远的,冷漠的，冷淡的,远离的，远隔的,不太清晰的
senses.sentence: From somewhere **distant** he heard the clatter of a typewriter.
senses.translation: 他听见从远处什么地方传来打字机的嗒嗒声。

senses.definition: vi.蒸馏,提炼,渗出
senses.sentence: You can't actually drink the water from the marshland. But you can **distil** it.
senses.translation: 沼泽地的水不能饮用，但是可以将它蒸馏净化。

senses.definition: vt.抽出…的精华,提炼,使渗出,使滴下
senses.sentence: We were asked to **distill** the crucial points of the book.
senses.translation: 我们被要求从这本书中提炼出关键点.

senses.definition: adj.明显的，清楚的,卓越的，不寻常的,有区别的,确切的
senses.sentence: The lighthouse beam was quite **distinct** in the gathering dusk.
senses.translation: 灯塔的光束在渐浓的暮色中清晰可见。

senses.definition: n.区别,荣誉,特质,卓越
senses.sentence: Lewis emerges as a composer of **distinction** and sensitivity.
senses.translation: 刘易斯作为一位悟性很高的优秀作曲家崭露头角。

senses.definition: vi.区分，辨别，分清,辨别是非
senses.sentence: It is necessary to **distinguish** the policies of two successive governments.
senses.translation: 分清前后两届政府的政策很有必要。

senses.definition: vi.扭曲,变形
senses.sentence: A painter may exaggerate or **distort** shapes and forms.
senses.translation: 画家可能会对线条和形状进行夸大或扭曲。

senses.definition: vt.使分心,使混乱
senses.sentence: There was nothing at all in this miserable place to **distract** him.
senses.translation: 这个鬼地方根本没有什么东西可以让他分心。

senses.definition: n.悲痛,危难，不幸,贫困,[法]扣押财物
senses.sentence: The crew did not send out any **distress** signals.
senses.translation: 机组人员没有发出任何求救信号。

senses.definition: vt.分配，散布,散发，分发,把…分类,[电]配电
senses.sentence: We didn't understand how difficult it was to **distribute** a national paper.
senses.translation: 我们不了解分销一份全国发行的报纸有多难。

senses.definition: n.地区,教区,〈美〉（各州众议员）选举区,行政区，市区
senses.sentence: The defense wants the **district** Judge to throw out the case.
senses.translation: 辩护律师希望区法官不受理那个案子。

senses.definition: vt.打扰，妨碍,使骚动,使不安，使烦恼,妨碍睡眠（休息等）
senses.sentence: The pictures were sensationalist and could seriously **disturb** younger readers.
senses.translation: 这些图片大肆渲染，会让一些比较年轻的读者们惶恐不安。

senses.definition: n.打扰,骚乱，变乱,困扰,烦闷
senses.sentence: The home would cause less **disturbance** to local residents than a school.
senses.translation: 养老院对当地居民造成的干扰会比学校小。

senses.definition: n.沟渠,壕沟
senses.sentence: Below the bridge we could just discern a narrow, weedy **ditch**.
senses.translation: 我们仅能依稀辨出桥下一条杂草丛生的窄沟。

senses.definition: vi.潜水,跳水,急剧下降,（头朝下）跳入水中
senses.sentence: With a snarl, the second dog made a **dive** for his heel.
senses.translation: 伴着一声嗥叫，第二只狗扑向了他的脚后跟。

senses.definition: adj.不同的，多种多样的,变化多的,形形色色的
senses.sentence: India has always been one of the most religiously **diverse** countries.
senses.translation: 印度一直都是宗教信仰最多元的国家之一。

senses.definition: n.转移,分散注意力,消遣
senses.sentence: The whole argument is a **diversion**.
senses.translation: 这场辩论分散了人们的注意力。

senses.definition: vt.使转移,娱乐,转移注意力
senses.sentence: The President needed to **divert** attention away from his own economic record.
senses.translation: 总统需要将人们的视线从他以往在经济上的表现上转移开。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.分,划分,分离,（使）产生分歧
senses.sentence: Remove the meat with a fork and **divide** it among four plates.
senses.translation: 用餐叉把肉叉走，分到4个盘里。

senses.definition: n.红利，股息，利息，（破产时清算的）分配金,,[数]被除数opp. divisor,（足球彩票的）彩金
senses.contextMeaning: 红利，股息，利息，（破产时清算的）分配金
senses.sentence: The number 15 is the **dividend**.
senses.translation: 15是被除数.

senses.definition: adj.神的， 天赐的,极好的,神圣的
senses.sentence: The whole system was based on **divine** revelation in the Scriptures.
senses.translation: 整个体系都建立在《圣经》的神圣启示的基础之上。

senses.definition: n.分开，分隔,[数]除法,部门,[军]师
senses.sentence: Villa had just been relegated from the First **Division**.
senses.translation: 维拉队刚刚从甲级联赛中降级。

senses.definition: n.离婚,分离
senses.sentence: Petter saw no reason to hurry the **divorce** along.
senses.translation: 彼得认为没有必要加速离婚进程。

senses.definition: adj.头昏眼花的,使人眩晕的，引起头晕的,昏乱的,愚蠢的
senses.sentence: He came over all **dizzy** when he stood up.
senses.translation: 他一站起身就觉得天旋地转。

senses.definition: aux.构成疑问句和否定句,代替动词,用于加强语气
senses.sentence: Beauty is an attitude. It has nothing to **do** with age.
senses.translation: 美是一种态度，与年龄无关。

senses.definition: n.码头,被告席,草本植物,尾巴的骨肉部份
senses.sentence: The truck left the loading **dock** with hoses still attached.
senses.translation: 卡车驶离装货月台时塑料水龙带还连在上面。

senses.definition: n.教条，教义,法律原则,声明,古语] 所教的东西，教育
senses.sentence: The **doctrine** of karma is inseparably linked with reincarnation.
senses.translation: 业的教义与轮回转世说紧密相关。

senses.definition: n.（计算机）文档，证件,公文
senses.sentence: The **document** was previously circulated in New York at the United Nations.
senses.translation: 这份文件先前在纽约的联合国总部传阅过.

senses.definition: n.纪录片
senses.sentence: She spent two years in South Florida researching and filming her **documentary**.
senses.translation: 她花了两年时间在佛罗里达州南部做研究，拍摄纪录片。

senses.definition: n.狗,蹩脚货,丑女人,卑鄙小人
senses.sentence: As soon as he got inside, the **dog** shook himself.
senses.translation: 他一进来，狗就开始摇头摆尾。

senses.definition: n.美元,一元纸[硬]币,金钱,财富
senses.sentence: In early trading in Tokyo, the **dollar** fell sharply against the yen.
senses.translation: 在东京市场早市开盘时，美元对日元的比价急剧下跌。

senses.definition: n.海豚,（码头的）系船柱
senses.sentence: He was so happy communing with the **dolphin** in Dingle Bay.
senses.translation: 他在丁格尔湾与海豚交流的时候特别开心。
