senses.definition: n.范围，领域,领土，疆土,管辖范围,[计]域名
senses.sentence: The state of their marriage has been put into the public **domain**.
senses.translation: 他们的婚姻状况已公开。

senses.definition: n.圆屋顶,像圆屋顶一样的东西,圆顶体育场
senses.sentence: A band of grey hair encircled his bald **dome**.
senses.translation: 他的秃头四周长着一圈灰白的头发.

senses.definition: adj.家庭的，家的,国内的,驯养的,热心家务的
senses.sentence: A special dispensation may be obtained from the **domestic** union concerned.
senses.translation: 从国内相关的工会那儿或许能得到一项特许。

senses.definition: adj.占优势的,统治的，支配的,[生]显性的,高耸的
senses.sentence: The firm has achieved a **dominant** position in the world market.
senses.translation: 这家公司在国际市场上占有举足轻重的地位。

senses.definition: v.支配，影响,占有优势,在…中具有最重要的特色,在…中拥有最重要的位置
senses.sentence: Fathers have the power to **dominate** children and young people.
senses.translation: 父辈们有能力支配孩子们和年轻人的生活。

senses.definition: n.捐赠,捐献
senses.sentence: We are happy to **donate** to bona fide charitable causes.
senses.translation: 我们很乐意为真正的慈善事业捐献财物。

senses.definition: n.驴，毛驴,笨蛋，傻瓜,（美国）民主党的象征
senses.sentence: He gave the **donkey** a whack across the back with his stick.
senses.translation: 他拿棍子朝驴背上狠狠打了一下。

senses.definition: n.命运,厄运,死亡,（尤指不利的、有罪的）判决，宣判
senses.sentence: A sense of imminent **doom** was inescapable.
senses.translation: 一种即将来临的毁灭感无可逃避。

senses.definition: n.门，户,出入口,一家[户],通道
senses.sentence: She went directly to Simon's apartment and knocked on the **door**.
senses.translation: 她直奔西蒙的房间，敲了敲门。

senses.definition: n.宿舍
senses.sentence: I want to move out of this **dorm**.
senses.translation: 我想搬出宿舍.

senses.definition: n.（学校等的）宿舍,集体寝室,（在市内工作的人的）郊外住宅区
senses.sentence: It had become almost a **dormitory** suburb of the city.
senses.translation: 它几乎成为了城市的一个市郊住宅区。

senses.definition: n.剂量，药量,（药的）一服，一剂,（处罚等）一回，一次，一番,（酒中的）配料，增味剂
senses.sentence: Someone had fed him a lethal **dose** of cyanide.
senses.translation: 有人给他下了致命剂量的氰化物。

senses.definition: n.点，小圆点
senses.sentence: You've wanted to be a barrister since the year **dot**.
senses.translation: 很久以前你就一直想成为一名辩护律师了。

senses.definition: adv.两倍地,双重地
senses.sentence: Both offer excellent value at around £90 for a **double** room.
senses.translation: 两家的双人客房都报出了大约90英镑的超值价格。

senses.definition: n.怀疑，疑虑,未确定
senses.sentence: They have the usual quota of human weaknesses, no **doubt**.
senses.translation: 毫无疑问，他们身上也有人所共有的弱点。

senses.definition: adv.（坐、倒、躺）下,向下,（表示范围或顺序的限度）下至
senses.sentence: She dusted herself **down** and left to build her own career.
senses.translation: 她重振旗鼓去开创自己的事业了。

senses.definition: adj.楼下的
senses.sentence: He was in an argument with his landlord **downstairs**.
senses.translation: 他与楼下的房东发生了争执。

senses.definition: n.市中心区,（市中）商业区
senses.sentence: There is heavy traffic in the **downtown** area tonight.
senses.translation: 今夜闹市区交通繁忙。

senses.definition: adj.向下的，往下的
senses.sentence: Each firm will face a **downward**-sloping demand curve.
senses.translation: 每一家企业都将面临需求曲线的下滑。

senses.definition: vi.打盹儿，打瞌睡,假寐
senses.sentence: I had a **doze** on the train.
senses.translation: 我在火车上打了个盹儿。

senses.definition: n.（一）打，十二个
senses.sentence: He sat behind a table on which were half a **dozen** files.
senses.translation: 他坐在一张放有6个文件夹的桌子后面。

senses.definition: n.汇票,草稿,选派,（尤指房间、烟囱、炉子等供暖系统中的）（小股）气流
senses.sentence: The money was payable by a **draft** drawn by the home.
senses.translation: 这笔钱可凭国内承兑的汇票支付。

senses.definition: vt.拖拽,吃力地往前拉,拖地而行
senses.sentence: Use your mouse to **drag** the pictures to their new size.
senses.translation: 用鼠标拖动图片，将其调整为新的尺寸。

senses.definition: vi.排水,流干
senses.sentence: **Drain** the beans thoroughly and save the stock for soup.
senses.translation: 将豆角彻底控干，并把滤出的豆汁留下做汤。

senses.definition: n.戏剧，剧本,戏剧效果,戏剧文学[艺术],戏剧性事件[场面]
senses.sentence: The **drama** takes an idealistic, even a naive view of the subject.
senses.translation: 这部戏在对待这一主题上有些理想化，甚至是天真。

senses.definition: adj.戏剧的，戏剧性的,引人注目的,激动人心的
senses.sentence: Recent, more **dramatic** use of CGI was seen in "Walking With Dinosaurs".
senses.translation: 在纪录片《与恐龙同行》中可以看到最新的、更加生动的电脑特效技术。

senses.definition: adj.激烈的,猛烈的,（法律等）严厉的,极端的
senses.sentence: Now there is a dawning realisation that **drastic** action is necessary.
senses.translation: 现在人们开始意识到必须采取断然的行动。

senses.definition: n.通风,气流,（船的）吃水深度,一饮，一口之量
senses.sentence: The restaurant is licensed, offering **draught** beers, wines, spirits and soft drinks.
senses.translation: 这家餐馆有酒类经营执照，提供扎啤、葡萄酒、烈性酒和汽水。

senses.definition: n.缺点，劣势,退税
senses.sentence: He felt the apartment's only **drawback** was that it was too small.
senses.translation: 他觉得这个公寓唯一的缺点就是太小了。

senses.definition: n.抽屉,开票人，出票人,起草者,酒馆侍者
senses.sentence: He folded the papers and stuck them in his desk **drawer**.
senses.translation: 他将文件叠起来，塞进自己的书桌抽屉里。

senses.definition: n.绘画,制图,图画,图样
senses.sentence: And all the time next spring's elections are **drawing** closer.
senses.translation: 明年春天的选举即将来临。

senses.definition: adj.可怕的
senses.sentence: The old **dread** knotted her stomach.
senses.translation: 从前那些可怕的经历让她的心都揪紧了。

senses.definition: vi.梦想,做梦,梦见,想到
senses.sentence: When the right woman comes along, this bad **dream** will be over.
senses.translation: 当有合适的女人出现时，这种胡思乱想就会停止了。

senses.definition: n.衣服,装饰,连衣裙,礼服
senses.sentence: Each **dress** is hemmed and scrupulously checked for imperfections.
senses.translation: 每条连衣裙都缝上了褶边，并经过严格的检查，不允许有任何瑕疵。

senses.definition: n.漂移，偏移,趋势，动向,大意,放任自流
senses.sentence: Anybody who's listening will get the **drift** of what he was saying.
senses.translation: 任何一个在专心听的人都会领悟他所说的大意。

senses.definition: n.操练,钻头,军事训练,（应对紧急情况的）演习
senses.sentence: The **drill** should be slowly rotated to ensure a clean hole.
senses.translation: 钻头必须缓慢转动，以保证钻孔平整光滑。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.喝（酒）,饮,喝酒,（尤指）酗酒
senses.sentence: She could ring for food and **drink**, laundry and sundry services.
senses.translation: 她可以打电话点餐，叫人来取要洗的衣服以及叫其他各种服务。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.（使）滴下
senses.sentence: The faucet has developed a **drip**.
senses.translation: 那个水龙头已经开始滴水了.

senses.definition: v.驾驶,开车,驱动,迫使
senses.sentence: I don't **drive** and the buses are quite hopeless.
senses.translation: 我不开车，公共汽车条件又太糟糕。

senses.definition: n.驾驶员，司机,驱动器，驱动程序,驱逐者，驱赶者,（高尔夫球）球棒
senses.sentence: The lorry **driver** escaped unhurt, but a pedestrian was injured.
senses.translation: 卡车司机安然脱险，但有一位行人受了伤。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.（使）落下,投下,（使）降低,减少
senses.sentence: **Drop** the dough onto a baking sheet with a teaspoon.
senses.translation: 用茶匙把生面团舀到烤盘上。

senses.definition: n.干旱（时期），旱季,旱灾,（长期的）缺乏,枯竭
senses.sentence: The path was dry and slithery from the **drought**.
senses.translation: 小路因干旱变得又干又滑。

senses.definition: vi.淹死
senses.sentence: It is cruel to **drown** the cat in the river.
senses.translation: 把猫淹死在河里是残忍的.

senses.definition: n.药物,药剂,麻醉药,毒品
senses.sentence: They have been treated with this **drug** in clinical trials.
senses.translation: 他们已在临床试验中接受过这种药物的治疗。

senses.definition: n.鼓,鼓状物,鼓声,石首鱼
senses.sentence: The **drum** is one of the oldest musical instruments.
senses.translation: 鼓是最古老的乐器之一。

senses.definition: adj.醉的,陶醉的,沉醉,飘飘然
senses.sentence: The landlord refused to serve him because he considered him too **drunk**.
senses.translation: 酒吧老板觉得他已经喝多了，拒绝再给他添酒。

senses.definition: adj.干的干燥的，干旱的,干旱的，口渴的,干咳的,无趣味的，枯燥的
senses.sentence: There were few **dry** eyes in the house when I finished.
senses.translation: 我说完后房间里没几个人不掉泪的。

senses.definition: adj.半信半疑的，犹豫不决的,可疑的,暧昧的，含糊的,不可靠的
senses.contextMeaning: 半信半疑的，犹豫不决的
senses.sentence: They would now find some **dubious** pretext to restart the war.
senses.translation: 他们现在会找个蹩脚的借口重新发动战争。

senses.definition: n.鸭子，野鸭,鸭肉,（表示友好的称呼）乖乖,（板球）零分
senses.sentence: She took to mothering like a **duck** to water.
senses.translation: 她很快就对母亲这一角色驾轻就熟了。

senses.definition: adj.由于,适当的,预定,到期
senses.sentence: Council members are **due** to have informal discussions later on today.
senses.translation: 委员会成员定于今日晚些时候进行非正式讨论。

senses.definition: adj.钝的,迟钝的,呆滞的,阴暗的
senses.sentence: I found the characters very two-dimensional, not to say **dull**.
senses.translation: 我觉得那些人物形象即使不说是乏味无聊，至少也是毫无深度。

senses.definition: adj.哑的，无说话能力的,不说话的，无声的,沉默的，无言的,口齿不清的，（在政府中）无代言人的，政治上无发言权的
senses.sentence: The questions were set up to make her look **dumb**.
senses.translation: 问题这么设计，就是为了让她出丑。

senses.definition: vt.倾倒,丢下，卸下,摆脱，扔弃,倾销
senses.sentence: The government declared that it did not **dump** radioactive waste at sea.
senses.translation: 政府宣称并未将放射性废料倾倒在海里。

senses.definition: v.复制,复印,重复
senses.sentence: Charles scored again, with an exact **duplicate** of his first goal.
senses.translation: 查尔斯梅开二度,与第一次破门如出一辙.

senses.definition: adj.耐用的，耐久的,持久的,长期的
senses.sentence: The **durable** high-impact plastic case is water resistant to 100 feet.
senses.translation: 这种结实的高强度塑料盒子在水下100英尺以内是防水的。

senses.definition: n.持续，持续的时间，期间,（时间的）持续，持久，连续,[语音学]音长，音延
senses.sentence: His wounds knocked him out of combat for the **duration**.
senses.translation: 他的伤病使他在整个期间都无法参赛。

senses.definition: prep.在…的时候,在…期间，当…之时,其间
n.黄昏，傍晚,幽暗
senses.sentence: As the **dusk** shaded into night, we drove slowly through narrow alleys.
senses.translation: 夜幕渐渐降临，我们驱车在狭窄的胡同里缓慢前行。

senses.definition: n.灰尘,（建筑物内、家具或地板等上的）灰尘,遗骸，尸体，人体，人,〈口〉金粉，粉末，粉剂，花粉
senses.sentence: Lights reflected off **dust**-covered walls creating a ghostly luminescence.
senses.translation: 灯光照在满是灰尘的墙上，反射回苍白的冷光。

senses.definition: n.职责，责任,义务,职责或工作,税收
senses.sentence: They clocked off **duty** and left at ten to three.
senses.translation: 他们打卡下班，于2点50分离开。

senses.definition: n.侏儒，矮子,矮小的动物（植物）,[天]矮星
senses.sentence: A **dwarf** going upstairs getting higher step by step.
senses.translation: 矮子上楼梯,步步登高.

senses.definition: vi.居住,存在于,细想某事
senses.sentence: I shut out the memory which was too painful to **dwell** on.
senses.translation: 我不再去回忆那些痛苦不堪的往事了。

senses.definition: n.住处，处所,寓所,居住
n.染料，染色,颜色
senses.sentence: The red **dye** on the leather is water-soluble.
senses.translation: 皮革上的这种红色染料可溶于水。

senses.definition: n.动态,动力，推动变化的力量,动力学,活力
senses.sentence: The **dynamic** of the market demands constant change and adjustment.
senses.translation: 市场要有活力，需要不断地改变和调整。

senses.definition: n.王朝,朝代
senses.sentence: The Seljuk **dynasty** of Syria was founded in 1094.
senses.translation: 叙利亚的塞尔柱王朝始建于1094年。

senses.definition: adj.每,各自的
senses.sentence: She planted a kiss on **each** of his leathery cheeks.
senses.translation: 她在他粗糙的面颊上左右各吻了一下。

senses.definition: adj.渴望的,热切的，热情洋溢的,热心的,急切
senses.sentence: He is always **eager** for new experiences and ever-willing to experiment.
senses.translation: 他总是渴望拥有新的经历，而且永远愿意尝试。

senses.definition: n.鹰,鹰状标志,[高]比标准杆少两杆的分数
senses.sentence: She knew the exact location of The **Eagle**'s headquarters.
senses.translation: 她知道“飞鹰”总部的确切地点。

senses.definition: n.耳朵,听觉，听力,耳状物,穗
senses.sentence: She sat on Rossi's knee as he whispered in her **ear**.
senses.translation: 她坐在罗西的膝盖上，听他低声耳语。

senses.definition: adj.早的,早期的,早日的,（果实等）早熟的
senses.sentence: Ethiopia'sart springs from her **early** Christian as well as her Muslim heritage.
senses.translation: 埃塞俄比亚的艺术起源于其早期的基督教和伊斯兰教文化遗产。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.赚得,获得,赢得,博得
senses.sentence: Players should be allowed to **earn** money from advertising.
senses.translation: 应该允许运动员拍广告挣钱。

senses.definition: adj.热心的,诚挚的，真挚的,重要的
senses.sentence: While this conver-sation was going on, I was listening with **earnest** attention.
senses.translation: 这场对话进行的时候，我聚精会神地听着。

senses.definition: n.地球,陆地,泥土,兽穴
senses.sentence: Weather satellites have observed a ring of volcanic ash girdling the **earth**.
senses.translation: 气象卫星观测到一个环绕地球的火山灰带。

senses.definition: n.地震,大变动,动乱
senses.sentence: An **earthquake** hit the capital, causing panic among the population.
senses.translation: 首都发生了地震，引发民众恐慌。

senses.definition: n.轻松，舒适,容易,安逸,不拘束，自在
senses.sentence: They sprawl at **ease** across the sofa, arms draped over the back.
senses.translation: 他们惬意地躺在沙发上，胳膊搭在后面。

senses.definition: adv.容易地,很可能,迅速地,频繁地
senses.sentence: Stan Dean, **easily** identifiable by his oddly-shaped hat, sat in a doorway.
senses.translation: 斯坦·迪安坐在门口，他那顶奇形怪状的帽子一下子就让人认出他来。

senses.definition: n.东，东方,东方国家,〈诗〉东风
senses.sentence: The river widens considerably as it begins to turn **east**.
senses.translation: 河流转向东流时河道大幅度变宽。

senses.definition: adj.东方的，东部（地方）的,朝东的,来自东方的
senses.sentence: Several countries in **eastern** Europe are counting the cost of yesterday's earthquake.
senses.translation: 东欧的几个国家正在计算昨天的地震带来的损失。

senses.definition: adv.朝东方,向东
senses.sentence: The crowd is heading **eastward**, believing that they can find gold there.
senses.translation: 人群正在向东移去, 他们认为在那里可以找到黄金.

senses.definition: adv.向东
senses.sentence: They were pressing on **eastwards** towards the city's small airfield.
senses.translation: 他们继续向东朝该市的小机场推进。

senses.definition: adj.容易的,舒适的,宽裕的,从容的
senses.sentence: This delicious variation on an omelette is quick and **easy** to prepare.
senses.translation: 这种稍加变化的可口煎蛋卷做起来又快又容易。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.吃，喝
senses.sentence: It makes sense to **eat** a reasonably balanced diet when slimming.
senses.translation: 在减肥过程中保持饮食的营养相对均衡是明智的。

senses.definition: adj.古怪的，异常的,偏离轨道的,离心的
senses.sentence: Geniuses are supposed to be **eccentric** and hopelessly impractical.
senses.translation: 天才通常都被认为行为古怪而且毫无实践能力。

senses.definition: n.回声，共鸣,（言语、作风、思想等的）重复,重复者,[无线电]回波
senses.sentence: The old fable continues to **echo** down the centuries.
senses.translation: 这则古老的寓言流传了数个世纪。

senses.definition: n.[天]（日、月）食,消失，黯然失色,漆黑
senses.sentence: During the seventies, her acting career was in **eclipse**.
senses.translation: 在七十年代, 她的表演生涯黯然失色.

senses.definition: n.生态学,社会生态学,个体生态学
senses.sentence: Development has been guided by a concern for the **ecology** of the area.
senses.translation: 该地区的发展以注重生态为指导原则。

senses.definition: adj.经济的,经济学的,合算的,有经济效益的
senses.sentence: The United States plans to tighten the **economic** sanctions currently in place.
senses.translation: 美国计划加大现有经济制裁的力度。

senses.definition: adj.节约的,经济的,合算的
senses.sentence: Mexican cookery is **economical**, she says. Nothing goes to waste.
senses.translation: “墨西哥的烹调注重俭省，”她说，“任何东西都不会浪费。”

senses.definition: n.节约,经济,理财,秩序
senses.sentence: The **economy** remains deep in recession with few signs of a pick-up.
senses.translation: 经济仍深陷衰退之中，几乎没有好转的迹象。

senses.definition: n.<生>生态系统
senses.sentence: The **ecosystem** will be thrown out of whack.
senses.translation: 生态系统将会失去平衡。

senses.definition: n.边,优势,（悬崖、峭壁的）边缘，端,锋利，尖锐
senses.sentence: A spell of poor health took the **edge** off her performance.
senses.translation: 一度身体欠佳令她表现有失水准。

senses.definition: n.食物
senses.sentence: The food at the hotel was barely **edible**.
senses.translation: 这家旅馆的食物简直不能入口。

senses.definition: vt.剪辑（影片，录音）,编辑,校订,主编
senses.sentence: I used to **edit** the college paper in the old days.
senses.translation: 以前我曾经做过大学校报的主编。

senses.definition: n.版次，版本,（报纸、杂志的）一份,（广播、电视节目的）一期,（书、报、杂志等的）一版印刷总数
n.编辑，编者,校订者,[计]编辑软件，编辑程序
senses.sentence: Frank Deford is a contributing **editor** for Vanity Fair magazine.
senses.translation: 弗兰克·德福特是杂志《名利场》的特约编辑。

senses.definition: adj.编辑的，主笔的,〈美〉社论的
senses.sentence: A Wall Street Journal **editorial** encapsulated the views of many conservatives.
senses.translation: 《华尔街日报》的一篇社论概述了很多保守派人士的观点。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.教育，教导,训练，培养
senses.sentence: She tried to **educate** her son's taste in music.
senses.translation: 她试图培养她儿子对音乐的爱好.

senses.definition: n.教育,教育学,培养,训练
senses.sentence: Sex **education** is also expected to help check the spread of AIDS.
senses.translation: 人们还希望性教育有助于控制艾滋病的蔓延。

senses.definition: n.影响,效果,印象,所有物
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **effect** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【effect】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: adj.有效的,起作用的,实际的，实在的,给人深刻印象
senses.sentence: Light colours provide an **effective** backdrop for pictures or a mirror.
senses.translation: 浅色是挂放图画或镜子很有效果的衬托。

senses.definition: n.效率，效能,实力，能力,[物]性能,功效
senses.sentence: The spa is the last word in luxury and **efficiency**.
senses.translation: 这家矿泉疗养浴场极尽奢华，功效极高。

senses.definition: adj.有效率的,（直接）生效的,能干的,（因省钱、省时或省力等而）收效大的
senses.sentence: The pill is the most **efficient** method of birth control.
senses.translation: 服用避孕药是最有效的避孕方法。

senses.definition: n.努力，尝试,工作,成就,杰作
senses.sentence: McGregor's **effort** was enough to edge Johnson out of the top spot.
senses.translation: 麦格雷戈奋力一搏，成功地将约翰逊从第一的位置上挤了下来。

senses.definition: n.鸡蛋，蛋,卵,<俚>家伙
senses.sentence: Each recipe specifies the size of **egg** to be used.
senses.translation: 每种菜谱都具体规定了所用鸡蛋的大小。

senses.definition: num.八,八个,第八
senses.sentence: Charlie was earning **eight** pounds, I was earning five.
senses.translation: 查利赚了8英镑，我赚了5英镑。

senses.definition: num.十八,十八个
senses.sentence: **Eighteen** boats plied the 1,000 miles of river along a trading route.
senses.translation: 18艘船沿着贸易航线往返于1,000英里的河面上。

senses.definition: num.八十
senses.sentence: The stadium has been fitted with seating for over **eighty** thousand spectators.
senses.translation: 这个体育场配备了8万多个观众座席。

senses.definition: pron.（两者之中）任何一个
senses.sentence: She had met both sons and did not care for **either**.
senses.translation: 两个儿子她都见了，一个都不喜欢。

senses.definition: vt.喷出,驱逐,强制离开
senses.sentence: Officials used guard dogs to **eject** the protesters.
senses.translation: 官员们用警犬驱散抗议人群。

senses.definition: vi.详尽说明,变得复杂
vi.消逝,时间过去
senses.sentence: A hundred long years must still **elapse** before Englishman could hear the name of Oliver Cromwell.
senses.translation: 离英国人听到奥利弗·克伦姆威尔的名字还有一百年之久呢.

senses.definition: adj.有弹力的,可伸缩的,灵活的
senses.sentence: This skirt needs some new **elastic** in the waist.
senses.translation: 这条裙子需要换一根松紧腰带。

senses.definition: n.肘部,弯头，扶手,肘形管，弯管
senses.sentence: He lay beside her awkwardly, propped on an **elbow**.
senses.translation: 他用一只胳膊肘支着身体，别扭地躺在她旁边。

senses.definition: n.长者,长辈,元老,比…年长的人
senses.sentence: He is now an **elder** of the village church.
senses.translation: 他现在是乡村教会的长老。

senses.definition: adj.上了年纪的,过了中年的,较老的
senses.sentence: The runaway car careered into a bench, hitting an **elderly** couple.
senses.translation: 那辆失控的车猛冲到一条长椅上，撞伤了一对老夫妇。

senses.definition: vt.选举,挑出，挑选,决定
senses.sentence: Austrian voters went to the polls this weekend to **elect** a successor to the President.
senses.translation: 奥地利选民这周末去投票中心选举下届总统。

senses.definition: adj.电的，带电的,发电的，导电的,令人激动的,电动的
senses.sentence: All Dreamland's **electric** blankets are guaranteed for three years.
senses.translation: 所有的梦乡牌电热毯质保3年。

senses.definition: adj.用电的，与电有关的，电学的,令人激动的，紧张的，惊人的
senses.contextMeaning: 用电的，与电有关的，电学的
senses.sentence: This degree programme is fully accredited by the Institution of **Electrical** Engineers.
senses.translation: 这门学位课程经电气工程师学院鉴定完全合格。

senses.definition: n.电工，电气技师
senses.sentence: The only **electrician** we could get hold of was miles away.
senses.translation: 我们唯一能够联络到的电工离这里有好几英里远。

senses.definition: n.电力,电流，静电,高涨的情绪,紧张
senses.sentence: It will produce **electricity** more cheaply than a nuclear plant.
senses.translation: 它的发电成本要比核电站低。

senses.definition: n.电子
senses.sentence: The structure of molecules can be seen under an **electron** microscope.
senses.translation: 分子的结构可在电子显微镜下观察到.

senses.definition: adj.电子的,电子操纵的,用电子设备生产的,用电子设备完成的
senses.sentence: All the royal cars are fitted with **electronic** homing devices.
senses.translation: 所有的皇家轿车都装有电子自导引装置。

senses.definition: n.电子学,电子学应用，电子器件,电子工业,电子流行音乐
senses.sentence: Computers and **electronics** are growth industries and need skilled technicians.
senses.translation: 计算机与电子行业属于蓬勃发展的产业，需要娴熟的技术人员。

senses.definition: adj.（人或其举止）优美的,漂亮的,简炼的,简洁的
senses.sentence: She produces **elegant** wedding gowns in a variety of sumptuous fabrics.
senses.translation: 她用各种华贵的布料制作高雅的婚纱。

senses.definition: n.[化]元素,要素,原理,[电]电阻丝
senses.sentence: In order to make it safe, the **element** is electrically insulated.
senses.translation: 为安全起见，该元件作了电绝缘处理。

senses.definition: adj.基本的,初级的,[化]元素的,初等
senses.sentence: He expressed the hope that on Monday **elementary** schools would be reopened.
senses.translation: 他表示希望各小学星期一能复课。

senses.definition: n.象，大象
senses.sentence: The pavilion has become a £4 million steel and glass white **elephant**.
senses.translation: 这个耗资400万英镑、用钢与玻璃所构筑起的亭子已经成了一个华而不实的摆设。

senses.definition: vt.举起,提高,提升,鼓舞
senses.sentence: Democracy might **elevate** the common man to a position of political superiority.
senses.translation: 民主也许能提升普通人的政治地位，让他们产生优越感。

senses.definition: n.电梯,升降机（美）,谷仓
num.十一,十一个,第十一
senses.sentence: It's, what, **eleven** years or more since he's seen him.
senses.translation: 打从他上次见他，已有，嗯，11年甚至更久了。

senses.definition: adj.合适的,在（法律上或道德上）合格的,有资格当选的,称心如意的
senses.sentence: Millions of householders are **eligible** to claim the new council tax benefit.
senses.translation: 数百万房主都有资格申请新的市政税优惠。

senses.definition: vt.排除，消除,淘汰,除掉,<口>干掉
senses.sentence: You could never **eliminate** risk, but preparation and training could attenuate it.
senses.translation: 风险不可能完全消除，但可以通过防范和培训来降低。

senses.definition: n.<法>精华,精锐，精英,上层集团,（统称）掌权人物
senses.sentence: They were, by and large, a very wealthy, privileged **elite**.
senses.translation: 他们基本上是一些非常有钱有势的精英。

senses.definition: adj.雄辩的，有口才的,有说明力的,富于表情的，逼真的,动人的
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **eloquent** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【eloquent】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: adv.其他,否则,另外
senses.sentence: I denied my father because I wanted to become someone **else**.
senses.translation: 我和父亲断绝了关系，因为我想成为一个不一样的自己。

senses.definition: adv.在别处，到别处,他
senses.sentence: Almost 80 percent of the state's residents were born **elsewhere**.
senses.translation: 该州居民中几乎有80%出生在异地。

senses.definition: vi.上飞机，上船,着手，从事
senses.sentence: Redundancy is the spur for many to **embark** on new careers.
senses.translation: 裁员促使很多人开始从事新事业。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.（使）窘迫，（使）局促不安,（使）困难
senses.sentence: I did not **embarrass** her with my effusions.
senses.translation: 我并没有太过热情而让她为难。

senses.definition: n.大使馆,大使馆全体成员,大使的职务（地位）,重任，差使
senses.sentence: **Embassy** security personnel refused to admit him or his wife.
senses.translation: 使馆保安人员不允许他和夫人进入。

senses.definition: vt.&vi.把…嵌入,栽种,深留（记忆中）
senses.sentence: They used to kind of **embed** it in the glass.
senses.translation: 他们往往把它嵌在玻璃里.

senses.definition: vt.表现，象征,包含，收录,使具体化,[军]组编
senses.sentence: Any incomes policy must **embody** the attributes of fairness and flexibility.
senses.translation: 任何收入政策都应该具有公平与灵活性之特征.

senses.definition: vt.& vi.拥抱
senses.sentence: I couldn't find it in me to **embrace** him.
senses.translation: 我打心眼里不想拥抱他。

senses.definition: n.<生>胚，胚胎,胚芽,初期
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **embryo** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【embryo】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: vi.出现，浮现,暴露,摆脱
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **emerge** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【emerge】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.紧急情况,突发事件,非常时刻
senses.sentence: The government is taking **emergency** action to deal with a housing crisis.
senses.translation: 政府正采取紧急措施解决住房危机。

senses.definition: vt.移居国外
senses.sentence: Economists warn that enormous pressures could build up, forcing people to **emigrate** westwards.
senses.translation: 经济学家警告，迫使人们向西部迁移的压力可能会增至很大的程度。

senses.definition: adj.（指人）知名的，杰出的，卓越的,（指品质、特性）明显的，显着的，突出的,显赫的,闻达
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **eminent** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【eminent】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: vt.发出,发射,颁布,发表
senses.sentence: The metal container began to **emit** a clicking sound.
senses.translation: 金属容器开始发出咔嗒咔嗒的声音。

senses.definition: n.情感，感情,情绪,感动，激动
adj.表现强烈情感的,令人动情的,易动感情的,感情脆弱的
senses.sentence: The **emotional** wounds of early childhood leave ineradicable scars.
senses.translation: 童年早期的情感创伤留下了难以抚平的伤痕。

senses.definition: n.皇帝，君主
senses.sentence: The **Emperor** must realize that he has us at his mercy.
senses.translation: 皇帝必须意识到我们任由他处置。

senses.definition: n.强调,着重,（轮廓、图形等的）鲜明,突出，重读
senses.sentence: The **emphasis** is on developing fitness through exercises and training.
senses.translation: 重点在于通过锻炼促进健康。

senses.definition: vt.强调，着重,加强语气,使突出
senses.sentence: I tried to **emphasize** my good points without sounding boastful.
senses.translation: 我在强调自己的优点时尽量不让人觉得是在自我吹嘘。

senses.definition: n.帝国，帝国领土,帝权，君权，最高统治权,大企业组织
senses.sentence: The **empire** had for years been falling into decadence.
senses.translation: 这个帝国走向腐朽堕落已经经年。

senses.definition: adj.凭经验的,经验主义的,以观察或实验为依据的
senses.sentence: The **empirical** evidence considered here is subject to many qualifications.
senses.translation: 此处提及的实验证据有诸多限制条件。

senses.definition: n.受雇,服务,工作
senses.sentence: Others hinted that he was in the **employ** of the KGB.
senses.translation: 其他人暗示他受雇于克格勃。

senses.definition: n.雇工，雇员，职工
senses.sentence: There is a substantial payback in terms of **employee** and union relations.
senses.translation: 雇员和工会关系大有改观。

senses.definition: n.雇主，老板,雇佣者
senses.sentence: An **employer** can demand written certification that the relative is really ill.
senses.translation: 雇主可以要求出具书面证明，证实员工的亲人确实病了。

senses.definition: n.雇用,使用,职业,有益的活动
senses.sentence: Current **employment** laws will be changed to reward effort and punish laziness.
senses.translation: 现行雇佣法要变，要奖勤罚懒。

senses.definition: vt.授权,准许,使能够,使控制局势
senses.sentence: His position does not **empower** him to cite our views without consultation.
senses.translation: 他的地位并没有给予他不经许可就引用我们观点的权力。

senses.definition: adj.空的，空虚的，空洞的,空闲的，无效的，徒劳的,无聊的，愚蠢的,言语或行动空洞的
senses.sentence: She showed him around the ground floor of the **empty** house.
senses.translation: 她带他参观了这处空房子的底楼。

senses.definition: vt.使能够，提供做…的权利[措施],使可能,授予权利或方法
senses.contextMeaning: 使能够，提供做…的权利[措施]
senses.sentence: This committee will **enable** decisions to be made democratically.
senses.translation: 该委员会将实现民主决议过程。

senses.definition: vt.（用墙、篱笆等）把…围起来,把…装入信封,附入
senses.sentence: Please **enclose** your remittance, making cheques payable to Thames Valley Technology.
senses.translation: 请附上汇款，支票收款人为泰晤士河谷科技公司。

senses.definition: vt.不期而遇,遭遇,对抗
senses.sentence: You'll have little patience with the hypocrisy and double standards you **encounter**.
senses.translation: 你将会无法忍受所遭遇的伪善和双重标准。

senses.definition: vt.鼓励，鼓舞,支持,促进,鼓动
senses.sentence: The idea is to **encourage** people to get to know their neighbours.
senses.translation: 其目的是促使人们结识邻居。

senses.definition: n.百科全书，大全
senses.sentence: An **encyclopaedia** contains a lot of knowledge.
senses.translation: 百科全书包含很多知识.

senses.definition: n.百科全书
senses.sentence: The **encyclopedia** fell to the floor with a thud.
senses.translation: 那本百科全书砰的一声掉到地上.

senses.definition: n.<正>结果,端,终止,最后部分
senses.sentence: Rationing had put an **end** to a surfeit of biscuits long ago.
senses.translation: 定量供应很久以前就结束了饼干过剩的状况。

senses.definition: vt.危及，使遭受危险
senses.sentence: It is illegal and could **endanger** other people's lives.
senses.translation: 这是非法的，可能会危及他人的生命。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.尝试，试图,尽力，竭力
senses.sentence: We **endeavor** to make our customers satisfied.
senses.translation: 我们力图使顾客都满意。

senses.definition: n.尽力，竭力
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **endeavour** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【endeavour】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.结局,结束,终结,最后部份
senses.sentence: So far little progress has been made towards **ending** the fighting.
senses.translation: 到目前为止，在结束交战方面还没取得什么进展。

senses.definition: vt.支票的背书，签名,签署，批准：签署（签名），,开发票，开证明文件,支持，核准
vt.捐赠，资助,赋予，赐予
senses.sentence: Herbs have been used for centuries to **endow** a whole range of foods with subtle flavours.
senses.translation: 数个世纪以来，香草一直被用于给各种食物增添淡淡的香味。

senses.definition: n.耐久（力），持久（力）,忍耐，忍耐力
senses.sentence: He showed remarkable **endurance** throughout his illness.
senses.translation: 他在整个生病期间表现出非凡的忍耐力。

senses.definition: vt.忍耐,容忍
senses.sentence: They had to **endure** a long wait before the case came to trial.
senses.translation: 在此案审理前他们只得忍受长时间的等待。

senses.definition: n.仇敌,敌军,危害物
senses.sentence: Our men wiped them out, but the **enemy** fought bravely and well.
senses.translation: 我们的部队歼灭了敌人，但敌人也进行了顽强的抵抗。

senses.definition: adj.精力充沛的，充满活力的,精力旺盛的，精神饱满的,（措施等）积极的，有力的,雄健
senses.sentence: We look for applicants who are numerate, computer-literate and **energetic** self-starters.
senses.translation: 我们对求职者的要求是具备运算能力，熟练使用电脑，精力充沛而且工作积极主动。

senses.definition: n.[物]能量,活力,精力,精神
vt.强迫服从,实施，执行,加强
senses.sentence: Game wardens were appointed to **enforce** hunting laws in New Hampshire.
senses.translation: 狩猎监督官被派到新罕布什尔州去执行狩猎法令。

senses.definition: vt.吸引住,聘用,与…交战
senses.sentence: They never learned skills to **engage** the attention of the others.
senses.translation: 他们从未学过吸引他人注意的技巧。

senses.definition: n.订婚，婚约,约会,约定，契约,雇用
senses.sentence: The constitution prohibits them from military **engagement** on foreign soil.
senses.translation: 宪法禁止他们在外国采取军事行动。

senses.definition: n.发动机，引擎,工具,火车头,机车
senses.sentence: In 1941, the train would have been pulled by a steam **engine**.
senses.translation: 1941年，火车本可以由蒸汽机车拉动。

senses.definition: n.工程师，技师,（轮船的）机师,〈美〉（火车的）司机，,（陆军的）工兵
senses.sentence: The **engineer** and his son held frequent consultations concerning technical problems.
senses.translation: 工程师和他的儿子经常就技术问题互相征求意见。

senses.definition: n.工程（学）， 工程师行业,操纵，管理,土木工程，工事,开车技术
senses.contextMeaning: 工程（学）， 工程师行业
senses.sentence: Traditionally young Asians in Britain have gravitated towards medicine, law and **engineering**.
senses.translation: 英国的亚裔年轻人通常被吸引到医学、法律及工程专业。

senses.definition: vt.提高，增加,加强
senses.sentence: Large paintings can **enhance** the feeling of space in small rooms.
senses.translation: 大型油画可以增加小房间的宽敞感。

senses.definition: vt.享有，享受,欣赏,喜欢,使过得快活
senses.sentence: Boys and girls will **enjoy** messing about with any kind of machine.
senses.translation: 男孩和女孩会喜欢摆弄各种机械装置。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.扩大，放大,扩展，扩充,拉长说，详述
senses.sentence: Workmen were hired to remodel and **enlarge** the farm buildings.
senses.translation: 雇用了工人来改造和扩建农场建筑。

senses.definition: vt.启发，启蒙,开导，教导,〈古〉照耀
senses.sentence: She didn't **enlighten** him about her background.
senses.translation: 她未向他讲明自己的出身背景。

senses.definition: adj.巨大的,庞大的,极恶的,凶暴的
senses.sentence: She was a shy, delicately pretty girl with **enormous** blue eyes.
senses.translation: 她是一个害羞、娇美的女孩，长着一双大大的蓝眼睛。

senses.definition: adj.充足的,足够的
senses.sentence: America has **enough** firepower in the area to mount sustained air strikes.
senses.translation: 美国在该地区拥有足够的火力发动持续的空中打击。

senses.definition: n.询问,调查,查询,问讯处
senses.sentence: The **enquiry** dug deeper into the alleged financial misdeeds of his government.
senses.translation: 这一调查对其政府涉嫌的财政违规行为展开了进一步深究。

senses.definition: vt.使富裕，使富有,给…添加肥料,使…美味,装饰
senses.sentence: People with disabilities are now doing many things to **enrich** their lives.
senses.translation: 残疾人士如今做很多事情来丰富他们的生活。

senses.definition: vi.入学,参军,注册
senses.sentence: You need to **enrol** before the end of August.
senses.translation: 你必须在八月底前注册。

senses.definition: v.注册,登记,加入,招收
senses.sentence: I should like to **enroll** all my children in the swimming class.
senses.translation: 我愿意让我的孩子们都参加游泳班.

senses.definition: vt.确保,担保获得[避免],使（某人）获得,使安全
senses.sentence: The drill should be slowly rotated to **ensure** a clean hole.
senses.translation: 钻头必须缓慢转动，以保证钻孔平整光滑。

senses.definition: vt.牵涉,需要,使必要,限定继承
senses.sentence: Selective aversion to certain risks may **entail** acceptance of other greater risks.
senses.translation: 有选择地回避某些风险可能招致更大的风险.

senses.definition: vt.& vi.进入,开始,参加,登记
senses.sentence: Two men answer-ing the description of the suspects tried to **enter** Switzerland.
senses.translation: 与描述的疑犯样子相符的两名男子试图进入瑞士。

senses.definition: n.企（事）业单位,事业，计划,事业心，进取心
senses.sentence: He favoured a middle course between free **enterprise** and state intervention.
senses.translation: 他更倾向于在自由经营与国家干预之间走一条中庸之道。

senses.definition: vt.热情款待,使有兴趣,抱着，怀有,考虑
n.娱乐，消遣,招待，款待,娱乐节目
senses.sentence: Crudeness is on the rise in all fields of **entertainment**.
senses.translation: 所有娱乐领域都日益粗俗化。

senses.definition: n.热情，热忱,热衷的事物,宗教的狂热
senses.sentence: She radiates an infectious **enthusiasm** for everything she does.
senses.translation: 她做任何事情都充满一种极富感染力的热情。

senses.definition: adj.热心的,热情的,热烈的,狂热的
senses.sentence: Bob Dole seemed less than **enthusiastic** about the proposed move.
senses.translation: 鲍勃·多尔似乎对提议的这项行动不太感兴趣。

senses.definition: adj.全部的,整个的,全体的,囫囵
senses.sentence: If the Commission has its way, the **entire** deal will be scuppered.
senses.translation: 如果委员会我行我素的话，整个交易将化为泡影。

senses.definition: vt.使有资格,给…定名,给与…权利,称做
senses.sentence: They lose their **entitle**-ment to benefit when they start work.
senses.translation: 他们一开始工作就失去了获得救济金的资格。

senses.definition: n.实体,实际存在物,本质
senses.sentence: The state is not a unified and internally coherent **entity**.
senses.translation: 该国不是一个统一的、内部团结的实体。

senses.definition: n.入口，进口,进入,进入方法，进入方式,入场权
senses.sentence: There were people at the **entrance** giving out leaflets.
senses.translation: 有人在入口处散发传单。

senses.definition: n.<法>企业家,主办人,承包人
senses.sentence: The **entrepreneur** takes business risks in the hope of making a profit.
senses.translation: 企业家为追求利润而冒险.

senses.definition: n.进入，入场,入口处，门口,登记，记录,参加比赛的人
senses.sentence: **Entry** to this prize draw is limited to UK residents.
senses.translation: 这次抽奖只限英国公民参加。

senses.definition: n.信封，封皮,壳层，外壳,包裹物,[生物学]膜，包袋
senses.sentence: Return the enclosed Donation Form today in the prepaid **envelope** provided.
senses.translation: 请于今日将随函附上的捐款表格用所提供的邮资预付的信封寄回。

senses.definition: n.环境，外界,周围，围绕,工作平台,（运行）环境
senses.sentence: Outside the protected **environment** of institutional care he could not survive.
senses.translation: 离开福利机构的照顾，离开这种受保护的环境，他将难以生存下去。

senses.definition: vt.想像，设想,正视，面对,观察，展望
senses.sentence: Nobody can **envisage** the consequences of total nuclear war.
senses.translation: 没有人能够想像全面核战争的后果.

senses.definition: n.嫉妒，妒忌,羡慕
senses.sentence: Gradually he began to acknowledge his feelings of **envy** towards his mother.
senses.translation: 渐渐地，他开始承认自己羡慕母亲。

senses.definition: n.流行病,迅速的传播、生长或发展,风尚等的流行
senses.sentence: Health officials have successfully confined the **epidemic** to the Tabatinga area.
senses.translation: 卫生官员成功地将疫情控制在塔巴廷加地区。

senses.definition: n.插曲,片段,一集,一段经历
senses.sentence: Mr Butterfield denies having anything to do with the **episode**.
senses.translation: 巴特菲尔德先生否认和此事有关。

senses.definition: n.纪元,时期,新时代,世
senses.sentence: It was meant to sound like an **epoch**-making declaration.
senses.translation: 有意让它听起来像是一个划时代的宣言。

senses.definition: adj.相等的，平等的,平稳的,势均力敌的,胜任的
senses.sentence: In many respects Asian women see themselves as **equal** to their men.
senses.translation: 在很多方面，亚洲女性都认为自己和丈夫是平等的。

senses.definition: n.同等，平等,[数]相等，等式
senses.sentence: The main beneficiaries of pension **equality** so far have been men.
senses.translation: 迄今为止，退休金均等政策的主要受益者一直是男性。

senses.definition: n.方程式,等式,相等,[化学] 反应式
senses.sentence: The party fears the **equation** between higher spending and higher taxes.
senses.translation: 该党担心难以平衡更多支出和更高税率之间的综合关系。

senses.definition: n.赤道,（平分球形物体的面的）圆,（任何）大圆
senses.sentence: The **equator** is an imaginary line around the middle of the earth.
senses.translation: 赤道是一条假想的环绕地球腰部的线。

senses.definition: vt.装备，配备,使具备，使有准备
senses.sentence: Owners of restaurants would have to **equip** them to admit disabled people.
senses.translation: 餐厅老板将必须在餐厅里配备能够接纳残疾人的设施。

senses.definition: n.设备，装备,器材，配件,（工作必需的）知识，素养
senses.sentence: I get very nervous because I'm using a lot of expensive **equipment**.
senses.translation: 因为正在使用很多昂贵的设备，所以我非常紧张。

senses.definition: adj.相等的，相当的，等效的,等价的，等积的,[化学]当量的
senses.sentence: His party has just suffered the **equivalent** of a near-fatal heart attack.
senses.translation: 他所在的政党刚刚经历了一次类似心脏病突发般几近致命的打击。

senses.definition: n.纪元，年代,历史时期，时代,重大事件
senses.sentence: As the **era** wore on, she switched her attention to films.
senses.translation: 随着这个时代慢慢过去，她把目光投向了电影业。

senses.definition: vt.擦掉,抹去,清除
senses.sentence: She tried to **erase** the memory of that evening.
senses.translation: 她试图忘却那天晚上的事。

senses.definition: vt.使直立，使竖起,建立，创立,安装,[医]使勃起
senses.sentence: Stand reasonably **erect**, your arms hanging naturally.
senses.translation: 挺身站直，双臂自然下垂。

senses.definition: n.腐蚀，侵蚀，磨损,烧蚀,磨蚀,糜烂
senses.sentence: More familiar landscapes have been sculpted by surface **erosion**.
senses.translation: 还有更多熟悉的地貌是因地表侵蚀形成的。

senses.definition: n.错误，过失,[法]误审，违法,[数]误差
senses.sentence: The plane was shot down in **error** by a NATO missile.
senses.translation: 一枚北约的导弹误将那架飞机击落。

senses.definition: vi.爆发,喷发,突然发生,出疹
senses.sentence: An active volcano may **erupt** at any time.
senses.translation: 活火山会随时喷发。

senses.definition: vt.使逐步升级,使逐步上升,乘自动梯上升
senses.sentence: Ground rents are likely to **escalate** over time.
senses.translation: 地租以后可能会逐渐上涨。

senses.definition: v.逃脱,逃离,躲过,泄露
senses.sentence: No detail was too small to **escape** her attention.
senses.translation: 再小的细节都逃不过她的眼睛。

senses.definition: n.护送者,护航舰,陪同某人参加社交活动的人（尤指男人）,受雇陪同某人外出社交的人（尤指女人）
senses.sentence: He arrived with a police **escort** shortly before half past nine.
senses.translation: 快到9点半的时候，他在一名警察的护送下到达了。

senses.definition: adv.尤其地,主要地，格外地,显著地,异常地
senses.sentence: All colour fades— **especially** under the impact of direct sunlight.
senses.translation: 所有颜色都会褪色——尤其是在阳光直射下。

senses.definition: n.散文,随笔，杂记文,尝试，企图,试验
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **essay** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【essay】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.本质，实质,精华，精髓,香精
senses.sentence: Though off-puttingly complicated in detail, local taxes are in **essence** simple.
senses.translation: 虽然地税在细节上复杂得要命，但在本质上却很简单。

senses.definition: adj.基本的,必要的,本质的,精华的
senses.sentence: Party membership was an **essential** prerequisite of a successful career.
senses.translation: 成为党员是事业有成必不可少的先决条件。

senses.definition: vt.建立，创建,确立或使安全,使被安排好,使成为
senses.sentence: We're trying to **establish** linkages between these groups and financial institutions.
senses.translation: 我们正努力在这些团体和金融机构之间建立联系。

senses.definition: n.企业,建立,（通常反对变革的）当权派,反对改革的保守当权派
senses.sentence: The fusty old **establishment** refused to recognise the demand for popular music.
senses.translation: 这一古板的老旧机构拒绝承认人们对流行音乐的需求。

senses.definition: n.财产，遗产，房地产,个人财产,不动产权,（较高的）社会地位
senses.sentence: We went straight to the **estate** agent and wrote out a cheque.
senses.translation: 我们径直到房地产经纪人那里开了一张支票。

senses.definition: vt.尊敬，敬重,认为，以为,考虑,估价
senses.sentence: He is held in high **esteem** by colleagues in the construction industry.
senses.translation: 建筑业的同行们都非常敬重他。

senses.definition: adj.有关美的, 美学的,审美的,悦目的
senses.sentence: That armchair is comfortable but not very **esthetic**.
senses.translation: 那张扶手椅坐起来舒服，但不太美观。

senses.definition: n.估计，预测,报价，预算书,评价，判断
senses.sentence: A conservative **estimate** of the bill, so far, is about £22,000.
senses.translation: 到目前为止，这笔账单保守估计为大约2.2万英镑。

senses.definition: adj.永恒的，永久的,似乎不停的，没完没了的,不朽的,永生的
senses.sentence: The series chronicles the everyday adventures of two **eternal** bachelors.
senses.translation: 这个系列剧按照时间顺序记述了两个老光棍每天的奇遇。

senses.definition: n.伦理，伦理观,道德体系,（复数）伦理学，道德学,（复数）行为准则
senses.sentence: Out of Puritanism came the intense work **ethic**.
senses.translation: 严格的职业道德源于清教主义。

senses.definition: adj.种族的，部落的,某文化群体的
senses.sentence: They've been living and working peacefully with members of various **ethnic** groups.
senses.translation: 他们和不同民族的人们一起和睦地生活和工作。

senses.definition: vi.排空（胃肠）,疏散,撤退
senses.sentence: They agreed on how to **evacuate** the civilians from the island.
senses.translation: 他们就如何撤退岛上的居民取得了一致意见.

senses.definition: vt.评价,求…的值（或数）,对…评价,[数学、逻辑学]求…的数值
senses.sentence: Our research attempts to **evaluate** the effectiveness of the different drugs.
senses.translation: 我们的研究试图对不同药物的疗效进行评估。

senses.definition: vi.消失,发散气体,蒸发
senses.sentence: Blasting cold air over it makes the water **evaporate**.
senses.translation: 向它喷射冷空气可以使水蒸发。

senses.definition: n.前夕，前夜,重要事件的前夕,傍晚
senses.sentence: Richard had turned up on Christmas **Eve** with Tony.
senses.translation: 理查德和托尼在圣诞夜一道露面了。

senses.definition: adv.甚至,更加, 即使,恰巧在…时候
senses.sentence: He once told an interviewer that he didn't **even** like rock music.
senses.translation: 他曾告诉一位采访者，他甚至都不喜欢摇滚乐。

senses.definition: n.傍晚,黄昏,晚会,晚年，衰退期，末期
senses.sentence: It was just gone 7 o'clock this **evening** when I finished.
senses.translation: 今晚我做完的时候刚过7点。

senses.definition: n.事件，大事,活动，经历,结果,运动项目
senses.sentence: The birth of a live healthy baby is a truly blessed **event**.
senses.translation: 一个健康活泼的婴儿的出生真是一件可喜的事情。

senses.definition: adv.终于，最后,竟,总归,终究
senses.sentence: **Eventually**, you'll learn to cry that on the inside.
senses.translation: 终有一天，你会学会让泪往心里流。

senses.definition: adv.永远,曾经，这以前,究竟，到底,可能
senses.sentence: **Ever** tried. **Ever** failed. No matter. Try Again. Fail again. Fail better.
senses.translation: 努力过，失败过，没关系，屡战屡败，屡败屡战，每一次失败都比上一次更好。

senses.definition: det.每个,每,所有可能的,充足的
senses.sentence: Someone comes in **every** day to check all is in order.
senses.translation: 每天都有人来检查是否一切都井然有序。

senses.definition: pron.每人，人人,大伙儿,各位
senses.sentence: The minute that the war started, **everybody** was glued to the television.
senses.translation: 战事一起，所有人都盯紧了电视报道。

senses.definition: adj.日常的，平常的,普通的,每天的,经常
senses.sentence: One in five young adults was struggling with **everyday** mathematics.
senses.translation: 1/5的年轻人做日常的数学计算都费劲。

senses.definition: pron.每人，人人
senses.sentence: The world breaks **everyone**, and afterward, many are stronger at the broken places.
senses.translation: 生活总是让我们遍体鳞伤，但到后来，那些受伤的地方会变得更坚强。

senses.definition: pron.每件事物,最重要的东西,（有关的）一切,万事
senses.sentence: Because you're not burning calories, **everything** you eat turns to fat.
senses.translation: 由于没有消耗卡路里，你吃的所有东西都会变成脂肪。

senses.definition: adv.到处，处处，无论什么地方,四下里,漫,匝地
senses.contextMeaning: 到处，处处，无论什么地方
senses.sentence: Stars appeared **everywhere**, spinning round and round, faster and faster.
senses.translation: 满眼金星乱转，而且越转越快。

senses.definition: n.证词,证据,迹象,明显
senses.sentence: This **evidence** supports their contention that the outbreak of violence was prearranged.
senses.translation: 这一证据证实了他们的观点，即此次突发暴力事件是有预谋的。

senses.definition: adj.明显的，明白的,昭著,彰
senses.sentence: The threat of inflation is already **evident** in bond prices.
senses.translation: 通货膨胀的危险在证券价格上已经表现得很明显。

senses.definition: adj.邪恶的，罪恶的,有害的,不幸的，不吉的,品行坏的
vt.产生，引起,唤起
senses.sentence: These images are likely to **evoke** a strong response in the viewer.
senses.translation: 这些图像可能会在观众中产生强烈反响.

senses.definition: n.演变,进化,发展
senses.sentence: It has passed through an interesting procedure of **evolution**.
senses.translation: 它经过了一个有趣的进化过程.

senses.definition: vt.使发展,使进化,设计，制订出,发出，散发
senses.sentence: We had to **evolve** the truth from a mass of confused evidence.
senses.translation: 我们不得不从大量庞杂的证据中推断出事情的真相.

senses.definition: adj.准确的,严密的,精密的，精确的
senses.sentence: A small number — five, to be **exact**—have been bad.
senses.translation: 一小部分——确切地说是5个——已经坏了。

senses.definition: vt.&vi.（使）扩大,（使）增加,夸张
senses.sentence: There could be more unrest, but I wouldn't **exaggerate** the problems.
senses.translation: 可能会有更大的动荡，不过我想也不必夸大问题。

senses.definition: n.<口>考试,测验
senses.sentence: Schools were told their **exam** information had to be spot-on and accurate.
senses.translation: 各学校接到通知，要求考试信息必须准确无误。

senses.definition: n.检查,考试,询问，审问
senses.sentence: The Navy is to carry out an **examination** of the wreck tomorrow.
senses.translation: 海军明天将对失事船只进行细查。

senses.definition: vi.检查,调查
senses.sentence: Doctors **examine** their patients thoroughly in order to make a correct diagnosis.
senses.translation: 为了作出准确的诊断，医生会对病人进行彻底的检查。

senses.definition: n.例子,榜样,范例,先例
senses.sentence: That's just one **example** of the kind of experiments you can do.
senses.translation: 这只不过是你可以做的各种试验中的一例罢了。

senses.definition: vt.超过,超越,胜过,越过…的界限
senses.sentence: Where payments **exceed** these limits they become fully taxable.
senses.translation: 付款额超过这些限度就得全部纳税.

senses.definition: adv.非常，极其，特别，十分,极大地,过分地,极度地，极端
senses.sentence: Physical perfection in a human being is **exceedingly** rare.
senses.translation: 体貌完美的人极为罕见。

senses.definition: vt.优于，擅长
senses.sentence: Academically he began to **excel**.
senses.translation: 他开始在学术上超越他人。

senses.definition: adj.卓越的,杰出的,优秀的,太好了
senses.sentence: The regions are interconnected by an **excellent** highway system.
senses.translation: 那些地区通过完善的公路系统相互连接。

senses.definition: vt.把…除外,不计
senses.sentence: He hadn't eaten a thing **except** for one forkful of salad.
senses.translation: 除了一餐叉色拉，他什么都没吃。

senses.definition: n.例外，除外,反对，批评,[法律]异议，反对
senses.sentence: Almost without **exception** those convicted were our friends and colleagues.
senses.translation: 那些被判有罪的人几乎无一例外都是我们的朋友和同事。

senses.definition: adj.优越的,杰出的,例外的,独特的
senses.sentence: He is an **exceptional** footballer — an artist.
senses.translation: 他是一名出色的足球运动员，一个足球高手。

senses.definition: n.摘录,引用,摘要,节录
senses.sentence: This is an **excerpt** from a novel.
senses.translation: 这是一部小说的摘录.

senses.definition: n.超过,超额量,多余量,放肆
senses.sentence: Red meat, eaten to **excess**, is very high in fat and calories.
senses.translation: 过量食用的红肉中脂肪和卡路里含量很高。

senses.definition: n.交换,交易,交易所,兑换（率）
senses.sentence: During the turmoil in the foreign-**exchange** markets the guilder remained strong.
senses.translation: 荷兰盾在外汇交易市场的动荡中保持坚挺。

senses.definition: vt.交换，互换,兑换,交换，调换
senses.sentence: They **exchange** traveller's cheques at a different rate from notes.
senses.translation: 他们兑换旅行支票时依据的汇率跟兑换现钞时不同。

senses.definition: vt.使兴奋,激发,刺激,使紧张不安
senses.sentence: Reports of the plot of this unusual film tend to **excite** revulsion.
senses.translation: 有关这部不同寻常电影的情节的报道常常令人生厌。

senses.definition: n.兴奋，激动,令人兴奋的事,刺激，振奋
senses.sentence: It had been a time of almost uncontrollable **excitement**.
senses.translation: 那是一个几乎难以抑制亢奋的时期。

senses.definition: adj.使人兴奋的，令人激动的
senses.contextMeaning: 使人兴奋的，令人激动的
senses.sentence: It'san **exciting** opportunity to learn what goes on behind the scenes.
senses.translation: 可以有机会了解幕后的工作，令人非常兴奋。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.呼喊,惊叫,大声说
senses.sentence: The Munroe girls rushed up to **exclaim** over her dress.
senses.translation: 孟家的女孩子都跑过来为她的衣服喝彩.

senses.definition: vt.排除，不包括,排斥,驱除，赶出
senses.sentence: The first task was to fence the wood to **exclude** sheep.
senses.translation: 第一项任务就是把树林围起来不让羊进去。

senses.definition: adj.专用的,高级的,排外的,单独的
senses.sentence: Many of their cheeses are **exclusive** to our stores in Britain.
senses.translation: 在英国，他们生产的奶酪很多只在我们商店出售。

senses.definition: n.（尤指集体）远足,短途旅行，游览,离题,[机]冲程
senses.sentence: We unwisely chose not to go on a coach **excursion** to Trondheim.
senses.translation: 我们作出了不明智的选择，没有乘旅游大巴去特隆赫姆。

senses.definition: vt.原谅,为…申辩,免除，宽免,给…免去
senses.sentence: National security is the stock **excuse** for keeping things confidential.
senses.translation: 国家安全常被用作对一些事情保密的挡箭牌。

senses.definition: vt.执行,处死，处决,履行,完成
senses.sentence: Make sure that you **execute** all movements smoothly and without jerking.
senses.translation: 一定要保证所有动作自然流畅，不要一顿一顿的。

senses.definition: n.总经理,行政部门,[计算机]执行指令
senses.sentence: The programme of sell-offs has been implemented by the new chief **executive**.
senses.translation: 新任总裁已经执行了抛售方案。

senses.definition: vt.是…的典型,例示，举例证明,[法]复印，制成核正誊本
senses.sentence: I'm going to **exemplify** one or two of these points.
senses.translation: 我打算就论点中的一、两个方面举例说明.

senses.definition: vt.使免除，豁免
senses.sentence: Children under two years are **exempt**.
senses.translation: 两岁以下儿童免票。

senses.definition: n.练习,运动，训练,运用,典礼
senses.sentence: His **exercise** books were full of well deserved red ticks.
senses.translation: 他的练习本上尽是些红钩钩，都是他应得的。

senses.definition: vt.发挥,运用,使受（影响等）,用（力）
senses.sentence: We all know that when we **exert** ourselves our heart rate increases.
senses.translation: 我们都知道太卖命了会导致心跳加速。

senses.definition: vi.排气
senses.sentence: When your **exhaust** falls off, you have to replace it.
senses.translation: 如果你的排气管脱落，应将其更换。

senses.definition: vt.陈列，展览,呈现,证明,[法]提交证据
senses.sentence: He seems to want to **exhibit** his shame.
senses.translation: 他似乎想要让大家知道自己感到羞愧。

senses.definition: n.陈列，展览,展览品，陈列品,表明,[法]（证据等的）提出
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **exhibition** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【exhibition】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: vt.放逐，流放,使背井离乡
senses.sentence: He was vilified, hounded, and forced into **exile** by the FBI.
senses.translation: 他遭到了联邦调查局的诬蔑和追捕，被迫流亡国外。

senses.definition: vi.存在,生存,生活,继续存在
senses.sentence: I would have to learn, little by little, to **exist** alone.
senses.translation: 我得慢慢学会独自生活。

senses.definition: n.存在，实在,生活，生活方式,实体，存在物
senses.sentence: He had been a rock in the shifting sands of her **existence**.
senses.translation: 他一直是她曲折坎坷的生活中的主心骨。

senses.definition: adj.目前的,现存的
senses.sentence: Some feminists sought reforms within the **existing** social order.
senses.translation: 一些女权主义者寻求在现存的社会制度内进行改革。

senses.definition: n.出口，通道,退场,退去，退出,死亡
senses.sentence: They escaped through an emergency **exit** and called the police.
senses.translation: 他们从紧急出口逃脱，并报了警。

senses.definition: adj.异国的,外来的,异乎寻常的，奇异的,吸引人的
senses.sentence: Consumers are increasingly interested in the authentically **exotic** tastes.
senses.translation: 消费者对于真正的异国风味越来越情有独钟。

senses.definition: vi.扩展,发展,张开,展开
senses.sentence: Health officials are proposing to **expand** their services by organising counselling.
senses.translation: 卫生官员计划通过组织咨询来扩展他们的服务。

senses.definition: n.扩大,扩张,扩张物,膨胀物
senses.sentence: This revolutionary **expansion** required energetic nation-building policies.
senses.translation: 这种跨越式的扩张需要有活力的国家建设政策。

senses.definition: vt.期望,预料,要求,认为（某事）会发生
senses.sentence: Don't **expect** me to come and visit you there.
senses.translation: 别指望我会去那儿看你。

senses.definition: n.期待，期望,期望的东西
senses.sentence: Average life **expectancy** went down from about 70 to 67.
senses.translation: 平均预期寿命从70岁左右降到了67岁。

senses.definition: n.期待,预期,前程,[数]期望值
senses.sentence: The weight of **expectation** was getting to them.
senses.translation: 他们逐渐感觉到了期望带来的压力。

senses.definition: n.考察，远航,考察队，远征军,（短途的）旅行,迅速（办理）
senses.sentence: The **expedition** was wrecked by bad planning and poor navigation.
senses.translation: 这次探险因计划不周和导航不利而失败。

senses.definition: vt.驱逐,赶走,把…除名,排出（气体等）
vt.花费,耗尽,用光
senses.sentence: Don't **expend** all your time on such a useless job.
senses.translation: 不要把时间消耗在这种无用的工作上.

senses.definition: n.花费，支出,费用，经费,（尤指金钱的）支出额,（精力、时间、材料等的）耗费
senses.sentence: He balanced his budgets by rigid control over public **expenditure**.
senses.translation: 他通过严格控制公共开支保持预算平衡。

senses.definition: n.费用,花费的钱,消耗,花钱的东西
senses.sentence: He put Elizabeth's motel bill and airfare on his **expense** account.
senses.translation: 他将伊丽莎白住汽车旅馆的费用和机票费用记在他的报销账目中。

senses.definition: adj.昂贵的，花钱多的,豪华的
senses.sentence: I get very nervous because I'm using a lot of **expensive** equipment.
senses.translation: 因为正在使用很多昂贵的设备，所以我非常紧张。

senses.definition: n.经验，体验,经历，阅历
senses.sentence: His office was in keeping with his station and **experience**.
senses.translation: 他的办公室与其身份和阅历相称。

senses.definition: n.实验，试验,尝试
senses.sentence: He is always eager for new experiences and ever-willing to **experiment**.
senses.translation: 他总是渴望拥有新的经历，而且永远愿意尝试。

senses.definition: adj.实验的,根据实验的,试验性的
senses.sentence: Yesterday he changed his tune, saying the fare increase was **experimental**.
senses.translation: 昨天他变卦了，说提价只是试行。

senses.definition: n.专家，能手,权威,行家，高手,熟练者
senses.sentence: I'm a limited and obtuse clergyman while you're the **expert**.
senses.translation: 你是专家，而我是个能力有限的愚笨牧师。

senses.definition: n.专门知识或技能,专家的意见,专家评价，鉴定
senses.sentence: It's a team unrivalled in stature, **expertise** and credibility.
senses.translation: 这个团队的名声、专业技能和信誉都是无可匹敌的。

senses.definition: vi.期满,文件、协议等（因到期而）失效,断气,逝世
senses.sentence: His term of office as president will **expire** next year.
senses.translation: 他的总统任期明年将届满.

senses.definition: vt.& vi.讲解，解释
senses.sentence: Hospital discipline was broken. Amy would have to **explain** herself.
senses.translation: 破坏了医院的纪律，埃米将不得不为自己辩解。

senses.definition: n.解释,说明,辩解,（消除误会后）和解
senses.sentence: Their water was turned off weeks ago without **explanation**.
senses.translation: 他们的水在几周以前就毫无理由地被切断了。

senses.definition: adj.明确的，清楚的,直言的,详述的,不隐瞒的
senses.sentence: Criticism is hinted at, but never made **explicit**.
senses.translation: 批评总是含沙射影，但从未明说。

senses.definition: vi.爆[突]发，发怒,激增，迅速扩大
senses.sentence: The car was juddering and vibrating as if it would **explode**.
senses.translation: 汽车剧烈地摇晃着、颤动着，就像要爆炸似的。

senses.definition: vt.开采,开拓,利用（…为自己谋利）,剥削
senses.sentence: What the media should not do is to **exploit** people's natural fears.
senses.translation: 媒体不应该利用人们天生的恐惧心理。

senses.definition: vi.勘查， 探测， 勘探,[医]探查（伤处等），探索，研究
senses.contextMeaning: 勘查， 探测， 勘探
senses.sentence: I just wanted to **explore** Paris, read Sartre, listen to Sidney Bechet.
senses.translation: 我就想逛逛巴黎，读读萨特的作品，听听悉尼·贝谢的音乐。

senses.definition: n.爆炸，炸裂,爆发,扩张，激增,（感情，尤指愤怒的）突然爆发
senses.sentence: A violent **explosion** seemed to jolt the whole ground.
senses.translation: 剧烈的爆炸好像要把整个地面都掀起来。

senses.definition: adj.爆炸的,易爆炸的,突增的,暴躁的
senses.sentence: Nobody knows what **explosive** arguments the future of Europe will bring.
senses.translation: 没有人知道欧洲的未来这一议题会引起怎样爆炸性的讨论。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.出口，输出
senses.sentence: Purchase tax was not payable on goods for **export**.
senses.translation: 出口商品不需要交购买税。

senses.definition: vt.揭露，揭发,使暴露,使遭受,使曝光
senses.sentence: When Myra told Karp she'd **expose** his past, he blew up.
senses.translation: 当迈拉告诉卡普她会把他的过去全抖搂出去时，卡普大为光火。

senses.definition: n.暴露,揭发,公开,（商品等的）展出
senses.sentence: Their sporting reputation has suffered enormously from Johnson's **exposure**.
senses.translation: 由于约翰逊东窗事发，他们的体育声誉受到了严重损害。

senses.definition: v.表达,表示,显而易见,快递邮寄
senses.sentence: It was important for children to learn to **express** themselves clearly.
senses.translation: 孩子学会清楚地表达自己很重要。

senses.definition: adj.精致的,细腻的,优美的,剧烈的
senses.sentence: She dances with an **exquisite** fluidity of movement.
senses.translation: 她的舞姿细腻流畅。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.延伸,扩大,推广
senses.sentence: This year they have introduced three new products to **extend** their range.
senses.translation: 今年他们发布了3种新产品，以扩大产品范围。

senses.definition: n.伸展，扩大,延长，延期,[医]牵引,电话分机
senses.sentence: After a further four-month **extension** of her probation period, she was sacked.
senses.translation: 在又试用了4个月后，她被开除了。

senses.definition: adj.广阔的，广大的,范围广泛的,[物]广延的,[逻]外延的
senses.sentence: He has received **extensive** corrective surgery to his skull.
senses.translation: 他的头骨做过大面积的矫形手术。

senses.definition: n.程度,长度,广大地域,扣押
senses.sentence: To an **extent**, that is the reason for the meeting.
senses.translation: 在某种程度上，那就是召开这次会议的原因。

senses.definition: n.外部，外面，表面，外形，外观,外貌,[影视]外景，[戏，影视]户外布景
senses.contextMeaning: 外部，外面，表面，外形，外观
senses.sentence: Eventually, they had to reinforce the walls with **exterior** beams.
senses.translation: 最终，他们不得不通过增加外梁来对墙体进行加固。

senses.definition: adj.外面的，外部的,表面上的,外用的,外国的
senses.sentence: **External** broadcasting soaks up more resources in Britain than elsewhere.
senses.translation: 英国花费在对外广播上的财力高于其他国家。

senses.definition: adj.灭绝的,绝种的,消逝的,破灭的
senses.sentence: Herbalism had become an all but **extinct** skill in the Western world.
senses.translation: 草药医术在西方已经成了一门几乎绝迹的技艺。

senses.definition: vt.熄灭（火）,使（希望、爱情等）不复存在,偿清
senses.sentence: Firefighters tried to **extinguish** the flames.
senses.translation: 消防队员奋力救火。

senses.definition: adj.额外的，补充的，附加的,特大的，特别的
senses.sentence: There's an **extra** blanket in the bottom drawer of the cupboard.
senses.translation: 壁橱最下面的抽屉里还有一条多余的毯子。

senses.definition: vt.提取,（费力地）拔出,选取,获得
senses.sentence: A dentist may decide to **extract** the tooth to prevent recurrent trouble.
senses.translation: 牙医可能会决定拔掉那颗牙，以免反复发作。

senses.definition: adj.学校课程以外的,课外
senses.sentence: Each child had participated in **extracurricular** activities at school.
senses.translation: 每个孩子都参加了学校的课外活动。

senses.definition: adj.非凡的,特别的,非常奇特的
senses.sentence: They testify to the **extraordinary** potency of his personality.
senses.translation: 这些事情证明了他非凡的人格魅力。

senses.definition: adj.过度的，过分的,奢侈的，浪费的,放肆的,大量的
senses.sentence: I can have a brainstorm and be very **extravagant**.
senses.translation: 我有时会头脑发热，挥霍无度。

senses.definition: n.极端,困境,[数]极限值,[常用复数]在两末端的事物
senses.sentence: It is hard to imagine Lineker capable of anything so **extreme**.
senses.translation: 很难想象莱恩克尔能做出如此极端的事情。

senses.definition: n.眼睛,视力,眼状物,风纪扣扣眼
senses.sentence: The worms cannot be seen by the naked **eye**.
senses.translation: 这些虫子用肉眼看不见。

senses.definition: n.视觉，视力,见解，观察,眼力
senses.sentence: He was not a particularly good shot because of his **eyesight**.
senses.translation: 他视力不好，算不上是一个出色的射手。

senses.definition: n.织物,布,构造,（建筑物的）结构（如墙、地面、屋顶）：质地
senses.sentence: He noticed that **fabric** was tearing away from the plane's wing.
senses.translation: 他注意到机翼在一块一块地断裂。

senses.definition: vt.制造,装配,捏造
senses.sentence: They plan to **fabricate** a cinema next year.
senses.translation: 他们计划明年建造一座电影院.

senses.definition: adj.极好的，极妙的,（美貌）惊人的,寓言般的,难以置信的
senses.sentence: During each show we will be raffling a **fabulous** prize.
senses.translation: 每场表演期间，我们将以抽彩方法送出大奖。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.面对,面向…,正视,承认
senses.sentence: They have maintained their optimism in the **face** of desolating subjugation.
senses.translation: 面对遭征服的悲惨命运，他们保持了乐观的态度。

senses.definition: vt.促进，助长,使容易,帮助
senses.sentence: The new trade agreement should **facilitate** more rapid economic growth.
senses.translation: 新贸易协定应当会加快经济发展。

senses.definition: n.设备,容易,能力,灵巧
senses.sentence: Your camcorder should have these basic features: autofocus, playback **facility**, zoom lens.
senses.translation: 你的便携式摄像机应该具备以下基本功能：自动聚焦、回放功能、变焦镜头。

senses.definition: n.事实，实情,实际,真相，证据,犯罪行为
n.因素,<数>因子,代理人
senses.sentence: This **factor** will come increasingly to the fore as election day nears.
senses.translation: 随着选举日的临近，这一因素将愈发重要。

senses.definition: n.工厂，制造厂,<古>代理店
senses.sentence: Nora was deflowered by a man who worked in a soda-water **factory**.
senses.translation: 在汽水厂工作的一个男子夺去了诺拉的童贞。

senses.definition: n.能力，才能,全体教职员,<英>（大学的）专科，系,特权，特许
senses.sentence: **Faculty** members complain that their students are unprepared to do college-level work.
senses.translation: 学院的老师们抱怨说他们的学生还很不适应大学的课业。

senses.definition: vi.褪去，失去光泽,逐渐消逝,凋谢，衰老
vt.& vi.失败，不及格,倒闭，破产,缺乏,衰退
senses.sentence: The various elements of the novel **fail** to cohere.
senses.translation: 这部小说的各部分之间缺乏连贯性。

senses.definition: n.失败，不及格,缺乏，不足,破产，倒闭,失败的事，失败者
senses.sentence: **Failure** is never quite so frightening as regret.
senses.translation: 比失败更令人恐惧的是懊悔。

senses.definition: adj.微弱的，模糊的,软弱的,无勇气的,将昏倒似的
senses.sentence: Don't be **faint**-hearted when things seem a bit slow or boring.
senses.translation: 事情变得有点沉闷无聊的时候，不要胆怯。

senses.definition: adj.公平的,合理的,晴朗的,美丽的
senses.sentence: Frank Deford is a contributing editor for Vanity **Fair** magazine.
senses.translation: 弗兰克·德福特是杂志《名利场》的特约编辑。

senses.definition: adv.适当，相当地,公平地,完全，简直,清楚地
senses.sentence: She was a **fairly** rigid person who had strong religious views.
senses.translation: 她相当顽固，宗教观念极强。

senses.definition: n.信用，信任,宗教信仰,忠诚,宗教
senses.sentence: His government is placing its **faith** in international diplomacy.
senses.translation: 他的政府对国际外交关系充满信心。

senses.definition: n.信徒
senses.sentence: The Bishop directed the **faithful** to stay at home.
senses.translation: 主教要求信徒们呆在家中。

senses.definition: vt.伪造,篡改,对…做手脚,仿造
senses.sentence: They said, after digging around, the photo was a **fake**.
senses.translation: 在搜集了有关情况后，他们说照片是伪造的。

senses.definition: v.落下,跌倒,减少,沦陷
senses.sentence: Over a given period, the value of shares will rise and **fall**.
senses.translation: 股票的价值在某一特定的时期内会有涨跌。

senses.definition: adj.虚伪的,不正的，非法的,假造的，摹造的,临时的
senses.sentence: Look at the **false** police reports that omitted or misstated crucial facts.
senses.translation: 看看这份失实的警方报告吧，它忽略或歪曲了关键的事实。

senses.definition: n.名声,名望,传闻,传说
adj.熟悉的,通晓的,冒昧的,随便的
senses.sentence: In the cosy consulting room the children are surrounded by **familiar** objects.
senses.translation: 在温馨的诊疗室里，孩子们周围摆满了亲切熟悉的东西。

senses.definition: n.家庭,家族,孩子,祖先
senses.sentence: Ah yes, but think of all the **family** life they're missing.
senses.translation: 是这样，不过别忘了他们错过了多少天伦之乐。

senses.definition: n.饥荒,饥饿,极度缺乏
senses.sentence: The civil war is obstructing distribution of **famine** relief by aid agencies.
senses.translation: 内战阻碍着救援机构对饥荒赈济物资的配给。

senses.definition: adj.著名的，出名的,〈古〉一流的，极好的
senses.sentence: The chalky soil around Saumur produces the **famous** Anjou wines.
senses.translation: 索米尔周围的白垩质土壤出产著名的安茹葡萄酒。

senses.definition: n.扇子，风扇,迷，粉丝,扇形物,扬谷机
senses.sentence: If you're a Billy Crystal **fan**, you'lllove this movie.
senses.translation: 如果你是比利·克里斯托的影迷，你会喜爱这部影片。

senses.definition: vt.想像,设想,想要,猜想
senses.sentence: It was packaged in a **fancy** plastic case with attractive graphics.
senses.translation: 它装在一个别致的有漂亮图纹的塑料盒子里。

senses.definition: adj.极好的,很大的,怪诞的,不切实际的
senses.sentence: I got a **fantastic** new job and my salary tripled.
senses.translation: 我得到了一份非常好的新工作，薪水涨到了原来的3倍。

senses.definition: n.幻想,空想的产物,幻想作品,非正式的货币
senses.sentence: She clings to a romantic **fantasy** of wedded bliss.
senses.translation: 她沉醉于婚后幸福的浪漫幻想。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.想像,幻想,奏幻想曲
senses.sentence: She invents **fantasy** lives for her own vicarious pleasure.
senses.translation: 她幻想过着各种奇妙的生活，从想入非非中获得乐趣。

senses.definition: adv.久远地,（问到或谈及距离时说）有多远,到很远距离,到很大程度
n.费,票价,乘客,食物
senses.sentence: In second class the **fare** is £85 one-way.
senses.translation: 二等车厢单程票价是85英镑。

senses.definition: n.告别，欢送,欢送会,告别辞
senses.sentence: He bade his wife **farewell** and set out on his journey.
senses.translation: 他辞别了妻子便启程了.

senses.definition: n.农场，农庄,农家,畜牧场,农田
senses.sentence: His most prized time, though, will be spent quietly on his **farm**.
senses.translation: 不过，他最宝贵的时光将在自己的农场里平静地度过。

senses.definition: n.农场主，农民,承包人
senses.sentence: Mr **Farmer** and Mrs Jones both admitted conspiring to murder her husband.
senses.translation: 法默先生和琼斯太太都承认密谋杀死了琼斯先生。

senses.definition: adv.更远地,较远地,在更大程度上,进一步
senses.sentence: I can't see any **farther** than the next six months.
senses.translation: 6个月以后的事情我就无法预见了。

senses.definition: vt.使着迷,使神魂颠倒,蛊惑
senses.sentence: I believed devoutly in her power to **fascinate** him, in her dazzling loveliness.
senses.translation: 我由衷地相信她有使他神魂颠倒的力量, 相信她有令人眼花缭乱的姿色.

senses.definition: n.时尚，时装,时装领域，时尚界,方式，方法
senses.sentence: Queen Mary started the **fashion** for blue and white china in England.
senses.translation: 玛丽女王开启了青花瓷在英格兰的流行风尚。

senses.definition: adj.流行的,时髦的，符合时尚的,时髦人物使用的,（尤指）有钱人常光顾的
senses.sentence: All shades of mauve, lilac, lavender and purple were **fashionable**.
senses.translation: 深深浅浅的各种木槿色、丁香色、熏衣草色和紫色都是流行色。

senses.definition: adv.（比准确的时间或宣布的时间）快,迅速地,紧紧地,彻底地
senses.sentence: The auguries of death are **fast** gathering round his head.
senses.translation: 死亡凶兆迅速地在他脑海中盘旋。

senses.definition: vt.系牢，钉牢,使坚固或稳固,使合在一起：封合,集中：稳定地集中或指向：
senses.sentence: They **fasten** with a drawstring.
senses.translation: 它们是用拉绳系紧的。

senses.definition: adj.肥的,胖的,厚的,大量的
adj.致命的，攸关的,毁灭性的，严重的,命中注定的,重大的
senses.sentence: It is impossible to say who struck the **fatal** blow.
senses.translation: 很难判断是谁给了致命的一击。

senses.definition: n.命运,天意,命中注定的事（尤指坏事）
senses.sentence: They held his **fate** in the palms of their ancient hands.
senses.translation: 他们这些老人将他的命运掌握在手心里。

senses.definition: n.父亲,祖先,（尤指天主教和东正教的）神父,天父
senses.sentence: There was a long silence, and my **father** looked shamefaced.
senses.translation: 沉默持续了很长时间，而我父亲看上去面带愧色。

senses.definition: vi.疲劳
senses.sentence: Symptoms of anaemia include weakness, **fatigue** and iron deficiency.
senses.translation: 贫血的症状包括虚弱、疲劳和缺铁。

senses.definition: n.缺点，缺陷,过错，责任,[电]故障,（猎狗的）失去嗅迹
senses.sentence: I was disappointed whenever the cook found **fault** with my work.
senses.translation: 每当厨师挑剔我干的活儿时，我都非常沮丧。

senses.definition: vt.支持,赞成,照顾,促成
senses.sentence: Recent opinion polls show that 60 percent **favor** abortion under certain circumstances.
senses.translation: 最近的民意调查显示，60%的人赞成在某些情况下可以堕胎。

senses.definition: adj.赞同的,称赞的,有利的,讨人喜欢的
n.特别喜欢的人（或物）,喜欢的事物,最有希望获胜者（尤指马）,收藏夹
senses.sentence: The Democrat candidate is the **favorite** to win election.
senses.translation: 民主党候选人最有希望赢得选举。

senses.definition: n.帮助,恩惠,赞同,善行
senses.sentence: The vote passed with 111 in **favour** and 25 against.
senses.translation: 111票赞成，25票反对，表决通过。

senses.definition: adj.顺利的，良好的,有利的,赞许的,给人好印象的
senses.sentence: That improved Mrs Goole's already **favourable** opinion of him.
senses.translation: 那件事更加深了古尔太太对他的好印象。

senses.definition: adj.特别受喜爱的
senses.sentence: Michael Fish is my **favourite**. He's a hoot, a real character.
senses.translation: 我最喜欢迈克尔·菲什。他滑稽逗趣，是个实实在在的人物。

senses.definition: n.传真
senses.sentence: These days, cartoonists send in their work by **fax**.
senses.translation: 现在卡通画家用传真机发送作品。

senses.definition: n.害怕,可能性,（对神等的）敬畏,忧虑
senses.sentence: His mind was a haze of **fear** and confusion.
senses.translation: 由于害怕和困惑，他当时处于一种混沌状态。

senses.definition: adj.害怕的，担心的,胆怯的,吓人的，可怕的,<口>极端的
senses.sentence: I had often been very **fearful**, very angry, and very isolated.
senses.translation: 我以前经常感到非常恐惧，非常愤怒，非常孤独。

senses.definition: adj.可行的,可用的,可实行的,可能的
senses.sentence: It's just not **feasible** to manage the business on a part-time basis.
senses.translation: 兼职管理业务是搞不好的。

senses.definition: n.盛会,宴会,宗教节日,使人欢快的事物（或活动）
senses.sentence: On the following day a **feast** was given in King John's honour.
senses.translation: 第二天设宴款待约翰王。

senses.definition: n.功绩，伟业,技艺表演,卓绝的手艺，技术，本领,武艺
senses.sentence: He performed a sensational acrobatic **feat**.
senses.translation: 他表演了一套惊人的杂技功夫。

senses.definition: n.羽毛，翎毛,状态，心情,种类,桨叶的水平运动
senses.sentence: I taped the base of the **feather** onto the velvet.
senses.translation: 我用胶带把羽毛的根部粘在了天鹅绒上。

senses.definition: n.特征，特点,容貌，面貌,（期刊的）特辑,故事片
senses.sentence: Television companies tend to censor bad language in **feature** films.
senses.translation: 电视公司往往会在审查故事片时删去其中的粗话。

senses.definition: n.二月
senses.sentence: He was jailed in **February** 1992 and could be released next year.
senses.translation: 他于1992年2月入狱，可能明年获释。

senses.definition: adj.联邦（制）的,同盟的
senses.sentence: He does not believe in a **federal** Europe with centralising powers.
senses.translation: 他认为一个集权式联邦制在欧洲是不可行的。

senses.definition: n.联邦，同盟,联盟，联合会,联邦，联邦政府
senses.sentence: The Russian **Federation** declared itself to be a sovereign republic.
senses.translation: 俄罗斯联邦宣布自己为主权独立的共和国。

senses.definition: n.（加入组织或做某事付的）费,专业服务费，业务报酬,小费，赏钱,[法] 继承的产业
senses.sentence: Sometimes there's a flat **fee** for carrying out a particular task.
senses.translation: 有时执行某项特定的任务有固定的价码。

senses.definition: adj.虚弱的，衰弱的,无效的，无意的,缺乏决心的，缺乏活力的
senses.sentence: He gave a **feeble** shrug and tried to squirm free.
senses.translation: 他无力地耸耸肩，扭动身体想要挣脱。

senses.definition: vt.喂养,满足（欲望等）,向…提供,供…作食物
n.反馈,反应,反馈噪音
senses.sentence: It would monitor traffic flows and provide **feedback** to motorists.
senses.translation: 它能监控交通状况，然后给司机提供反馈信息。

senses.definition: n.感觉,触摸,感受,触觉
senses.sentence: I've gotten my feet thoroughly soaked and **feel** frozen through and through.
senses.translation: 我双脚湿透，感觉都冻到骨头里了。

senses.definition: n.感觉，知觉，情绪,感情,气氛
senses.sentence: McKay walked slowly toward this screen, **feeling** a growing tenseness.
senses.translation: 麦凯缓缓地朝这个屏幕走来，每走一步心情都更加紧张。

senses.definition: vt.砍倒，打倒
senses.sentence: The ball **fell** straight to the feet of Klinsmann.
senses.translation: 球直接落到了克林斯曼的脚上。

senses.definition: n.同伴,男子,（大学的）研究员,（某些学院或大学的）董事
senses.sentence: He was a tall, thin **fellow** with a slight stoop.
senses.translation: 他是个瘦高个儿，有点驼背。

senses.definition: n.友谊，交情,会社，团体,研究员职位,学术奖金
senses.sentence: There was a great deal of soldierly good **fellowship**.
senses.translation: 这里充满了战友间才有的那种真挚友谊。

senses.definition: adj.女性的,雌性的,能结果实的,电气设备阴的
senses.sentence: Janis Joplin was the personification of the '60s **female** rock singer.
senses.translation: 贾尼斯·乔普林是20世纪60年代摇滚女歌手的代表。

senses.definition: adj.有女性气质的,女子气的,[语]阴性的,阴柔的
senses.sentence: Bead-work, applique and embroidery add a uniquely **feminine** touch.
senses.translation: 珠饰、嵌花和刺绣可增添一种独特的女人味。

senses.definition: n.栅栏，篱笆,围墙,防护物,剑术
senses.sentence: He squeezed through a narrow opening in the **fence**.
senses.translation: 他从围栏上的狭窄缺口里挤了过去。

senses.definition: n.渡船,渡口,摆渡,用船渡运
senses.sentence: The **ferry** did not even have time to send out an SOS.
senses.translation: 渡船甚至连发出紧急呼救信号的时间都没有。

senses.definition: adj.肥沃的,可繁殖的,想象力丰富的
senses.sentence: They used force to banish the natives from the more **fertile** land.
senses.translation: 他们使用武力把土著居民驱逐出了比较肥沃的土地。

senses.definition: vt.施肥于,使肥沃
senses.sentence: Here a close - up of a number of sperm trying to **fertilise** an egg.
senses.translation: 这张图片上显示的是大量精子正在争先恐后地给卵子受精.

senses.definition: n.肥料，化肥
senses.sentence: The **fertiliser** releases nutrients gradually as bacteria decompose it.
senses.translation: 随着细菌的分解，肥料逐渐释放出各种营养成分。

senses.definition: vt.使肥沃,使受孕,施肥
senses.sentence: It only takes one sperm to **fertilize** an egg.
senses.translation: 只需要一个精子就能让卵子受精。

senses.definition: n.肥料，化肥,受精媒介物,促进发展者
senses.sentence: The organic **fertilizer** shall keep the soil in good heart.
senses.translation: 这有机肥一定会使土壤保持肥沃.

senses.definition: n.节日,节期,贺宴，会演
senses.sentence: During the **festival**, we'll be showing 13 classic oldie films.
senses.translation: 我们将在电影节期间展映13部经典老片.

senses.definition: vt.接来（某人）,使发出,吸引,售得（若干价钱）
senses.sentence: **Fetch** me a glass of water.
senses.translation: 去给我拿杯水来。

senses.definition: n.发热，发烧,热病,一时的狂热,激动不安
senses.sentence: Evans had rheumatic **fever**, missed school and fell behind.
senses.translation: 伊万斯得了风湿热，没去上课，功课也落下了。

senses.definition: adj.很少的,很少,（与复数名词和复数动词连用）有些,几乎没有的
senses.sentence: **Few** would argue that this team has experience and proven ability.
senses.translation: 这个队伍的丰富经验和表现出来的实力是众所公认的。

senses.definition: n.光纤,（织物的）质地,纤维，纤维物质
senses.sentence: The muscle **fiber** of this animal is diseased.
senses.translation: 这个动物的肌肉纤维产生了病变.

senses.definition: n.纤维,性格,硬纸板纤维板
senses.sentence: The ball is made of rattan — a natural **fibre**.
senses.translation: 这个球是由一种天然纤维——省藤制成的。

senses.definition: n.小说，虚构的文学作品,虚构的或想像出的事，并非完全真实的事,编造，虚构
senses.sentence: **Fiction** takes up a large slice of the publishing market.
senses.translation: 小说在出版市场上占了很大的份额。

senses.definition: n.田,（作某种用途的）场地,（学习或研究的）领域,运动场
senses.sentence: He was on the training **field** for some light work yesterday.
senses.translation: 昨天他在训练场进行了一些强度较小的训练。

senses.definition: adj.凶猛的，残忍的,猛烈的,狂热的
senses.sentence: The area has been the scene of **fierce** fighting for three months.
senses.translation: 这一地区3个月以来不断发生激战。

senses.definition: n.十五,十五个人组成的橄榄球队
senses.sentence: **Fifteen**-year-old Danny is on the run from a local authority home.
senses.translation: 15岁的丹尼从地方当局的收容所逃跑了。

senses.definition: num.五十,五十个
senses.sentence: Forty or **fifty** women were sitting cross-legged on the ground.
senses.translation: 四五十个女人盘腿坐在地上。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.战斗,斗争,打架,吵架
senses.sentence: He had had a **fight** with Smith and bloodied his nose.
senses.translation: 他和史密斯打了一架，把后者的鼻子打出了血。

senses.definition: n.文件（夹）,档案,纵列,锉刀
senses.sentence: I looked your address up in the personnel **file**.
senses.translation: 我在人事档案里找到了你的地址。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.（使）充满，（使）装满
senses.sentence: **Fill** a saucepan with water and bring to a slow boil.
senses.translation: 往平底锅里加满水，小火煮沸。

senses.definition: n.影片,电影,胶片,薄层
senses.sentence: Originally released in 1957, the **film** was remade as "The Magnificent Seven".
senses.translation: 这部电影最早在1957年上映，后被翻拍为《七侠荡寇志》。

senses.definition: vt.过滤,滤除
senses.sentence: Children should have glasses which **filter** out UV rays.
senses.translation: 儿童应该戴上滤除紫外线的眼镜。

senses.definition: n.结局,决赛,期末考试,〈口〉（报纸的）末版
senses.sentence: The winner of each preliminary goes through to the **final**.
senses.translation: 每场初赛的获胜者进入决赛。

senses.definition: adv.最后，终于,总算,末后,结果
senses.sentence: At approxi-mately 11:30 p.m., Pollard **finally** gave his consent to the search.
senses.translation: 大概晚上11点半的时候，波拉德最终同意进行搜查。

senses.definition: n.财政,金融,财源,资金
senses.sentence: The **finance** minister will continue to mastermind Poland's economic reform.
senses.translation: 财政部长将继续策划波兰的经济改革。

senses.definition: adj.财政的,财务的,金融的,有钱的
senses.sentence: The enquiry dug deeper into the alleged **financial** misdeeds of his government.
senses.translation: 这一调查对其政府涉嫌的财政违规行为展开了进一步深究。

senses.definition: v.发现,找到,查明,发觉
senses.sentence: It would be difficult to **find** two men who were more dissimilar.
senses.translation: 很难找到彼此间差异更大的人了。

senses.definition: n.发现物,研究结果,调查（或研究）的结果,<律>（陪审团的）裁决
senses.sentence: **Finding** a volunteer to write the computer program isn't a problem.
senses.translation: 找个志愿者编这个计算机程序不成问题。

senses.definition: adj.好的，上等的,纤细的，精致的,健康的,晴朗的
senses.sentence: She's going to be **fine**. She always was pretty strong.
senses.translation: 她会好的。她一直都很强壮。

senses.definition: n.手指,指状物,指针
senses.sentence: He explored the wound with his **finger**, trying to establish its extent.
senses.translation: 他用手指摸了摸伤口，想要确定受伤的程度。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.完成,结束,吃光,使筋疲力尽
senses.sentence: They meant to **finish** her off, swiftly and without mercy.
senses.translation: 他们打算毫不留情地迅速结果了她。

senses.definition: adj.有限的,[语]限定的,[数]有穷的，有限的
senses.sentence: The physical universe is **finite** in space and time.
senses.translation: 物质世界在时间和空间上是有限的。

senses.definition: n.商号，商行,公司,企业,工作集体
senses.sentence: An oil executive swindled £50,000 out of his **firm**.
senses.translation: 一名石油公司主管从其公司骗取了5万英镑。

senses.definition: num.第一
senses.sentence: Their **first** car rolls off the production line on December 16.
senses.translation: 他们的第一辆车于12月16日下线。

senses.definition: n.鱼，鱼肉，鱼类,〈口〉（特殊的）人物，家伙，东西,[建]接合板，夹片，鱼尾板,[航]钓锚器，撑夹桅杆的加固夹箍
senses.sentence: Butter, margarine, and oily **fish** are all good sources of vitamin D.
senses.translation: 黄油、人造黄油和多脂鱼都含有丰富的维生素D。

senses.definition: n.拳，拳头,〈口〉笔迹,掌握,[印]指标参见号
senses.sentence: My son had a tantrum and banged his **fist** on the ground.
senses.translation: 我儿子大发脾气，一拳捶在了地上。

senses.definition: n.健康,适当，适合,合情理
senses.sentence: The emphasis is on developing **fitness** through exercises and training.
senses.translation: 重点在于通过锻炼促进健康。

senses.definition: v.使适合（fit的现在分词）,使合身,与…相符,安装
senses.sentence: Does responsibility end at the **fitting** of car seats?
senses.translation: 只负责安装好汽车座椅吗？

senses.definition: num.五，五个,与某人击掌问候（或庆祝胜利）,第五
senses.sentence: It was **five** long miles to the nearest pub.
senses.translation: 离最近的酒吧有长长的5英里的路程。

senses.definition: n.（房屋等的）固定装置,[商]定期放款，定期存款,固定在某位置的人或物,（定期定点举行的）体育活动
senses.sentence: The couple quickly became a **fixture** of society pages.
senses.translation: 夫妇俩很快便成为了报纸社交版上的常驻人物。

senses.definition: n.旗,旗帜,信号旗,菖蒲
senses.sentence: They flew the **flag** of the African National Congress.
senses.translation: 他们升起非洲人国民大会的旗帜。

senses.definition: n.火焰,热情，激情,〈俚〉爱人，情人,激动
senses.sentence: The two sheets of **flame** clashed, soaring hundreds of feet high.
senses.translation: 两片火焰化作一处，腾起了几百英尺高的烈焰。

senses.definition: n.扁平物,[航] 襟翼,拍打，拍打声,〈口〉不安，恐慌
senses.sentence: He drew back the tent **flap** and strode out into the blizzard.
senses.translation: 他拉开帐篷的门帘，大步走进暴风雪中。

senses.definition: vi.闪耀，闪光,燃烧,突然发怒,向外张开
senses.sentence: Don'tspill too much fat on the barbecue as it could **flare** up.
senses.translation: 不要在烤肉上浇太多的油，会烧起来的。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.使闪光，使闪烁,拍出，发出（电报等）,〈口〉炫耀
senses.sentence: The answer had come to him in a **flash**.
senses.translation: 他一下子就有了答案。

senses.definition: adj.平的,单调的,不景气的,干脆的
senses.sentence: Warm weather has attracted the **flat** fish close to shore.
senses.translation: 煦暖的气候将比目鱼引到了近海。

senses.definition: v.奉承,自命不凡,使显得更漂亮
senses.sentence: You can make your stomach look **flatter** instantly by improving your posture.
senses.translation: 通过采取更好的坐姿，你的腹部马上就会看起来平坦一些。

senses.definition: n.味,韵味,特点,香料
senses.sentence: I think the **flavor** of fresh strawberries is out of this world.
senses.translation: 我认为新鲜草莓的味道鲜美无比.

senses.definition: n.风味，情趣,味，滋味,香味，气味
senses.sentence: Cognac is also used to macerate and **flavour** ingredients and casseroles.
senses.translation: 干邑白兰地也用于浸渍食材，给砂锅炖菜提味。

senses.definition: n.瑕疵，缺点,一阵狂风,短暂的风暴,裂缝，裂纹
senses.sentence: It was a large diamond, but it had a **flaw**.
senses.translation: 这是颗大钻石, 但它有一点瑕疵.

senses.definition: vi.逃走，逃掉,消失
senses.sentence: For an instant, Catherine was tempted to **flee**.
senses.translation: 有那么一会儿，凯瑟琳很想逃跑。

senses.definition: n.舰队,船队,车队,港湾，小河
senses.sentence: He ordered the combined **fleet** to convoy troops to Naples.
senses.translation: 他命令联合舰队将军队护送到那不勒斯。

senses.definition: n.肉,肉体,果肉,皮肤
senses.sentence: There may even be some wire or nylon biting into the **flesh**.
senses.translation: 甚至可能有一些金属丝或者尼龙线勒到肉里。

senses.definition: n.柔韧性，机动性，灵活性,伸缩性,可塑度,柔度
senses.sentence: Women have lost out in this new pay **flexibility**.
senses.translation: 在这一新的薪资弹性化政策中吃亏的是女性。

senses.definition: adj.灵活的,易弯曲的,柔韧的,易被说服的
senses.sentence: Times become more **flexible** off-season, especially in the smaller provincial museums.
senses.translation: 尤其是在规模较小的地方博物馆，开放时间在旅游淡季更加灵活。

senses.definition: vt.（尤指生气地）猛扔,急派,放肆地投入,扔在一边，抛弃
senses.sentence: I can **fling** off a poem in half an hour.
senses.translation: 我用半小时就可以作一首诗.

senses.definition: vt.& vi.（使）浮动,（使）漂浮,自由浮动
senses.sentence: A fresh egg will sink and an old egg will **float**.
senses.translation: 新鲜鸡蛋会沉下去而不新鲜的会浮在上面。

senses.definition: n.兽群，鸟群,群众,棉束,大堆，大量
senses.sentence: A **flock** of birds was already warbling a cheerful morning chorus.
senses.translation: 一群鸟儿已经齐声唱起了欢快的晨曲。

senses.definition: n.洪水,泛滥,溢流,探照灯
senses.sentence: The **flood** of cars has now slowed to a trickle.
senses.translation: 汹涌的车流现在已经变得稀稀拉拉。

senses.definition: n.地面，地板,楼层,底部,议员席
senses.sentence: There was constant jeering and interruption from the **floor**.
senses.translation: 议员席上不断有人在嘲讽和打岔.

senses.definition: n.面粉
senses.sentence: Sift the **flour** and baking powder into a medium-sized mixing bowl.
senses.translation: 将面粉和发酵粉筛入中等大小的搅拌碗中。

senses.definition: vi.挥舞,茂盛，繁荣,活跃，蓬勃
senses.sentence: If left unchecked, weeds will **flourish**.
senses.translation: 如果不加以遏制，杂草就会疯长。

senses.definition: vi.流,垂,流出,（谈话、文体等）流畅
senses.sentence: These dams have restricted the **flow** of the river downstream.
senses.translation: 这些堤坝限制了河水顺流而下。

senses.definition: n.花,精华,开花植物
senses.sentence: Pickers are bent double, plucking each **flower** with lightning speed.
senses.translation: 采花人弓着身子飞快地摘着花。

senses.definition: vi.波动,涨落
senses.sentence: Body temperature can **fluctuate** if you are ill.
senses.translation: 人患病后体温可能会上下波动。

senses.definition: adj.流畅的,流利的,液态的
senses.sentence: She's **fluent** in French and German. She also speaks a little Italian.
senses.translation: 她的法语和德语讲得流利，也会说一点意大利语。

senses.definition: n.液体，流体
senses.sentence: The **fluid** can be drawn off with a syringe.
senses.translation: 可用注射器将液体汲出。

senses.definition: vi.脸红,呈红色,奔流,冲刷
senses.sentence: Water is ideal to **flush** the kidneys and the urinary tract.
senses.translation: 用水清洗肾脏和尿道最理想不过。

senses.definition: vi.飞,飞行,（旗）飘荡,过得快
senses.sentence: His inspiration to **fly** came even before he joined the Army.
senses.translation: 他想开飞机的念头在参军之前就有了。

senses.definition: n.泡沫,泡沫材料，泡沫状物
senses.sentence: Bring a sleeping bag and **foam** mat.
senses.translation: 带上睡袋和泡沫垫。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.（使）集中，（使）聚集,调整（镜头，眼睛）焦点[焦距]以便看清
senses.sentence: In the background, in soft **focus**, we see his smiling wife.
senses.translation: 在背景部分，我们可以看到他妻子面带微笑的蒙影像。

senses.definition: vt.折叠,合拢,抱住,笼罩
senses.sentence: But as other shops **fold**, the march of the superstores continues.
senses.translation: 但在其他商店纷纷关门倒闭之时，大型超市的强劲扩张势头却依旧不减。

senses.definition: n.民族,人们,〈口〉家属，亲戚,民间音乐
senses.sentence: Jack was a **folk** hero in the Greenwich Village bars.
senses.translation: 在格林尼治村的酒吧里杰克是人们心目中的英雄。

senses.definition: adj.后面的，其次的,下列的,顺风的
senses.sentence: Australian rugby league enjoys a huge **following** in New Zealand.
senses.translation: 澳大利亚橄榄球联盟在新西兰有众多支持者。
