senses.definition: adj.喜欢的,多情的,溺爱的，宠爱的,盲目轻信的
senses.sentence: He seemed **fond** of her in a strictly professional way.
senses.translation: 他似乎只是出于职业缘故而喜欢她。

senses.definition: n.食物，食品,粮食,养料,资料
senses.sentence: Megamalls and fast **food** restaurants line the highway system.
senses.translation: 公路系统沿线有大型商场和快餐店。

senses.definition: n.愚人，傻瓜,受骗者,有癖好的人,受愚弄的人
senses.sentence: People always think I'm a **fool**, and I dare say they're right.
senses.translation: 人们总认为我是个傻瓜，想必他们是对的。

senses.definition: adj.愚蠢的,鲁莽的,荒谬的，可笑的,混
senses.sentence: Any action on the basis of such fragmentary evidence would be **foolish**.
senses.translation: 基于如此不完整的证据采取的任何行动都是愚蠢的。

senses.definition: n.脚,底部,英尺(=12 英寸或 30。48 厘米),脚步
senses.sentence: My hobbies are letter writing, **foot**-ball, music, photography, and tennis.
senses.translation: 我的业余爱好是写信、踢足球、听音乐、玩摄影和打网球。

senses.definition: n.足球〔美国通常指橄榄球〕,足球运动,屡屡引起争论（或分歧）的问题,被踢来踢去的难题
senses.contextMeaning: 足球〔美国通常指橄榄球〕
senses.sentence: There are other forms of civil disorder — most notably, **football** hooliganism.
senses.translation: 还有其他形式的民众骚乱，最出名的是足球流氓行为。

senses.definition: n.脚步（声）,足迹
senses.sentence: Ruth listened and started nervously at every passing **footstep**.
senses.translation: 露丝谛听着,每次有脚步声过去她就心惊肉跳.

senses.definition: prep.为，为了,倾向于,关于,当作
senses.sentence: Instead of complaining about what's wrong, be grateful **for** what's right.
senses.translation: 别抱怨不好的事，要对美好的事心存感恩。

senses.definition: vt.禁止,阻止,阻碍,妨碍
senses.sentence: The bylaws **forbid** playing ball in the public garden.
senses.translation: 地方法规规定任何人不得在公园打球或踢球.

senses.definition: n.力,武力,（社会）势力,魄力
senses.sentence: They used **force** to banish the natives from the more fertile land.
senses.translation: 他们使用武力把土著居民驱逐出了比较肥沃的土地。

senses.definition: n.前臂
senses.sentence: My **forearm** deflected most of the first punch.
senses.translation: 我用前臂挡开了第一拳的大部分力道。

senses.definition: n.预报,预言
senses.sentence: The weather **forecast** is for showers and overcast skies.
senses.translation: 天气预报上说多云并伴有阵雨。

senses.definition: adj.外国的，外交的,外来的,不相干的,[医]异质的
senses.sentence: The Swiss wanted to discourage an inflow of **foreign** money.
senses.translation: 瑞士人想要阻止外资流入。

senses.definition: n.外国人,外人，陌生人,外来物，进口货物,（非本土的）外来动植物
senses.sentence: You don't sound like a **foreigner** talking English.
senses.translation: 听你讲英语，不像是外国人。

senses.definition: adj.第一流的，最重要的,最初的，最前面的
senses.sentence: He was one of the world's **foremost** scholars of ancient Indian culture.
senses.translation: 他是世界上最杰出的古印第安文化研究者之一。

senses.definition: vt.预知，预见,有先见之明
senses.sentence: No one can **foresee** what will happen in the future.
senses.translation: 谁也无法预见到将来会发生什么事.

senses.definition: n.森林,丛林,（森林似的）一丛,一片
senses.sentence: Even carrying the camcorder while hiking in the **forest** was an effort.
senses.translation: 在森林中徒步旅行时，即便带的是便携式摄像机也非常费力。

senses.definition: adv.永远,不断地，无休止地,老是，经常
senses.sentence: To this end the young child is **forever** watchful.
senses.translation: 这个年纪不大的孩子为此始终保持警惕。

senses.definition: vt.预先警告，事先告知
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **forewarn** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【forewarn】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.锻造车间,熔铁炉，锻铁炉,铁匠铺，铁匠工场
senses.sentence: The project will help inmates **forge** new careers.
senses.translation: 这项计划会帮助犯人开始新的职业。

senses.definition: vt.忘记，忘却,忽略，疏忽,遗落,忘掉
senses.sentence: If you ever cross him, **forget** it, you're finished.
senses.translation: 如果你曾经跟他作过对，就别想了，你没戏了。

senses.definition: vt.免除
senses.sentence: The American Congress has agreed to **forgive** Egypt's military debt.
senses.translation: 美国国会同意免除埃及的军事债务。

senses.definition: n.叉（挖掘用的园艺工具）,餐叉,叉状物,（自行车或摩托车的）车叉子
senses.sentence: Remove the meat with a **fork** and divide it among four plates.
senses.translation: 用餐叉把肉叉走，分到4个盘里。

senses.definition: n.形状，形式,外形,方式,表格
senses.sentence: Swimming is probably the best **form** of exercise you can get.
senses.translation: 游泳或许是现有的最佳锻炼方式。

senses.definition: adj.（学校教育或培训）正规的,方式上的,礼仪上的
senses.sentence: Despite its lack of **formal** power the nobility was not powerless.
senses.translation: 尽管没有正式的权力，贵族阶层并非没有权势。

senses.definition: n.（出版物的）版式,[自]（数据安排的）形式,电视节目的总安排（或计划）
senses.sentence: The **format** of the new quiz show has proved popular.
senses.translation: 新的智力竞赛节目的总体安排结果证明很受欢迎。

senses.definition: n.形成,构成，结构,形成物,编队，队形
senses.sentence: They saw a squadron of fifteen motorcycle policemen driving in V-**formation**.
senses.translation: 他们看见15名警察骑着摩托车排成V字形前行。

senses.definition: adj.以前的，从前的,在前的,前任的
senses.sentence: The **former** owner had not left any forwarding address.
senses.translation: 以前的房主没有留下任何转递地址。

senses.definition: adj.可怕的,令人敬畏的,难以对付的
senses.sentence: They possess a **formidable** arsenal of rifles, machine guns, landmines and teargas.
senses.translation: 他们持有的步枪、机枪、地雷和催泪弹数量惊人。

senses.definition: n.公式，准则,客套话,方案,婴儿食品
senses.sentence: There is no magic **formula** for producing winning products.
senses.translation: 获奖电影的制作没有捷径可取。

senses.definition: vt.构想出，规划,确切地阐述,用公式表示
senses.sentence: He took care to **formulate** his reply very clearly.
senses.translation: 他字斟句酌,清楚地做了回答.

senses.definition: adv.向前，向前方,露着的，往外的,[废语]出外，离家
senses.sentence: They ate in an Italian restaurant in **Forth** Street.
senses.translation: 他们在第四大街的一家意大利餐馆吃了饭。

senses.definition: n.来临,临近
senses.sentence: The party is all geared up for the **forthcoming** election campaign.
senses.translation: 该党为即将来临的竞选活动做好了准备.

senses.definition: n.两星期，十四天
senses.sentence: I really feel in the pink after a **fortnight**'s holiday.
senses.translation: 度了两星期假后,我的确感到身体非常舒适.

senses.definition: adj.侥幸的，幸运的,带来幸运的，吉利的
senses.sentence: Anna approached several builders and was **fortunate** to come across Eddie.
senses.translation: 安娜与几个建筑商有过接洽，并且很幸运地碰到了埃迪。

senses.definition: n.（某人的）命运,富有,幸运,[常作复数]（人生事件中的）时运
senses.sentence: When **fortune** smiled on him, he made the most of it.
senses.translation: 当好运来临时，他充分把握住了。

senses.definition: n.四十,四十几
senses.sentence: Defence soaks up **forty** per cent of the budget.
senses.translation: 国防耗去40%的预算。

senses.definition: n.论坛，讨论会，专题讨论节目,集会的公共场所,提供公开讨论的媒体,法庭
senses.contextMeaning: 论坛，讨论会，专题讨论节目
senses.sentence: The **forum** is now open to all budding entrepreneurs.
senses.translation: 这个论坛目前向所有企业家新秀敞开大门。

senses.definition: adv.前进地,向前,至将来,提前地
senses.sentence: The car passed over the body twice, once backward and then **forward**.
senses.translation: 那辆车把那人来回轧了两次，先是倒着轧的，再是往前开着轧的。

senses.definition: n.化石,僵化的事物,老顽固，食古不化的人,习语中保存的旧词
senses.sentence: Peter Forey is curator of **fossil** fishes at the Natural History Museum.
senses.translation: 彼得·福雷是自然历史博物馆鱼类化石展厅的负责人。

senses.definition: v.培养,抚育,促进,代养
senses.sentence: The children were waiting for placement in a **foster** care home.
senses.translation: 这些孩子在抚育院等待安置。

senses.definition: n.犯规,缠结,碰撞
senses.sentence: One of the judges thought it was a **foul** throw.
senses.translation: 有个裁判认为投球犯规.

senses.definition: v.发现（ find的过去式）,找到,到达,发觉
senses.sentence: He **found** evidence of mutated forms of the gene.
senses.translation: 他找到了该基因出现了变异形式的证据。

senses.definition: n.地基,基础,基金（会）,粉底
senses.sentence: She dug the **foundation** with a pick and shovel.
senses.translation: 她用镐和平锹挖地基。

senses.definition: n.人工喷泉,喷水池,喷射,源泉
senses.sentence: Snape wrote a receipt with a gold **fountain** pen.
senses.translation: 斯内普用金笔开了一张收据。

senses.definition: num.四,四个,第四
senses.sentence: The key issue was whether the **four** defendants acted dishonestly.
senses.translation: 关键问题是4名被告是否存在欺诈行为。

senses.definition: num.十四,十四个,第十四
senses.sentence: He spent the last **fourteen** years of his life in retirement.
senses.translation: 他一生中最后的14年是在退休中度过的。

senses.definition: n.狐,狐狸,狡猾的人,狐皮
senses.sentence: It shows a **fox** being disembowelled by a pack of hounds.
senses.translation: 画面中一只狐狸正被一群猎狗撕咬得肠子外流。

senses.definition: n.[数]分数,一小部分，些微,不相连的一块，片段,[化]分馏
senses.sentence: If a stranger stops you, just wind the window down a **fraction**.
senses.translation: 如果有陌生人拦你的车，把车窗摇下一点点就行。

senses.definition: n.破裂，断裂,骨折
senses.sentence: A doctor can reduce a **fracture** or dislocation.
senses.translation: 医生能使骨折或脱臼复位.

senses.definition: adj.易碎的，脆的,虚弱的
senses.sentence: He remains the anchor of the country's **fragile** political balance.
senses.translation: 他仍然是维系该国脆弱的政治平衡的支柱。

senses.definition: n.碎片,片段，未完成的部分,（将文件内容）分段
senses.sentence: She read everything, digesting every **fragment** of news.
senses.translation: 她什么都看，对新闻的每个片段都细细品味。

senses.definition: adj.芳香的，香的,愉快的,喷香,芳菲
senses.sentence: It leaves your hair smelling deliciously fresh and **fragrant**.
senses.translation: 它会让头发闻起来清新、芳香，令人愉悦。

senses.definition: n.框架,眼镜框,组织,边框
senses.sentence: We painted our table to match the window **frame** in the bedroom.
senses.translation: 我们把桌子刷成与卧室窗框一致的颜色。

senses.definition: n.构架,框架,（体系的）结构,机构，组织
senses.sentence: The magazine's aim is to discuss topical issues within a Christian **framework**.
senses.translation: 该杂志的宗旨是在基督教框架下讨论时下的热门话题。

senses.definition: n.弗兰克,免费邮寄权,免费邮戳或签名,免费邮寄的信件
senses.sentence: **Frank** Deford is a contributing editor for Vanity Fair magazine.
senses.translation: 弗兰克·德福特是杂志《名利场》的特约编辑。

senses.definition: n.欺诈,骗子,伪劣品,冒牌货
senses.sentence: **Fraud** squad officers had bugged the phone and were ready to pounce.
senses.translation: 反诈骗小组的警员们已在电话上安装了窃听器，并随时准备突击。

senses.definition: n.自由，自主,直率,特权，特许,自由权
senses.sentence: The music brought him a feeling of plenitude and **freedom**.
senses.translation: 这音乐带给他一种完满和自由的感觉。

senses.definition: n.冻结,严寒时期
senses.sentence: A wage **freeze** was imposed on all staff earlier this month.
senses.translation: 这个月早些时候，所有员工的工资都被冻结了。

senses.definition: vt.运输,装货于
senses.sentence: Environmental pressures are strengthening the case for waterborne **freight**.
senses.translation: 环境的压力使人们更加认可水上运输。

senses.definition: n.频繁性,[数][物]频率，次数,频率分布
senses.sentence: Their instruments detected very faint radiowaves at a **frequency** of 3 kilohertz.
senses.translation: 他们的仪器检测到一个3千赫的微弱无线电波。

senses.definition: adj.频繁的，时常发生的，常见的,（脉搏等）急促的，快的
senses.contextMeaning: 频繁的，时常发生的，常见的
senses.sentence: Bordeaux is on the main Paris-Madrid line so there are **frequent** trains.
senses.translation: 波尔多位于巴黎到马德里的铁路主干线上，来往列车频繁。

senses.definition: adv.频繁地，屡次地,往往,动,动辄
senses.sentence: The reality of mothering is **frequently** very different from the romantic ideal.
senses.translation: 养育孩子的现实经常与浪漫的理想大相径庭。

senses.definition: adj.新鲜的,淡水的,新的,无经验的
senses.sentence: **Fresh** fruits and vegetables are important and so is bran.
senses.translation: 新鲜的水果和蔬菜很重要，麦麸也是。

senses.definition: n.摩擦,冲突，不和,摩擦力
senses.sentence: The **friction** of the sheets against his skin was torture.
senses.translation: 被单摩擦着他的皮肤，简直像是酷刑。

senses.definition: n.星期五，周五，礼拜五,《鲁滨逊漂流记》中鲁滨逊的仆人,[人名] [英格兰人姓氏] 弗赖迪可能是德意志或犹太人人名的英译
senses.sentence: He fled on **Friday**, saying he feared for his life.
senses.translation: 他星期五逃走了，说是担心自己有生命危险。

senses.definition: n.电冰箱,冷冻机
senses.sentence: The **fridge** door was open and food was scattered across the floor.
senses.translation: 冰箱门开着，食物散落在地板上。

senses.definition: n.朋友，友人,资助者,助手,近亲
senses.sentence: I might buy one for a **friend**'s birthday as a giggle.
senses.translation: 我可能会买一件送给朋友当生日礼物，逗他开心。

senses.definition: adj.友好的，亲密的,有帮助的,互助的
senses.sentence: The spokesman said the tone of the letter was very **friendly**.
senses.translation: 发言人说信函的语气非常友好。

senses.definition: n.友情，友谊,友善的关系,友善，好意
senses.sentence: Estonia has done much to cultivate the **friendship** of western European countries.
senses.translation: 爱沙尼亚努力发展与西欧国家的友谊。

senses.definition: n.恐怖,惊吓,可怕的东西，难看的人
senses.sentence: One boy, aged about 11, looks frozen with **fright**.
senses.translation: 一个大约11岁的男孩吓得一动不动。

senses.definition: vt.使惊恐，使恐慌,吓走，赶走
senses.sentence: It doesn't **frighten** them. They're used to it.
senses.translation: 这可吓不倒他们。他们已经习惯了。

senses.definition: n.穗,边缘,刘海,次要
senses.sentence: I also let my hair go darker and grew out my **fringe**.
senses.translation: 我还把头发颜色染深，并让刘海儿长长消失。

senses.definition: n.青蛙,〈侮辱〉青蛙佬，对法国人的蔑称,[交]铁路辙叉,饰扣，挂环
senses.sentence: They arrested the men and **frog**-marched them to the local police station.
senses.translation: 他们逮捕了这些人，并把他们押送到当地警察局。

senses.definition: prep.（表示时间）从…,（表示原因）因为,（表示来源）来自…,（表示分离）与…分离[隔开]
senses.sentence: He knew what he wanted to do **from** the age of 14.
senses.translation: 他14岁起就知道自己日后干什么了。

senses.definition: n.前面,正面,身体前部,前线
senses.sentence: Teachers staged a sit-down protest in **front** of the president's office.
senses.translation: 老师们在校长办公室门前举行了一场静坐抗议。

senses.definition: n.边疆，边境,边界，边缘,尚待开发的领域
senses.sentence: A "**frontier**-free" Europe implies a greatly increased market for all economic operators.
senses.translation: “无国界的”欧洲对所有经营者来说都意味着一个大大扩展了的市场。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.使结冰霜,冻坏,（在蛋糕上）撒糖霜
senses.sentence: We had 11 degrees of **frost** last night.
senses.translation: 昨天夜里气温降到了零下11度。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.皱眉,不同意,蹙额
senses.sentence: There was a deep **frown** on the boy's face.
senses.translation: 男孩眉头紧锁.

senses.definition: n.成果,水果,果实,（大地的）产物
senses.sentence: I tend to stick to fresh **fruit** for pudding.
senses.translation: 我一直坚持用新鲜水果做甜点。

senses.definition: adj.果实累累的,肥沃的,效果好的
senses.sentence: We had a long, happy, **fruitful** relationship.
senses.translation: 我们有过一段长久、愉快、双方都获益良多的关系。

senses.definition: vt.挫败,阻挠,使受挫折
senses.sentence: We will **frustrate** you, my friends, deep as you think yourselves.
senses.translation: 我的朋友呀, 尽管你们自以为高深莫测, 我们会挫败你们的.

senses.definition: vt.油炸,油煎,（美俚）使被处电刑,瓦解
senses.sentence: **Fry** remaining peppers, adding a little more dressing if necessary.
senses.translation: 用油炸一下剩下的辣椒，如果需要再加点调味汁。

senses.definition: n.燃料,（为身体提供能量的）食物,（维持、增加感情的）刺激物,竞选提神（或兴奋）剂（一种健怡可乐，饮用后能使人精力充沛地从事竞选活动）
senses.sentence: Investigators say that a **fuel** explosion may have caused the crash.
senses.translation: 调查员说燃料爆炸有可能是失事的根源。

senses.definition: vt.履行（条约，义务），遵守，执行（命令等）,完成（计划等），做完（工作）,达到（目的），应验（预言等），满足（希望）,使臻于完善，充分发挥潜在的能力
senses.contextMeaning: 履行（条约，义务），遵守，执行（命令等）
senses.sentence: The Editor can give no guarantee that they will **fulfil** their obligations.
senses.translation: 《编辑家》无法保证他们会履行职责.

senses.definition: vt.履行（诺言等）,执行（命令等）,达到（目的）,使结束
senses.sentence: My father was very keen that I should **fulfill** my potential.
senses.translation: 我父亲热切地希望我能够发挥出自身的潜力。

senses.definition: adj.满的，装满的,完全的，完整的,丰富的,详尽的
senses.sentence: His exercise books were **full** of well deserved red ticks.
senses.translation: 他的练习本上尽是些红钩钩，都是他应得的。

senses.definition: n.烟气，烟雾,愤怒，烦恼
senses.sentence: Place the apparatus in a **fume** cupboard and cool the solution in ice.
senses.translation: 将仪器放在通风的橱中,用冰冷却溶液.

senses.definition: n.乐趣,娱乐活动,嬉戏，嬉闹,有趣的事
senses.sentence: The following recipe is a statement of another kind—food is **fun**!
senses.translation: 下面的食谱是另一种观点的表现——食物可以带来乐趣！

senses.definition: n.功能，作用,应变量，函数,职务,重大聚会
senses.sentence: A complex engine has many separate components, each performing a different **function**.
senses.translation: 一个复杂发动机有很多独立零部件，每个零部件具有不同作用。

senses.definition: n.基金,储备,现款,特别基金管理机构
senses.sentence: He's accused of misusing $17.5 million from a secret government slush **fund**.
senses.translation: 他被指控滥用秘密的政府行贿基金，金额达1,750万美元。

senses.definition: adj.基础的，基本的，根本的，重要的，原始的，主要的，十分重大的,[物]基频的，基谐波的,[乐]基音的
senses.contextMeaning: 基础的，基本的，根本的，重要的，原始的，主要的，十分重大的
senses.sentence: NATO countries have been forced to confront **fundamental** moral questions.
senses.translation: 北约国家被迫正视基本的道德问题。

senses.definition: n.葬礼，丧礼,〈比喻〉不愉快的事，操心的事，有关系的事
senses.sentence: None of my business, I guess. It's your **funeral**.
senses.translation: 我想是不关我什么事儿，你就自寻死路吧。

senses.definition: adj.有趣的，好笑的，滑稽的,（口）稀奇的，古怪的，奇异的,有病的，不舒服的,狡猾的，欺骗（性）的，可疑的，不光明的
senses.sentence: There's a reason why women don't read this stuff; it's not **funny**.
senses.translation: 女人不读这种东西是有原因的，它并不好笑。

senses.definition: n.毛皮,软毛,毛皮衣服,人造毛
senses.sentence: Fifty-five foxes were released from a **fur** farm by animal rights activists.
senses.translation: 动物权利保护主义者把55只狐狸从毛皮动物饲养场放了出来。

senses.definition: adj.狂怒的，暴怒的,激烈的,热烈兴奋的,喧闹的
senses.sentence: I am absolutely **furious** that he divorced me to marry her.
senses.translation: 他为了娶她而和我离婚，我愤怒至极。

senses.definition: n.熔炉，火炉,极热的地方,严峻的考验或磨难
senses.sentence: The flame in the **furnace** can be looked at through coloured glasses.
senses.translation: 可以通过有色眼镜观看高炉内的火焰.

senses.definition: vt.陈设，布置,提供，供应,装修（房屋）
senses.sentence: We propose to **furnish** our own house according to our own taste.
senses.translation: 我们建议按自己的爱好布置自己的房子.

senses.definition: n.家具,设备,附属品
senses.sentence: Buying budget-priced **furniture** needn't mean compromising on quality or style.
senses.translation: 买价钱经济的家具并不意味着就要牺牲质量和样式。

senses.definition: adj.更远的，较远的,更进一步的，深一层的,更多的
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **further** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【further】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: adv.此外,而且,与此同时,再者
senses.sentence: **Furthermore**, as Gervaise was quick to point out, Mr Scully was not a detective.
senses.translation: 而且，正如热尔韦斯毫不犹豫地指出来的那样，斯库利先生并不是一名侦探。

senses.definition: vi.熔化,融合
senses.sentence: The flakes seem to **fuse** together and produce ice crystals.
senses.translation: 雪花好像融合在一起形成了冰晶。

senses.definition: n.保险丝,导火线,雷管,引信
senses.sentence: The **fuse** blew as he pressed the button to start the motor.
senses.translation: 他按下按钮启动马达的时候保险丝烧断了。

senses.definition: n.忙乱,大惊小怪,大惊小怪的人,争吵
senses.sentence: He accused me of making a great **fuss** about trivialities.
senses.translation: 他指责我为丁点琐事大惊小怪。

senses.definition: adj.将来的，未来的,[语法学]将来时的
senses.sentence: I have not faltered in my quest for a new **future**.
senses.translation: 我对新的未来的追求从未动摇过。

senses.definition: n.未来学
senses.sentence: The way a good investor does really well is by engaging in successful **futurology**.
senses.translation: 优秀的投资者之所以能够成功是因为他们可以很好地预测未来。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.获得,赢得,增加,（钟、表）走快
senses.sentence: I was able to **gain** invaluable experience over that year.
senses.translation: 在那一年里我有幸获得了非常宝贵的经验。

senses.definition: n.星系,银河系,一群显赫的（出色的）人物
senses.sentence: From this you can calculate the total mass in the **Galaxy**.
senses.translation: 由此你可以算出银河系的总质量。

senses.definition: n.画廊，走廊,（教堂，议院等的）边座,旁听席,大批观众
senses.sentence: Laura landed a plum job with a smart art **gallery**.
senses.translation: 劳拉在一家时尚画廊找到了份美差。

senses.definition: n.加仑（容量单位）
senses.sentence: The price of petrol is coming down by four pence a **gallon**.
senses.translation: 汽油的价格每加仑降了4便士。

senses.definition: n.（马等）疾驰，飞奔,（比喻）飞快
senses.sentence: I read the book at a **gallop**.
senses.translation: 我飞快地读完了这本书。

senses.definition: vi.赌博,投机，冒风险,孤注一掷,打赌
senses.sentence: Most people visit Las Vegas to **gamble** their hard-earned money.
senses.translation: 大多数人拿着辛苦挣来的钱去拉斯维加斯赌博。

senses.definition: n.游戏，运动,比赛，竞赛,诡计,猎物
senses.sentence: Argentina came to a virtual standstill while the **game** was being played.
senses.translation: 在比赛进行的时候，阿根廷全国几乎陷入了停顿状态。

senses.definition: n.帮派，团体,盗贼等的)一帮,（工具，机械等的）一套,〈美俚〉棒球队
senses.sentence: There are problems of urban decay and **gang** violence.
senses.translation: 存在城市衰败和帮派暴力的问题。

senses.definition: n.监狱，拘留所
senses.sentence: You'll go to **gaol** if you touch the money.
senses.translation: 如果你碰这钱,你就会去坐牢.

senses.definition: n.缺口,分歧,间隔,美国休闲服饰品牌
senses.sentence: There is a credibility **gap** developing between employers and employees.
senses.translation: 雇主和雇员之间出现了信任危机。

senses.definition: n.车库,汽车修理站,飞机库
senses.sentence: Ben drove past them, nosing his car into the **garage**.
senses.translation: 本小心翼翼地把车开进车库时从他们身边经过。

senses.definition: n.垃圾,脏东西,丢弃的食物,无用的数据
senses.sentence: A bomb planted in a **garbage** can exploded early today.
senses.translation: 今天早些时候，安放在垃圾箱里的一枚炸弹爆炸了。

senses.definition: n.花园，菜园,公园,供应点心的露天设施,大型公共礼堂
senses.sentence: I wanted the front **garden** to be a blaze of colour.
senses.translation: 我想让门前的花园变得五彩缤纷。

senses.definition: n.大蒜,蒜头
senses.sentence: Boil the chick peas, add **garlic** and lemon juice.
senses.translation: 把鹰嘴豆放在开水中煮，并加入大蒜和柠檬汁。

senses.definition: n.衣服,服装
senses.sentence: She stood up and began to disrobe, folding each **garment** neatly.
senses.translation: 她站起来开始脱衣服，并把每件衣服叠整齐。

senses.definition: vi.喘气，喘息,倒抽气,渴望
senses.sentence: He snatched a last **gasp** winner.
senses.translation: 他在最后关头一举夺冠。

senses.definition: n.门,闸门,登机门,入场费
senses.sentence: We gave the **gate** money to the St John Ambulance brigade.
senses.translation: 我们将门票收入都捐给了圣约翰急救队。

senses.definition: vt.收集,聚集，搜集,收紧，收缩,采集
senses.sentence: I **gather** his report is highly critical of the trial judge.
senses.translation: 据我所知，他在报道中毫不留情地批评了初审法官。

senses.definition: n.测量的标准或范围,尺度，标准,测量仪器,评估
senses.sentence: The index is the government's chief **gauge** of future economic activity.
senses.translation: 这一指数是政府判断未来经济活动的主要依据。

senses.definition: adj.快乐的，愉快的,同性恋的,艳丽的，华丽的,放荡的，无法无天的
senses.sentence: His sexual orientation was a lot more **gay** than straight.
senses.translation: 从他的性取向来看，他不像异性恋，更像个同性恋。

senses.definition: vi.凝视，注视
senses.sentence: I felt so self-conscious under Luke's mother's intense **gaze**.
senses.translation: 在卢克母亲审视的目光下，我感到极不自在。

senses.definition: n.齿轮,排挡,传动装置,衣服
senses.sentence: She selected a low **gear** and started down the track carefully.
senses.translation: 她选了低速挡小心翼翼地沿小径下行。

senses.definition: n.<语>性某些语言的（阳性、阴性和中性，不同的性有不同的词尾等）,性别,某些语言的（名词、代词和形容词）性的区分
senses.sentence: Dara challenges our stereotypical ideas about **gender** and femininity.
senses.translation: 达拉对我们老一套的性别和女性特质观念提出了异议。

senses.definition: n.<生>基因,遗传因子
senses.sentence: He found evidence of mutated forms of the **gene**.
senses.translation: 他找到了该基因出现了变异形式的证据。

senses.definition: adj.大致的,综合的,总的，全体的,普遍的
senses.sentence: She had a confused idea of life in **general**.
senses.translation: 总的来说，她对生活非常困惑。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.概括，归纳，推论
senses.sentence: Confidence regions **generalise** the confidence interval concept to deal with multiple quantities.
senses.translation: 置信区域产生了置信区间这个概念以处理各种不同的数量.

senses.definition: vt.& vi.概括，归纳,推广，普及,使一般化,形成概念
senses.sentence: When we use " he " , we **generalize** for both sex.
senses.translation: 当我们用 he 时, 我们泛指男女.

senses.definition: vt.形成，造成,产生物理反应,产生（后代）,引起
senses.sentence: The company, New England Electric, burns coal to **generate** power.
senses.translation: 新英格兰电力公司用煤发电。

senses.definition: n.一代人,代（约30年），时代,生殖,产生
senses.sentence: A new **generation** of scientists became fascinated by dinosaurs.
senses.translation: 新一代科学家对恐龙研究着了迷。

senses.definition: n.发电机，发生器,电力公司,生产者，创始者,[乐]基础低音
senses.sentence: An automatic voltage regulator ensured a constant output from the **generator**.
senses.translation: 一个自动电压调节器保证了发电机电流输出的稳定。

senses.definition: adj.慷慨的，大方的,丰盛的,肥沃的,浓厚的
senses.sentence: Not everyone thinks that the government is being particularly **generous**.
senses.translation: 并非所有人都认为政府特别慷慨。

senses.definition: adj.遗传的,基因的,起源的，起因的,演变的
senses.sentence: The offspring contain a mixture of the **genetic** blueprint of each parent.
senses.translation: 子女身上遗传了父母双方的基因型板。

senses.definition: n.天才,天赋,天才人物,（特别的）才能
senses.sentence: I was hoping some of his **genius** might rub off.
senses.translation: 我希望他的才华也可以影响他人。

senses.definition: n.类型，种类,体裁，样式,风俗画
senses.sentence: She emerges as a full, three-dimensional character in a way that few horror **genre** heroines ever do.
senses.translation: 她作为一个丰满而又鲜活的人物形象展现在读者面前，之前的恐怖体裁作品中，很少有女主人公给人这种感觉。

senses.definition: adj.温和的,文雅的,高尚的
senses.sentence: The blustery winds of spring had dropped to a **gentle** breeze.
senses.translation: 呼啸的春风已经减弱，成了习习的微风。

senses.definition: n.先生,绅士,有身份地位的人
senses.sentence: A **gentleman** should always be civil, even to his inferiors.
senses.translation: 绅士应该总是彬彬有礼,即便是对地位不及自己者.

senses.definition: adj.真正的,坦率的，真诚的,血统纯粹的，纯种的,[医学]真性的
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **genuine** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【genuine】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.地理（学）,地形，地势,布局
senses.sentence: The American continent's **geography** severely limited the lines of attack.
senses.translation: 美洲大陆的地形严重限制了进攻路线。

senses.definition: n.地质学,（某地区的）地质情况,地质学的著作
senses.sentence: We went on a **geology** field trip.
senses.translation: 我们去进行地质野外考察。

senses.definition: n.几何学,几何形状,几何图形,几何学著作
senses.sentence: His idea was to apply **geometry** to dynamics.
senses.translation: 他的想法就是将几何学应用在力学上。

senses.definition: n.[生]幼芽，胚芽,微生物,起源，萌芽
senses.sentence: The **germ** of an idea took root in Rosemary's mind.
senses.translation: 罗斯玛丽心里萌生了一个念头。

senses.definition: n.手势，姿势,举止，动作,〔古语〕仪态,[计算机]光笔指令
senses.sentence: He put his hand under her chin in an almost paternal **gesture**.
senses.translation: 他以近乎父亲的姿态用手托着她的下巴。

senses.definition: vt.得到,抓住,说服,受到（惩罚等）
senses.sentence: If you wait, all that happens is that you **get** older.
senses.translation: 如果你等待，发生的只有变老。

senses.definition: n.巨人，大汉,巨兽，巨物,卓越人物
senses.sentence: Fewer than a thousand **giant** pandas still live in the wild.
senses.translation: 只有不到1,000只大熊猫仍然在野外生活。

senses.definition: n.赠品，礼物,天赋,赠送,天资
senses.sentence: They are naturally good salesmen with the **gift** of the gab.
senses.translation: 他们天生就是能说会道的推销能手。

senses.definition: adj.巨大的，庞大的,巨人似的,硕大无比,排山倒海
senses.sentence: The **gigantic** natural harbour of Poole is a haven for boats.
senses.translation: 巨型天然港普尔港是船只的避风港。

senses.definition: n.咯咯的笑,傻笑,<英·非正>玩笑,the giggles 止不住的格格笑
senses.sentence: I desperately fought the urge to **giggle**.
senses.translation: 我拼命地想忍住笑。

senses.definition: n.女孩,姑娘，未婚女子,女职员，女演员,（男人的）女朋友
senses.sentence: She was a shy, delicately pretty **girl** with enormous blue eyes.
senses.translation: 她是一个害羞、娇美的女孩，长着一双大大的蓝眼睛。

senses.definition: adj.女孩子（似）的，少女的
senses.sentence: You'll lose your **girlish** figure if you don't watch out.
senses.translation: 如果不多加注意，你就会失去女孩般的苗条身段。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.给予,赠送,作出
senses.sentence: **Give** the cardboard two or three coats of varnish to harden it.
senses.translation: 在纸板上涂两三层清漆使其变硬。

senses.definition: adj.指定的，确定的,假设的，假定的,有…倾向的,赠送的
senses.sentence: Mr Mandela was **given** a tumultuous reception in Washington.
senses.translation: 曼德拉先生在华盛顿受到热情的款待。

senses.definition: n.冰河，冰川
senses.sentence: The best bit was walking along the **glacier**.
senses.translation: 最好的部分就是沿着冰川走。

senses.definition: adj.高兴的，乐意的,令人高兴的，使人愉快的,（风光）明媚的，（景色）美丽的,充满欢乐的，兴高采烈的
senses.sentence: I can't tell you how **glad** I was to leave that place.
senses.translation: 我无法形容自己离开那个地方心里有多高兴。

senses.definition: n.魔法，迷人的美
senses.sentence: Since she start college, all of a sudden she's miss **glamor**.
senses.translation: 她上了大学后, 一下子变得很时髦.

senses.definition: n.魅力,诱惑力,魔力,迷人的美
senses.sentence: She is a perfect incarnation of **glamour**.
senses.translation: 她是魅力的完美化身。

senses.definition: vi.一瞥,闪微光,掠过，擦过,随便提到，简略地触及
senses.sentence: He stole a **glance** at the clock behind her.
senses.translation: 他偷偷地看了一眼她背后的钟。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.怒目而视
senses.sentence: She attacked police in the full **glare** of TV cameras.
senses.translation: 她在电视摄像机的镜头聚焦下公然袭击了警察。

senses.definition: n.玻璃,玻璃制品,镜子
senses.sentence: The theatre is a futuristic steel and **glass** structure.
senses.translation: 这家剧院是钢筋和玻璃结构的未来派建筑。

senses.definition: n.滑行，滑翔,[乐]滑音，延音,流逝，消逝,静悄悄的流水
senses.sentence: So graceful was the ballerina that she just seemed to **glide**.
senses.translation: 那芭蕾舞女演员翩跹起舞,宛如滑翔.

senses.definition: vi.瞥见
senses.sentence: Below us you could **glimpse** the rooftops of a few small villages.
senses.translation: 我们可以瞥见脚下一些小村庄的屋顶。

senses.definition: vi.闪烁，闪耀,华丽夺目，炫耀
senses.sentence: The child was attracted by the **glitter** of the Christmas tree decorations.
senses.translation: 这孩子被圣诞树上闪耀的装饰物吸引住了.

senses.definition: adj.全球的，全球性的，有关全球大局的,全面的，整体的，全局的,球形的，球状的，球面的，球体的,[计]全程的
senses.contextMeaning: 全球的，全球性的，有关全球大局的
senses.sentence: **Global** ecological efforts can easily be at odds with local ecologies.
senses.translation: 全球性生态保护工作很可能会和地方生态系统存在矛盾。

senses.definition: n.球，球状物,地球，世界,天体,地球仪
senses.sentence: America's media companies bestride the **globe**.
senses.translation: 美国的传媒公司称雄寰球。

senses.definition: adj.黑暗的,令人沮丧的,前景黯淡的,悲观的，阴郁的
senses.sentence: Some good might come of all this **gloomy** business.
senses.translation: 生意不景气也未必全是坏事。

senses.definition: adj.辉煌的,荣誉的,极好的,<口>非常愉快的
senses.sentence: We opened the windows and let in the **glorious** evening air.
senses.translation: 我们打开窗户，让傍晚那沁人心脾的空气流进室内。

senses.definition: n.光荣，荣誉,壮观，壮丽,（对上帝的）赞颂,非常美的事物
senses.sentence: The crowd sang "Land of Hope and **Glory**" and other patriotic songs.
senses.translation: 人群高唱《希望和光荣之地》等爱国歌曲。

senses.definition: n.手套,棒球手套,拳击手套
senses.sentence: It was time to consign his bat and **glove** to the cupboard.
senses.translation: 该把他的球棒和手套搁进柜子里了。

senses.definition: vi.发光，灼热,脸红,洋溢，喜形于色
senses.sentence: Exercise will give you a **glow** of satisfaction at having achieved something.
senses.translation: 运动将让你体会到一种有所成就的无比喜悦感。

senses.definition: n.胶水,胶粘物,粘聚力
senses.sentence: The smell of sawdust and **glue** pervaded the factory.
senses.translation: 工厂里弥漫着锯屑和胶水的气味。

senses.definition: vi.走,离开,去做,进行
senses.sentence: We'll **go** to a meeting in Birmingham and come straight back.
senses.translation: 我们将去伯明翰参加会议，然后马上回来。

senses.definition: n.目标，目的,球门,终点,得分
senses.sentence: They were still arguing the toss about the first **goal**.
senses.translation: 他们仍在为第一个进球争论不休。

senses.definition: n.山羊,色鬼,替罪羊
senses.sentence: Sheep's milk is produced in much the same way as **goat**'s milk.
senses.translation: 绵羊奶和山羊奶的生产过程差不多。

senses.definition: n.上帝，造物主,被极度崇敬的人[物],男神,戏院顶层楼座观众
senses.sentence: The President described the disaster as an act of **God**.
senses.translation: 总统将这场灾难说成是天灾。

senses.definition: n.金，黄金,金色,金币,金饰品
senses.sentence: This little ball of **gold** weighs a quarter of an ounce.
senses.translation: 这个小金球重0.25盎司。

senses.definition: adj.金（黄）色的,金质的,美好的
senses.sentence: Imagine long **golden** beaches where you can wander in solitude.
senses.translation: 想象一下那长长的金色海滩吧，在那里你可以独自徜徉。

senses.definition: n.高尔夫球,高尔夫球运动
senses.sentence: At least three British **golf** courses are now owned by the Japanese.
senses.translation: 现在英国至少有3家高尔夫球场为日本人所有。

senses.definition: vi.打高尔夫球
senses.sentence: Walking and **golf** increased in popularity during the 1980s.
senses.translation: 在20世纪80年代越来越多的人喜欢上了远足或是打高尔夫球。

senses.definition: adj.好的,优秀的,有益的,漂亮的，健全的
senses.sentence: Remember, keep a positive attitude and **good** things will happen.
senses.translation: 记住：保持乐观的心态，好事自然会发生。

senses.definition: int.<美>再见
senses.sentence: Well, **goodby**, everyone. Lets get together again soon.
senses.translation: 嗯, 各位再见, 我们很快再见个面吧!

senses.definition: n.再见
senses.sentence: Amy lifted her arm to wave. "**Goodbye**," she called.
senses.translation: 埃米举起胳膊挥挥手。“再见，”她喊道。

senses.definition: n.良好,善良,精华,上帝
senses.sentence: She had an unshakeable faith in human **goodness** and natural honesty.
senses.translation: 她坚信人的本性是善良诚实的。

senses.definition: n.商品，货物,动产,本领,合意的人
senses.sentence: Purchase tax was not payable on **goods** for export.
senses.translation: 出口商品不需要交购买税。

senses.definition: n.鹅,鹅肉,雌鹅,傻瓜
senses.sentence: An increase in crime could kill the golden **goose** of tourism.
senses.translation: 犯罪率的上升可能会扼杀旅游业这只产金蛋的鹅。

senses.definition: adj.华丽的，艳丽的,极好的，称心的,美丽动人的，光彩夺目的,令人愉快的，令人享受的
senses.sentence: The cosmetics industry uses **gorgeous** women to sell its skincare products.
senses.translation: 化妆品行业常找一些性感美女来推销护肤产品。

senses.definition: n.流言蜚语，谣言,爱讲闲话的人,谈话，闲话,关系亲密的伙伴
senses.sentence: The jet-setting couple made frequent appearances in the **gossip** columns.
senses.translation: 这对穿梭于各国的富豪夫妇经常出现在八卦专栏。

senses.definition: vt.统治,管理,治理,支配（词或短语的形式或用法）
senses.sentence: The **govern**-ment will continue to try to regenerate inner city areas.
senses.translation: 政府将继续努力重建内城地区。

senses.definition: n.政府,政体,治理的形式,管辖，治理
senses.sentence: He admitted that the **government** was in "a dreadful hole".
senses.translation: 他承认政府目前“处境极为尴尬”。

senses.definition: n.长袍，长外衣,女长服,罩袍,大学的学生和教师
senses.sentence: Wood was now comfortably enfolded in a woolly dressing-**gown**.
senses.translation: 伍德正舒服地穿着件羊毛晨衣。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.抢先，抢占
senses.sentence: He made a **grab** for her but she sidestepped him.
senses.translation: 他想要抓住她，但她侧步闪开了。

senses.definition: n.恩泽,优雅,慈悲,魅力
senses.sentence: **Grace** allowed her mind to wander to other things.
senses.translation: 格雷丝任由自己的思绪游走。

senses.definition: adj.亲切的，和蔼的,（对王族及其行为的敬语）仁慈的，谦和的,雅致的,有礼貌的
senses.sentence: All this **gracious** living isn't for me; I prefer the simple life.
senses.translation: 这优裕的生活不适合我, 我宁愿过简朴的生活.

senses.definition: vt.安排,依序排列，依等级排列,评估,评分
senses.sentence: South Point College does not **grade** the students' work.
senses.translation: 南点学院不对学生的作业评分。

senses.definition: adj.渐进的，渐（升）降的,倾斜度小的,逐次的，逐渐的,平缓的
senses.sentence: The greatest hope for reform is the **gradual** spread of information.
senses.translation: 对改革的最大希望是信息能得以逐渐传播。

senses.definition: vi.渐变,渐渐变为（与into连用）,渐渐消逝（与away连用）,取得资格（与as连用）
senses.sentence: My first job was as a **graduate** trainee with a bank.
senses.translation: 我的第一份工作是在一家银行做大学毕业实习生。

senses.definition: n.谷物，粮食,（沙，金，盐等的）颗粒,谷粒，籽粒,（木材，大理石等的）纹理
senses.sentence: There's more than a **grain** of truth in that.
senses.translation: 其中含有很深刻的道理。

senses.definition: n.语法,语法书,（学术的）基本原理,（人的）语言知识及运用能力
senses.sentence: He was known for his poor **grammar** and punctuation.
senses.translation: 他不通语法和乱用标点是出了名的。

senses.definition: adj.宏大的，宏伟的,（最）重要的,豪华的
senses.sentence: The intelligence service conceived a **grand** design to assassinate the War Minister.
senses.translation: 情报机构策划了一项暗杀陆军部长的重大计划。

senses.definition: n.（外）祖母,老奶奶,女祖先
senses.sentence: Her **grandmother** had the gift of making people happy.
senses.translation: 她奶奶有逗人开心的本事。

senses.definition: n.拨款,补助金,授给物（如财产、授地、专有权、补助、拨款等）
senses.sentence: She won a **grant** to develop her own business.
senses.translation: 她赢得了一笔拨款，用以扩展自己的企业。

senses.definition: n.葡萄,深紫色，葡萄紫
senses.sentence: He put a **grape** into his mouth and swallowed it whole.
senses.translation: 他把一粒葡萄放入嘴里,整个吞了下去.

senses.definition: n.图表，曲线图,词的拼法
senses.sentence: We plot about eight points on the **graph**.
senses.translation: 我们在图表上绘制出大约8个点的曲线。

senses.definition: adj.图解的，用图表示的,用文字表示的,形象的，生动的
senses.sentence: She asked her son, a **graphic** designer, to create letterheads and stationery.
senses.translation: 她请做平面设计师的儿子设计了信头和信笺。

senses.definition: vt.抓住,了解,急忙抓住,急切（或贪婪）地抓住
senses.sentence: His hand was taken in a warm, firm **grasp**.
senses.translation: 他的手被热情地紧紧握住了。

senses.definition: n.草，青草,草地，草坪,告密者,〈俚〉龙须菜
senses.sentence: Mr Zuma had a solid reputation as a **grass** roots organiser.
senses.translation: 作为一个民众的组织者，祖玛先生名声甚佳。

senses.definition: adj.感激的，感谢的,令人愉快的,宜人的,荷
senses.sentence: Instead of complaining about what's wrong, be **grateful** for what's right.
senses.translation: 别抱怨不好的事，要对美好的事心存感恩。

senses.definition: n.感激，感谢,感激的样子,谢意,恩义
senses.sentence: She smiled, politely rather than with tenderness or **gratitude**.
senses.translation: 她只是出于礼貌地笑了笑，而非出于关心或感激。

senses.definition: adj.重大的，重要的,严重的,[音乐]沉重的,（颜色等）朴素的
senses.sentence: He did die a pauper and is buried in an unmarked **grave**.
senses.translation: 他死的时候一文不名，葬在一处无名墓穴中。

senses.definition: n.重力,万有引力，地心引力,重要性，严重性,严肃，庄重
senses.sentence: Anything with strong **gravity** attracts other things to it.
senses.translation: 任何有较强重力的物体都会对其他物体产生引力。

senses.definition: n.灰色,灰马,灰色颜料,暗淡的光线
senses.sentence: I saw this nice-looking man in a **gray** suit.
senses.translation: 我见到过这个身着灰色套装的英俊男士。

senses.definition: n.放牧,擦伤
senses.sentence: There is good grassland here for your cattle and horses to **graze** on.
senses.translation: 这里有很好的草地供你们放牧牛马.

senses.definition: n.动物油脂,油膏，润滑油,〈俚〉贿赂
senses.sentence: The floor was covered in **grease** and filth.
senses.translation: 地板上满是油垢和污物。

senses.definition: adj.伟大的，杰出的,优异的，显著的,很多的,重大的
senses.sentence: She's got a **great** voice and is singing better than ever.
senses.translation: 她的嗓音非常好，现在的唱功比以往任何时候都要好。

senses.definition: n.温室，花房,[军]<俚>周围有玻璃的座舱，轰炸员舱
senses.sentence: Leonard pottered round the **greenhouse**, tying up canes for the tomatoes.
senses.translation: 伦纳德在温室里悠然自得地给西红柿绑上撑杆。

senses.definition: vt.欢迎，迎接,致敬，致意,打招呼,（景象，声音等）映入眼帘
senses.sentence: He looked at Livy and Mark, who had risen to **greet** him.
senses.translation: 他看着站起来跟他打招呼的莉薇和马克。

senses.definition: n.招呼，问候,敬礼,祝贺,欢迎辞
senses.sentence: He turned his sightless eyes their way and boomed out a **greeting**.
senses.translation: 他将失明的双眼转向他们，低声打了个招呼。

senses.definition: adj.灰色的,灰白的
senses.sentence: At one point last week shares in the **grey** market touched 230p.
senses.translation: 上周，灰市上的股票价格一度高达230便士。

senses.definition: n.悲伤,悲痛,悲伤的事
senses.sentence: There was no **grief** in his expression, only deep resignation.
senses.translation: 他的表情里没有悲痛，只有深深的无奈。

senses.definition: vi.伤心,悲伤
senses.sentence: I didn't have any time to **grieve**.
senses.translation: 我没有时间伤心。

senses.definition: vi.露齿而笑
senses.sentence: He had a **grin** on his face like a Cheshire Cat.
senses.translation: 他咧着嘴笑呵呵的。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.磨碎，嚼碎,折磨
senses.sentence: The daily **grind** of government is done by Her Majesty's Civil Service.
senses.translation: 枯燥的日常政务都由女王陛下的政府行政部门来处理。

senses.definition: n.紧握，抓牢,握力,掌握，理解,能力，胜任
senses.sentence: Luke answered by tightening his **grip** on her shoulder.
senses.translation: 卢克的回应就是把她的肩头抓得更紧了。

senses.definition: vi.呻吟,发牢骚,抱怨,吱嘎声：因压力而发出声响
senses.sentence: They glanced at the man on the floor, who began to **groan**.
senses.translation: 他们瞥了一眼躺在地上的男人，那人现在开始呻吟起来。

senses.definition: vi.触摸，试探着前进,探索，摸索
senses.sentence: He would try to **grope** her breasts and put his hand up her skirt.
senses.translation: 他会试图摸她的胸部，还把手从她的裙子上向上移。

senses.definition: adj.总的,粗俗的,显而易见的,恶劣的
senses.sentence: I only resist things like chocolate if I feel really **gross**.
senses.translation: 我只有在觉得自己胖得很难看的时候才能拒绝巧克力这类东西的诱惑。

senses.definition: n.组，团体,群，批,（雕塑等的）群像,（英美的）空军大队
senses.sentence: I thought I'd enrol you with an art **group** at the school.
senses.translation: 我想我会吸收你参加学校的一个艺术团。

senses.definition: vt.种植,扩大,扩展,增加
senses.sentence: Developed land was to **grow** from 5.3% to 6.9%.
senses.translation: 已开发土地的面积将从5.3%增加到6.9%。

senses.definition: n.生长,增长,一茬植株,肿块，肿瘤
senses.sentence: Last year, economic **growth** tailed off to below four percent.
senses.translation: 去年，经济增长率下降到4%以下。

senses.definition: n.保证，担保,保证人，保证书,抵押品
senses.sentence: The Editor can give no **guarantee** that they will fulfil their obligations.
senses.translation: 《编辑家》无法保证他们会履行职责.

senses.definition: n.警卫,狱吏，看守,护卫队,防护装置
senses.sentence: A military **guard** was injured in the aborted coup.
senses.translation: 一位哨兵在这次未遂政变中受伤。

senses.definition: vt.推测,猜测，臆测,猜中,假定，认为
senses.sentence: **Guess** what? I'm going to dinner at Mrs. Combley's tonight.
senses.translation: 你猜怎么着？今晚我要去康伯利夫人家里赴宴。

senses.definition: n.客人,旅客,特邀嘉宾,[动]寄生虫
senses.sentence: Murray was a **guest** on a live radio show.
senses.translation: 默里在一个直播的电台节目里当嘉宾。

senses.definition: n.指导，引导,导航,领导
senses.sentence: I went down on my knees and prayed for **guidance**.
senses.translation: 我跪了下来，祈求得到指引。

senses.definition: n.指导者,向导,导游,有指导意义的事物
senses.sentence: A **guide** gives a brief talk on the history of the site.
senses.translation: 导游简要地介绍了那个遗址的历史。

senses.definition: n.指导方针,指导原则
senses.sentence: A written IQ test is merely a **guideline**.
senses.translation: 书面智商测试仅供参考。

senses.definition: n.行会，协会,同业公会,[植]依赖植物集团
senses.sentence: I belong to a **guild** of wine butlers.
senses.translation: 我属于主管酒类的男仆同业公会.

senses.definition: adj.内疚的,有罪的
senses.sentence: Striker Alan Smith was **guilty** of two glaring misses.
senses.translation: 前锋艾伦·史密斯两次严重失误，将球射偏。

senses.definition: n.吉他,六弦琴
senses.sentence: Molly had cringed when Ann started picking up the **guitar**.
senses.translation: 安开始弹吉他时，莫莉感到有些难堪。

senses.definition: n.海湾,分歧,波斯湾,（地面的）裂口
senses.sentence: The **Gulf** has 65 per cent of the world's oil reserves.
senses.translation: 海湾地区拥有全世界65％的石油储藏。

senses.definition: n.枪,发令枪声,受雇杀人的枪手,喷射器
senses.sentence: The **gun** was fired and Beaton was wounded a second time.
senses.translation: 枪响了，比顿再次受伤。

senses.definition: n.家伙，伙计,（架设天线、支撑帐篷等用的）牵索,[复数]各位,一群男人（或女人）
senses.sentence: He claims he was made the fall **guy** for the affair.
senses.translation: 他声称自己是这起事件的替罪羊。

senses.definition: n.<非正>健身房,体育馆,室内健身操,体操
senses.sentence: The **gym** can be used by both able-bodied and disabled people.
senses.translation: 这家健身房健全和残障人士都可使用。

senses.definition: n.健身房，体育馆,大学预科，高级中学
senses.sentence: The game will be staged in the **gymnasium**.
senses.translation: 竞赛将在体育馆举行.

senses.definition: n.习惯，习性,气质,宗教服装
senses.sentence: Let's face it — drinking is a socially acceptable **habit**.
senses.translation: 我们面对现实吧——饮酒是一种为社会所接受的习俗。

senses.definition: n.（动物的）栖息地，住处,产地,经常发现某种事物的地方
senses.sentence: In its natural **habitat**, the hibiscus will grow up to 25ft.
senses.translation: 在原生境中，木槿能长到25英尺高。

senses.definition: n.冰雹,一阵
senses.sentence: The victim was hit by a **hail** of bullets.
senses.translation: 受害者被一阵弹雨击中。

senses.definition: n.头发，毛发,（动、植物的）毛,一丝丝，些微,毛发织物
senses.sentence: She walked forward and embraced him and stroked his tousled white **hair**.
senses.translation: 她走上前拥抱他并轻抚他凌乱的白发。

senses.definition: adj.一半的，半个的
senses.sentence: Elliott crossed the finish line just **half** a second behind his adversary.
senses.translation: 埃利奥特跨过终点线时仅比对手落后半秒钟。

senses.definition: n.过道，走廊,大厅，前厅,娱乐中心，会所
senses.sentence: The entrance **hall** is littered with toys and wellington boots.
senses.translation: 门厅里到处乱扔着玩具和雨靴。

senses.definition: n.停止，中止,暂停,小火车站
senses.sentence: Operating systems can be brought to a **halt** by a Trojan Horse.
senses.translation: 操作系统可能会因为木马病毒的攻击而中止。

senses.definition: n.汉堡包,碎牛肉,牛肉饼
senses.sentence: Avoid unhealthy foods such as **hamburger** and chips.
senses.translation: 不要吃不健康食品，如汉堡和薯条。

senses.definition: vt.妨碍，束缚，限制,使困累
senses.sentence: I hastily packed the **hamper** and lugged it to the car.
senses.translation: 我匆忙装好食品篮，吃力地把它拎上车子。

senses.definition: n.手,协助，帮助,（工具等的）把，柄,掌管
senses.sentence: All this, needless to say, had been culled second-**hand** from radio reports.
senses.translation: 不用说，所有这些都是从电台报道中采集来的二手材料。

senses.definition: n.手册,指南
senses.sentence: This material has been extracted from "Collins Good Wood **Handbook**".
senses.translation: 这些材料摘自《柯林斯优秀木材手册》。

senses.definition: n.少数，少量,一把（的量）,难以控制的人（或动物）,棘手事
senses.sentence: Only a **handful** had returned to work in the immediate vicinity.
senses.translation: 仅有几个人回到临近地区工作。

senses.definition: n.障碍,缺陷,不利条件,给弱者增加的杆数（按击球次数计数，并随参赛者的进步而减少）
senses.sentence: Some hearing-impaired children may work harder to overcome their **handicap**.
senses.translation: 一些有听障的儿童可能需要花更大的力气来克服这一缺陷。

senses.definition: n.手帕,方巾，围巾
senses.sentence: She balled the **handkerchief** up and threw it at his feet.
senses.translation: 她把手绢揉成一团，丢在了他的脚边。

senses.definition: n.（织物、毛皮等的）手感,手柄,举动,柄状物
senses.sentence: Don't take on more responsibilities than you can **handle**.
senses.translation: 不要承担过多的责任。

senses.definition: adj.方便的,手边的，附近的,便于使用的,手巧的
senses.sentence: Keep a pad **handy** to jot down queries as they occur.
senses.translation: 手边放一本便笺簿，以便有问题时随时记下。

senses.definition: vt.悬挂,（被）绞死,贴，装饰,使悬而未决
senses.sentence: The King has merely given the politicians enough rope to **hang** themselves.
senses.translation: 国王只不过是给了这些政客自缚的绳子。

senses.definition: vi.发生,碰巧,出现,偶然遇到
senses.sentence: Remember, keep a positive attitude and good things will **happen**.
senses.translation: 记住：保持乐观的心态，好事自然会发生。

senses.definition: adj.幸福的,快乐的,巧妙的,〈口〉有点醉意的
senses.sentence: She has now changed into a **happy**, self-confident woman.
senses.translation: 如今她已经变成一个快乐、自信的女人。

senses.definition: n.骚扰，扰乱,折磨人的东西,烦恼，忧虑,袭扰
senses.sentence: They have a policy of zero tolerance for sexual **harassment**.
senses.translation: 他们对性骚扰采取绝不容忍的政策。

senses.definition: n.海港,海湾,避难所,躲藏处
senses.sentence: The **harbor** lies to the south of the city.
senses.translation: 港口在城市的南边.

senses.definition: n.海港，港口,港湾,避难所,藏身处
senses.sentence: The gigantic natural **harbour** of Poole is a haven for boats.
senses.translation: 巨型天然港普尔港是船只的避风港。

senses.definition: adj.困难的,硬的,有力的,努力的
senses.sentence: The federal government hiked the tax on **hard** liquor.
senses.translation: 联邦政府提高了烈性酒的税率。

senses.definition: vt.使硬化,使经得起考验,使无情,使轮廓鲜明
senses.sentence: Give the cardboard two or three coats of varnish to **harden** it.
senses.translation: 在纸板上涂两三层清漆使其变硬。

senses.definition: adv.几乎不,简直不,刚刚,严厉地，粗鲁地
senses.sentence: The ward was busy and Amy **hardly** had time to talk.
senses.translation: 病房里非常忙碌，埃米几乎没有时间说话。

senses.definition: n.艰难,困苦,艰难情况,造成困苦与苦难的原因
senses.sentence: Many people are suffering economic **hardship**.
senses.translation: 很多人正处于经济困难之中。

senses.definition: n.五金器具,计算机硬件,武器装备
senses.sentence: **Hardware** stores have sold out of water pumps and tarpaulins.
senses.translation: 五金店内水泵和防水油布已经卖光了。

senses.definition: n.损害,伤害,危害
senses.sentence: All dogs are capable of doing **harm** to human beings.
senses.translation: 只要是狗就可能会咬人。

senses.definition: n.协调,融洽，一致,和谐,[音]和声
senses.sentence: As they smiled at each other, **harmony** was restored again.
senses.translation: 他们彼此微笑的时候，又恢复了往日的和睦。

senses.definition: n.马具，挽具,背带,系带
senses.sentence: He was almost strangled by his parachute **harness** straps.
senses.translation: 他差点被自己的降落伞吊带勒死。

senses.definition: adj.粗糙的,刺耳的,严厉的，严格的,残酷的
senses.sentence: His voice was **harsh** as he enunciated each word carefully.
senses.translation: 他一字一顿，听上去很生硬。

senses.definition: n.收割,收获季节,收成,结果
senses.sentence: Unfavourable weather has had damaging effects on this year's **harvest**.
senses.translation: 恶劣天气使今年的收成受到了损失。

senses.definition: n.匆忙，急忙,急速，紧迫,轻率
senses.sentence: The opposition says the legislation was drafted with indecent **haste**.
senses.translation: 反对人士认为该法律的起草太过草率。

senses.definition: adj.仓促完成的,急忙的,草率的,轻率的
senses.sentence: So let's not be **hasty**. After all, he can't run away.
senses.translation: 所以我们不要鲁莽行事。毕竟他是跑不掉的。

senses.definition: n.帽子,（帽子所表示的）职位，职务
senses.sentence: Stan Dean, easily identifiable by his oddly-shaped **hat**, sat in a doorway.
senses.translation: 斯坦·迪安坐在门口，他那顶奇形怪状的帽子一下子就让人认出他来。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.孵化,孵出，破壳而出
senses.sentence: The eggs quickly **hatch** into larvae.
senses.translation: 虫卵很快孵化成幼虫。

senses.definition: vt.仇恨，憎恨,厌恶,对…感到不喜欢或讨厌
senses.sentence: "A deal!" she said contemptuously, "I **hate** all deals."
senses.translation: “交易！”她鄙夷地说，“我厌恶一切交易。”

senses.definition: vt.& vi.拖，拉
senses.sentence: Revitalising the Romanian economy will be a long **haul**.
senses.translation: 罗马尼亚经济的复兴将是一项长期而艰巨的工作。

senses.definition: aux.用以构成完成式及完成式的不定式，表示已经…
senses.contextMeaning: 用以构成完成式及完成式的不定式，表示已经…
senses.sentence: They **have** maintained their optimism in the face of desolating subjugation.
senses.translation: 面对遭征服的悲惨命运，他们保持了乐观的态度。

senses.definition: n.霍克,鹰,鹰派人物，主战派,掠夺别人的人，骗子
senses.sentence: The **hawk** poised in mid-air ready to swoop.
senses.translation: 老鹰在半空中盘旋，准备俯冲。

senses.definition: vt.冒险,使遭受危险
senses.sentence: Catching colds is unfortunately an occupational **hazard** in this profession.
senses.translation: 不幸的是，容易感冒是这个行业的职业性风险。

senses.definition: pron.他，它,一个人
senses.sentence: **He** said they should turn their fire on the Conservative Party instead.
senses.translation: 他说他们应该掉转枪口，向保守党开火。

senses.definition: n.上端,头脑,头部,首脑，首长
senses.sentence: He won a **head**-to-**head** battle with NF leader Jean-Marie Le Pen.
senses.translation: 他在和国民阵线领袖让-马里·勒庞的正面交锋中获得了胜利。

senses.definition: n.头痛,令人头痛的事
senses.sentence: Symptoms are a slight fever, **headache** and loss of appetite.
senses.translation: 症状包括低烧、头痛和食欲不振。

senses.definition: n.标题，题名,信头,[航]航向,斩首
senses.sentence: By 09.30 we had cast off and were **heading** down-river.
senses.translation: 9点30分时我们就解缆向下游出发了。

senses.definition: n.大字标题,新闻提要,头条新闻
senses.sentence: The newspaper's **headline** indicates that there was a trade-off at the summit.
senses.translation: 报纸的大字标题表明峰会上大家作出了妥协。

senses.definition: n.（私立学校的）校长
senses.sentence: He was **headmaster** of a public school in the West of England.
senses.translation: 他是英格兰西部一所公学的校长。

senses.definition: n.（机构，企业等的）总部,总店,司令部,指挥部
senses.sentence: Its **headquarters** will soon be relocated from Westminster to the Greenwich site.
senses.translation: 其总部很快将从威斯敏斯特迁往格林尼治。

senses.definition: vt.恢复健康的状态,使恢复正常,使（某人）精神恢复健康
senses.sentence: You'll mend. The X-rays show that your arm will **heal** all right.
senses.translation: 你会康复的。X光照片显示你的胳膊能够较好地复原。

senses.definition: n.健康状况,卫生,保健,昌盛，兴旺
senses.sentence: His wife Cheryl said she had no worries about his **health**.
senses.translation: 他的妻子谢里尔说她并不担心他的健康。

senses.definition: adj.健康的,健全的,大量的,有益于健康的
senses.sentence: The birth of a live **healthy** baby is a truly blessed event.
senses.translation: 一个健康活泼的婴儿的出生真是一件可喜的事情。

senses.definition: n.堆，堆积,<口>许多，大量,<俚>破车
senses.sentence: The young footballer collapsed in a **heap** after a heavy tackle.
senses.translation: 年青的足球队员完成激烈的阻截后瘫倒在地动弹不得。

senses.definition: n.听力，听觉,审问,听力所及的距离，听得见的范围,听证会，〈美〉意见听取会
senses.sentence: He will now face a disciplinary **hearing** for having an affair.
senses.translation: 他因有外遇而要面临纪律听证会的裁决。

senses.definition: n.心，心脏,感情,要点,胸部
senses.sentence: Her husband had never before had any **heart** trouble.
senses.translation: 她丈夫以前从来没得过任何心脏疾病。

senses.definition: vt.举起,投掷,使起伏,呕吐
senses.sentence: It took only one **heave** to hurl him into the river.
senses.translation: 只一推，就把他推进了河里。

senses.definition: n.天,天堂,上帝,极乐
senses.sentence: They would move **heaven** and earth to stop me if they could.
senses.translation: 可能的话，他们会千方百计地阻止我。

senses.definition: adv.在很大程度上,沉重地,大量地,缓慢又高声地
senses.sentence: Nuclear weapons plants across the country are **heavily** contaminated with toxic wastes.
senses.translation: 全国的核武器工厂均受到了有毒废弃物的严重污染。

senses.definition: adj.重的，沉重的,大量的，浓密的,激烈的,重型的
senses.sentence: The outside air was **heavy** and moist and sultry.
senses.translation: 外面的空气沉滞、潮湿而闷热。

senses.definition: n.树篱,保护手段,防止损失（尤指金钱）的手段
senses.sentence: I saw an old man out clipping his **hedge**.
senses.translation: 我看见一位老人在外面修剪树篱。

senses.definition: n.高度，海拔,高地,身高,绝顶，顶点
senses.sentence: The sudden **height** dizzied her and she clung tightly.
senses.translation: 突然上升的高度让她晕头转向，她抓得紧紧的。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.（使）变高,（使）加强
senses.sentence: He took advantage of every opportunity to **heighten** racial tensions.
senses.translation: 他利用一切机会加剧种族间的紧张关系.

senses.definition: n.继承人,后嗣，嗣子
senses.sentence: His **heir** sold the painting to the London art dealer Agnews.
senses.translation: 他的继承人把这幅画卖给了伦敦艺术品经销商阿格纽斯。

senses.definition: n.直升机，直升飞机
senses.sentence: She served six months in prison for the **helicopter** caper.
senses.translation: 她因为直升机一案坐了6个月牢。

senses.definition: n.地狱，阴间,训斥,胡闹，见鬼,苦境，罪恶之地
senses.sentence: The men might be armed, but they sure as **hell** weren'ttrained.
senses.translation: 这些人可能携有武器，但他们很显然没有受过训练。

senses.definition: int.哈喽，喂,你好，您好,表示问候,打招呼
senses.sentence: A moment later, Cohen picked up the phone. "**Hello**?"
senses.translation: 过了一会儿，科恩接起电话。“喂？”

senses.definition: n.头盔,钢盔,盔形物，盔状物,[植]盔状花冠
senses.sentence: Miners wore a **helmet** as a guard against falling rocks.
senses.translation: 矿工头戴钢盔,防护落下的岩石.

senses.definition: vt.& vi.帮助,有助于， 有利于
senses.sentence: Sheila had an ulterior motive for trying to **help** Stan.
senses.translation: 希拉想帮助斯坦是另有所图的。

senses.definition: adj.给予帮助的，有益的,愿意帮忙的
senses.sentence: Having the right equipment at hand will be enormously **helpful**.
senses.translation: 手头上有合适的设备将会帮上大忙。

senses.definition: n.半球,地球的半球,[解]大脑半球
senses.sentence: This animal is to be found only in the Southern **Hemisphere**.
senses.translation: 这种动物只有在南半球才能找到.

senses.definition: adv.因此，所以,从此,从此处
senses.sentence: Whatever is hidden is harmful (**hence** revelation equals security).
senses.translation: 任何隐藏的东西都是有害的（所以披露就等于安全）。

senses.definition: adv.从今以后，今后
senses.sentence: We were finally released with a formal warning that we were **henceforth** barred from the base.
senses.translation: 我们被正式警告从此不得进入基地后终于获得了释放。

senses.definition: pron.(she的宾格)她,(she的所有格)她的,她，指某个国家，（一艘）船
senses.sentence: Somehow Karin managed to cope with the demands of **her** career.
senses.translation: 卡琳设法达到了其职业的要求。

senses.definition: n.草，草本植物,药草，香草,牧草
senses.sentence: The **herb** has been used for centuries to curdle milk.
senses.translation: 那种香草几个世纪以来都被用来制作酸乳。

senses.definition: n.兽群,牧群,放牧人,<蔑>群众，民众
senses.sentence: Stefano used a motor cycle to **herd** the sheep.
senses.translation: 斯特凡诺骑一辆摩托车放羊。

senses.definition: adv.在这里,这时,在这一点上,（给某人东西或指出某物时说）
senses.sentence: I try to remember all the good times I've had **here**.
senses.translation: 我试着回忆在这里度过的所有美好时光。

senses.definition: n.遗产,继承物,传统,文化遗产
senses.sentence: Ethiopia'sart springs from her early Christian as well as her Muslim **heritage**.
senses.translation: 埃塞俄比亚的艺术起源于其早期的基督教和伊斯兰教文化遗产。

senses.definition: n.英雄，勇士,男主角,（古代神话中的）神人，半神的勇士
senses.sentence: The mystery **hero** imme-diately alerted police after spotting a bomb.
senses.translation: 那个无名英雄发现炸弹后马上报了警。

senses.definition: adj.有英雄气概的，英雄的，英勇的,记叙英雄及其事迹的,夸张的
senses.contextMeaning: 有英雄气概的，英雄的，英勇的
senses.sentence: Their dogged single-mindedness is almost **heroic**.
senses.translation: 他们不屈不挠专心致志的劲头简直是一种壮举。

senses.definition: pron.她的,属于她的
senses.sentence: **Hers** was a minor part, but she played it with gusto.
senses.translation: 她演的是个小角色，但是演得很投入。

senses.definition: pron.（反身代词）她自己,（用以加强语气）她亲自，她本人
senses.sentence: She dusted **herself** down and left to build her own career.
senses.translation: 她重振旗鼓去开创自己的事业了。

senses.definition: int.（用以引起注意，表示惊异或询问）嘿，喂,你好！（表示问候）,咳
senses.contextMeaning: （用以引起注意，表示惊异或询问）嘿，喂
senses.sentence: **Hey**, I know what, I'll get a bumper sticker printed up.
senses.translation: 嘿，有了，我会找人印刷一些保险杠贴纸。

senses.definition: int.（用作问候语）嘿，喂
senses.sentence: All this equipment has received international acclaim from the specialist **hi**-fi press.
senses.translation: 这套设备受到全球高保真音响专业报刊的赞誉。

senses.definition: vt.隐藏,躲避，隐匿，躲藏,遮蔽，覆盖
senses.sentence: She fancied he was trying to **hide** a smile.
senses.translation: 她猜想他正在尽力掩饰笑容。

senses.definition: n.[计]分层，层次,等级制度,统治集团,天使的级别或等级
senses.sentence: The principle of **hierarchy** does not equate to totalitarian terror.
senses.translation: 等级制度在原则上并不等同于极权主义恐怖。

senses.definition: adj.高的,高尚的，崇高的,高音调的,高级的，高等的
senses.sentence: If cancers are spotted early there'sa **high** chance of survival.
senses.translation: 如果癌症在早期发现的话，存活的几率会很高。

senses.definition: adj.高地的，高原（地区）的,苏格兰高地的
senses.sentence: A solo piper opens Aberdeen **Highland** Games at 10am and the main events start at 1pm.
senses.translation: 上午10点，一位风笛独奏家揭开了阿伯丁高地运动会的序幕，下午1点主要比赛项目开始。

senses.definition: n.（图画或照片的）强光部份,最重要的事情,最精彩的部分
senses.sentence: The presidential elections are the **highlight** of next year's political calendar.
senses.translation: 总统选举是明年政治日程表上的大事.

senses.definition: adv.高度地,极，非常,非常赞许地
senses.sentence: I gather his report is **highly** critical of the trial judge.
senses.translation: 据我所知，他在报道中毫不留情地批评了初审法官。

senses.definition: n.公路,公用通道,干线,途径，方法
senses.sentence: Megamalls and fast food restaurants line the **highway** system.
senses.translation: 公路系统沿线有大型商场和快餐店。

senses.definition: n.劫持,敲诈,威逼
senses.sentence: Every minute during the **hijack** seemed like a week.
senses.translation: 被劫持过程中，每一分钟都过得如同一周那么漫长。

senses.definition: n.徒步旅行,远足,提高，涨价,<口>（数量、价格等）增加，上升
senses.sentence: They went on a ten-mile **hike** through the forest.
senses.translation: 他们做了一次穿越森林的十英里徒步旅行。

senses.definition: n.小山，山冈,斜坡
senses.sentence: He turned his back on them and stomped off up the **hill**.
senses.translation: 他转身不理他们，噔噔噔地爬上了山。

senses.definition: pron.(he的宾格)他
senses.sentence: She studied **him** for the longest time, looking wryly amused.
senses.translation: 她面带苦笑，盯着他看了很长时间。

senses.definition: pron.（反身代词）他自己,（用以加强语气）他亲自，他本人
senses.sentence: He sees **himself** going right to the top of the tree.
senses.translation: 他预见自己在同行中将无人可及。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.阻碍，妨碍,成为阻碍
senses.sentence: Don't **hinder** me in my work.
senses.translation: 不要妨碍我的工作.

senses.definition: n.铰链，折叶,关键，转折点,枢要，中枢
senses.sentence: Running water is never stale and a door - **hinge** never gets worm - eaten.
senses.translation: 流水不腐,户枢不蠹.

senses.definition: n.线索，迹象,提示，注意事项,暗示,微量
senses.sentence: She'd never received the merest **hint** of any communication from him.
senses.translation: 她从未得到他准备沟通的一丁点儿暗示。

senses.definition: n.租金,酬金，工钱,[非正式用语] 被雇佣的人,销售部的两个新雇员
senses.sentence: Child car seats only cost about £10 a week to **hire**.
senses.translation: 儿童汽车坐椅一周的租金才10英镑。

senses.definition: pron.(he的所有格)他的,(he的物主代词)他的东西
senses.sentence: He finished **his** conversation and stood up, looking straight at me.
senses.translation: 他说完话站起来，直视着我。

senses.definition: n.历史学家，史学工作者
senses.sentence: The **historian** Yakut described it picturesquely as a "mother of castles".
senses.translation: 历史学家雅库特把它形象地描述为“城堡之母”。

senses.definition: adj.在历史上重要的，有历史影响的,历史的，历史上的
senses.contextMeaning: 在历史上重要的，有历史影响的
senses.sentence: Its **historic** buildings are being slowly and splendidly renovated.
senses.translation: 此处的历史建筑正被缓慢且精心地修复着。

senses.definition: adj.历史的，历史上的,有关历史研究的,有根据的,基于史实的
senses.sentence: Two **historical** questions — you can answer them how you like.
senses.translation: 两个历史问题——你可以随便回答。

senses.definition: n.历史，历史学,发展史,履历，经历,（某地的）沿革
senses.sentence: I fell under the influence of a **history** master.
senses.translation: 我当时深受一位历史老师的影响。

senses.definition: adv.到目前为止,迄今,至今
senses.sentence: **Hitherto** he had experienced no great success in his attempt.
senses.translation: 到目前为止,他的尝试还没获得成功.

senses.definition: n.蜂箱,蜂巢,蜂群,喧闹地区
senses.sentence: A dark cloud of bees comes swarming out of the **hive**.
senses.translation: 黑压压的一大群蜜蜂从蜂巢中飞出来。

senses.definition: n.业余爱好,嗜好，兴趣,小马
senses.sentence: It is only a **hobby**, not a life or death struggle.
senses.translation: 这只是一项爱好，不需要拼死拼活地努力。

senses.definition: vt.升起，提起
senses.sentence: Materials are elevated to the top floor by the new **hoist**.
senses.translation: 材料由那台新起重机吊到楼顶.

senses.definition: vt.拿住，握住,保留，保存,扣留，拘押,容纳
senses.sentence: It is hard to get **hold** of guns in this country.
senses.translation: 在这个国家里要搞到枪支是很困难的。

senses.definition: n.支持物,持有者,（支票等）持有人,支托（或握持）…之物
senses.sentence: Her popular pot **holder** is also available in do-it-yourself kits.
senses.translation: 她那广受欢迎的防烫布垫也可以自己购买原料套装自己制作。

senses.definition: n.洞，孔,洞穴，穴,缺陷,<口>绝境
senses.sentence: He admitted that the government was in "a dreadful **hole**".
senses.translation: 他承认政府目前“处境极为尴尬”。

senses.definition: n.假日，休息日,节日
senses.sentence: The trading day is shortened in observance of the Labor Day **holiday**.
senses.translation: 因庆祝劳工节，这个交易日交易时间缩短了。

senses.definition: adj.空的,空洞的,虚伪的,空腹的
senses.sentence: The ersatz spontaneity of "Sunday Love" sounds especially **hollow**.
senses.translation: 对《星期天的爱情》这首歌的即兴模仿听起来尤其空洞。

senses.definition: n.家,家庭,家庭生活,终点
senses.sentence: It had once been the **home** of a wealthy nobleman.
senses.translation: 这里曾是一个有钱贵族的宅邸。

senses.definition: n.家庭作业,功课
senses.sentence: Tom admits that playing video games sometimes distracts him from his **homework**.
senses.translation: 汤姆承认玩电子游戏有时会使他无心做作业。

senses.definition: adj.同性质的，同类的,由相同（或同类型）事物（或人）组成的,均匀的,[数]齐性的，齐次的
senses.sentence: The unemployed are not a **homogeneous** group.
senses.translation: 失业者不能一概而论。

senses.definition: adj.诚实的,坦诚的,老实的,辛勤挣得的
senses.sentence: To be **honest** the house is not quite our style.
senses.translation: 说实话，这所房子不太适合我们。

senses.definition: n.蜂蜜,<口>宝贝,可爱的人
senses.sentence: Sweeten dishes sparingly with **honey**, or con-centrated apple or pear juice.
senses.translation: 加一点蜂蜜或浓缩苹果汁或梨汁，让菜带点甜味。

senses.definition: n.尊敬,光荣,节操,荣誉
senses.sentence: The Chinese make a point of their personal **honor**.
senses.translation: 中国人特别重视个人荣誉.

senses.definition: adj.可敬的，荣誉的，光荣的
senses.sentence: He argued that the only **honorable** course of action was death.
senses.translation: 他认为唯一体面的行为就只有一死。

senses.definition: n.尊敬,荣幸,正义感,荣誉
senses.sentence: Caste is defined primarily by social **honour** attained through personal life-style.
senses.translation: 社会等级制度主要是通过个人生活方式赢得的社会荣誉来确定。

senses.definition: adj.诚实的，正直的,光荣的，荣耀的,尊敬的,高尚的
senses.sentence: My title, by courtesy only, is the **Honourable** Amalia Lovell.
senses.translation: 人们称我为，当然只是出于礼貌，尊敬的阿马利娅·洛弗尔夫人。

senses.definition: n.钩，铁钩,弯曲部分，有钩部分,圈套，陷阱,〈俚〉锚
senses.sentence: He disconnected the IV bottle from the overhead **hook**.
senses.translation: 他把静脉滴注瓶从头顶的钩子上拿下来。

senses.definition: vi.跳上[下],单足蹦跳,齐足（或双足）跳行,摘葎草花
senses.sentence: The group's debut album was immediately acclaimed a hip **hop** classic.
senses.translation: 这个组合的首张专辑一经推出便被盛赞为嘻哈乐的经典之作。

senses.definition: n.希望，期望,希望的东西,被寄予希望的人或事物、情况,抱有希望的理由
senses.sentence: I do **hope** you'll forgive me but I've got to leave.
senses.translation: 我真的非常抱歉，我得走了。

senses.definition: adj.抱有希望的,给人以希望的
senses.sentence: Surgeons were **hopeful** of saving the sight in Sara's left eye.
senses.translation: 外科医生有信心保住萨拉左眼的视力。

senses.definition: adj.不抱希望的，绝望的,没有希望的，惨淡的,不可救药的,不可能的
senses.sentence: I don't drive and the buses are quite **hopeless**.
senses.translation: 我不开车，公共汽车条件又太糟糕。

senses.definition: n.地平线,范围,界限,眼界
senses.sentence: She stared dreamily out of the small window at the blue **horizon**.
senses.translation: 她出神地看着小窗子外面的蓝色地平线。

senses.definition: adj.水平的，卧式的,地平线的,[植]（枝条）平层的,同一行业的，同阶层的
senses.sentence: Do not raise your left arm above the **horizontal**.
senses.translation: 左臂不要举过水平高度。

senses.definition: n.荷尔蒙,激素
senses.sentence: **Hormone** replacement therapy is very important and should be instituted early.
senses.translation: 激素替代治疗非常重要，应该及早开始。

senses.definition: n.角，触角,号角，喇叭,角质,角状物
senses.sentence: We drove through red traffic lights, the **horn** blaring.
senses.translation: 我们鸣着喇叭，闯过红灯。

senses.definition: n.恐怖，可怕的事物,嫌恶，痛恨,讨厌的人或事,〈口〉非常丑恶
senses.sentence: Somehow he tells these stories without a note of **horror**.
senses.translation: 不知为什么他讲这些故事时一点都不害怕。

senses.definition: n.马,骑马的军人，骑兵,有脚的架,跳马，鞍马
senses.sentence: Representatives from across the **horse** industry will attend the meeting.
senses.translation: 整个赛马业的代表都将参加这次会议。

senses.definition: n.软管，胶皮管,长筒袜,男性穿的紧身裤
senses.sentence: Two inmates hurled slates at prison officers spraying them with a **hose**.
senses.translation: 两名囚犯朝着用水管向他们喷水的狱警们扔石板瓦。

senses.definition: n.医院,收容所,养老院,〈古〉旅客招待所
senses.sentence: You are welcome to visit the **hospital** at any time.
senses.translation: 你可以随时来医院。

senses.definition: n.殷勤好客,招待，款待,（气候，环境等的）宜人，适宜
senses.sentence: He struck the ball straight into the **hospitality** tents.
senses.translation: 他将球直接打进迎宾帐篷里。

senses.definition: n.[计算机]主机,主人，东道主,节目主持人,酒店业主
senses.sentence: He left a **host** of other riders trailing in his slipstream.
senses.translation: 他把其他的摩托车手甩在身后。

senses.definition: n.人质,抵押品
senses.sentence: The class was held **hostage** by a hooded gunman.
senses.translation: 全班同学被一个蒙面的持枪歹徒劫为人质。

senses.definition: n.女主人,（夜总会的）女招待,（电视或广播节目的）女主持人,（餐馆的）迎宾女招待
senses.sentence: Mary was always the perfect **hostess**.
senses.translation: 玛丽总是最殷勤的女主人。

senses.definition: n.敌对者，敌对物,敌方
senses.sentence: It could engage the enemy beyond the range of **hostile** torpedoes.
senses.translation: 从这可以避开敌方鱼雷区对敌人发动进攻。

senses.definition: adj.热的,辣的,激动的,热门的
senses.sentence: Wash your hands thoroughly with **hot** soapy water before handling any food.
senses.translation: 在拿吃的之前，用热肥皂水把手好好地洗干净。

senses.definition: n.旅馆，宾馆，酒店，饭店
senses.sentence: His team-mates opened **hotel** windows, shouting "Jump!" and somewhat less printable banter.
senses.translation: 他的队友打开了酒店的窗户，大叫着“跳！”，还开了一些上不了台面的玩笑。

senses.definition: n.猎狗，猎犬,卑劣的人,[动]角鲨，星鲨，弓鳍鱼,有…迷[瘾]的人
senses.sentence: The police have promised to **hound** down those responsible for the explosion.
senses.translation: 警方已保证要追查此次爆炸事件有责任的人员.

senses.definition: n.小时，钟头,时间，时刻,固定时间,课时
senses.sentence: Use your lunch **hour** to have a nap in your chair.
senses.translation: 利用午饭时间坐在椅子上打个盹吧。

senses.definition: n.房屋,全家人,（从事某种生意的）公司,（英国）下议院
senses.sentence: On Sunday Cohen lay around the **house** all day.
senses.translation: 科恩星期天一整天都在家无所事事。

senses.definition: n.家庭，户,（集合词）全家人，（包含人在内的）家眷，家属，家里人,家庭,（英）王室
senses.sentence: The twins endorsed a line of **household** cleaning products.
senses.translation: 那对双胞胎为一系列家用清洁产品做广告。

senses.definition: n.家庭主妇,家庭妇女
senses.sentence: She seemed less like a poetess than a distracted **housewife**.
senses.translation: 她似乎不像个女诗人，更像一个心烦意乱的家庭主妇。

senses.definition: n.家务劳动
senses.sentence: I discovered an addiction to **housework** which I had never felt before.
senses.translation: 我发现自己迷上了做家务，之前我从没有这种感觉。

senses.definition: n.房屋,供给住宅,掩护,外罩
senses.sentence: The government is taking emergency action to deal with a **housing** crisis.
senses.translation: 政府正采取紧急措施解决住房危机。

senses.definition: vi.盘旋,徘徊,犹豫
senses.sentence: You don't **hover** round the table.
senses.translation: 你不要围着桌子走来走去.

senses.definition: adv.怎样,健康状况如何,到何种地步,以任何方式
senses.sentence: I know **how** to darn, and **how** to sew a button on.
senses.translation: 我会打补丁，缝纽扣。

senses.definition: adv.不管到什么程度,无论如何,然而,可是
senses.sentence: What is missing, **however**, is an internal, artistic cohesion.
senses.translation: 不过，缺乏的是一种内在的艺术凝聚力。

senses.definition: vt.哀号，吼叫
senses.sentence: Traditionalists may **howl**, but in today's world, cultural relativism rules.
senses.translation: 传统卫道士们也许会叫嚣反对，但在当今世界，文化相对论确实是占据着统治地位。

senses.definition: n.拥挤,杂乱一团,小型私人会议
senses.sentence: We lay there: a **huddle** of bodies, gasping for air.
senses.translation: 我们横七竖八地挤作一团躺在那里，大口喘着气。

senses.definition: adj.巨大的,庞大的,极大的
senses.sentence: Australian rugby league enjoys a **huge** following in New Zealand.
senses.translation: 澳大利亚橄榄球联盟在新西兰有众多支持者。

senses.definition: vt.哼唱
senses.sentence: **Hum**, I am sorry but I thought you were French.
senses.translation: 嗯，很抱歉，我以为你是法国人。

senses.definition: adj.人的,有人性的,显示人类特有弱点的,人本性的
senses.sentence: It's an affront to **human** dignity to keep someone alive like this.
senses.translation: 如此维持一个人的生命是对人类尊严的冒犯。

senses.definition: n.人类,人性,人道,人文学科
senses.sentence: We admire her dedication to the cause of **humanity**.
senses.translation: 我们敬佩她对人类事业的献身精神。

senses.definition: adj.谦逊的,简陋的,（级别或地位）低下的,不大的
senses.sentence: Spyros Latsis started his career as a **humble** fisherman in the Aegean.
senses.translation: 斯皮罗斯·拉齐斯的第一份职业是爱琴海上一名地位卑贱的渔夫。

senses.definition: adj.潮湿的,湿气重的,湿润的,温湿
senses.sentence: Visitors can expect hot and **humid** condi-tions.
senses.translation: 游客会遇到炎热潮湿的天气状况。

senses.definition: n.（空气中的）湿度,潮湿，高温潮湿,湿热,[物]湿度
senses.sentence: As an asthmatic, he cannot cope with the heat and **humidity**.
senses.translation: 他患有哮喘病，经不起高温和潮湿。

senses.definition: vt.使蒙羞，使丢脸，使出丑,屈辱，羞辱
senses.sentence: There are people who want to **humiliate** you and grind you down.
senses.translation: 有一些人会想要让你难堪，欺负你。

senses.definition: n.幽默，心情，诙谐
senses.sentence: I think **humor** is a great lubricant for life.
senses.translation: 我认为幽默是人生的上好润滑剂。

senses.definition: n.幽默,幽默感 ,感觉,体液
senses.sentence: Sharon tells the story of that night with self-deprecating **humour**.
senses.translation: 沙伦以幽默自嘲的口吻讲述那一夜的故事。

senses.definition: num.一百,许多,100 到 999 间的数目,某个世纪的年代
senses.sentence: Three **hundred** million dollars will be nothing like enough.
senses.translation: 3亿美元远远不够。

senses.definition: n.饿，饥饿,欲望
senses.sentence: Other daughters, faced with their mother's emotional **hunger**, pull away.
senses.translation: 面对母亲的情感渴求，其他几个女儿都疏远了她。

senses.definition: adj.饥饿的,渴望的，渴望得到,（统称）饥民,荒年的，不毛的
senses.sentence: Come on now. You know you must be **hungry**.
senses.translation: 好，来吧，你肯定已经饿了。

senses.definition: vi.追逐猎物,寻找,前后摆动,积极地寻找
senses.sentence: Parent birds began to **hunt** for food for their young.
senses.translation: 亲鸟开始为幼鸟寻找食物。

senses.definition: vt.丢下，用力投掷,大声叫骂，愤慨的说出,推到，推翻
senses.sentence: The best cure for unhappiness is to **hurl** yourself into your work.
senses.translation: 医治愁苦的最好办法就是全身心地投入工作.

senses.definition: n.飓风，十二级风,飓风般猛烈的东西,（感情等的）爆发,<英>飓风式战斗驱逐机
senses.sentence: The agency was heavily criticised for its tardy response to the **hurricane**.
senses.translation: 该机构因对飓风反应迟缓，受到严厉批评。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.仓促（做某事）,催促,（朝某方向）迅速移动,迅速处理
senses.sentence: Dave was in a **hurry** to get back to work.
senses.translation: 戴夫急于回到工作岗位。

senses.definition: adj.受伤的,痛苦的,（受）损坏的
senses.sentence: The turning point in the process of growing up is when you discover the core of strength within you that survives all **hurt**.--Max Lerner
senses.translation: 当你从内心深处找到一种可以忍受一切痛苦的坚强力量时，你的成长历程就会出现飞跃。

senses.definition: n.丈夫,〈英〉管家,〈古〉节俭的管理人,船舶管理人
senses.sentence: Her **husband** had never before had any heart trouble.
senses.translation: 她丈夫以前从来没得过任何心脏疾病。

senses.definition: n.小屋,棚屋,临时营房,牢房
senses.sentence: The **hut** hung half over the edge of the precipice.
senses.translation: 那间小屋有一半悬在峭壁边上.

senses.definition: n.<化>氢
senses.sentence: **Hydrogen** is used extensively in industry for the production of ammonia.
senses.translation: 氢气在工业上广泛用于制氨。

senses.definition: n.卫生，卫生学,保健法
senses.sentence: Infection with head lice is no reflection on personal **hygiene**.
senses.translation: 头上生虱子并不说明不讲个人卫生。

senses.definition: n.假设，假说,[逻]前提
senses.sentence: The results confirmed his **hypothesis** on the use of modal verbs.
senses.translation: 结果证实了他的关于情态动词用法的假设.

senses.definition: adj.情绪异常激动的,歇斯底里般的,癔病的,癔病性
senses.sentence: Paul Mazursky was Master of Ceremonies, and he was pretty **hysterical**.
senses.translation: 保罗·马祖尔斯基担任司仪，他简直把人笑坏了。

senses.definition: n.冰,雪糕,冷淡,冰状物
senses.sentence: His mother's voice was one he knew; **ice** cold and deadly.
senses.translation: 母亲的声音是他很熟悉的：冰冷、无情。

senses.definition: n.主意，想法,[哲]理念，观念,[乐]乐句,模糊想法
senses.sentence: I have a fair **idea** of how difficult things can be.
senses.translation: 我大致了解情况会有多困难。

senses.definition: adj.理想的，完美的,被认为是最好的,完全或相当令人满意的,想象的，假设的
senses.sentence: She was the **ideal** American teenager, both on and off screen.
senses.translation: 无论是在荧幕上还是在生活中，她都是人们心目中完美的美国青少年。

senses.definition: adj.同一的,完全同样的，相同的,恒等的,同卵的
senses.sentence: A coral reef is built by the accretion of tiny, **identical** organisms.
senses.translation: 珊瑚礁是由许多相同的微生物不断堆积而成。

senses.definition: n.鉴定，识别,验明,身份证明,认同
senses.sentence: I need your full, emotional **identification** with the problem and with me.
senses.translation: 我需要你对我、对此问题都有充分的情感认同与支持。

senses.definition: vt.识别，认出,确定,使参与,把…看成一样
senses.sentence: The candidates all want to **identify** themselves with reform.
senses.translation: 候选人都想把自己与改革密切联系起来。

senses.definition: n.身份,[逻]同一性,个性,[数]恒等（式）
senses.sentence: The vital clue to the killer's **identity** was his nickname, Peanuts.
senses.translation: 查明杀手身份的重要线索是他的外号叫“花生”.

senses.definition: n.思想（体系），思想意识,意识形态,观念学,空想，空论
senses.sentence: To add spice to the debate, they disagreed about method and **ideology**.
senses.translation: 他们在方法和观念上都持不同意见，这使辩论精彩了很多。

senses.definition: n.习语，成语,方言，土语,（语言）风格,惯用语法
senses.sentence: It was an old building in the local **idiom**.
senses.translation: 这是一座具有当地特色的古建筑.

senses.definition: n.傻瓜，笨蛋,白痴
senses.sentence: He snubbed her in public and made her feel an **idiot**.
senses.translation: 他当众冷落她，让她觉得自己像一个白痴似的。

senses.definition: adj.无意义的,空闲的,懒惰的,无根据的
senses.sentence: It would be **idle** to pretend the system is perfect.
senses.translation: 假装系统完美无疵是徒劳的。

senses.definition: conj.如果，倘若,即使,〈口〉是否,假设
senses.sentence: **If** you love life, life will love you back.
senses.translation: 热爱生活，生活也会厚爱你。(Arthur Rubinstein)

senses.definition: vt.点燃,使燃烧,使激动,使灼热
senses.sentence: Nothing less than a fission bomb can **ignite** a thermonuclear reaction.
senses.translation: 威力比一个裂变炸弹小的任何东西都不能点燃热核反应.

senses.definition: vi.点火,燃烧
senses.sentence: The rocket rises and we can see the second stage **ignite**.
senses.translation: 火箭升高了,我们可以看到二级点火.

senses.definition: n.无知，愚昧,蒙
senses.sentence: **Ignorance** of people brings fear, fear of the unknown.
senses.translation: 人们的无知会带来恐惧，对未知事物的恐惧。

senses.definition: adj.无知的，愚昧的,由无知引起的,无学识的
senses.sentence: Authors are famously **ignorant** about the realities of publishing.
senses.translation: 作者们不了解出版界的实际情况，这是人所共知的。

senses.definition: vt.忽视，不顾,[法律]驳回（诉讼）
senses.sentence: The movie industry had chosen to **ignore** the encroaching competition of television.
senses.translation: 电影业故意无视电视业的侵犯性竞争。

senses.definition: adj.不好的,恶意的,有病的,不吉利的
senses.sentence: Her daughters visited him from time to time when he was **ill**.
senses.translation: 他生病的时候她的女儿们时常去探望他。

senses.definition: adj.不合法的，违法的,违反规则的
senses.sentence: Discrimination by employers on the grounds of race and nationality was **illegal**.
senses.translation: 雇主以种族或国籍为由歧视员工是非法的。

senses.definition: n.目不识丁者,文盲,无知
senses.sentence: There are still many **illiterate** people in our country.
senses.translation: 在我国还有许多文盲.

senses.definition: n.疾病,某种具体疾病,不健康
senses.sentence: Attitudes to mental **illness** have shifted in recent years.
senses.translation: 最近几年对精神病的态度已有所改变。

senses.definition: vt.照亮，照明,阐明，说明,装饰,使灿烂
senses.sentence: We **illuminate** the enemy plane with searchlights in order to shoot at it.
senses.translation: 我们用探照灯照射敌机为的是向其射击.

senses.definition: n.错觉,幻想,错误观念,假象
senses.sentence: Sloping walls on the bulk of the building create an optical **illusion**.
senses.translation: 大楼主体的斜墙给人造成一种视错觉。

senses.definition: vt.说明,表明,给…加插图,（用示例、图画等）说明
senses.sentence: The company's bank statements **illustrate** its success.
senses.translation: 这家公司的银行报表说明了它的成功.

senses.definition: n.说明,例证,图解,插图
senses.sentence: The **illustration** shows a cluster of five roses coloured apricot orange.
senses.translation: 插图上是一簇杏橙色的玫瑰，一共5朵。

senses.definition: n.影像,肖像,概念，意向,镜像，映像
senses.sentence: Their healthy **image** disguises the fact that they are highly processed foods.
senses.translation: 它们看上去有益健康，实则掩盖了其为精加工食品这一事实。

senses.definition: n.想像，想像力,空想，妄想,想像出来的事物
senses.sentence: A child may not differentiate between his **imagination** and the real world.
senses.translation: 儿童可能无法将自己的幻想与真实世界区分开来。

senses.definition: adj.富于想像力的，运用想像力的,想象或创造出来的,沉溺于想象的,虚假的
senses.contextMeaning: 富于想像力的，运用想像力的
senses.sentence: He's one of the most dynamically **imaginative** jazz pianists still functioning.
senses.translation: 他是当下仍旧活跃的最有闯劲、最具想象力的爵士乐钢琴师之一。

senses.definition: vi.想象,猜想，推测
senses.sentence: **Imagine** long golden beaches where you can wander in solitude.
senses.translation: 想象一下那长长的金色海滩吧，在那里你可以独自徜徉。

senses.definition: vt.模仿，效仿,仿造，伪造
senses.sentence: He could **imitate** in speech or writing most of those he admired.
senses.translation: 他能模仿大多数自己崇拜的偶像的讲话和写作风格。

senses.definition: n.模仿，仿效,仿制品,赝品,[生]拟态
senses.sentence: It's not real leather; it's only an **imitation**.
senses.translation: 那不是真皮, 只不过是仿制品.

senses.definition: adj.立即的,直接的，最接近的,目前的，当前的,直觉的
senses.sentence: Only a handful had returned to work in the **immediate** vicinity.
senses.translation: 仅有几个人回到临近地区工作。

senses.definition: adj.极大的，巨大的,浩瀚的，无边际的,〈口〉非常好的,弘道
senses.sentence: I'd seen it before in people who held **immense** power.
senses.translation: 我以前曾在掌握大权的人身上看到过这种情况。

senses.definition: vt.浸没,施浸礼,沉迷…中，陷入
senses.sentence: **Immerse** the cloth in the dye for twenty minutes.
senses.translation: 把布浸在染料里20分钟.

senses.definition: n.移民，侨民,从异地移入的动物[植物]
senses.sentence: In recent months many conservative politicians have jumped on the anti-**immigrant** bandwagon.
senses.translation: 最近几个月，很多保守政客都搭上了“反移民”这班车。

senses.definition: vi.移入
senses.sentence: It's hard to say if her daughter shall **immigrate** into italy.
senses.translation: 很难说她的女儿是否应该移居意大利.

senses.definition: adj.不道德的,邪恶的,猥亵的,悖德
senses.sentence: I rejected the teaching that premarital sex was **immoral**.
senses.translation: 我反对宣扬婚前性行为不道德的说教。

senses.definition: adj.免疫的,有免疫力的,不受影响的,免除…的
senses.sentence: This discovery led on to studies of the **immune** system.
senses.translation: 此发现使人们开始对免疫系统进行研究。

senses.definition: n.碰撞，冲击，撞击,影响,冲击力
senses.sentence: The specific **impact** of the greenhouse effect is unknowable.
senses.translation: 温室效应的具体影响无法知道。

senses.definition: vt.损害，削弱
senses.sentence: Tiredness can seriously **impair** your ability to drive.
senses.translation: 疲劳会大大影响你的驾驶能力.

senses.definition: vt.给予,告知，透露,传授
senses.sentence: Monosodium glutamate **impart** flavo ( u ) r to food.
senses.translation: 味素 使食品有味道.

senses.definition: adj.必要的，不可避免的,命令的，专横的,势在必行的,[语]祈使的
senses.sentence: Job creation has become an **imperative** for the government.
senses.translation: 创造就业机会是政府必须做的事.

senses.definition: adj.帝国的，皇帝的,皇家的，庄严的,特级的,度量衡英制的
senses.sentence: In 1527 **Imperial** troops sacked the French ambassador's residence in Rome.
senses.translation: 1527年，帝国军队洗劫了位于罗马的法国大使官邸。

senses.definition: n.动力,促进,势头,声势
senses.sentence: This is the primary **impetus** behind the economic recovery.
senses.translation: 这是促使经济复苏的主要动力.

senses.definition: vt.实施，执行,使生效，实现,落实（政策）,把…填满
senses.sentence: He tried to **implement** a technocratic economic policy.
senses.translation: 他力图实行技术统领一切的经济政策。

senses.definition: n.含义,含蓄，含意，言外之意,卷入，牵连，牵涉，纠缠,[逻辑学]蕴涵，蕴含
senses.sentence: The **implication** that marital infidelity enhances a leader's credibility is preposterous.
senses.translation: 婚姻不忠会提升领导人可信度的暗示荒谬之极。

senses.definition: adj.不言明[含蓄]的,无疑问的，绝对的,成为一部份的,内含的
senses.sentence: He had **implicit** faith in the noble intentions of the Emperor.
senses.translation: 他对皇帝陛下高尚的动机深信不疑。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.暗示,意味,隐含,说明，表明
senses.sentence: Cheerfulness doesn't always **imply** happiness.
senses.translation: 快活并不总是意味着幸福.

senses.definition: n.进口，进口商品,输入,重要性,意义
senses.sentence: Germany, however, insists on restrictions on the **import** of Polish coal.
senses.translation: 但是德国坚持对进口波兰煤炭加以限制.

senses.definition: n.重要性,重要地位，显著,骄傲，自大
senses.sentence: My great-grandfather was a person of some **importance** here.
senses.translation: 我曾祖父曾是这儿的头面人物。

senses.definition: adj.重要的,权威的,有势力的,有地位的
senses.sentence: Fresh fruits and vegetables are **important** and so is bran.
senses.translation: 新鲜的水果和蔬菜很重要，麦麸也是。

senses.definition: vt.强加,征税,以…欺骗
senses.sentence: The law should **impose** penalties on companies that use energy wastefully.
senses.translation: 法律应当严惩浪费能源的公司。

senses.definition: adj.不可能的，做不到的,难以忍受的,不会有的，不能相信的
senses.sentence: The government inherited an **impossible** situation from its predecessors.
senses.translation: 这届政府从前任那里接过了一个非常棘手的烂摊子。

senses.definition: n.印象,印记
senses.sentence: The boys were vying with each other to **impress** her.
senses.translation: 小伙子们争着给她留下好印象.

senses.definition: n.印象，感觉,影响，效果,盖印，印记
senses.sentence: My visit to India in 1986 left an indelible **impression** on me.
senses.translation: 1986年的印度之行给我留下了难忘的印象。

senses.definition: adj.给人印象深刻的，感人的,引人注目的,可观的,显赫
senses.contextMeaning: 给人印象深刻的，感人的
senses.sentence: India while not racking up such an **impressive** score beat Japan 3-0.
senses.translation: 印度尽管没有大胜，却也以3比0击败了日本。

senses.definition: vt.提高（土地、地产）的价值,利用（机会）,改善，改良
senses.sentence: To **improve** hand-eye co-ordination, practise throwing and catching balls.
senses.translation: 要想提高手眼协调能力，就练习投球和接球。

senses.definition: n.改进，改善，改良，增进，进步,（美）装修，改良措施,利用，活用,更优秀的人，更进步的人
senses.contextMeaning: 改进，改善，改良，增进，进步
senses.sentence: CBS's ratings again showed huge **improvement** over the previous year.
senses.translation: 与前一年相比，哥伦比亚广播公司的收视率再次大幅提高。

senses.definition: n.凭冲动行事,突如其来的念头,[电子]脉冲,[医]冲动，搏动
senses.sentence: All day she had fought off the **impulse** to telephone Harry.
senses.translation: 她一整天都在克制自己想给哈里打电话的冲动。

senses.definition: prep.采用（某种方式）,穿着，带着,（表示位置）在…里面，（表示领域，范围）在…以内,（表示品质、能力等）在…之中
senses.sentence: The turning point **in** the process of growing up is when you discover the core of strength within you that survives all hurt.--Max Lerner
senses.translation: 当你从内心深处找到一种可以忍受一切痛苦的坚强力量时，你的成长历程就会出现飞跃。

senses.definition: vt.开创,创始,举行开幕典礼,举行就职典礼
senses.sentence: To begin or **inaugurate** with a ceremony intended to bring good luck.
senses.translation: 以某种讨吉利的仪式着手做(某事)

senses.definition: n.动机,刺激,诱因,鼓励
senses.sentence: You get a big salary **incentive** and free board and lodging too.
senses.translation: 你们能获得大笔激励性薪水，还可享受免费膳宿。

senses.definition: n.英寸（相当于 2。54 厘米，一英尺有12英寸）,少量，少许,身高
senses.contextMeaning: 英寸（相当于 2。54 厘米，一英尺有12英寸）
