senses.sentence: His life was saved by a quarter-**inch**-thick bullet-proof steel screen.
senses.translation: 多亏一块1/4英寸厚的防弹钢板，他才捡了条命。

senses.definition: n.发生率,影响范围,[数]关联，接合,[物]入射，入射角
senses.sentence: This area has a high **incidence** of crime, disease, unemployment, etc.
senses.translation: 这个地区的犯罪率 、 发病率 、 失业率等很高.

senses.definition: n.事件，事变,小插曲,敌对行动,骚乱
senses.sentence: The violation of the graves is not the first such **incident**.
senses.translation: 像这种破坏墓地的行为不是第一次出现了。

senses.definition: adv.顺便,偶然地，不经意地,附带,捎带
senses.sentence: **Incidentally**, I think you still owe me some money.
senses.translation: 顺便说一句, 我想你还欠我一些钱.

senses.definition: n.斜坡,斜面,坡度,倾斜
senses.sentence: The men had to slog up a steep muddy **incline**.
senses.translation: 人们只得在陡峭而泥泞的斜坡上艰难地行进。

senses.definition: vt.包括,包含,计入,包住
senses.sentence: The unemployed executives **include** former sales managers, directors and accountants.
senses.translation: 被解雇的管理人员包括前销售经理、主管和会计。

senses.definition: n.收入，进款,进来的动作,进入
senses.sentence: Tourism is up, jobs are up, individual **income** is up.
senses.translation: 旅游火了，工作机会多了，个人收入涨了。

senses.definition: vi.包含,吸收,合并,混合
senses.sentence: We had to **incorporate** the company for tax reasons.
senses.translation: 由于纳税的原因,我们不得不把那家公司合并了.

senses.definition: vt.& vi.增加，增大，增多
senses.sentence: He introduced radio to the school to **increase** the children's awareness.
senses.translation: 他在学校开通广播，以提高孩子们的警觉性。

senses.definition: adv.越来越多地,日益，格外,越来越…,愈
senses.sentence: **Increasingly**, corporate clients are seeking to outsource the management of their facilities.
senses.translation: 越来越多的公司客户寻求将设施的管理外包出去。

senses.definition: adj.不可思议的,惊人的,难以置信的,未必可能的
senses.sentence: It was an **incredible** display of motherly love and forgiveness.
senses.translation: 那是慈母般关爱与宽容的了不起的表现。

senses.definition: vt.招致，引起,遭受
senses.sentence: Any expenses you may **incur** will be chargeable to the company.
senses.translation: 你的所有开销均由本公司支付。

senses.definition: adj.自主的,不相关连的,无党派的,不相干的人所做的（或提供的）
senses.sentence: The **Independent** Labour Party was founded in Bradford on January 13, 1893.
senses.translation: 独立工党1893年1月13日在布拉德福德成立。

senses.definition: n.索引,<数>指数,指示,标志
senses.sentence: He suffered a hairline fracture of the right **index** finger.
senses.translation: 他右手食指骨裂。

senses.definition: vt.表明，标示，指示,象征，暗示，预示,[医]显示需要做…的治疗
senses.sentence: Ballpark estimates **indicate** a price tag of $90 million a month.
senses.translation: 大致的估计费用为每月9,000万美元。

senses.definition: n.指示,象征,表明,标示
senses.sentence: If she had noticed her father's entrance, she gave no **indication**.
senses.translation: 就算她已经注意到了父亲的到来，她也会不动声色。

senses.definition: adj.象征的,指示的，表示的,[语]陈述的，直陈的
senses.sentence: His presence is **indicative** of his willingness to help.
senses.translation: 他的出席表示他愿意帮忙.

senses.definition: adj.漠不关心的,无关紧要的,中立的,中等的
senses.sentence: Crook liked her well enough, but remained **indifferent** to her feminine charms.
senses.translation: 克鲁格还比较喜欢她，只是对她的女性魅力却始终无动于衷。

senses.definition: adj.土生土长的,生来的，固有的,本地的,根生土长
senses.sentence: Each country has its own **indigenous** cultural tradition.
senses.translation: 每个国家都有其自身的文化传统.

senses.definition: adj.愤怒的，愤慨的,愤愤不平的,激愤
senses.sentence: MPs were **indignant** that the government had not consulted them.
senses.translation: 政府没有事先征求他们的意见，下院议员们感到很愤怒。

senses.definition: adj.间接的,不直截了当的,闪烁其词的,不坦率的
senses.sentence: Businesses are feeling the **indirect** effects from the recession that'sgoing on elsewhere.
senses.translation: 企业感受到了别处经济衰退带来的间接影响。

senses.definition: adj.不可缺少的,绝对必要的,责无旁贷的,不可避开的
senses.sentence: He is **indispensable** to our work, we cannot do it without him.
senses.translation: 对于我们的工作来说,他是不可缺少的,没有他, 我们就做不了.

senses.definition: n.个人,个体
senses.sentence: This was a matter for decision by the **individual**.
senses.translation: 这件事需要个人自己决定。

senses.definition: adj.室内的，户内的,在室内使用的,待在家里的,救济院内的
senses.sentence: If the weather is wet or cold choose an **indoor** activity.
senses.translation: 如果碰上下雨天或是严寒天气，就选择一项室内活动。

senses.definition: vt.引诱,引起,[电]感应,归纳
senses.sentence: He might decide that it is best to **induce** labour.
senses.translation: 他也许决定最好引产。

senses.definition: vt.迁就，纵容,使满足,使（自己）沉溺于,使快乐
senses.sentence: They went into town to **indulge** in some serious shopping.
senses.translation: 他们进城去大肆购物。

senses.definition: adj.工业的，产业的,从事工业的,供工业用的,来自勤劳的
senses.sentence: Its trade and **industrial** policies should be used more ambitiously.
senses.translation: 其贸易和工业政策的适用范围应该扩大。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.（使）工业化
senses.sentence: They wanted to **industrialise** their nation.
senses.translation: 他们想使国家工业化.

senses.definition: vt.& vi.（使）工业化
senses.sentence: The southern part of the country was slow to **industrialize**.
senses.translation: 这个国家的南部工业化进程缓慢。

senses.definition: n.工业,产业（经济词汇）,工业界,勤劳
senses.sentence: We are becoming one of the market leaders in the fashion **industry**.
senses.translation: 我们正在成为时装业的领军者之一。

senses.definition: n.<物>惯性，惰性,迟钝,不活动
senses.sentence: I can't seem to throw off this feeling of **inertia**.
senses.translation: 我好像无法摆脱这种无力的感觉。

senses.definition: adj.不可避免的,必然发生的,<非正>总会发生的,必然发生的事
senses.sentence: Most unions see privatisation as an **inevitable** prelude to job losses.
senses.translation: 大多数工会认为私有化会不可避免地导致失业。

senses.definition: n.婴儿，幼儿,未成年人,初学者，生手
senses.sentence: There was an **infant** squalling in the back of the church.
senses.translation: 有个婴儿在教堂后部大声啼哭。

senses.definition: vt.使受影响，感染,传染，散布病毒，侵染,（电脑病毒）使（电脑的）存储器[数据]受到感染
senses.sentence: He thought they might **infect** others with their bourgeois ideas.
senses.translation: 他认为他们可以用他们的资产阶级思想去影响别人。

senses.definition: adj.传染的,有传染性的,易传染的,有感染力的
senses.sentence: **Infectious** diseases are spreading among many of the flood victims.
senses.translation: 传染病正在遭受洪灾的很多灾民中蔓延。

senses.definition: vt.推断,猜想，推理,暗示,意指
senses.sentence: From this study we can reasonably **infer** that this behaviour is inherited.
senses.translation: 根据这项研究我们可以合理地推断出这种行为是遗传的.

senses.definition: n.推理,推断,推论
senses.sentence: The **inference** I've drawn from his lateness is he overslept.
senses.translation: 从他来晚我得出的结论是他睡过头了.

senses.definition: adj.（质量等）低劣的,下级的，下等的,（位置在）下面的,[植]下位的
senses.sentence: He preferred the company of those who were intellectually **inferior** to himself.
senses.translation: 他喜欢与那些智力水平不如他的人共处。

senses.definition: adj.极大的,无法衡量的, 无限的,无穷尽的
senses.sentence: The whole universe exists eternally in that one **infinite** being.
senses.translation: 整个宇宙在无限的空间中永生。

senses.definition: n.膨胀,通货膨胀,夸张,自命不凡
senses.sentence: Specialists see various reasons for the recent surge in **inflation**.
senses.translation: 专家们认为目前通货膨胀加剧有多种原因。

senses.definition: n.影响,势力,有影响的人（或事物）,[占星学]星力
senses.sentence: The Shropshire landscape was an **influence** on Owen too.
senses.translation: 什罗普郡的风景也对欧文产生了影响。

senses.definition: adj.有影响的,有权势的
senses.sentence: He was one of the most **influential** perfor-mers of modern jazz.
senses.translation: 他是现代爵士乐最有影响力的表演者之一。

senses.definition: vt.通知,使活跃，使充满,预示
senses.sentence: The concept of the Rose continued to **inform** the poet's work.
senses.translation: 玫瑰的概念持续贯穿于诗人的作品中。

senses.definition: n.信息，数据,通知,消息,知识
senses.sentence: The room was quiet; no one volunteered any further **information**.
senses.translation: 房间很安静，无人主动提供更多的信息。

senses.definition: n.红外线
senses.sentence: **Infrared** is widely used in industry and medical science.
senses.translation: 红外线广泛应用于工业和医学科学.

senses.definition: n.基础设施,基础建设
senses.sentence: The **infrastructure**, from hotels to transport, is old and decrepit.
senses.translation: 从宾馆到交通，所有的基础设施都已陈旧失修。

senses.definition: adj.灵巧的,精巧的,设计独特的,有天才的，聪明的
senses.sentence: The director used **ingenious** devices to keep the audience in suspense.
senses.translation: 导演用巧妙手法引起观众的悬念.

senses.definition: n.（混合物的）组成部分,（烹调的）原料,（构成）要素,因素
senses.sentence: The active **ingredient** in some of the mouthwashes was simply detergent.
senses.translation: 某些漱口剂中的有效成分只不过是洗涤剂而已。

senses.definition: vi.居住
senses.sentence: Wild tribes still **inhabit** part of the Philippines.
senses.translation: 菲律宾部分地区仍然居住着一些原始部落.

senses.definition: n.居民，住户,（栖息在某地区的）动物
senses.sentence: Cairo has only thirteen square centimetres of green space for each **inhabitant**.
senses.translation: 开罗居民的人均绿地面积仅13平方厘米。

senses.definition: adj.固有的，内在的,天生
senses.sentence: Mainline feminism was arguing for the **inherent** beauty of the natural woman.
senses.translation: 主流女权主义思想倡导女性天生的自然美。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.继承
senses.sentence: They are to **inherit** 100,000 US dollars.
senses.translation: 他们将会继承10万美元。

senses.definition: v.抑制,禁止
senses.sentence: It could **inhibit** the poor from getting the medical care they need.
senses.translation: 那会使穷人得不到他们所需要的医疗保健。

senses.definition: adj.最初的,开始的,首字母的
senses.sentence: They learnt a lot from the **initial** market testing exercise.
senses.translation: 他们从最初的市场测试中了解了许多信息。

senses.definition: vt.开始，发起,传授,创始，开辟,接纳新成员
senses.sentence: A language teacher should **initiate** pupils into the elements of grammar.
senses.translation: 语言老师应该把基本语法教给学生.

senses.definition: n.主动性,主动精神,倡议,主动权
senses.sentence: The government now hopes to seize the **initiative** on education.
senses.translation: 如今政府希望抓住教育上的主动权。

senses.definition: vt.（给…）注射（药物等）,（给…）注射（液体）,（给…）添加,（给…）投入（资金）
senses.sentence: The result might **inject** more sense into future bargaining.
senses.translation: 其结果可能为未来的谈判注入更多的理性。

senses.definition: vt.损害，毁坏,伤害（名誉、自尊等）,（尤指事故中）伤害,伤害（感情，自尊心等）
senses.sentence: I can say, with absolute truthfulness, that I did not **injure** her.
senses.translation: 我可以绝对坦率地说，我没有伤害她。

senses.definition: n.伤害，损害,受伤处,伤害的行为
senses.sentence: The victim suffered a dreadful **injury** and lost a lot of blood.
senses.translation: 受害者受了重伤，大量失血。

senses.definition: adj.内地的，内陆的,国内的
senses.sentence: There are interesting hikes **inland**, but most ramblers stick to the clifftops.
senses.translation: 内陆地区有一些很有意思的徒步远足路线，但多数徒步者都去爬悬崖陡壁。

senses.definition: n.小旅馆，客栈,小饭店，小酒馆
senses.sentence: A shuttle bus runs frequently between the **Inn** and the Country Club.
senses.translation: 一辆区间公交车频繁地往返于这家旅馆和那个乡村俱乐部。

senses.definition: adj.内部的，内心的,精神的,秘密的
senses.sentence: When he heard these words, Shinran felt his **inner** doubts melt away.
senses.translation: 听到这番话，欣兰感到他内心的疑虑顿时消散了。

senses.definition: adj.无辜的，无罪的,清白的,天真无邪的,无知的
senses.sentence: He was **innocent** and the victim of a frame-up.
senses.translation: 他是清白的，是受人诬陷的。

senses.definition: n.改革，创新,新观念,新发明,新设施
senses.sentence: The vegetarian burger was an **innovation** which was rapidly exported to Britain.
senses.translation: 素食汉堡是一种迅速传到了英国的新开发食品。

senses.definition: adj.无数的，数不清的,指不胜屈,不可胜数,无可胜数
senses.sentence: **Innumerable** books have been written on the subject.
senses.translation: 已经有无数书籍写过这个主题。

senses.definition: n.输入，投入,输入电路,<电>输入端,输入的数据
senses.sentence: Edit the **input** text and re-run the software.
senses.translation: 修改输入的文本，重新运行软件。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.打听，询问,查究
senses.sentence: Inspectors were appointed to **inquire** into the affairs of the company.
senses.translation: 督查员受委派调查该公司的事务。

senses.definition: n.调查，审查,询问，质问，质询，追究,探究,打听
senses.sentence: The government ordered an independent **inquiry** into the affair.
senses.translation: 政府下令对该事件进行独立调查。

senses.definition: n.虫，昆虫,卑鄙的人,微贱的人，小人
senses.sentence: Chambers' voice droned, maddening as an **insect** around his head.
senses.translation: 钱伯斯一直在他耳边嗡嗡地说个不停，他都快疯了。

senses.definition: adj.感觉迟钝的,（对某事物）无感觉的,（对变化）懵然不知的,不敏感的
senses.sentence: How you can be so **insensitive** absolutely beats me.
senses.translation: 我真搞不懂你怎么会这么麻木。

senses.definition: vt.插入,嵌入,（在文章中）添加,加插
senses.sentence: The newspaper had an **insert** of pages of pictures.
senses.translation: 该报带有数页插图.

senses.definition: adj.里面的，内部的,内幕的,内侧的
senses.sentence: Eventually, you'll learn to cry that on the **inside**.
senses.translation: 终有一天，你会学会让泪往心里流。

senses.definition: n.洞察力，洞悉,直觉，眼光,领悟,顿悟
senses.sentence: He got his first **insight** into how inhumane employers can be.
senses.translation: 他对雇主的冷酷无情第一次有了深刻认识。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.坚持,强调,坚决要求,坚决认为
senses.sentence: They **insist** on tastier chocolate than the anaemic British stuff.
senses.translation: 他们坚持要比淡而无味的英国货味道更好的巧克力。

senses.definition: vt.检查，检验,视察
senses.sentence: They have the right to come in and **inspect** the meter.
senses.translation: 他们有权进来查表。

senses.definition: n.灵感,鼓舞人心的人或事,启发灵感的人（或事物）,吸气
senses.sentence: Powell's unusual journey to high office is an **inspiration** to millions.
senses.translation: 鲍威尔升任高官的不寻常历程对数以百万计的人都是一个激励。

senses.definition: vt.鼓舞,激励,赋予灵感,启迪
senses.sentence: The caves cannot but **inspire** wonder in the beholder.
senses.translation: 这些洞穴让观者无不叹为观止。

senses.definition: vt.安装,安顿，安置,任命,使…正式就职
senses.sentence: Another change that Sue made was to **install** central heating.
senses.translation: 休所作的另一个改变是安装中央供暖系统。

senses.definition: n.安装,装置,永久性军事基地,就职
senses.sentence: **Installation** of the new system will take several days.
senses.translation: 新系统的安装需要几天时间。

senses.definition: n.例子，实例,情况,要求，建议,[法]诉讼手续
senses.sentence: It is not a unique **instance** , but has its counterpart.
senses.translation: 无独有偶.

senses.definition: n.瞬间，顷刻,此刻,当月,速食食品，即溶饮料
senses.sentence: At that **instant** the museum was plunged into total darkness.
senses.translation: 就在那时，博物馆陷入了一片漆黑。

senses.definition: adj.瞬间的,即刻的,猝发的
senses.sentence: Death was **instantaneous** because both bullets hit the heart.
senses.translation: 因为两颗子弹都击中了心脏，所以死亡是瞬间发生的。

senses.definition: adv.代替，顶替,反而,反倒
senses.sentence: **Instead** of complaining about what's wrong, be grateful for what's right.
senses.translation: 别抱怨不好的事，要对美好的事心存感恩。

senses.definition: n.本能，天性,冲动,天资，天才
senses.sentence: Farmers are increasingly losing touch with their **instinct** for managing the land.
senses.translation: 农民正在逐渐丢失经营土地的本领。

senses.definition: n.协会,学会,学院,（教育、专业等）机构
senses.sentence: At the Curtis **Institute** he studied conducting with Fritz Reiner.
senses.translation: 在柯蒂斯学院，他师从弗里茨·赖纳学习指挥。

senses.definition: n.（大学、银行等规模大的）机构,惯例，制度，规定，建立,社会事业机构,<口>名人，名物
senses.sentence: Congress as an **institution** scores low in public opinion polls.
senses.translation: 作为一个公共机构，国会在公众民意调查中得分很低。

senses.definition: vt.教，讲授,教导，指导,通知,命令
senses.sentence: We should **instruct** the passengers what customs regulations are.
senses.translation: 我们应该向乘客说明海关规则是什么.

senses.definition: n.授课,教诲,传授的或获得的知识，课程,[计算机科学]指令
senses.sentence: This technique brings life to **instruction** and eases assimilation of knowledge.
senses.translation: 这一方法给教学带来了活力，也使知识的吸收变得容易了。

senses.definition: n.仪器,手段，工具,乐器,法律文件
senses.sentence: There is an internal circuit breaker to protect the **instrument** from overload.
senses.translation: 内置有断路器，防止设备过载。

senses.definition: adj.乐器的,仪器的,有帮助的,起作用的
senses.sentence: The last track on the CD is an **instrumental**.
senses.translation: CD上的最后一支曲目是一首器乐曲。

senses.definition: vt.使隔离，使孤立,使绝缘，使隔热
senses.sentence: He continues to **insulate** his country from the contagion of foreign ideas.
senses.translation: 他继续使本国远离外来思想的侵袭。

senses.definition: vt.侮辱，凌辱,辱骂,损害
senses.sentence: He felt the smart of their **insult** for many days.
senses.translation: 他受到他们的侮辱后好多天都感到难受.

senses.definition: n.保险，保险业,保险费,预防措施
senses.sentence: She learned her **insurance** had been canceled by Pacific Mutual **Insurance** Company.
senses.translation: 她得知自己的保险已经被太平洋互助保险公司中止了。

senses.definition: vt.保证,确保,为…保险,投保
senses.sentence: Think carefully before you **insure** against accident, sickness and redundancy.
senses.translation: 在为意外事故、疾病与失业投保之前一定要考虑清楚。

senses.definition: adj.完整无缺的，未经触动的，未受损伤的,原封不动的,完好无缺,完好无损
senses.contextMeaning: 完整无缺的，未经触动的，未受损伤的
senses.sentence: Most of the house remains **intact** even after two hundred years.
senses.translation: 虽然过了两百年，这房子的大部分还保持完好。

senses.definition: adj.完整的,积分的,必须的
senses.sentence: Music is an **integral** part of the school's curriculum.
senses.translation: 音乐是这所学校的课程中基本的一环。

senses.definition: vt.使一体化,使整合,使完整,使结合成为整体
senses.sentence: The way Swedes **integrate** immigrants is, she feels, 100% more advanced.
senses.translation: 她觉得瑞典人帮助移民适应当地生活的方式百分百地更为先进。

senses.definition: n.结合,整合,一体化,（不同肤色、种族、宗教信仰等的人的）混合
senses.sentence: With Germany, France has been the prime mover behind closer European **integration**.
senses.translation: 法国与德国一道，一直是更加紧密的欧洲一体化进程的主要推动者。

senses.definition: n.正直，诚实,完整,[计算机]保存,健全
senses.sentence: He inspires affection and respect as a man of unquestionable **integrity**.
senses.translation: 他无可争议的忠诚正直赢得了人们的爱戴和尊敬。

senses.definition: adj.智力的,有才智的,需用智力的,智力发达的
senses.sentence: Without continued learning, graduates will lose their **intellectual** vitality.
senses.translation: 如果不继续学习，毕业生就会失去思想上的活力。

senses.definition: n.智力,聪颖,情报,情报机构
senses.sentence: Too bad he used his **intelligence** for criminal purposes.
senses.translation: 他把聪明都用在了犯罪上，太可惜了。

senses.definition: adj.聪明的,理解力强的,有智力的,[计]智能的
senses.sentence: She was thin and spare, with a sharply **intelligent** face.
senses.translation: 她又高又瘦，一副精明过人的模样。

senses.definition: adj.可理解的，明白易懂的，清楚的
senses.contextMeaning: 可理解的，明白易懂的，清楚的
senses.sentence: The language of Darwin was **intelligible** to experts and non-experts alike.
senses.translation: 达尔文的语言无论对专家还是非专业人士而言都明白易懂。

senses.definition: vt.意欲，计划,为特殊目的而设计,为特定用途而打算,意指或意味
senses.sentence: They **intend** to claim for damages against the three doctors.
senses.translation: 他们打算向那3位医生索要损害赔偿。

senses.definition: adj.热情的，强烈的，紧张的,热烈的，热情的，认真的,[摄]（底片）明暗度强的,有强烈感情（或意见、想法）的
senses.sentence: I felt so self-conscious under Luke's mother's **intense** gaze.
senses.translation: 在卢克母亲审视的目光下，我感到极不自在。

senses.definition: n.强烈,（感情的）强烈程度,强度,烈度
senses.sentence: The most visible sign of the **intensity** of the crisis is unemployment.
senses.translation: 预示危机严重程度的一个最显著的迹象就是失业情况。

senses.definition: adj.加强的，强烈的,[农]精耕细作的,[语]加强语意的,（农业方法）集约的
senses.sentence: There have been **intensive** discussions between the two governments in recent days.
senses.translation: 近几天，双方政府一直在进行紧张的磋商。

senses.definition: n.意图，目的,意向,意义，意旨,[医]愈合
senses.sentence: The president said he had no **intention** of deploying ground troops.
senses.translation: 总统称并不打算部署地面部队。

senses.definition: v.相互作用,互相影响,互动
senses.sentence: After initiation, the youths started to **interact** with the older members.
senses.translation: 入会仪式后，这些小伙子与老成员开始互动。

senses.definition: vt.互换，交换,交替（位置等）,使更叠发生,交替发生
senses.sentence: The **interchange** of ideas illumines the debate.
senses.translation: 思想的交锋使辩论熠熠生辉。

senses.definition: n.兴趣，爱好,利害关系，利益,利息,趣味，感兴趣的事
senses.sentence: **Interest** rates would come down as the recovery gathered pace.
senses.translation: 随着复苏的加速，利率会降下来。

senses.definition: adj.令人感兴趣的，有趣的,引起兴趣的,有趣的,令人关注的
senses.sentence: There are **interesting** hikes inland, but most ramblers stick to the clifftops.
senses.translation: 内陆地区有一些很有意思的徒步远足路线，但多数徒步者都去爬悬崖陡壁。

senses.definition: n.界面,<计>接口,交界面
senses.sentence: The system uses an impressive graphical **interface**.
senses.translation: 这一系统采用了特别好的图形界面。

senses.definition: vi.干预，干涉,调停，排解,妨碍，打扰
senses.sentence: He knew when to leave well alone and when to **interfere**.
senses.translation: 他知道什么时候该适可而止，什么时候该插手干预。

senses.definition: n.干涉，干扰，冲突,介入,妨碍，打扰，阻碍物,冲突，抵触
senses.sentence: The parliament described the decree as **interference** in the republic's internal affairs.
senses.translation: 议会形容此法令为对共和国内政的干涉。

senses.definition: adj.暂时的，临时的,期中的
senses.sentence: This is the half-yearly meeting of the **interim** committee.
senses.translation: 这是临时委员会召开的年中例会。

senses.definition: n.内部,内地,内政,内心
senses.sentence: **Interior** decoration by careful coordination seems to have had its day.
senses.translation: 精心搭配的室内装饰似乎已不再受欢迎了。

senses.definition: adj.中间的，中级的
senses.sentence: This country is now at an **intermediate** stage of development.
senses.translation: 这个国家目前正处于发展的中间阶段.

senses.definition: adj.间歇的,，断断续续的,间歇性
senses.sentence: It's a cold night here, with **intermittent** rain showers and a blustery wind.
senses.translation: 呆在这儿的那天晚上很冷，阵雨不断，还刮着大风。

senses.definition: adj.国内的,内部的,体内的,内心的
senses.sentence: This cuttlefish has a horny **internal** shell like a pen.
senses.translation: 这只乌贼有一个笔状的角质内壳。

senses.definition: adj.国际的,两国（或以上）国家的,超越国界的,国际关系的
senses.sentence: It was his responsibility for foreign affairs that gained him **international** prestige.
senses.translation: 他在负责处理外交事务的过程中赢得了国际声望。

senses.definition: n.互联网
senses.sentence: Postings on the **Internet** can be accessed from anywhere in the world.
senses.translation: 因特网上的帖子在世界任何一个地方都能读到。

senses.definition: vt.解释,理解,诠释，体现,口译
senses.sentence: Historians annotate, check and **interpret** the diary selections.
senses.translation: 历史学家对日记选篇进行加注、核查以及阐释。

senses.definition: n.解释，说明,翻译,表演，演绎,理解
senses.sentence: The opposition Conservative Party put a different **interpretation** on the figures.
senses.translation: 反对党保守党对这些数字提出一番不同的解释。

senses.definition: vi.打断
senses.sentence: Turkin tapped him on the shoulder. "Sorry to **interrupt**, Colonel."
senses.translation: 图尔金拍拍他的肩膀。“不好意思打断您一下，上校。”

senses.definition: n.横断，横切,交叉，相交,交叉点，交叉线,[数]交集
senses.sentence: The policeman regulated traffic at the **intersection**.
senses.translation: 警察在交叉路口指挥交通.

senses.definition: n.间隔,幕间休息,（数学）区间
senses.sentence: The ferry service has restarted after an **interval** of 12 years.
senses.translation: 时隔12年之后，轮渡服务又重新开通了。

senses.definition: vi.阻碍,出面,插嘴,介于…之间
senses.sentence: The Government is doing nothing to **intervene** in the crisis.
senses.translation: 政府没有采取任何行动对这次危机进行干预。

senses.definition: n.接见,采访,面试,会谈
senses.sentence: In the **interview** he gave some grounds for optimism.
senses.translation: 他接受采访时阐述了持乐观态度的理由。

senses.definition: n.被接见者,被访问者
senses.sentence: It is counter-productive to address an **interviewee** in patronizing tones.
senses.translation: 以盛气凌人的语气同面试者讲话将会适得其反。

senses.definition: adj.亲密的，亲近的,私人的，个人的,内部的,直接的
senses.sentence: He surprised me with his **intimate** knowledge of Kierkegaard and Schopenhauer.
senses.translation: 他对克尔恺郭尔与叔本华的深刻了解让我很吃惊。

senses.definition: vt.恐吓，威胁
senses.sentence: Jones had set out to **intimidate** and dominate Paul.
senses.translation: 琼斯开始恐吓并控制保罗。

senses.definition: prep.（表示方向）进入…中,（表示所属）输入,（表示状态）进入…状态,（表示时间）持续到
senses.sentence: I have tried to pack a good deal **into** a few words.
senses.translation: 我尽量言简意赅。

senses.definition: adj.市内的
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **intracity** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【intracity】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: adj.错综复杂的,难理解的,曲折,盘错
senses.sentence: The quilt has pretty, scalloped edges and **intricate** quilting.
senses.translation: 这条被子有漂亮的荷叶饰边，而且绗缝活做得也很精致。

senses.definition: n.密谋，阴谋,私通，奸情
senses.sentence: They spiced their conversations and discussions with **intrigue**.
senses.translation: 他们的谈话和讨论透着些许的神秘。

senses.definition: vt.提出,介绍,引进,作为…的开头
senses.sentence: Britain did not **introduce** compulsory primary education until 1880.
senses.translation: 直到1880年，英国才开始实行初等义务教育。

senses.definition: n.介绍,引言，导言,采用，引进,新采用的东西
senses.sentence: Millions of words have been written about the **introduction** of the euro.
senses.translation: 有关采用欧元的文章已经有很多。

senses.definition: n.直觉,凭直觉感知的知识,直觉力
senses.sentence: I had an **intuition** that something awful was about to happen.
senses.translation: 我直觉感到要出乱子了。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.侵入，侵略,进行侵略,蜂拥而入，挤满,（疾病，声音等）袭来，侵袭
senses.sentence: I don't want to **invade** your private life unnecessarily.
senses.translation: 我不想过多地干涉你的私生活.

senses.definition: adj.无效的,不能成立的,有病的,病人用的
senses.sentence: Margaret resides with her **invalid** mother in a London suburb.
senses.translation: 玛格丽特同她病弱的母亲住在伦敦郊区。

senses.definition: adj.非常宝贵的,无法估计的,无价的,金不换
senses.sentence: The research should prove **invaluable** in the study of linguistics.
senses.translation: 该调查研究在语言学研究领域的重要性应该会得到证实。

senses.definition: vt.发明，创造,虚构
senses.sentence: His father had helped **invent** a whole new way of doing business.
senses.translation: 他父亲帮助创造了一套全新的生意经。

senses.definition: n.发明,发明物,捏造：内心捏造的东西，特指谎言,发明才能
senses.sentence: The new **invention** ensures the beer keeps a full, frothy head.
senses.translation: 这项新发明能保证啤酒始终保持丰富的泡沫。

senses.definition: n.存货清单,财产目录，财产目录的编制,存货总值,清查
senses.sentence: This is a detailed **inventory** of all the jobs to be done.
senses.translation: 这是一张待办事项的详表.

senses.definition: vt.使…前后倒置,使反转
senses.sentence: Place a plate over the cake tin and **invert** it.
senses.translation: 在蛋糕烤模上盖一个盘子，然后将其翻倒过来。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.投资,花费
senses.sentence: She wanted to set up her own company to **invest** in films.
senses.translation: 她想成立自己的公司投资电影。

senses.definition: vt.调查,审查,研究
senses.sentence: He felt impelled to **investigate** further.
senses.translation: 他觉得有必要作进一步调查。

senses.definition: n.投资，投资额,封锁,（时间、精力的）投入,值得买的东西
senses.sentence: **Investment** could dry up and that could cause the economy to falter.
senses.translation: 投资可能会中断，而这会引起经济衰退。

senses.definition: adj.看不见的,不易为视线所见的，隐匿的,无形的（指银行、旅游等服务）,不引人注目的
senses.sentence: The **invisible** trade surplus was £200 million lower than reported.
senses.translation: 无形贸易盈余比报道所称的少2亿英镑。

senses.definition: n.招待，邀请,请柬，请帖,引诱，吸引，诱惑
senses.sentence: Elizabeth had a standing **invitation** to stay with her.
senses.translation: 伊丽莎白受到邀请，可以随时去她家住。

senses.definition: vt.邀请,请求,引诱,招致
senses.sentence: I **invite** every citizen to carefully study the document.
senses.translation: 我请每位市民都仔细研读该文件。

senses.definition: vt.乞灵，祈求,提出或授引…以支持或证明,召鬼,借助
senses.sentence: He has even had the temerity to **invoke** the names of Martin Luther King Jr and Malcolm X in defence of his actions.
senses.translation: 他竟然敢搬出马丁·路德·金和马尔科姆·艾克斯的名字来为自己的行为辩解。

senses.definition: vt.包含,使参与，牵涉,围绕，缠绕,使专心于
senses.sentence: The £85m programme will **involve** an extensive rebranding of the airline.
senses.translation: 这个8,500万英镑的项目将包括全面重塑该航空公司的形象。

senses.definition: n.铁器，铁制品,熨斗，烙铁,坚强,脚镣
senses.sentence: They would have to offer cast-**iron** guarantees to invest in long-term projects.
senses.translation: 他们需提供绝对可靠的担保，才能投资长期项目。

senses.definition: n.反语,讽刺，冷嘲,具有讽刺意味的事,[语]反语法
senses.sentence: She said to him with slight **irony**.
senses.translation: 她略带嘲讽地对他说.

senses.definition: adj.不规则的，不对称的,无规律的,不合规范的，不合法的,不规则变化的
senses.sentence: At least 17 different **irregular** units are engaged in the war.
senses.translation: 至少有17个非正规军部队参战。

senses.definition: adj.不考虑的，不顾的,无关的
senses.sentence: Everyone is treated equally, **irrespective** of race.
senses.translation: 不分种族，每个人都受到公平对待。

senses.definition: adj.不负责任的,不可靠的，缺乏责任心,[法律] 无责任能力的,无需对更高一级权力负责的
senses.sentence: Many people have an **irresponsible** attitude towards marriage and relationships.
senses.translation: 很多人对婚姻与两性关系持一种不负责任的态度。

senses.definition: vt.灌溉,冲洗（伤口）,使清新
senses.sentence: The farmer dug several trenches to **irrigate** the rice fields.
senses.translation: 这个农民挖了好几条沟以灌溉稻田.

senses.definition: vt.刺激，使兴奋,使发怒,使感到不适,使疼痛，使发炎
senses.sentence: Her uncritical acceptance of everything I said began to **irritate** me.
senses.translation: 我说什么她都不论对错一概接受，这倒惹我不耐烦起来。

senses.definition: n.岛，岛屿
senses.sentence: He made it his object in life to find the **island**.
senses.translation: 他把找到那座岛屿当成自己的人生目标。

senses.definition: n.岛，小岛
senses.sentence: After much cogitation, we decided to move to the **Isle** of Wight.
senses.translation: 经过慎重考虑后，我们决定搬到怀特岛去。

senses.definition: vt.使隔离，使孤立,[电]使绝缘,[化]使离析,[微]使细菌分离
senses.sentence: Political influence is being used to shape public opinion and **isolate** critics.
senses.translation: 政治影响正被用来左右公众舆论，使批评家们陷于孤立。

senses.definition: adj.隔离的,孤独的,单独的,偏远的
senses.sentence: Many of the refugee villages are in **isolated** areas.
senses.translation: 很多难民村落都在偏远地区。

senses.definition: n.问题,（报刊的）期，号,发行物,流出
senses.sentence: The key **issue** was whether the four defendants acted dishonestly.
senses.translation: 关键问题是4名被告是否存在欺诈行为。

senses.definition: pron.它,他,正好是所需的,事实[情况]
senses.sentence: English has hurt me a thousand times, but I still regard **it** as my first love.
senses.translation: 英语伤我千百遍，我待英语如初恋。

senses.definition: n.条，条款,项目,一则,一件商品（或物品）
senses.sentence: There was an **item** in the paper about him.
senses.translation: 报纸上有一条关于他的报道。

senses.definition: pron.(it的所有格形式)它的,厥
senses.sentence: The council recently drew fire for **its** intervention in the dispute.
senses.translation: 委员会最近因为介入该起争端而遭到批评。

senses.definition: pron.(it的反身形式),它自己，它本身,自身，本身
senses.sentence: After years of neglect and decline the city was cleaning **itself** up.
senses.translation: 多年的玩忽职守和经济萧条过后，这个城市在进行自我整顿。

senses.definition: n.象牙,象牙制品,象牙色,象牙质
senses.sentence: The rebels have opened the road from Monrovia to the **Ivory** Coast.
senses.translation: 叛乱分子已经开放了从蒙罗维亚到象牙海岸的道路。

senses.definition: n.短上衣，夹克,土豆皮,书籍的护封,文件套，公文夹
senses.sentence: He took his flashlight from his **jacket** pocket and switched it on.
senses.translation: 他从夹克口袋里拿出手电筒，打开开关。

senses.definition: n.监狱,拘留所
senses.sentence: In the end the "bad guys" are caught and sent to **jail**.
senses.translation: 最后，“坏人”都被抓住送进了监狱。

senses.definition: n.果酱,拥挤，挤满,困境,[无线]干扰
senses.sentence: Did she do things like bottling fruit or making **jam**?
senses.translation: 她干过将水果装瓶或做果酱之类的活计吗？

senses.definition: n.一月,[人名] 贾纽厄里
senses.sentence: The club has moved its meeting to Saturday, **January** 22nd.
senses.translation: 俱乐部把会议日期改到1月22号，星期六。

senses.definition: n.日本人，日本国民,日语
senses.sentence: She speaks no **Japanese** and is unfamiliar with **Japanese** culture.
senses.translation: 她不会说日语，也不了解日本文化。

senses.definition: n.罐子,（啤酒）杯,缸,猛然震动
senses.sentence: There's a hairline crack in the rim of that **jar**.
senses.translation: 那只罐子的口沿有条极细的裂缝。

senses.definition: n.下巴,颌,唠叨,狭窄入口
senses.sentence: He thought for a moment, stroking his well-defined **jaw**.
senses.translation: 他摸着自己轮廓分明的下巴想了一会儿。

senses.definition: n.爵士乐，爵士舞（曲）
senses.sentence: Page is well versed in many styles of **jazz**.
senses.translation: 佩奇精通多种风格的爵士乐。

senses.definition: adj.妒忌的,羡慕的,精心守护的,吃醋的
senses.sentence: I worked myself into frenzy plotting ways to make him **jealous**.
senses.translation: 我绞尽脑汁，处心积虑，就是为了让他嫉妒。

senses.definition: n.牛仔裤,瘦腿紧身裤
senses.sentence: Leather **jeans** that are too big will make you look larger.
senses.translation: 过于肥大的皮裤会让你看起来块头更大。

senses.definition: n.喷嘴，喷雾,喷气式飞机,喷射流,煤玉
senses.sentence: As he talked, an airforce **jet** screamed over the town.
senses.translation: 他谈话时，一架军用喷气式飞机在镇子上空呼啸而过。

senses.definition: n.宝石，宝石饰物,受珍视的人[物],宝贝，手表的宝石轴承
senses.sentence: He spent important money on a small **jewel** for his wife.
senses.translation: 他花大笔钱购买小小的宝石给太太.

senses.definition: n.首饰，饰物,等于jewelry,珍宝
senses.sentence: A thousand pounds worth of **jewellery** and silver has been stolen.
senses.translation: 价值1,000英镑的珠宝和银饰被盗。

senses.definition: n.（一件）工作,职责,职业,（作为一个单元处理的）作业
senses.sentence: The public never had faith in his ability to handle the **job**.
senses.translation: 公众从来不相信他有能力胜任这一职位。

senses.definition: n.轻推，轻摇,慢跑,（线，面上的）参差不齐,突然的转向
senses.sentence: They set off at a **jog** up one street and down another.
senses.translation: 他们开始沿着一条又一条的街道慢跑。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.连接,联结,加入,参加
senses.sentence: Angela says she longs to **join** an amateur dramatics class.
senses.translation: 安杰拉说她渴望参加业余戏剧班。

senses.definition: adj.共同的，联合的,共享的,两院的,连带的，共同的
senses.sentence: They had come to the world's most famous pick-up **joint**.
senses.translation: 他们来到了全世界最有名的寻花问柳之地。

senses.definition: n.笑话，玩笑,笑柄，笑料
senses.sentence: Chinese waiters stood in a cluster, sharing a private **joke**.
senses.translation: 华人服务生们站在一起，讲着只有他们自己才懂的笑话。

senses.definition: n.日报，日志，日记,定期刊物，期刊，杂志,[会计]分类账
senses.sentence: A Wall Street **Journal** editorial encapsulated the views of many conservatives.
senses.translation: 《华尔街日报》的一篇社论概述了很多保守派人士的观点。

senses.definition: n.新闻工作者，新闻记者,记日志者
senses.sentence: A **journalist** all his life, he's now brought out a book.
senses.translation: 他当了一辈子新闻记者，如今已出了一本书。

senses.definition: n.旅行，旅程行期,历程，过程
senses.sentence: Powell's unusual **journey** to high office is an inspiration to millions.
senses.translation: 鲍威尔升任高官的不寻常历程对数以百万计的人都是一个激励。

senses.definition: n.高兴,喜悦,喜悦,成功
senses.sentence: It was a **joy** to see. It really made my day.
senses.translation: 这太有趣了，真的把我高兴坏了。

senses.definition: n.判断，鉴定，评价，判断,审判，裁判，判决,看法，意见,判断力，见识
senses.sentence: A tide of emotion rose and clouded his **judgement**.
senses.translation: 心头涌起一阵强烈的感情，模糊了他的判断力。

senses.definition: n.判断，鉴定,辨别力，判断力,意见，看法,判决书
senses.sentence: I depended on his companionship and on his **judgment**.
senses.translation: 我信赖他的友情，也相信他的判断。

senses.definition: adj.司法的,法庭的,明断的,公正的
senses.sentence: The process of **judicial** selection was held up to ridicule.
senses.translation: 司法选举的过程成为了笑柄。

senses.definition: n.n.大罐，壶，一大罐（壶）的容量
senses.contextMeaning: n.大罐，壶，一大罐（壶）的容量
senses.sentence: He walked along with a **jug** poised on his head.
senses.translation: 他头上顶着一个水罐,保持着平衡往前走.

senses.definition: n.果汁,肉汁,胃液
senses.sentence: Lemon and lime **juice** were both temporarily out of stock.
senses.translation: 柠檬汁和酸橙汁暂时都缺货。

senses.definition: n.七月
senses.sentence: In **July** 1957, we were married in New York.
senses.translation: 我们于1957年7月在纽约举行了婚礼。

senses.definition: n.连接，接合,会合点，接合点,（公路或铁路的）交叉路口,（电缆等的）主结点
senses.sentence: There's a good British Rail link at Clapham **Junction**.
senses.translation: 在克拉珀姆枢纽站有条很不错的英国铁路线。

senses.definition: n.六月,[女子名]琼，来源于拉丁语，含义是“年轻气盛的六月”（youthful from the name of the month）
senses.sentence: **June** always rhymes with moon in old love songs.
senses.translation: 在老情歌中June总是和moon成韵。

senses.definition: n.（热带）丛林,丛林音乐,乱七八糟的一堆事物,尔虞我诈的环境
senses.sentence: If you make aggression pay, this becomes the law of the **jungle**.
senses.translation: 如果你通过侵略谋取利益，这就成了弱肉强食。

senses.definition: adj.较年幼的，较年小的,三年级的，低年级的,资历较浅的,后进的
senses.sentence: Our doctor diagnosed a throat infection and prescribed antibiotic and **junior** aspirin.
senses.translation: 我们的医生诊断是喉部感染，并且开了一些抗生素和小剂量阿司匹林。

senses.definition: n.废旧物品，破烂物,中国式平底帆船,便宜货，假货,废话，哄骗
senses.sentence: There was no mail except the usual **junk** addressed to the occupier.
senses.translation: 除了寄给业主的常见垃圾信件之外，再没有其他邮件了。

senses.definition: n.陪审团,（展览会，竞赛等的）全体评审员,舆论的裁决,评判委员会
senses.sentence: The **jury** will retire to consider its verdict today.
senses.translation: 陪审团今天将退庭商议裁决结果。

senses.definition: n.正义,公正,法律制裁,审判员，法官
senses.sentence: I too am committing myself to continue the fight for **justice**.
senses.translation: 我本人也保证将继续为正义而战。

senses.definition: n.辩解,无过失,正当的理由
senses.sentence: To me the only **justification** for a zoo is educational.
senses.translation: 对我来说，动物园存在的唯一正当理由是其教育作用。

senses.definition: vt.证明…有理,为…辩护,对…作出解释
senses.sentence: They **justify** every villainy in the name of high ideals.
senses.translation: 他们打着实现远大理想的幌子为他们的每件恶行开脱。

senses.definition: n.青少年,扮演少年角色的演员,少年读物,羽毛未丰的鸟，雏鸟
senses.sentence: an increase in **juvenile** delinquency
senses.translation: 青少年犯罪的增加

senses.definition: adj.厉害的，强烈的,敏锐的，敏捷的,锐利的,热心的
senses.sentence: He had retained a **keen** interest in the progress of the work.
senses.translation: 他对那项工作的进展一直很关心。

senses.definition: vt.保持,保留,遵守,阻止
senses.sentence: Remember, **keep** a positive attitude and good things will happen.
senses.translation: 记住：保持乐观的心态，好事自然会发生。

senses.definition: n.（烧水用的）壶,小汽锅
senses.sentence: I filled the **kettle** while she was talking and plugged it in.
senses.translation: 她说话间，我把水壶灌满并插上了电源。

senses.definition: n.钥匙,（打字机等的）键,关键，线索，秘诀,（音乐的）调
senses.sentence: He unlocked her door and handed her back the **key**.
senses.translation: 他给她打开门锁，并把钥匙交还给她。

senses.definition: n.键盘,琴键,电子琴
senses.sentence: I was expected to familiarise myself with the **keyboard**.
senses.translation: 对我的要求是熟悉键盘。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.踢
senses.sentence: I went to **kick** the ball and I completely missed it.
senses.translation: 我去踢球却踢了个空。

senses.definition: n.<口>小孩,小山羊，小山羊皮制品
senses.sentence: He beat up on my brother's **kid** one time.
senses.translation: 他有一次殴打了我哥的孩子。

senses.definition: vt.诱拐，绑架，劫持,拐骗
senses.sentence: He was charged with the **kidnap** of a 25 year-old woman.
senses.translation: 他被指控绑架一名25岁的女子。

senses.definition: n.肾，肾脏,（可食用的动物的）腰子,脾气，性格
senses.sentence: Liver and **kidney** are particularly rich in vitamin A.
senses.translation: 肝脏和肾脏的维生素A含量尤其丰富。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.杀死…
senses.sentence: Don't try and double-cross me, Taylor, because I'll **kill** you.
senses.translation: 别跟我耍花招，泰勒，要不我会杀了你。

senses.definition: n.千克,公斤
senses.sentence: Apple costs five dollars a **kilogram**.
senses.translation: 苹果每千克5美元.

senses.definition: n.公斤,千克
senses.sentence: She sells her eggs for 12 yuan every **kilogramme**.
senses.translation: 她的鸡蛋以每公斤12元的价格出售.

senses.definition: n.<美>千米，公里
senses.sentence: The scale of this map is one centimeter to the **kilometer**.
senses.translation: 这个地图的比例是用一厘米代表一公里.

senses.definition: n.千米，公里
senses.sentence: Moreau took gold in the five-**kilometre** individual pursuit competition.
senses.translation: 莫罗在个人五公里追逐赛中获得金牌。

senses.definition: n.〈古〉方式，方法,本质，天性,同类,某类
senses.sentence: I don't know why he bothers me with this **kind** of rubbish.
senses.translation: 我不明白他为何用这种烂事来烦我。

senses.definition: n.仁慈，善行,友好的行为
senses.sentence: Build her up with **kindness** and a sympathetic ear.
senses.translation: 用友善和富有同情心的倾听来重拾她的信心。

senses.definition: n.国王,（纸牌中的）老K,（国际象棋的）王,…之王
senses.sentence: The **king**'s indulgence towards his sons angered the business community.
senses.translation: 国王对儿子们的纵容令商界恼火。

senses.definition: n.王国,界,领域
senses.sentence: It was infamous as a **kingdom** of brigands, scoundrels, and slave-traders.
senses.translation: 该地区因土匪、无赖和奴隶贩子猖獗而声名狼藉。

senses.definition: vt.接吻,轻拂,轻微碰撞
senses.sentence: She planted a **kiss** on each of his leathery cheeks.
senses.translation: 她在他粗糙的面颊上左右各吻了一下。

senses.definition: n.衣物和装备,成套用品,配套元件
senses.sentence: Badly-built **kit** cars can be death traps.
senses.translation: 质量低劣的组装车可能会有安全隐患。

senses.definition: n.厨房,厨师
senses.sentence: The study links the main living area to the **kitchen**.
senses.translation: 书房把主要的生活区与厨房连在一起。

senses.definition: n.风筝,鸢（猛禽）,空头支票,光棍
senses.sentence: A boy is flying a **kite** in the piazza.
senses.translation: 一个小男孩在阳台上放风筝.

senses.definition: n.膝,膝盖
senses.sentence: A stiff **knee** following surgery forced her to walk with a limp.
senses.translation: 手术后她的膝盖活动不便，走路时被迫跛行。

senses.definition: n.刀,匕首,刃部,手术刀
senses.sentence: His surgical instruments were a **knife** and a pair of pincers.
senses.translation: 他的外科手术器械是一把刀和一把钳子。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.编织，编结,接合（折骨等）,使皱起，使皱紧,使紧密相联
senses.sentence: Events over the last year have created a close-**knit** community.
senses.translation: 去年发生的一些事让整个社会紧密团结在一起。

senses.definition: n.球形把手,（收音机等的）旋钮,小块,疙瘩
senses.sentence: Top the steaming hot potatoes with a **knob** of butter.
senses.translation: 在冒热气的马铃薯上放一小块黄油。

senses.definition: n.短促的敲打（声）,爆震声,敲击声,敲门（或窗等）声
senses.sentence: What they said was a real **knock** to my self-confidence.
senses.translation: 他们的话是对我自信心的一次重大打击。

senses.definition: n.结，绳结，结节，（装饰用的）花结，蝴蝶结,[航]节(=浬/小时)，浬，海里,（树木或木材上的）节疤，（人或动物身上的）硬块，节，瘤,难事，难题，麻烦事，（问题的）要点，（戏剧，小说的）情节的征结
senses.contextMeaning: 结，绳结，结节，（装饰用的）花结，蝴蝶结
senses.sentence: Len tied the **knot** with Kate five years ago.
senses.translation: 莱恩5年前和凯特结婚了。

senses.definition: v.知道,了解,认识,确信
senses.sentence: We all **know** that fats spoil by becoming rancid.
senses.translation: 我们都知道油脂变质后会发臭。

senses.definition: n.了解，理解,知识（表示多方面的知识时有复数knowledges这一用法）,学科,见闻
senses.sentence: Father had no more than a superficial **knowledge** of music.
senses.translation: 父亲对音乐只懂一点皮毛。

senses.definition: n.实验室，研究室,Lab,英国政治工党,分析室,暗室
senses.sentence: The **lab** has recently been updated to allow for more advanced courses.
senses.translation: 实验室最近经过更新，可以上更高阶的课程了。

senses.definition: n.标签,称标记，符号,[建] 门或窗户上面的线脚
senses.sentence: "Eat before JULY 14" was stamped on the **label**.
senses.translation: 标签上盖有“7月14日前食用”的戳记。

senses.definition: n.劳动,努力,工作,劳工
senses.sentence: The trading day is shortened in observance of the **Labor** Day holiday.
senses.translation: 因庆祝劳工节，这个交易日交易时间缩短了。

senses.definition: n.实验室,实验课,研究室,药厂
senses.sentence: This was demonstrated in a **laboratory** experiment with rats.
senses.translation: 在实验室用老鼠进行的实验证明了这一点。

senses.definition: n.劳动,劳工,分娩，临产阵痛,工作，活计
senses.sentence: The Independent **Labour** Party was founded in Bradford on January 13, 1893.
senses.translation: 独立工党1893年1月13日在布拉德福德成立。

senses.definition: n.蕾丝,透孔织品,鞋带,系带
senses.sentence: I am wearing a plaid nightgown trimmed with white **lace**.
senses.translation: 我穿着一件带有白色蕾丝花边的格子呢睡衣。

senses.definition: vt.缺乏，缺少,需要的东西
senses.sentence: Despite his **lack** of experience, he got the job.
senses.translation: 他虽然经验不足，但还是获得了这份工作。

senses.definition: n.少年，小伙子,〈口〉伙伴，老朋友,〈英〉管赛马房的马夫,〈俚〉情人
senses.sentence: Come along, **lad**. Time for you to get home.
senses.translation: 来吧，小伙子。你该回家了。

senses.definition: n.梯子，阶梯,梯状物,途径,（紧身裤袜或长筒袜的）滑丝
senses.sentence: Two men were on the bridge-deck, steadying a **ladder**.
senses.translation: 两名男子在船桥甲板上扶着一架梯子不让它摇晃。

senses.definition: n.（指成年女子，有些人尤其是长者认为这样说比较礼貌）女士,（不尊重的非正式称呼）女人,（在英国对女贵族或贵族成员的妻子女儿或爵士妻子的称呼）夫人,举止文雅且有教养的女子
senses.contextMeaning: （指成年女子，有些人尤其是长者认为这样说比较礼貌）女士
senses.sentence: In the past he dallied with actresses and **lady** novelists.
senses.translation: 他过去曾与许多女演员和女小说家调情。

senses.definition: adj.<过时，褒>贵妇人似的
senses.sentence: She crossed the room with quick, **ladylike** steps.
senses.translation: 她迈着淑女步快速穿过房间。

senses.definition: vi.走得极慢，落后
senses.sentence: As conceit makes one **lag** behind, so modesty helps one make progress.
senses.translation: 骄傲使人落后, 谦虚使人进步.

senses.definition: n.羔羊，小羊,羔羊肉,<宗>耶稣
senses.sentence: You should have prepared something other than **lamb** and ratatouille.
senses.translation: 除了羊肉和蔬菜杂烩之外，你本应再准备点儿别的。

senses.definition: adj.跛的，瘸的,僵痛的,差劲的，无说服力的,蹩脚的
senses.sentence: He mumbled some **lame** excuse about having gone to sleep.
senses.translation: 他含含糊糊地找了个蹩脚的借口，想要解释自己为什么睡着了。

senses.definition: n.灯,发热灯，照射灯
senses.sentence: I used my thumbnail to tighten the screw on my **lamp**.
senses.translation: 我用拇指指甲把台灯上的螺钉拧紧了。

senses.definition: n.陆地,国家,地产,土地
senses.sentence: Harry inherited the house and a sizeable chunk of **land**.
senses.translation: 哈里继承了这座房子以及相当大的一片土地。

senses.definition: n.女房东,女地主,（旅店或寄宿舍的）女店主
senses.sentence: I heard my **landlady** creeping stealthily up to my door.
senses.translation: 我听到我的女房东偷偷地来到我的门前.

senses.definition: n.房东，地主,店主
senses.sentence: The **landlord** refused to serve him because he considered him too drunk.
senses.translation: 酒吧老板觉得他已经喝多了，拒绝再给他添酒。

senses.definition: n.风景,风景画,乡村风景画,地形
senses.sentence: Wind turbines are large and noisy and they disfigure the **landscape**.
senses.translation: 风力涡轮机个头大、噪音响，还会破坏周边风景。

senses.definition: n.小路，小巷,航道，空中走廊，规定的单向行车道,车道,[篮球]罚球区
senses.sentence: The lorry was travelling at 20mph in the slow **lane**.
senses.translation: 卡车在慢车道上以20英里的时速行驶。

senses.definition: n.语言，语言文字,表达能力,言语，语风，文风，文体,专门用语，术语
senses.sentence: The Ukrainians speak a Slavonic **language** similar to Russian.
senses.translation: 乌克兰人所说的那种斯拉夫语系的语言类似于俄语。

senses.definition: n.灯笼,灯塔,灯罩,灯饰
senses.sentence: I've been thinking I'd better have asked for a **lantern**.
senses.translation: 我一直认为我还不如要一个灯笼呢.

senses.definition: vt.折叠,包裹，缠绕,使搭接,磨亮，磨平
senses.sentence: We don't live in the **lap** of luxury, but we're comfortable.
senses.translation: 我们的生活虽然并非锦衣玉食，也算是衣食无忧。

senses.definition: n.小错，疏忽,行为失检，失足,流逝,[法]（权利等的）失效，消失
senses.sentence: He knew that he might soon **lapse** into unconsciousness.
senses.translation: 他知道自己可能很快就会失去知觉。

senses.definition: n.便携式电脑
senses.sentence: She used to work at her **laptop** until four in the morning.
senses.translation: 她从前经常用手提电脑一直工作到凌晨4点。

senses.definition: adv.大部分地，主要地,大规模地,丰富地
senses.sentence: It is a part of Britain as yet **largely** unaccustomed to tourists.
senses.translation: 英国的这一块地方还很不为游客所熟悉。

senses.definition: n.激光,激光器，镭射器
senses.sentence: He made contact with someone with an idea for reconditioning **laser** copiers.
senses.translation: 他联系了一个会修理激光复印机的人。

senses.definition: n.鞭挞，鞭子,责骂,讽刺,眼睫毛
senses.sentence: Never before had he felt the full **lash** of John's temper.
senses.translation: 他以前从未见识过约翰如此暴烈的脾气.

senses.definition: adj.晚的，迟到的,时间不早的,已故的,原来的，之前的,临近终了的
senses.sentence: Most **late** developers will catch up with their friends.
senses.translation: 大多数身材发育迟缓者都会赶上他们的朋友。

senses.definition: adv.近来，最近,不久以前
senses.sentence: **Lately**, the president has been sacking and picking new ministers at whim.
senses.translation: 最近，总统一时兴起频频解雇旧部长，选任新部长。

senses.definition: adj.潜在的,潜伏的,休眠的,潜意识的
senses.sentence: These children have a huge reserve of **latent** talent.
senses.translation: 这些孩子蕴藏着极大的潜在天赋。

senses.definition: adv.较晚地,以后，过后,后来,随后
senses.sentence: I hate to rush you but I have another appointment **later** on.
senses.translation: 我真不想催你，但我稍后还有一个约会。

senses.definition: adj.侧面的,横向的,[语]边音的
senses.sentence: It may be caused by lack of compressive loads in the **lateral** trochanter in daily activity.
senses.translation: 这可能是由于日常活动减少导致外侧大转子的压力载荷减少。

senses.definition: n.拉丁文,拉丁语，拉丁文学,拉丁美洲人,拉丁姆人
senses.sentence: Above its doors was a **Latin** inscription: Non omnia possumus omnes.
senses.translation: 门的上方刻有拉丁文铭“人非万能”。

senses.definition: n.纬度,范围,[天]黄纬
senses.sentence: He would be given every **latitude** in forming a new government.
senses.translation: 他将可以不受任何限制地组建新政府。

senses.definition: adj.后者的,末了的,较后的
senses.sentence: He holds the belief that he is a **latter**-day prophet.
senses.translation: 他深信自己是当代先知。

senses.definition: vi.笑,发笑,嘲笑,（特别表示因成功而）处于有利地位
senses.sentence: Do not hesitate to **laugh** at anything you find amusing.
senses.translation: 只要觉得好笑就尽管笑。

senses.definition: n.笑，笑声,〈古〉好笑的事,〈美俚〉力量悬殊得可笑的体育比赛,大笑
senses.sentence: Behind the mocking **laughter** lurks a growing sense of unease.
senses.translation: 嘲笑声的背后潜伏着一种越来越强烈的不安。

senses.definition: vt.发射,[计算机]开始（应用程序）,发动,开展（活动、计划等）
senses.sentence: A series of technical foul-ups delayed the **launch** of the new product.
senses.translation: 一系列技术问题延误了新产品的上市。

senses.definition: n.洗衣店，洗衣房,洗好的衣服,待洗的衣服,洗熨
senses.sentence: She could ring for food and drink, **laundry** and sundry services.
senses.translation: 她可以打电话点餐，叫人来取要洗的衣服以及叫其他各种服务。

senses.definition: n.熔岩,火山岩
senses.sentence: The ground had opened to disgorge a boiling stream of molten **lava**.
senses.translation: 大地开裂，汩汩冒出炽热的熔岩。

senses.definition: n.草地，草坪,上等细麻布
senses.sentence: The windows overlooked a **lawn** of tall waving grass.
senses.translation: 窗户外边是一块草地，高高的草随风摇摆。

senses.definition: n.律师，法学家
senses.sentence: The **lawyer** looked impassively at him and said nothing.
senses.translation: 律师面无表情地看着他，什么都没说。

senses.definition: vt.放置,铺放,涂，敷,产卵
senses.sentence: On Sunday Cohen **lay** around the house all day.
senses.translation: 科恩星期天一整天都在家无所事事。

senses.definition: n.层，层次,膜,[植]压条,放置者，计划者
senses.sentence: Chemicals form a protective **layer** that resists both oil and water-based stains.
senses.translation: 化学物质形成了一个抗油污和水渍的保护层。

senses.definition: n.门外汉，外行,俗人,一般信徒
senses.sentence: These technical terms are difficult for the **layman** to understand.
senses.translation: 这些专门术语是外行人难以理解的.

senses.definition: n.停工，停止活动,临时解雇,操作停止,失业期
senses.sentence: His card joined the small pile of those spared from the **layoff**.
senses.translation: 他的登记卡被放到那一小叠免于被裁的人的卡片里面.

senses.definition: n.布局，安排，设计,布置图，规划图
senses.sentence: This boat has a good deck **layout** making everything easy to operate.
senses.translation: 这艘船的甲板布局合理，使得所有操控都很方便。

senses.definition: adj.懒惰的,没精打采的,慢吞吞的
senses.sentence: **Lazy** and incompetent police officers are letting the public down.
senses.translation: 懒惰兼无能的警官令公众失望。

senses.definition: vi.领导,导致,用水砣测深
senses.sentence: The group proceeded with a march they knew would **lead** to bloodshed.
senses.translation: 这个团体继续示威游行，他们知道这将导致流血事件的发生。

senses.definition: n.领导,领导的才能或能力,一群领导者,带路，指引
senses.sentence: Yet it is feared the Republican **leadership** could split over the agreement.
senses.translation: 但有人担心，共和党的领导层可能会在该协议上出现意见分歧。

senses.definition: adj.重要的，主要的,前列的,首位的
senses.sentence: Britain's future as a **leading** industrial nation depends on investment.
senses.translation: 作为一个主要工业国英国的未来要倚赖投资。

senses.definition: n.叶子,页,叶状的结构,金属薄片
senses.sentence: Fortunately, the chore of **leaf** sweeping is well worth the effort.
senses.translation: 幸运的是，干清扫落叶这个活儿是值得的。

senses.definition: n.传单，散页印刷品,小叶，嫩叶,复叶的一片,叶状器官
senses.sentence: The **leaflet** explains how to complain to the banking ombudsman.
senses.translation: 这份传单介绍了如何向银行意见调查官投诉。

senses.definition: n.联盟,社团,（运动）联合会、联赛,里格（长度单位，约等于 3 英里）
senses.sentence: His pitching was a legend among major **league** hitters.
senses.translation: 他的投球在大联盟的击球员中是个传奇。

senses.definition: n.泄漏，漏洞,裂缝,漏出物,（俚语）撒尿
senses.sentence: The yacht has sprung a **leak** in the hull.
senses.translation: 帆船的船体上出现了一条裂缝。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.（使）倾斜，屈身
senses.sentence: She was feeling tired and was glad to **lean** against him.
senses.translation: 她正感到有些疲倦，因此很高兴可以靠在他身上。

senses.definition: vi.跳,冲动的行动
senses.sentence: Warwicks **leap** to third in the table, 31 points behind leaders Essex.
senses.translation: 沃里克队在排名中蹿升至第3名，落后领先的埃塞克斯队31分。

senses.definition: vi.学习,获知
senses.sentence: No matter where you go in life or how old you get, there's always something new to **learn** about. After all, life is full of surprises.
senses.translation: 不管你生活在哪里，你有多少岁，总有新东西要学习，毕竟，生活总是充满惊喜。

senses.definition: adj.有学问的,博学的,学术上的,精通某门学问的
senses.sentence: She **learned** to draw by tracing pictures out of old storybooks.
senses.translation: 她通过描摹旧故事书上的图画学会了画画。

senses.definition: n.学问，学术，知识
senses.sentence: Both he and the crew are on a steep **learning** curve.
senses.translation: 他和组员们都学得很快。

senses.definition: n.租约,租契,租赁物,租赁权
senses.sentence: When the **lease** ran out the family moved to Campigny.
senses.translation: 租约到期后，这家人搬到了坎皮格尼。

senses.definition: adj.最小的,最少的（little的最高级）,最不重要的，地位最低的
senses.sentence: He is the **least** appealing character, to me at any rate.
senses.translation: 他是其中最没有吸引力的角色，至少对我来说是这样。

senses.definition: n.皮，皮革,皮革制品
senses.sentence: He drummed his fingers on the **leather** top of his desk.
senses.translation: 他用手指连续敲击他的皮革桌面。

senses.definition: n.演讲,训斥，教训
senses.sentence: Our captain gave us a stern **lecture** on safety.
senses.translation: 船长就安全问题严厉地训斥了我们一顿。

senses.definition: adj.左边的，左侧的,左派的
senses.sentence: She dusted herself down and **left** to build her own career.
senses.translation: 她重振旗鼓去开创自己的事业了。

senses.definition: n.腿,支柱，支架,裤腿,一段赛程
senses.sentence: First he kicked the left **leg**, then he kicked the right.
senses.translation: 他先踢左腿，然后踢右腿。

senses.definition: adj.法律的,合法的,法定的,法律（上）的
senses.sentence: She was the only woman in Shell's **legal** department.
senses.translation: 她是壳牌公司法律事务部唯一的女性。

senses.definition: n.传说,传奇人物,铭文,图例
senses.sentence: His pitching was a **legend** among major league hitters.
senses.translation: 他的投球在大联盟的击球员中是个传奇。

senses.definition: n.立法，制定法律,法律，法规
senses.sentence: They think that any **legislation** that involved putting down dogs was wrong.
senses.translation: 他们认为任何涉及捕杀狗的立法都是错误的。

senses.definition: adj.合法的，合理的,正规的,合法婚姻所生的,真正的，真实的
senses.sentence: The empire could not cohere as a **legitimate** whole.
senses.translation: 这个帝国无法凝聚成一个合法的整体。

senses.definition: n.空闲时间,闲暇,悠闲,安逸
senses.sentence: The **Leisure** Center is a long and low modern building.
senses.translation: 休闲中心是一个狭长而低矮的现代建筑。

senses.definition: vt.把…借给,贷（款）,贡献，给予,适于
senses.sentence: Stipe attended yesterday's news conference to **lend** his support.
senses.translation: 斯蒂普出席了昨天的新闻发布会以示支持。

senses.definition: n.长度，长,时间的长短,（语）音长,一段，一节
senses.sentence: Strangely enough, you will automatically wake up after this **length** of time.
senses.translation: 奇怪的是，过了这样一段时间你就会自己醒来。

senses.definition: n.透镜，镜头,眼睛中的水晶体,隐形眼镜,汽车的灯玻璃
senses.sentence: The autoexposure button is awkwardly placed under the **lens** release button.
senses.translation: 自动曝光按钮安装在镜头脱卸按钮下面，十分不便。

senses.definition: adj.较少的（little的比较级）,较小的,较次的，较劣的,较不重要的
senses.sentence: These files have been zipped up to take up **less** disk space.
senses.translation: 这些文档已经进行了压缩，以节省磁盘空间。

senses.definition: n.教训，训诫,功课,课程，一堂课,[宗]日课
senses.sentence: It was the quickest swimming **lesson** I'd ever witnessed.
senses.translation: 这是我所见过的最速成的游泳课。

senses.definition: 允许，任由,让，随,假设,出租
senses.sentence: Well, at any rate, **let** me thank you for all you did.
senses.translation: 好吧，不管怎样，还是要感谢你所做的一切。

senses.definition: n.信,证书，许可证,字母，文字,字面意义
senses.sentence: The things that stuck out were his cockiness and his four-**letter** words.
senses.translation: 与众不同之处在于他的骄傲自大和满嘴脏话。

senses.definition: n.水平，水准,水平线，水平面,水平仪,[物]电平
senses.sentence: Solid low-**level** waste will be disposed of deep underground.
senses.translation: 放射性水平低的固体废料将做地下深埋处理。

senses.definition: n.杠杆,操作杆,工具
senses.sentence: Press the **lever** until you hear the catch engage.
senses.translation: 压下挡杆，直到听到挡挂好。

senses.definition: n.征兵,征税
senses.sentence: A direct food **levy** was imposed by the local government.
senses.translation: 地方政府征收了食品税.

senses.definition: n.责任,倾向,债务,<口>妨碍
senses.sentence: The company cannot accept **liability** for any damage caused by natural disasters.
senses.translation: 该公司对自然灾害造成的任何损失概不承担责任。

senses.definition: adj.有责任的,有义务的,有…倾向的,易…的
senses.sentence: Offenders will be **liable** to a seven-year prison term.
senses.translation: 违犯者可判处7年监禁。

senses.definition: n.自由主义者,自由党党员
senses.sentence: The attitude of the medical profession is very much more **liberal** now.
senses.translation: 现在，医务人员的态度开明多了。

senses.definition: n.自由,许可权,放肆，无礼,解放，释放
senses.sentence: He firmly believes **liberty** is inseparable from social justice.
senses.translation: 他坚信自由与社会正义是不可分的。

senses.definition: n.图书管理员,[计算机]库管理程序
senses.sentence: The old **librarian** illuminated some old books and manuscripts.
senses.translation: 这个老图书馆员把一些古书和旧抄稿加上各种装饰.

senses.definition: n.图书馆，藏书楼,藏书,书屋，书斋,图书出租处
senses.sentence: Other amenities, less commonly available, include a **library** and exercise room.
senses.translation: 还有一些不太常有的设施，包括图书馆和健身房。

senses.definition: n.许可,许可证,放纵,放荡
senses.sentence: The painting was returned to Spain on a temporary import **licence**.
senses.translation: 这幅画凭着临时进口许可证被送回了西班牙。

senses.definition: n.许可证，执照,特许
senses.sentence: The government revoked her husband's **license** to operate migrant labor crews.
senses.translation: 政府撤销了她丈夫管理外来打工人群的许可证。

senses.definition: vt.舔,<口>打败
senses.sentence: You'll have four months in which to **lick** the recruits into shape.
senses.translation: 你将有4个月的时间把这些新兵训练出来。

senses.definition: n.盖子,限制,[口]果盖,[口]遮盖
senses.sentence: The **lid**, turned upside down, served as a coffee table.
senses.translation: 那个盖子被翻过来当作咖啡桌。

senses.definition: v.躺,坐落在,处于…状态,说谎
senses.sentence: **Lie** face upwards with a cushion under your head.
senses.translation: 头枕垫子仰卧。

senses.definition: n.生活，生计,生命，性命,一生，寿命,人生，尘世
senses.sentence: If you love **life**, **life** will love you back.
senses.translation: 热爱生活，生活也会厚爱你。(Arthur Rubinstein)

senses.definition: n.一生，寿命,有生之年,存在期，有效期
senses.sentence: Say's writings reached a wide audience during his **lifetime**.
senses.translation: 在塞伊有生之年，他的作品拥有大量的读者。

senses.definition: n.电梯,举起,起重机,搭车
senses.sentence: The **lift** started off, juddered, and went out of action.
senses.translation: 电梯开动了，接着剧烈震颤起来，然后就毫无反应了。

senses.definition: n.光,发光体,电灯,点火器
senses.sentence: The company manufactures a range of innovative **light**-weight cycles.
senses.translation: 这家公司生产一系列的新型轻便自行车。

senses.definition: adj.闪电般的，快速的
senses.sentence: It was unbelievably dramatic as **lightning** crackled all round the van.
senses.translation: 闪电在货车周围炸开时，情景异常壮观。

senses.definition: vt.喜欢,（与would 或 should 连用表示客气）想,想要,喜欢做
senses.sentence: I thought you might **like** to read the enclosed.
senses.translation: 我想你或许想要读一下信封里的内容。

senses.definition: n.可能，可能性,[数]似然，似真
senses.sentence: He faces growing unease among the Democrats about the **likelihood** of war.
senses.translation: 他面临民主党内对可能出现的战事不断滋长的不满情绪。

senses.definition: adv.可能,或许,大概,多半
senses.sentence: The fires are **likely** to permanently deforest the land.
senses.translation: 这些火灾很可能会彻底毁掉这片土地上的森林。

senses.definition: adv.同样地,也，而且
senses.sentence: These requests are ignored. His requests for rent are **likewise** sometimes ignored.
senses.translation: 这些要求被置之不理。他关于支付租金的要求有时也同样未被理睬。

senses.definition: n.肢，翼,大树枝,分支,枝干
senses.sentence: She sat on a **limb** of the tree and looked down.
senses.translation: 她坐在一根大树枝上往下看.

senses.definition: n.限制,限量，限度,界限
senses.sentence: They struggled to **limit** the cost by enforcing a low-tech specification.
senses.translation: 他们通过实施低技术规格拼命限制成本。

senses.definition: n.限制,局限,极限,起限制作用的规则（或事实、条件）
senses.sentence: This drug has one important **limitation**. Its effects only last six hours.
senses.translation: 这种药有一个严重缺陷：它的药力只能持续6个小时。

senses.definition: adj.有限的,（君主权力）受宪法限制的,〈美〉乘客名额有限制的,（智力，能力等）有限的
senses.sentence: Nerve cells have **limited** ability to regenerate if destroyed.
senses.translation: 如果受到损伤，神经细胞再造的能力有限。

senses.definition: n.跛行,挣扎着慢慢前进,（诗的）韵律紊乱
senses.sentence: A stiff knee following surgery forced her to walk with a **limp**.
senses.translation: 手术后她的膝盖活动不便，走路时被迫跛行。

senses.definition: adj.无力的,无生气的,易弯的,松软的
senses.sentence: She was told to reject applicants with **limp** handshakes.
senses.translation: 她被告知要回绝掉那些握手软弱无力的申请者。

senses.definition: n.线条,排,行列,界线
senses.sentence: Elliott crossed the finish **line** just half a second behind his adversary.
senses.translation: 埃利奥特跨过终点线时仅比对手落后半秒钟。

senses.definition: adj.直线的，线形的,长度的,<数>一次的，线性的,通过单独的若干阶段来发展
senses.sentence: In his art he broke the laws of scientific **linear** perspective.
senses.translation: 他在自己的绘画艺术中打破了科学的直线透视法规律。

senses.definition: n.亚麻布，亚麻线,家庭日用织品
senses.sentence: Anna looked tanned and majestic in her **linen** caftan.
senses.translation: 安娜穿着亚麻长袍，衬出其棕色的皮肤，显得十分高贵。

senses.definition: n.班轮，班机,衬垫，衬套,衬里,画线者
senses.sentence: It became impractical to make a business trip by ocean **liner**.
senses.translation: 乘坐远洋班轮进行商务旅行变得不合时宜了。

senses.definition: vi.逗留，徘徊,缓慢消失
senses.sentence: When apartheid is over the maladies will **linger** on.
senses.translation: 废除了种族隔离政策后痼疾依然存在。

senses.definition: adj.语言的,语言学的
senses.sentence: When a book goes into translation, all those **linguistic** subtleties get lost.
senses.translation: 当一部书被翻译成另一种语言后，所有那些语言上的精妙之处就都丢失了。

senses.definition: n.语言学,语言的，语言学的，语言研究的(linguistic的名词复数 )
senses.sentence: These ideas rapidly became the new orthodoxy in **linguistics**.
senses.translation: 这些观点迅速成为语言学中新的正统观念。

senses.definition: n.环，节,[计算机]链接,关联，关系
senses.sentence: He suggested a **link** between class size and test results of seven-year-olds.
senses.translation: 他认为7岁大的学生的测试分数和班级的规模有关系。

senses.definition: n.狮子,名人,[天文学、占星术]狮子（星）座,勇士，名流
senses.sentence: A man-eating **lion** is on the loose somewhere in England.
senses.translation: 英格兰有一头吃人的狮子跑出来了。

senses.definition: n.嘴唇,（杯，壶等的）口，边缘,〈俚〉无理的回答,〈美〉律师
senses.sentence: She had quite severe bruising and a cut **lip**.
senses.translation: 她身上有严重的淤伤，嘴唇也破了。

senses.definition: n.液体,流音
senses.sentence: The hot **liquid** splashed down on the concrete and rebounded.
senses.translation: 滚烫的液体泼在水泥地面上又溅了起来。

senses.definition: n.酒，烈性酒,含酒精饮料
senses.sentence: The federal government hiked the tax on hard **liquor**.
senses.translation: 联邦政府提高了烈性酒的税率。

senses.definition: n.清单，目录,倾斜,布边，布头,狭条
senses.sentence: Every care has been taken in compiling this **list**.
senses.translation: 汇编这份清单时考虑得很充分。

senses.definition: vi.倾听,留心听,听信,（让对方注意）听着
senses.sentence: **Listen** to criticism but don't be crushed by it.
senses.translation: 听取批评意见，但不要被它击垮。

senses.definition: n.[计量] 公升（容量单位）
senses.sentence: Add 20 mg. of diatomaceous earth filter aid per **liter** of solution.
senses.translation: 对每升溶液加入20毫克硅藻土助滤剂.

senses.definition: n.识字,有文化,能读能写,精通文学
senses.sentence: Of course, **literacy** isn't the same thing as intelligence.
senses.translation: 当然，识字和智力是两码事。

senses.definition: adv.逐字地,照字面地,确实地，真正地,[口语]差不多，简直（用于加强语意）
senses.sentence: Until next payday, I was **literally** without any money.
senses.translation: 到下个发薪日前，我真的没有一点儿钱了。

senses.definition: adj.文学（上）的,精通文学的,爱好文学的,从事文学研究（或写作）的
senses.sentence: Her **literary** criticism focuses on the way great literature suggests ideas.
senses.translation: 她的文学批评集中关注的是伟大的文学作品表达思想的方式。

senses.definition: n.文学,文学作品,文献,著作
senses.sentence: He was well acquainted with the **literature** of France, Germany and Holland.
senses.translation: 他对于法国、德国和荷兰的文学了如指掌。

senses.definition: n.（容量单位）升
senses.sentence: New Japanese cars averaged 13 km to the **litre** in 1981.
senses.translation: 1981年，新型的日产汽车平均每升汽油能跑13千米。

senses.definition: n.杂物，垃圾,（一窝）幼崽,褥草,轿，担架
senses.sentence: Wear rubber gloves when handling cat **litter**.
senses.translation: 清理猫粪时要带上橡胶手套。

senses.definition: adj.小的,琐碎的,娇小的,幼小的
senses.sentence: He could just about see the **little** man behind the counter.
senses.translation: 他勉强能看到柜台后面的小个子男人。

senses.definition: adj.充满活力的,活泼的,充满趣味的
senses.sentence: The papers also show a **lively** interest in European developments.
senses.translation: 论文对欧洲的动向亦表现出浓厚的兴趣。

senses.definition: n.肝脏,（食用）肝,深赤褐色,生活者
senses.sentence: **Liver** and kidney are particularly rich in vitamin A.
senses.translation: 肝脏和肾脏的维生素A含量尤其丰富。

senses.definition: n.家畜，牲畜
senses.sentence: Namibian law permits ranchers to shoot cheetahs to protect their **livestock**.
senses.translation: 纳米比亚法律允许农场主射杀猎豹以保护家畜。

senses.definition: adj.活（着）的,现存的,在使用中的,逼真的
senses.sentence: If you're not satisfied with the life you're **living**, don't just complain. Do something about it.
senses.translation: 对于现况的不满，不能只是抱怨，要有作出改变。

senses.definition: n.负荷,负担,装载,工作量
senses.sentence: An efficient bulb may lighten the **load** of power stations.
senses.translation: 一个节能灯泡也许就能减轻发电站的负荷。

senses.definition: n.一条（块）面包
senses.sentence: Pick up a quart of milk or a **loaf** of bread.
senses.translation: 拿1夸脱牛奶或一条面包。

senses.definition: n.贷款,借款,借用
senses.sentence: Frankly, Thomas, this question of your **loan** is beginning to worry me.
senses.translation: 老实讲，托马斯，你贷款的问题开始让我担心了。

senses.definition: n.门厅，大厅,休息室,游说团,投票厅
senses.sentence: Council tenants around the country are planning a mass **lobby** of Parliament.
senses.translation: 全国各地的市政住房租户正在计划组建一个大的议会游说团。

senses.definition: adj.地方的,当地的，本地的,局部的,褊狭的
senses.sentence: They drink bitter on draught in the **local** bar.
senses.translation: 他们在当地的酒吧里喝桶装的苦啤酒。

senses.definition: n.位置,地区,产地
senses.sentence: He surprised us with his knowledge of the **locality**.
senses.translation: 我们很惊讶他对那地方如此了解.

senses.definition: vt.位于,说出来源,查找…的地点,确定…的位置
senses.sentence: Rescue teams are using thermal imaging to **locate** survivors of the earthquake.
senses.translation: 救援队伍正利用热成像确定地震幸存者的位置。

senses.definition: n.位置，场所,定位,外景（拍摄地）
senses.sentence: The first duty of a director is to recce his **location**.
senses.translation: 主管的第一项任务是熟悉所在地区的情况。

senses.definition: n.锁,水闸，船闸,（机器部件等的）锁定,一把，一撮
senses.sentence: That key will come in handy if you **lock** yourself out.
senses.translation: 要是你把自己锁在了屋外，那把钥匙就派上用场了。

senses.definition: n.寄物柜,上锁的人,小橱,冷藏间
senses.sentence: At the swimming pool I put my clothes in a **locker**.
senses.translation: 在游泳池我把衣服锁在小柜里.

senses.definition: n.火车头,机车
senses.sentence: He was killed by an onrushing **locomotive**.
senses.translation: 他被飞驰而来的火车头撞死了。

senses.definition: vi.存放,暂住,埋入,（权利、权威等）归属
senses.sentence: Authorities requisitioned hotel rooms to **lodge** more than 3,000 stranded Christmas vacationers.
senses.translation: 当局征用旅馆房间安顿了3,000多名无处落脚的圣诞度假者。

senses.definition: adj.高耸的，巍峨的,高尚的,傲慢的
senses.sentence: Victorian houses can seem cold with their **lofty** ceilings and rambling rooms.
senses.translation: 维多利亚式房屋屋顶高耸，房间布局凌乱，因此可能会显得较为阴冷。

senses.definition: n.记录,日志,原木
senses.sentence: I set the **log** on the ground and shaved off the bark.
senses.translation: 我将原木放到了地上，刨掉了树皮。

senses.definition: n.逻辑，逻辑学,（做某事的）道理,推理方法,威力，压力，强制（力）
senses.sentence: Apart from criminal investigation techniques, students learn forensic medicine, philosophy and **logic**.
senses.translation: 除罪案调查技巧外，学生们还要学习法医学、哲学和逻辑学。

senses.definition: adj.逻辑（上）的,符合逻辑的,推理正确的,合乎常理的
senses.sentence: The indisputable fact is that computers carry out **logical** operations.
senses.translation: 不容置疑的事实是，电脑执行逻辑操作指令。

senses.definition: adj.孤独的，孤单的,寂寞的,荒凉的，幽静的,在孤单中度过的
senses.sentence: I would imagine she's quite **lonely** living on her own.
senses.translation: 我猜想她一个人过肯定很孤独。

senses.definition: n.经度，经线,[天]黄经
senses.sentence: All places on the same meridian have the same **longitude**.
senses.translation: 在同一子午线上的地方都有相同的经度.

senses.definition: n.看,（尤指吸引人的）相貌,眼神,样子
senses.sentence: She had the **look** of someone deserted and betrayed.
senses.translation: 她一副遭人遗弃和背叛的样子。

senses.definition: n.织布机，织布法,若隐若现的景象,桨柄,[航]翼肋腹部
senses.sentence: He turned away from the messenger to work at his **loom** again.
senses.translation: 他撇下那两个捎口信的来者,又去织布.

senses.definition: n.圈，环,[医]宫内避孕环,回路,弯曲部分
senses.sentence: These activists don't want to feel out of the **loop**.
senses.translation: 这些活跃分子不想做局外人。

senses.definition: adj.松的，宽的,模糊的,散漫的,自由的
senses.sentence: She was pretty and young, in a **loose** smocked sundress.
senses.translation: 她年轻貌美，一身宽松的刺绣太阳裙。

senses.definition: vt.解开或使松,放宽，放松,使（肠）通畅
senses.sentence: **Loosen** the bolt so the bars can be turned.
senses.translation: 松一松插销，好转动门闩。

senses.definition: vt.失去,错过,遗失,耽搁
senses.sentence: He appealed to his countrymen not to **lose** heart.
senses.translation: 他呼吁自己的同胞不要丧失信心。

senses.definition: n.损失，减少,丢失，遗失,损耗，亏损,失败
senses.sentence: Slimming snacks that offer miraculous weight **loss** are a con.
senses.translation: 有神奇减肥效果的瘦身点心是一个骗局。

senses.definition: n.彩票,碰运气的事
senses.sentence: Imagine winning the local **lottery** first prize of £5,000.
senses.translation: 想象一下中个5,000英镑的当地彩票头奖吧。

senses.definition: adj.响亮的，大声的，高声的,响亮的，洪亮的，高亢的,高声的，激烈的,刺眼的，太招摇的
senses.sentence: I've always had a **loud** mouth, I refuse to be silenced.
senses.translation: 我一贯大声说出自己的想法，不会迫于压力而一言不发。

senses.definition: n.休息厅,客厅,（机场等的）等候室
senses.sentence: They checked in their luggage and found seats in the departure **lounge**.
senses.translation: 他们办完行李托运，到候机室找了座位坐下。

senses.definition: n.爱情，爱意,疼爱,热爱,爱人，所爱之物
senses.sentence: If you **love** life, life will **love** you back.
senses.translation: 热爱生活，生活也会厚爱你。(Arthur Rubinstein)

senses.definition: adj.可爱的,令人愉快的,亲切友好的,慷慨大方的
senses.sentence: It was just one of those **lovely** old English gardens.
senses.translation: 那正是一个那种古老的英式花园，非常迷人。

senses.definition: n.爱好者，嗜好者,情人,情妇，情夫,情侣
senses.sentence: She was dumped by her long-term **lover** after five years.
senses.translation: 5年后她被相恋多年的恋人抛弃了。

senses.definition: adj.低的，矮小的,楼下的，低洼的,沮丧的,下贱的
senses.sentence: Doctor believed that his **low** sperm count was the problem.
senses.translation: 医生认为他的精子数太低是问题所在。

senses.definition: adj.下方的,在底部的,较低级的
senses.sentence: Companies are moving jobs to towns with a **lower** cost of living.
senses.translation: 各公司正在把工作岗位转移至生活费用较低的城镇。

senses.definition: adj.忠诚的，忠心的,忠贞的
senses.sentence: I thanked them for their long and **loyal** service.
senses.translation: 我感谢他们长期以来忠诚的效力。

senses.definition: n.忠诚，忠实,忠心,忠于…感情
senses.sentence: **Loyalty** and support became the bywords of the day.
senses.translation: 忠诚和支持成了那个时代人们时常挂在嘴边的词儿。

senses.definition: vi.润滑
senses.sentence: Mineral oils are used to **lubricate** machinery.
senses.translation: 矿物油被用来润滑机器。

senses.definition: n.运气,好运,机遇,命运
senses.sentence: Good **luck** is when an opportunity comes along and you're prepared for it.
senses.translation: 好运就是当机会来临时，你早已做好了准备。

senses.definition: adj.运气好的，侥幸的,兆头好的，吉祥的,〈俚〉难得,很恰当的
senses.sentence: Chantal was **lucky** to be able to salvage her career.
senses.translation: 尚塔尔能保住她的事业算是走了运。

senses.definition: n.<英>行李,<美>皮箱
senses.sentence: He waited until all the **luggage** was cleared, but Paula's never appeared.
senses.translation: 他一直等到所有的行李都拿走了，但始终没看见葆拉的。

senses.definition: n.木材,隆隆声,废物
senses.sentence: The truck was sent to carry **lumber**.
senses.translation: 卡车被派出去运木材.

senses.definition: n.块，团,肿块,许多，大量,笨拙的人
senses.sentence: Howard had to have cancer surgery for a **lump** in his chest.
senses.translation: 霍华德不得不进行肿瘤手术以切除胸部的肿块。

senses.definition: adj.月的，月球的,阴历的,（光）苍白的，微弱的,银的，含银的
senses.sentence: The astronauts piloted their craft down to the **lunar** surface.
senses.translation: 宇航员驾驶太空飞船在月球表面降落.

senses.definition: n.午餐
senses.sentence: We tend to meet up for **lunch** once a week.
senses.translation: 我们往往每周共进一次午餐。

senses.definition: n.肺,呼吸器官,[医]辅助呼吸的装置,〈英〉可供呼吸新鲜空气的地方
senses.sentence: **Lung** cells die and are replaced about once a week.
senses.translation: 肺细胞约每周新老更替一次。

senses.definition: n.吸引力，魅力,诱惑物,诱饵
senses.sentence: The **lure** of rural life is proving as strong as ever.
senses.translation: 事实证明，乡村生活的魅力丝毫未减。

senses.definition: n.奢侈，豪华,奢侈品，美食，美衣,乐趣，享受,不常有的乐趣（或享受、优势）
senses.sentence: The spa is the last word in **luxury** and efficiency.
senses.translation: 这家矿泉疗养浴场极尽奢华，功效极高。

senses.definition: n.机器，机械,机械般的人,核心
senses.sentence: The repairs to the Hafner **machine** were near to completion.
senses.translation: 对哈夫纳机器的修理即将结束。

senses.definition: n.（总称）机器,（政府等的）机关，组织,机器的运转部份,机械装置
senses.sentence: On the customs declaration, the sender labeled the freight as agricultural **machinery**.
senses.translation: 在报关单上，寄货人将货物列为农用机械。

senses.definition: n.宏观结构
senses.sentence: Finally, a case is analyzed from the viewpoint of enterprises and **macrostructure**.
senses.translation: 同时从企业层次和宏观层次进行案例分析.

senses.definition: adj.疯狂的,猛烈的,着迷的,〔口语〕愤怒的，生气的
senses.sentence: There are certain things he does that drive me **mad**.
senses.translation: 他的某些举动让我很生气。

senses.definition: n.女士,小姐,喜欢指使他人的年轻妇女,（妓院的）鸨母
senses.sentence: Sue is a thoroughly precocious little **madam** if ever there was one.
senses.translation: 休确实是个少见的早熟的小丫头。

senses.definition: n.<法>（用于已婚妇女姓名前的尊称）太太，夫人，女士
senses.contextMeaning: <法>（用于已婚妇女姓名前的尊称）太太，夫人，女士
senses.sentence: **Madame** Clicquot is credited with the perfection of this technique.
senses.translation: 这项技术的完善要归功于凯歌夫人。

senses.definition: n.弹药库,杂志,弹仓,胶卷盒
senses.sentence: Frank Deford is a contributing editor for Vanity Fair **magazine**.
senses.translation: 弗兰克·德福特是杂志《名利场》的特约编辑。

senses.definition: n.魔法,巫术,戏法,不可思议的魔力
senses.sentence: It infected them with some of the **magic** of a lost age.
senses.translation: 逝去的岁月让他们平添了几分魅力。

senses.definition: n.地方法官，治安官,文职官员,治安推事
senses.sentence: He was wanted for the murder of a **magistrate**.
senses.translation: 他因谋杀一名地方法官而被通缉。

senses.definition: n.磁铁，磁石,有吸引力的人或物,[物]磁体
senses.sentence: In the 1990s the area became a **magnet** for new investment.
senses.translation: 这个地区在20世纪90年代成了新的投资热点。

senses.definition: adj.有磁性的，有吸引力的,磁性的,有吸引力的,有魅力的
senses.sentence: The secondary current sets up a **magnetic** field inside the tube.
senses.translation: 二次电流在管子内部会产生磁场。

senses.definition: adj.壮丽的,伟大的，高尚的,华丽的，高贵的,瑰丽的
senses.sentence: At 54 years old her energy and looks are **magnificent**.
senses.translation: 她54岁了，精力和气色都非常好。

senses.definition: vt.放大,赞美,夸大,夸奖
senses.sentence: He tried to **magnify** the part he played in the battle.
senses.translation: 他试图夸大他在战斗中发挥的作用.

senses.definition: n.巨大，广大,重大，重要,量级,（地震）级数
senses.sentence: The time delay would be smaller by eight orders of **magnitude**.
senses.translation: 如果按8个数量级来看，延时量会显得小一些。

senses.definition: n.未婚女子,处女,断头机,未得分的投球
senses.sentence: The aircraft makes its **maiden** flight tomorrow.
senses.translation: 这架飞机明天首航.

senses.definition: n.邮件，邮政,邮政（制度）,邮务员，邮递员,〈古〉袋，旅行包
senses.sentence: Goods may be sent by surface **mail** or airmail.
senses.translation: 货物可通过平寄或空运发送。

senses.definition: adj.主要的，最重要的,全力的
senses.sentence: Premature birth is the **main** cause of perinatal mortality.
senses.translation: 早产是临产死亡的主要原因。

senses.definition: n.大陆,本土
senses.sentence: Ischia was now connected to the **mainland** water supply.
senses.translation: 伊斯基亚这时已经通上了大陆的水。

senses.definition: adv.大部分地,主要地,基本上
senses.sentence: Thousands of people, **mainly** Zulus, assembled in a stadium in Thokoza.
senses.translation: 数以千计的人，主要是祖鲁族人，聚集在托考查的一个体育场里。

senses.definition: vt.保持,保养,坚持,固执己见
senses.sentence: In New Zealand, the Maori people **maintain** a strong cultural tradition.
senses.translation: 在新西兰，毛利人保持着深厚的文化传统。

senses.definition: n.维持，保持,保养，保管,维护,维修
senses.sentence: In the future the machines will need spare parts and **maintenance**.
senses.translation: 这些机器将来会需要备件和维修保养。

senses.definition: adj.主要的,重要的,大调的,主修的（课程）
senses.sentence: He said the issue was not a **major** irritant.
senses.translation: 他说那个问题不是什么大问题。

senses.definition: n.多数,（获胜的）票数,成年,法定年龄
senses.sentence: Independent candidates won the **majority** of seats on the local council.
senses.translation: 无党派候选人在地方议会选举中赢得了多数席位。

senses.definition: vt.做，制造,生产，制定,使成为,使产生
senses.sentence: These large institutions **make** — and change—the rules to suit themselves.
senses.translation: 这些大机构总是随意制定规定，而且说变就变。

senses.definition: adj.男性的,雄性的,有力的,[植]雄性的，仅有雄蕊的
senses.sentence: The army is still one of the last **male** bastions.
senses.translation: 军队仍然是男人占据的最后堡垒之一。

senses.definition: n.故障，功能障碍,失灵
senses.sentence: Results have been delayed owing to a **malfunction** in the computer.
senses.translation: 由于电脑发生故障,计算结果推迟了.

senses.definition: vi.失灵,发生故障
senses.sentence: The radiation can damage microprocessors and computer memories, causing them to **malfunction**.
senses.translation: 辐射会损坏微处理器和电脑内存，使之失灵。

senses.definition: adj.恶性的，致命的,恶意的，恶毒的
senses.sentence: She developed a **malignant** breast tumour.
senses.translation: 她长了一个恶性的乳房肿瘤。

senses.definition: vt.虐待,亏待
senses.sentence: It is strictly forbidden to torture, insult or otherwise **maltreat** prisoners.
senses.translation: 严禁对罪犯施加酷刑 、 侮辱和打骂虐待.

senses.definition: n.哺乳动物
senses.sentence: The function of a **mammal**'s fur is to insulate the body.
senses.translation: 哺乳动物皮毛的功能在于使身体保温.

senses.definition: n.男人,人类,男子汉,雇工
senses.sentence: She ran away with a **man** called McTavish last year.
senses.translation: 去年，她和一个叫麦克塔维什的男人私奔了。

senses.definition: vt.使用,完成（困难的事）,经营,明智地使用（金钱、时间、信息等）
senses.sentence: Petroleum engineers plan and **manage** the extraction of oil.
senses.translation: 石油工程师规划并管理石油的提炼。

senses.definition: n.管理,管理人员,管理技巧，处事的能力
senses.sentence: The governors were joined by Mr Hunter and his **management** team.
senses.translation: 亨特先生及他率领的管理小组加入了州长们的队伍。

senses.definition: n.处理者，经理，管理人,干事，理事,〈美〉（政党等的）领袖,策士，干才，干练的人
senses.sentence: I want the **manager**'sjob when he calls it a day.
senses.translation: 等到经理不干了之后，我想接替他的位子。

senses.definition: v.& n.机动，演习
senses.sentence: This **maneuver** of his is a diabolical conspiracy.
senses.translation: 他这一手是一个居心叵测的大阴谋.

senses.definition: n.成年,男子,男子气概,刚毅之气
senses.sentence: His handwriting, from earliest young **manhood**, was flowing and graceful.
senses.translation: 他的字从小就写得流畅优美。

senses.definition: vt.显示，表明,证明,使显现
senses.sentence: The same alarm is **manifest** everywhere.
senses.translation: 到处弥漫着同样的恐慌。

senses.definition: vt.操作，处理,巧妙地控制,操纵,[医] 推拿，调整
senses.sentence: She was unable, for once, to control and **manipulate** events.
senses.translation: 她仅有一次没能控制和处理好局势。

senses.definition: n.人类,男性，男子
senses.sentence: **Mankind**'s knowledge of the universe has increased beyond measure.
senses.translation: 人类对于宇宙的了解已经大为增加。

senses.definition: adj.有男子气概的,适合男子的,强壮的
senses.sentence: The boy walked with a confident **manly** stride.
senses.translation: 这男孩以自信的男人步伐行走.

senses.definition: n.方式，方法，做法,态度，样子，举止,礼貌，规矩,风俗，习惯，惯例，生活方式
senses.sentence: There was much curiosity about what **manner** of man he was.
senses.translation: 他究竟是什么样的人，大家都十分好奇。

senses.definition: n.调遣，换防，对抗演习，操纵,技术动作,策略，巧计,花招，伎俩
senses.contextMeaning: 调遣，换防，对抗演习，操纵
senses.sentence: Some analysts believe he has made a canny political **manoeuvre**.
senses.translation: 一些分析家认为，他的这一政治举措很高明。

senses.definition: n.手册,指南,[乐]键盘,[军]刀枪操练
senses.sentence: The worst part of the set-up is the poor instruction **manual**.
senses.translation: 安装时最糟糕就是操作指南讲述不够清楚。

senses.definition: n.制造,制成品，产品,工业，工厂,（文学作品等的）粗制滥造
senses.sentence: Now they lead in the **manufacture** of weapons of mass destruction.
senses.translation: 现在他们在制造大规模杀人武器方面领先.

senses.definition: n.手稿,原稿,底稿,手写本
senses.sentence: The finished **manuscript** ran to the best part of fifty double-sided pages.
senses.translation: 完成的手稿占了双面都写满字的足足50页纸。

senses.definition: adj.许多，多的
senses.sentence: She has had **many** credits and name-checks in American Vogue.
senses.translation: 美国版《时尚》多次对她进行赞扬或是提到她的名字。

senses.definition: n.地图，天体图,类似地图的事物,〈美俚〉脸，面孔,（染色体上基因排列的）遗传图
senses.sentence: It was even marked on the **map** as a scenic route.
senses.translation: 它甚至还作为观光路线标在了地图上。

senses.definition: n.<体>马拉松赛跑,长距离比赛,需要长时间努力或耐力的事件或活动
senses.sentence: Rodgers can also claim four victories in the New York **Marathon**.
senses.translation: 罗杰斯也能在纽约马拉松比赛中4次夺冠。

senses.definition: n.大理石,大理石制品,弹子游戏,理智，常识
senses.sentence: Traders in **Marble** Arch are facing huge rent increases.
senses.translation: 大理石拱门的经销商们面临租金的大幅上涨。

senses.definition: vi.（坚定地向某地）前进,行军，进军,游行示威,进展，进行
senses.sentence: Police said permission for the **march** had not been granted.
senses.translation: 警方说游行并未得到批准。

senses.definition: n.边缘，范围,极限,利润，盈余,（版心外）的空白
senses.sentence: They could end up with a 50-point winning **margin**.
senses.translation: 他们最终可能会以50分的优势获胜。

senses.definition: adj.边的，边缘的,旁注的,临界的，最低限度的,收入仅敷支出的
senses.sentence: For low-paid workers, the **marginal** tax rate is at least 75%.
senses.translation: 对于低收入的工人来说，边际税率至少为75%。

senses.definition: adj.海的,海产的,海军的,海事的
senses.sentence: **Marine** insurance is governed by a strict series of rules and regulations.
senses.translation: 关于海险有一系列严格的规章制度对其作了规定。

senses.definition: adj.婚姻的，夫妻（间）的
senses.sentence: The implication that **marital** infidelity enhances a leader's credibility is preposterous.
senses.translation: 婚姻不忠会提升领导人可信度的暗示荒谬之极。

senses.definition: n.斑点,记号,成绩,标准
senses.sentence: **Mark** was out of earshot, walking ahead of them.
senses.translation: 马克走在前面，听不见他们的声音。

senses.definition: n.交易,市集,需求,交易情况，行情
senses.sentence: We are becoming one of the **market** leaders in the fashion industry.
senses.translation: 我们正在成为时装业的领军者之一。

senses.definition: n.结婚,婚姻生活,密切结合,合并
senses.sentence: After a three-weekend courtship, Pamela accepted Randolph's proposal of **marriage**.
senses.translation: 经过3个周末的追求之后，帕梅拉接受了伦道夫的求婚。

senses.definition: adj.已婚的,与…结为夫妻的,婚姻的
senses.sentence: They had met by chance at university and finished up getting **married**.
senses.translation: 他们在大学偶遇，最后结了婚。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.（使）结婚,娶,嫁,结合
senses.sentence: I think he wanted to **marry** her, if I am not mistaken.
senses.translation: 我觉得他曾经想娶她为妻，如果我没有弄错的话。

senses.definition: adj.引起惊异的,不可思议的,非凡的,神乎其神
senses.sentence: He was on fire with this **marvelous** sight.
senses.translation: 看到这一令人叹为观止的景象，他激动万分。

senses.definition: n.马克思主义
senses.sentence: **Marxism** possesses the theoretical character of keeping pace with the times.
senses.translation: 马克思主义具有与时俱进的理论品格.

senses.definition: adj.男子气概的,阳性的，雄性的,男性化的，像男人的
senses.sentence: Andrew describes her as a large, bony and **masculine** woman.
senses.translation: 安德鲁说她是一个瘦骨嶙峋、男人模样的大块头女人。

senses.definition: vt.掩饰,戴面具,用面具遮住，掩盖，掩饰
senses.sentence: Diane lit a cigarette, trying to **mask** her agitation.
senses.translation: 黛安娜点燃一根香烟，试图掩饰她的焦躁不安。

senses.definition: n.大量，大多,块，堆，团,[物理学]质量,弥撒曲
senses.sentence: In the spring, the meadow is a **mass** of daffodils.
senses.translation: 春天，草地上开满了黄水仙。

senses.definition: n.大屠杀，残杀,（牲畜的）成批屠宰
senses.sentence: Most of them had only heard of the **massacre** at second hand.
senses.translation: 他们中的大多数人只是听说了那次大屠杀。

senses.definition: adj.大的，重的,大块的，大量的,魁伟的，结实的,大规模的
senses.sentence: Combined with other compounds, they created a **massive** dynamite-type bomb.
senses.translation: 将其与其他化合物结合，就制造出杀伤力极强的硝酸甘油炸弹。

senses.definition: n.杰作，名作,杰出的事
senses.sentence: The whole thing was a **masterpiece** of crowd management.
senses.translation: 整件事情就是人群管理的典范。

senses.definition: n.席子，垫子,（体育运动用的）厚垫子,衬边,团，簇
senses.sentence: There was a letter on the **mat**.
senses.translation: 地毯上有一封信。

senses.definition: n.比赛,对手,相配的人（或物）,火柴
senses.sentence: Charlton are about to play an important away **match**.
