senses.translation: 查尔顿队即将在客场进行一场重要比赛。

senses.definition: n.（工人间的）伙伴，同事，老兄，老弟〔工人，水手间的亲密称呼〕,配偶〔男女任何一方〕，动物之偶（尤指鸟类），（一对中的）一只，配对物,[医学]（军医等的）助手,[航海]（商船的）大副，驾驶员
senses.contextMeaning: （工人间的）伙伴，同事，老兄，老弟〔工人，水手间的亲密称呼〕
senses.sentence: Kathy is a great **mate**, we are like sisters.
senses.translation: 凯茜是个很好的伙伴，我们亲如姐妹。

senses.definition: n.材料，原料,素材,布，织物,适当人选
senses.sentence: This will give your promotional **material** individuality and style.
senses.translation: 这会让你的促销品显得个性十足、格调高雅。

senses.definition: n.数学（等于mathematics）
senses.sentence: The hard **math** problem tripped up most of the students.
senses.translation: 这道数学难题难倒了大多数学生.

senses.definition: adj.数学的,精确的,绝对的,可能性极小的
senses.sentence: With **mathematical** problems, you can save time by approximating.
senses.translation: 对于数学题，可以用取近似值的办法节约时间。

senses.definition: n.数学,〈诗〉同“ripen”,算学
senses.sentence: The degree provides a thorough grounding in both **mathematics** and statistics.
senses.translation: 该学位课程将为数学和统计学打下扎实的基础。

senses.definition: n.数学,=mathematics（英）
senses.sentence: The papers in **maths** and English are very testing.
senses.translation: 数学试卷和英语试卷很难。

senses.definition: n.事件,（讨论、考虑等的）问题,重要性,物质
senses.sentence: Ever tried. Ever failed. No **matter**. Try Again. Fail again. Fail better.
senses.translation: 努力过，失败过，没关系，屡战屡败，屡败屡战，每一次失败都比上一次更好。

senses.definition: adj.（人、树木、鸟或动物）成熟的,仔细考虑过的,到期（应该支付）的,成年人的
senses.sentence: Some adolescents might be more sexually **mature** and provocative than others.
senses.translation: 一些青少年可能相比同龄人在性方面更成熟、更具挑逗性。

senses.definition: adj.最大值的，最大量的
senses.sentence: You have to develop your capabilities to the **maximum**.
senses.translation: 你必须尽你所能。

senses.definition: aux.可以,也许,会,但愿
senses.sentence: The agreement has raised hopes that the war **may** end soon.
senses.translation: 那项协议使人们感到战争有望很快结束。

senses.definition: adv.也许,可能,大概
senses.sentence: The men were **maybe** a hundred feet away and coming closer.
senses.translation: 那些人大约有100英尺远，正在向这里靠近。

senses.definition: n.市长,镇长,（英格兰、威尔士和北爱尔兰由议员选举产生的）镇长,（民选的）市长
senses.sentence: The person who embodies democracy at the local level is the **mayor**.
senses.translation: 在地方上代表民主的人是市长。

senses.definition: pron.（人称代词I的宾格）我
senses.sentence: He finished his conversation and stood up, looking straight at **me**.
senses.translation: 他说完话站起来，直视着我。

senses.definition: n.草地,牧场
senses.sentence: In the spring, the **meadow** is a mass of daffodils.
senses.translation: 春天，草地上开满了黄水仙。

senses.definition: n.餐，饭,进餐（时间）,〈英〉一次挤奶量,谷物粗粉（用作饲料或加工面粉）
senses.sentence: You get an interesting **meal** for a reasonable price.
senses.translation: 你花不多的钱就可以吃一顿很特别的饭。

senses.definition: n.意思，意义,含义,意图
senses.sentence: People use scientific terms with no clear idea of their **meaning**.
senses.translation: 人们使用科学术语，但并非很清楚其含义。

senses.definition: n.方法（mean的名词复数）,手段,收入,财富
senses.sentence: This proposal is by no **means** a sure thing.
senses.translation: 这个提议绝不会理所当然地获得通过。

senses.definition: n.其时，其间
senses.sentence: I'll contact them soon. **Meantime** don't tell them I'm back.
senses.translation: 我会尽快和他们联系。在此期间，不要告诉他们我回来了。

senses.definition: adv.同时，其间
senses.sentence: The media, **meanwhile**, has blown hot and cold on the affair.
senses.translation: 同时，媒体对这件事的态度表现得忽冷忽热。

senses.definition: n.测量，测度,措施,程度,尺寸
senses.sentence: The local administration says the curfew is a precautionary **measure**.
senses.translation: 地方当局说宵禁是一种预防措施。

senses.definition: n.肉,食物,实质
senses.sentence: The government increased prices on several basic commodities like bread and **meat**.
senses.translation: 政府提高了面包、肉类等几种基本商品的价格。

senses.definition: n.技工，机修工
senses.sentence: An elevator **mechanic** can work the machinery directly by turning this lever.
senses.translation: 电梯修理工可以转动这根杠杆直接操作机器。

senses.definition: adj.机械的，机械学的,呆板的,体力的,手工操作的
senses.sentence: The company undertakes **mechanical** work on all types of cars.
senses.translation: 该公司承接各类汽车的修理工作。

senses.definition: n.[生]机制，机能，[乐]机理,（机械）结构，机械装置[作用]，（故事的）结构,[艺]手法，技巧，途径,机械作用
senses.sentence: Some objects had got entangled with the underneath **mechanism** of the engine.
senses.translation: 一些东西缠在了发动机下面的机件上。

senses.definition: n.奖章，奖牌,勋章,纪念章,证章
senses.sentence: Theresa Zabell ran away with the women's gold **medal**.
senses.translation: 特雷莎·扎贝尔轻松获得了女子金牌。

senses.definition: vt.经调解解决,斡旋促成
senses.sentence: The Secretary-General was asked to **mediate** in the dispute.
senses.translation: 有人请秘书长来调解这次纷争。

senses.definition: adj.医学的,医药的,医疗的,内科的
senses.sentence: The problem is compounded by the **medical** system here.
senses.translation: 这儿的医疗体制使问题进一步恶化。

senses.definition: n.医学,药物,有功效的东西，良药
senses.sentence: Traditionally young Asians in Britain have gravitated towards **medicine**, law and engineering.
senses.translation: 英国的亚裔年轻人通常被吸引到医学、法律及工程专业。

senses.definition: adj.中古的，中世纪的
senses.sentence: The house is a textbook example of **medieval** domestic architecture.
senses.translation: 这所房子是典型的中世纪民居。

senses.definition: vi.沉思,打算
senses.sentence: That's when I try to **meditate** or do some deep-breathing exercises.
senses.translation: 这时我就会试着沉思或者做些深呼吸练习。

senses.definition: adj.中等的，中级的,普通的,平均的,五分熟的
senses.sentence: I would class my garden as **medium** in size.
senses.translation: 我的花园只能算是中等大小。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.相遇,相识,开会,接触（某物）
senses.sentence: We tend to **meet** up for lunch once a week.
senses.translation: 我们往往每周共进一次午餐。

senses.definition: n.会议,聚会,汇合点,运动会
senses.sentence: The Politburo has been **meeting** in Peking to discuss the situation.
senses.translation: 政治局已在北京召开会议讨论形势。

senses.definition: n.旋律，曲调,美妙的音乐，和谐的调子,好听的声音,歌曲
senses.sentence: The **melody** that ran through his brain was composed of bad notes.
senses.translation: 回荡在他脑海里的旋律都走调了。

senses.definition: vi.熔化，溶解,逐渐融合,逐渐消失,感动，软化，感情上变得温和
senses.sentence: Meanwhile, **melt** the white chocolate in a bowl suspended over simmering water.
senses.translation: 同时，把碗置于微沸的水上，将白巧克力放入碗中使其熔化。

senses.definition: n.成员,分子,身体部位（尤指胳膊或腿）,构件，部件
senses.sentence: He was confirmed as a **member** of the Church of England.
senses.translation: 他领受了坚振礼，成为英国国教会的一员。

senses.definition: n.会员资格,会员身份,会员全体
senses.sentence: The European Builders Confederation has a **membership** of over 350,000 building companies.
senses.translation: 欧洲建筑商联合会拥有逾35万家建筑公司会员。

senses.definition: n.记忆，记忆力,回忆，往事,[计]存储器，内存
senses.sentence: The **memory** of it all was locked deep in my subconscious.
senses.translation: 关于它的一切记忆都深植于我的潜意识里。

senses.definition: n.威胁,恐吓
senses.sentence: The European states retained a latent capability to **menace** Britain's own security.
senses.translation: 欧洲国家仍具有威胁英国自身安全的潜在能力。

senses.definition: vt.修理，修补,改正，纠正,加强,使恢复健康
senses.sentence: I felt that might well **mend** the rift between them.
senses.translation: 我觉得那样做也许可以让他们冰释前嫌。

senses.definition: adj.内心的，精神的，思想的，心理的,智慧的，智[脑]力的,〈口〉精神病的，意志薄弱的，愚笨的
senses.sentence: Attitudes to **mental** illness have shifted in recent years.
senses.translation: 最近几年对精神病的态度已有所改变。

senses.definition: vt.提到，说起,提名表扬
senses.sentence: The mere **mention** of John had touched a very raw nerve indeed.
senses.translation: 提到约翰就真的让人心痛。

senses.definition: n.菜单,菜，菜肴
senses.sentence: Burke cast a cursory glance at the **menu**, then flapped it shut.
senses.translation: 伯克匆匆地瞥了一眼菜单，然后啪地合上了。

senses.definition: n.商品,货物
senses.sentence: They had shoplifted thousands of dollars' worth of **merchandise**.
senses.translation: 他们已经偷了商店价值好几千美元的商品。

senses.definition: n.商人,批发商,店主,零售商
senses.sentence: They sent naval forces to protect **merchant** shipping.
senses.translation: 他们派出了海军保护商船。

senses.definition: n.[化]汞，水银,[天]水星,温度表,精神，元气
senses.sentence: That night the **mercury** fell to thirty degrees below zero.
senses.translation: 那天晚上温度计显示气温降到了零下30度。

senses.definition: n.宽容,怜悯,幸运,侥幸
senses.sentence: The Emperor must realize that he has us at his **mercy**.
senses.translation: 皇帝必须意识到我们任由他处置。

senses.definition: adj.仅仅，只不过,小的，轻微的,纯粹的
senses.sentence: The **mere** mention of John had touched a very raw nerve indeed.
senses.translation: 提到约翰就真的让人心痛。

senses.definition: adv.仅仅，只不过,只是,纯粹,全然
senses.sentence: The letter **merely** restated the law of the land.
senses.translation: 这封信只不过重复了一下土地法。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.（使）混合,相融,融入,渐渐消失在某物中
senses.sentence: Like a chameleon, he could **merge** unobtrusively into the background.
senses.translation: 他就像一条变色龙，可以神不知鬼不觉地隐藏在背景中间。

senses.definition: n.价值，优点,[宗教]（行善得到的）功德,功绩，功勋,荣誉
senses.sentence: For his dedication the Mayor awarded him a medal of **merit**.
senses.translation: 为表彰他的奉献精神，市长授予他荣誉奖章。

senses.definition: n.混乱,食堂,肮脏,困境
senses.sentence: Except for the remarkably tidy kitchen, the place was a **mess**.
senses.translation: 除了厨房特别干净外，这地方一片狼藉。

senses.definition: n.信息,消息,要旨,教训
senses.sentence: Stationery can be imprinted with your **message** or logo.
senses.translation: 可以把你的信息或标志印在信纸上。

senses.definition: n.金属,金属元素,成色,金色
senses.sentence: Heavy **Metal** music really arose in the late 60s.
senses.translation: 重金属音乐真正形成于60年代后期。

senses.definition: n.隐喻，暗喻,象征
senses.sentence: Despite the mixed **metaphor**, there is some truth in this judgement.
senses.translation: 尽管有混用的比喻，这个判断还是有些道理的。

senses.definition: n.计量器,计量仪
senses.sentence: They have the right to come in and inspect the **meter**.
senses.translation: 他们有权进来查表。

senses.definition: n.方法,条理
senses.sentence: He succeeded with the aid of a completely new **method** he discovered.
senses.translation: 借助于自己发现的一种全新的方法，他获得了成功。

senses.definition: n.米，公尺,格律，韵律
senses.sentence: Prices start at £13.95 a **metre** for printed cotton.
senses.translation: 印花棉布以每米13.95英镑的价格起售。

senses.definition: adj.米制的，公制的，十进制的,度量的,距离的
senses.contextMeaning: 米制的，公制的，十进制的
senses.sentence: The Customs Service seized 27.2 **metric** tons of cocaine in 1986.
senses.translation: 1986年海关截获了27.2公吨的可卡因。

senses.definition: adj.大都会的,大城市的,宗主国的,大主教教区的
senses.sentence: This is yet another slur on the integrity of the **Metropolitan** Police.
senses.translation: 这是对伦敦市警察局刚正廉明作风的又一次诽谤。

senses.definition: n.微型（电子）计算机,微电脑
senses.sentence: Status flags represent one of the simplest forms of **microcomputer** logic.
senses.translation: 状态标志是微计算机逻辑中的一种最简单的形式之一.

senses.definition: n.微电子学
senses.sentence: He has lots of original ideas about the research into **microelectronics**.
senses.translation: 他对微电子学的研究很有创见.

senses.definition: n.扩音器，麦克风,话筒
senses.sentence: He wore a hidden **microphone** to secretly tape-record conversations.
senses.translation: 他身上藏了一个传声器，打算偷偷录下谈话内容。

senses.definition: n.显微镜
senses.sentence: We aimed the **microscope** at a likely looking target.
senses.translation: 我们把显微镜对准了一个看起来合适的目标。

senses.definition: n.中午,正午
senses.sentence: Northerly winds will increase to force six by **midday**.
senses.translation: 到中午时分北风会加强到6级。

senses.definition: n.中部，中间,腰部,中央,正中
senses.sentence: She was born in the **middle** of a rain storm.
senses.translation: 她出生在一场暴风雨中。

senses.definition: n.子夜，午夜,漆黑,一段黑暗阴暗的时间,漏夜
senses.sentence: He fell asleep just past **midnight** with tolerable ease.
senses.translation: 他刚过午夜就睡着了，睡得还算安稳。

senses.definition: n.中部，中间，当中
senses.sentence: We're lucky to have such a man in our **midst**.
senses.translation: 在我们中间有这样一个人是我们的幸运。

senses.definition: aux.表示可能,表示许可,表示询问情况
senses.sentence: I thought you **might** like to read the enclosed.
senses.translation: 我想你或许想要读一下信封里的内容。

senses.definition: vi.迁移，移往,移动,随季节而移居
senses.sentence: Swallows **migrate** south in winter.
senses.translation: 燕子在冬天迁徙到南方。

senses.definition: adj.温柔的,温暖的,轻微的,（味道）不浓的
senses.sentence: It wasn't anything serious. A **mild** stomach upset, that's all.
senses.translation: 没什么大不了的。只是胃有点不舒服，没别的。

senses.definition: n.英里,很远的距离,一英里赛跑
senses.sentence: The President is determined "to go the extra **mile** for peace".
senses.translation: 总统决心“为实现和平而加倍努力”。

senses.definition: adj.斗志昂扬的，富于战斗性的,激进的，好战的,战斗中的，交战中的,好斗者
senses.contextMeaning: 斗志昂扬的，富于战斗性的
senses.sentence: They have already been accused of appeasement by more **militant** organisations.
senses.translation: 已有更多的好战组织谴责他们采取姑息态度。

senses.definition: adj.军事的,军用的,讨厌的,好战的
senses.sentence: They said the present system of **military** conscription should be phased out.
senses.translation: 他们说，当前的征兵体系应当逐步废除。

senses.definition: n.奶,乳液,母乳
senses.sentence: Usually a woman's breasts produce **milk** spontaneously after the birth.
senses.translation: 女性的乳房通常在产后会自然泌乳。

senses.definition: n.磨坊,磨粉机,榨汁机,工厂
senses.sentence: For many they clearly represent an alternative to run-of-the-**mill** estate cars.
senses.translation: 对于很多人来说，他们显然可以作为一般旅行车的替代品。

senses.definition: n.毫米
senses.sentence: In the back of the truck was a 12.7 **millimeter** rapid-fire machine gun.
senses.translation: 在卡车后面有一只12.7毫米口径的速射机关枪。

senses.definition: n.毫米
senses.sentence: The silicon chips are less than a **millimetre** thick.
senses.translation: 这些硅片厚度不足一毫米。

senses.definition: n.百万
senses.sentence: The disease wiped out 40 **million** rabbits at a stroke.
senses.translation: 该疾病一下子就使4,000万只兔子丧命。

senses.definition: n.巧于模仿的人,复写品或仿制品,摹拟笑剧的演员
senses.sentence: Neural networks are computer systems which **mimic** the workings of the brain.
senses.translation: 神经网络是模拟大脑工作方式的计算机系统。

senses.definition: n.心，精神，心力，知，智力，智慧,心胸，头脑，人,愿望，目的，意向，意志，决心，见解，意见,记忆，记性，记忆力，回想
senses.contextMeaning: 心，精神，心力，知，智力，智慧
senses.sentence: How very thoughtless. I'll give him a piece of my **mind**.
senses.translation: 真是太没头脑了，我要告诉他我很生气。

senses.definition: pron.(I的所有格)我的（东西）
senses.sentence: She tells me her troubles. I tell her **mine**.
senses.translation: 我和她互相倾诉烦恼。

senses.definition: n.矿物,矿石,矿物质,汽水
senses.sentence: The **mineral** is weakly magnetic.
senses.translation: 这种矿物带有轻微的磁性。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.混合，混淆
senses.sentence: One of the hostess's duties is to **mingle** with the guests.
senses.translation: 女主人的职责之一是与客人们交际.

senses.definition: adj.小型的，微小的
senses.sentence: If it can be done full-size, I can do it in **miniature**.
senses.translation: 如果可以做成与原物相同大小的，我就可以做成缩微的。

senses.definition: n.小型公共汽车，小巴
senses.sentence: He was then taken by **minibus** to the military base.
senses.translation: 他随后被一辆中巴车带到了军事基地。

senses.definition: adj.<正式>最小的，极少的,极小的
senses.sentence: The co-operation between the two is **minimal**.
senses.translation: 双方的合作是最低限度的。

senses.definition: vt.把…减至最低数量[程度],对（某事物）作最低估计，极力贬低（某事物）的价值[重要性],极度轻视
senses.sentence: Concerned people want to **minimize** the risk of developing cancer.
senses.translation: 相关人员希望尽可能降低罹癌风险。

senses.definition: n.最低限度,最小量,最低消费,[数]极小值
senses.sentence: He reduced his needs to the **minimum** by simplifying his life.
senses.translation: 他过上了一种简单的生活，将自己的需求降到最低限度。

senses.definition: n.迷你短裙，超短裙
senses.sentence: She walked off the plane in a **miniskirt** and tight top.
senses.translation: 她身穿迷你裙和紧身上衣走下了飞机。

senses.definition: n.大臣,部长,公使,牧师
senses.sentence: There is good news of a kind for the Prime **Minister**.
senses.translation: 对总理来说也算是有个好消息。

senses.definition: n.（政府的）部,神职,牧师职位,神职任期
senses.sentence: The **Ministry** desperately tried to hush up the whole affair.
senses.translation: 部里拼命想隐瞒整个事件。

senses.definition: adj.较小的，少数的，小…,未成年的,[乐]小调的，小音阶的,（两同姓男孩中）年幼的
senses.sentence: Aloe may have an analgesic effect on inflammation and **minor** skin irritations.
senses.translation: 芦荟可能对发炎以及轻微的皮肤炎症具有镇痛作用。

senses.definition: n.少数,少数民族,未成年
senses.sentence: A **minority** of officers were prepared to bend the rules.
senses.translation: 少数官员准备篡改规则。

senses.definition: n.减号,负号,不利,不足
senses.sentence: None of these **minus** points will have been mentioned.
senses.translation: 这些不利因素都不会被提及。

senses.definition: n.奇迹，圣迹，神迹,令人惊奇的人（或事）
senses.sentence: A **miracle** is something that seems impossible but happens anyway.
senses.translation: 奇迹就是看似不可能，却发生了。

senses.definition: n.镜子，反光镜,真实的写照,反映，借鉴,榜样
senses.sentence: This is almost the **mirror** image of the situation in Scotland.
senses.translation: 这几乎就是苏格兰局势的翻版。

senses.definition: n.损害，危害,顽皮，淘气,恶作剧,祸根
senses.sentence: James Fox is best known as the author of White **Mischief**.
senses.translation: 詹姆斯·福克斯以《欲望城》一书最为出名.

senses.definition: adj.悲惨的,令人痛苦的,太少的,卑鄙的
senses.sentence: **Miserable**, and unexpectedly lonely, she went in search of Jean-Paul.
senses.translation: 内心痛苦、突感寂寞的她去寻找琼－保罗。

senses.definition: n.不幸,厄运,不幸的事,灾难
senses.sentence: He has known great **misfortune** in his life.
senses.translation: 他一生中经历过巨大的不幸。

senses.definition: vt.把…带错路,把…引入歧途
senses.sentence: Ministers must not knowingly **mislead** Parliament and the public.
senses.translation: 大臣们不应该故意地误导议会与公众。

senses.definition: n.（用于姓名或姓之前，对未婚女子的称呼）小姐,女士,失误
senses.contextMeaning: （用于姓名或姓之前，对未婚女子的称呼）小姐
senses.sentence: It would be just his luck to **miss** the last boat.
senses.translation: 他就这运气，误了最后一班船也毫不出奇。

senses.definition: n.导弹,投射物
senses.sentence: They claimed to have shot down one incoming **missile**.
senses.translation: 他们声称击落了一枚来犯的导弹。

senses.definition: adj.失去的,下落不明的
senses.sentence: It is not unknown for valuable display items to go, ahem, **missing**.
senses.translation: 贵重的展品，呃哼，丢失的话，会众人皆知。

senses.definition: n.代表团,使命,官方使命,布道所
senses.sentence: There is an enormous sense of **mission** in his speech and gesture.
senses.translation: 他的一言一行都带着强烈的使命感。

senses.definition: n.薄雾,视线模糊不清,液体喷雾
senses.sentence: He recognized the coast of England through a veil of **mist**.
senses.translation: 透过薄雾他认出了那是英格兰的海岸线。

senses.definition: vt.误会，误解,曲解
senses.sentence: I'm not saying what he did was good, don't **misunderstand** me.
senses.translation: 别误会，我并不是说他所做的是好事。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.混合,（使）结交,相容,平安相处
senses.sentence: For speed we used packets of pizza dough **mix**.
senses.translation: 为了节约时间，我们用了几包做比萨饼的混合面粉。

senses.definition: n.混合，混杂,混杂的事物[人群],混合（状态）
senses.sentence: Liquidize the **mixture** and then pass it through a sieve.
senses.translation: 将混合物打成泥状，然后用滤网滤一下。

senses.definition: adj.可移动的,行动自如的,易变的,流动性的
senses.sentence: The Party has been unable to attract upwardly **mobile** voters.
senses.translation: 该党一直不能吸引那些追求更高社会地位的选民。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.动员起来，调动，鼓动起
senses.sentence: India is now in a better position to **mobilise** its forces.
senses.translation: 印度现在更有条件动员军队了。

senses.definition: vt.调动,动员,组织，动员起来
senses.sentence: He helped energize and **mobilize** millions of people around the nation.
senses.translation: 他帮助激励和动员了全国数百万人。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.愚弄，嘲弄
senses.sentence: He screwed his face into an expression of **mock** pain.
senses.translation: 他面部扭曲，假装疼痛。

senses.definition: n.方式,状况,时尚，风尚,调式
senses.sentence: The bicycle reigned supreme as Britain's most popular **mode** of transport.
senses.translation: 当时自行车是英国最流行的交通工具。

senses.definition: n.模型,模特儿,模式,典型
senses.sentence: The functionalist **model** of industrial society was subjected to conceptual criticism.
senses.translation: 工业社会的实用主义模型在概念上遭到了批判。

senses.definition: adj.有节制的,稳健的，温和的,适度的，中等的,<美俚>慢吞吞的
senses.sentence: The new centre-right government's radical objectives are often couched in **moderate** terms.
senses.translation: 新的中右翼政府经常以温和的语言表述其激进的目标。

senses.definition: adj.现代的,近代的,新式的,当代风格的
senses.sentence: This boxed collection captures 64 of the greatest **modern** love songs.
senses.translation: 这套盒装专辑收录了64首最好听的当代爱情歌曲。

senses.definition: n.现代化,现代化事物
senses.sentence: Successful agricultural reform is also a sine qua non of Mexico's **modernisation**.
senses.translation: 成功的农业改革也是墨西哥实现现代化的必要条件。

senses.definition: vt.使现代化，使适应现代需要
senses.contextMeaning: 使现代化，使适应现代需要
senses.sentence: There is a pressing need to **modernise** our electoral system.
senses.translation: 我们的选举制度迫切需要现代化。

senses.definition: n.现代化，现代化的事物
senses.sentence: The **modernization** of the industry was phased over at 20 - year period.
senses.translation: 工业现代化分20年逐步实现.

senses.definition: vt.使现代化，使适应现代需要
senses.contextMeaning: 使现代化，使适应现代需要
senses.sentence: The government has announced an ambitious programme to **modernize** the railway network.
senses.translation: 政府宣布了一项高要求的计划，使铁路网现代化。

senses.definition: adj.谦虚的，谦逊的,适度的，适中的,端庄的,羞怯的
senses.sentence: Though his background was **modest**, it was in no sense deprived.
senses.translation: 尽管他家境一般，但也并不贫穷。

senses.definition: vi.被修饰,修改
senses.sentence: Established practices are difficult to **modify**.
senses.translation: 既定的惯例是很难更改的.

senses.definition: n.模块,组件,（宇宙飞船上各个独立的）舱,测量流水等的单位
senses.sentence: They have docked a robot **module** alongside the orbiting space station.
senses.translation: 他们已经将一个自动操作舱与沿轨道运行的空间站并行对接上了。

senses.definition: adj.潮湿的,微湿的,多雨的,含泪的
senses.sentence: The outside air was heavy and **moist** and sultry.
senses.translation: 外面的空气沉滞、潮湿而闷热。

senses.definition: n.水分,湿气,潮湿,降雨量
senses.sentence: A thin, glistening thread of **moisture** ran along the rough concrete sill.
senses.translation: 在粗糙不平的水泥窗台上有一条细细的发光水印。

senses.definition: n.模子,模式,类型,霉
senses.sentence: The plastic was poured into the **mold** and left to set until it was firm.
senses.translation: 塑料被注入模子后,便放在一边让它慢慢凝结硬化.

senses.definition: n.分子,微小颗粒
senses.sentence: So tell me what this **molecule** does that makes it special.
senses.translation: 那么告诉我这个分子有何作用而使其与众不同。

senses.definition: n.瞬间，片刻,时刻,重要，紧要,[物]力矩
senses.sentence: I'll report back the **moment** I have located him.
senses.translation: 我一找到他就马上汇报。

senses.definition: n.[物]动量,势头,动力,要素，契机
senses.sentence: Demands for his dismissal have gathered **momentum** in recent weeks.
senses.translation: 最近几周，要求将他解职的呼声越来越高。

senses.definition: n.星期一,周一
senses.sentence: Wendy popped in for a quick bite to eat on **Monday** night.
senses.translation: 温迪周一晚上过来匆匆吃了点儿饭。

senses.definition: adj.货币的，金钱的,钱的（尤指一国的金融）,金融的,财政的，财政（上）的
senses.sentence: The grand design of Europe's **monetary** union is already agreed.
senses.translation: 欧洲统一货币的宏伟构想已经获得认同。

senses.definition: n.钱,财富,薪水,款项
senses.sentence: I spent lots of **money** on smart new outfits for work.
senses.translation: 我花大笔钱购置了上班时穿的漂亮新套装。

senses.definition: vt.监控，监听,搜集，记录,测定,监督
senses.sentence: Meetings are held periodically to **monitor** progress on the case.
senses.translation: 定期举行会议以监督案件的进展。

senses.definition: vi.胡闹,捣蛋
senses.sentence: Come here, you cheeky little **monkey**!
senses.translation: 过来，你这没有教养的小捣蛋鬼！

senses.definition: n.单翼机
senses.sentence: He was killed when his **monoplane** stalled and dived into the ground.
senses.translation: 他因驾驶的单翼飞机失速坠地而丧生。

senses.definition: n.垄断,专卖,垄断者,专利品
senses.sentence: Had he succeeded, he would have acquired a **monopoly**.
senses.translation: 要是他当时成功了，他就会取得垄断地位。

senses.definition: n.单调的语调，单调的声音
senses.contextMeaning: 单调的语调，单调的声音
senses.sentence: He was seen on TV delivering platitudes about the crisis in a **monotone** voice.
senses.translation: 人们看到他在电视上念经似地就危机问题老调重弹。

senses.definition: adj.（声音，话语）单调的，无抑扬顿挫的,枯燥无味的
senses.contextMeaning: （声音，话语）单调的，无抑扬顿挫的
senses.sentence: Closures and job losses are again being announced with **monotonous** regularity.
senses.translation: 倒闭和失业的消息又在一次次地反复宣布着。

senses.definition: adj.巨大的，庞大的,（建筑物）巍峨的
senses.sentence: During the 1980s **monster** publishing houses started to swallow up smaller companies.
senses.translation: 20世纪80年代，一些出版巨头开始吞并一些较小的公司。

senses.definition: n.月，月份,一个月的时间
senses.sentence: One **month** before the deadline we see the hollowness of these promises.
senses.translation: 离最后期限只有一个月时，我们认识到了这些许诺都是空头支票。

senses.definition: n.月刊,月经
senses.sentence: She presents a **monthly** magazine programme on the BBC.
senses.translation: 她在英国广播公司主持一个月刊节目。

senses.definition: n.纪念碑,遗迹,遗址,丰碑
senses.sentence: As Wren's epitaph famously declares, the cathedral itself is his **monument**.
senses.translation: 众所周知，雷恩的墓志铭中写道，大教堂本身就是他的纪念碑。

senses.definition: n.心情,语气,气氛,坏心境
senses.sentence: He faced the press, initially, in a somewhat subdued **mood**.
senses.translation: 他最初面对媒体时情绪有点忧郁。

senses.definition: n.月亮，月球,卫星,月状物，新月状物
senses.sentence: The half **moon** is hidden behind some wispy clouds.
senses.translation: 半轮月亮躲在淡淡的云彩之后。

senses.definition: adj.道德的，道义上的,精神上的,无疑的，当然的,教导道德的
senses.sentence: Her case falls within the ambit of **moral** law.
senses.translation: 她的案例属于道德法律的范畴。

senses.definition: n.道德,道德准则,品德高尚的行为,道德观
senses.sentence: War turns **morality** inside out: killing and cruelty are virtues.
senses.translation: 战争颠倒是非：杀戮与残忍成了美德。

senses.definition: n.更多,附加，添加
senses.sentence: If you build **more** plastics into cars, the car lasts longer.
senses.translation: 如果汽车采用更多塑料元件，寿命会更长一些。

senses.definition: adv.再者,此外,而且,同时
senses.sentence: **Moreover**, Ramsay was no mean thinker himself.
senses.translation: 而且拉姆齐自己也是一位出色的思想家。

senses.definition: n.早晨,上午,黎明,早期，初期
senses.sentence: A Delta II rocket was launched from Cape Canaveral early this **morning**.
senses.translation: 今天一早，一枚“德尔塔”Ⅱ型火箭在卡纳维拉尔角发射升空。

senses.definition: adj.致命的,不共戴天的,终有一死的,极度的
senses.sentence: Adultery is a **mortal** sin.
senses.translation: 通奸是不可饶恕的罪孽。

senses.definition: n.死亡数，死亡率,必死性，必死的命运
senses.sentence: Premature birth is the main cause of perinatal **mortality**.
senses.translation: 早产是临产死亡的主要原因。

senses.definition: n.抵押,抵押单据，抵押证明,抵押权，债权
senses.sentence: Thousands of its customers are in arrears with loans and **mortgage** payments.
senses.translation: 有数千客户拖欠其贷款和抵押贷款还款。

senses.definition: vt.抵押
senses.sentence: The recent rebound in **mortgage** rates could snuff out the housing recovery.
senses.translation: 抵押贷款利率最近的回升可能会扼杀房地产的复苏。

senses.definition: n.马赛克,镶嵌图案,镶嵌工艺,[植]花叶病
senses.sentence: a design in **mosaic**
senses.translation: 马赛克图案

senses.definition: n.蚊子
senses.sentence: I threw aside my **mosquito** net and jumped out of bed.
senses.translation: 我把蚊帐甩到一边，跳下床来。

senses.definition: n.最大限度,大部分,大多数人
senses.sentence: **Most** of the wine was unfit for human consumption.
senses.translation: 这些酒中大部分都不适于人类饮用。

senses.definition: adv.大部分，多半,主要地,基本上,通常
senses.sentence: Timothy was crying, **mostly** from exhaustion, and his nose was running.
senses.translation: 蒂莫西正在哭泣，主要是因为太累了，而且他还流着鼻涕。

senses.definition: n.汽车旅馆
senses.sentence: He took off at once and headed back to the **motel**.
senses.translation: 他立刻离开，回到汽车旅馆。

senses.definition: n.母亲，妈妈,女修道院院长,大娘
senses.sentence: The desire to be a **mother** may creep up on you unexpectedly.
senses.translation: 你会不知不觉地产生想当母亲的渴望。

senses.definition: n.运动,手势,动机，意向,请求
senses.sentence: Whenever recession strikes, a chain reaction is set into **motion**.
senses.translation: 只要经济不景气，连锁反应就开始了。

senses.definition: vt.使有动机，促动，激发，诱导,刺激,激发…的积极性
senses.contextMeaning: 使有动机，促动，激发，诱导
senses.sentence: Our challenge is to **motivate** those voters and inspire them to join our cause.
senses.translation: 我们面临的挑战是如何调动那些选民的积极性并鼓励他们加入我们的事业。

senses.definition: n.动机，主旨,（艺术作品的）主题，题材
senses.sentence: The **motive** of the executions would be to instil fear.
senses.translation: 执行死刑的动机是要灌输恐惧。

senses.definition: n.马达，发动机，[火箭]助推器,原动者，原动力,汽车,[解]运动肌，运动神经
senses.contextMeaning: 马达，发动机，[火箭]助推器
senses.sentence: Stefano used a **motor** cycle to herd the sheep.
senses.translation: 斯特凡诺骑一辆摩托车放羊。

senses.definition: n.铸模,模型,性格,霉
senses.sentence: If damp, musty buildings make you ill, **mould** is probably the cause.
senses.translation: 如果潮湿发霉的建筑令你生病了，霉菌很可能是病因。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.登上,骑上
senses.sentence: America has enough firepower in the area to **mount** sustained air strikes.
senses.translation: 美国在该地区拥有足够的火力发动持续的空中打击。

senses.definition: n.山，山岳,山脉,一大堆,大量
senses.sentence: I'll run over to Short **Mountain** and check on Mrs Adams.
senses.translation: 我会开车去肖特山看看亚当斯夫人。

senses.definition: vt.表示深深的遗憾,哀悼,悲哀地说
senses.sentence: As the nation continued to **mourn**, the new President of South Africa paid his own tribute.
senses.translation: 举国仍在哀悼之际，南非新任总统也表达了自己的怀念之情。

senses.definition: n.老鼠,鼠标,羞怯[胆小]的人,[非正式用语] 眼部青肿
senses.sentence: It's a cat-and-**mouse** game to him, and I'm the **mouse**.
senses.translation: 在他看来，这是个猫捉老鼠的把戏，而我就是老鼠。

senses.definition: n.口,出入口,传闻
senses.sentence: His **mouth** was a little open, as if he'd started to scream.
senses.translation: 他的嘴微微张开,似乎是要开始尖叫.

senses.definition: n.运动,活动,动作，举动,乐章
senses.sentence: Monks shave their heads, as do devotees of the Hare Krishna **movement**.
senses.translation: 和尚要剃度，克利须那派教徒也一样。

senses.definition: n.电影,电影院,电影业
senses.sentence: The **movie** sees Burton psychoanalysing Firth to cure him of his depression.
senses.translation: 在电影中伯顿对弗思进行了精神分析，想要治愈他的抑郁症。

senses.definition: adv.非常,差不多,很多地,很大程度上
senses.sentence: Mrs Allen's style of cooking owes **much** to her mother-in-law.
senses.translation: 艾伦太太的烹饪风格很大程度上承传于她的婆婆。

senses.definition: adj.多国的,跨国的
senses.sentence: The US troops would be part of a **multinational** force.
senses.translation: 美军将是多国部队的一个组成部分。

senses.definition: adj.多重的,多个的,复杂的,多功能的
senses.sentence: The government performed competently in the face of **multiple** challenges.
senses.translation: 面临多种挑战，政府表现得非常出色。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.乘,（使）相乘,（使）增加,（使）繁殖
senses.sentence: Take the time in seconds, square it, and **multiply** by 5.12.
senses.translation: 记下用了多少秒时间，将其平方，再乘以5.12。

senses.definition: adj.多种用途的，多目标的,多用途,多用
senses.sentence: A **multipurpose** programming language used primarily for command and control applications.
senses.translation: 一种多用途的编程语言,主要用在指挥和控制应用软件之中.

senses.definition: n.大量，许多,大众，人群
senses.sentence: There are a **multitude** of small quiet roads to cycle along.
senses.translation: 有很多可以骑车的宁静小路。

senses.definition: adj.市的，市政的,地方自治的,都市的，市营的，市制的,内政的
senses.sentence: The decor was reminiscent of a **municipal** arts-and-leisure centre.
senses.translation: 这种布置让人想起都市里的艺术休闲中心。

senses.definition: n.谋杀,杀戮,极艰难[令人沮丧]的经历
senses.sentence: 13 men have been questioned in connection with the **murder**.
senses.translation: 有13名男子因谋杀案受到盘问。

senses.definition: n.咕哝，发牢骚,低声的抱怨,低声说话
senses.sentence: The droning **murmur** of the doctor's voice in the bedroom had ceased.
senses.translation: 卧室里医生喋喋不休的低语声已经停下了。

senses.definition: n.肌肉,力量,权威，权力
senses.sentence: This can lead to bodily weakness and **muscle** wastage.
senses.translation: 这样可能会导致身体虚弱和肌肉萎缩。

senses.definition: adj.肌肉的,壮健的，肌肉发达的，强壮的
senses.sentence: He was wearing shorts which showed his long, **muscular**, hairy legs.
senses.translation: 他穿着短裤，露出自己强壮多毛的长腿。

senses.definition: n.博物馆
senses.sentence: The **museum** will have a permanent exhibition of 60 vintage cars.
senses.translation: 这个博物馆将长期展出60辆老爷车。

senses.definition: n.蘑菇,蘑菇状物，蘑菇形物体,（女用）蘑菇形草帽,暴发户
senses.sentence: a cheese and **mushroom** omelette
senses.translation: 奶酪蘑菇蛋饼

senses.definition: n.音乐,乐曲,乐谱,乐队
senses.sentence: He once told an interviewer that he didn't even like rock **music**.
senses.translation: 他曾告诉一位采访者，他甚至都不喜欢摇滚乐。

senses.definition: adj.音乐的，用于音乐的,喜爱[精通]音乐的,音调优美的,悦耳的
senses.sentence: The drum is one of the oldest **musical** instruments.
senses.translation: 鼓是最古老的乐器之一。

senses.definition: n.音乐家
senses.sentence: He feels that he was destined to become a **musician**.
senses.translation: 他觉得自己注定会成为一名音乐家。

senses.definition: aux.必须,必然要,（做出逻辑推断）,（表示坚持）
senses.sentence: You **must** have noticed how tired he sometimes looks.
senses.translation: 你一定注意到他有时候显得特别疲惫。

senses.definition: n.咕哝,小声低语，小声抱怨,怨言
senses.sentence: I heard a **mutter** of discontent.
senses.translation: 我听到有人小声咕哝着表示不满.

senses.definition: adj.共有的,共同的,相互的,彼此的
senses.sentence: It's plain that he adores his daughter, and the feeling is **mutual**.
senses.translation: 明摆着他很喜欢自己的女儿，而且女儿也喜欢他。

senses.definition: adj.我的(I的所有格形式)
senses.sentence: English has hurt me a thousand times, but I still regard it as **my** first love.
senses.translation: 英语伤我千百遍，我待英语如初恋。

senses.definition: pron.我自己，亲自
senses.sentence: I found **myself** behind a curtain, necking with my best friend'swife.
senses.translation: 我意识到自己在帘子后面吻着至友的妻子。

senses.definition: adj.神秘的，诡秘的,难以理解的，不可思议的,魔,玄妙
senses.sentence: Soon they were dead, victims of a **mysterious** poisoner.
senses.translation: 不久他们就死了，是一个神秘的投毒者下的手。

senses.definition: n.秘密，谜,神秘，神秘的事物,推理小说，推理剧,常作mysteries 秘技，秘诀
senses.sentence: The **mystery** hero imme-diately alerted police after spotting a bomb.
senses.translation: 那个无名英雄发现炸弹后马上报了警。

senses.definition: n.神话,神怪故事,奇人，奇事,虚构的人，虚构的事
senses.sentence: Rumour, **myth** and hearsay obscure the truth after months of bloodshed.
senses.translation: 杀戮持续了数月后，真相在谣言、谎话和传闻的遮掩下变得模糊不清。

senses.definition: n.钉子,指甲，趾甲,钉状物,纳尔
senses.sentence: A mirror hung on a **nail** above the washstand.
senses.translation: 脸盆架上方用钉子挂着一面镜子。

senses.definition: adj.幼稚的,天真的,单纯的
senses.sentence: The drama takes an idealistic, even a **naive** view of the subject.
senses.translation: 这部戏在对待这一主题上有些理想化，甚至是天真。

senses.definition: adj.裸体的，裸露的,率直的，赤裸裸的,缺乏保护,不加掩饰的
senses.sentence: The worms cannot be seen by the **naked** eye.
senses.translation: 这些虫子用肉眼看不见。

senses.definition: n.名字,名声,有…名称的,著名的人物
senses.sentence: They also left a card, imprinted with the **name** Sean Lynch.
senses.translation: 他们还留下了一张名片，上面印着肖恩·林奇的名字。

senses.definition: adv.即，也就是,换句话说,亦即,就是说
senses.sentence: The book was inspired by a real person, **namely** Tamara de Treaux.
senses.translation: 那本书的灵感源于一个真实人物，即塔玛拉·德特罗。

senses.definition: n.小睡，打盹,一种牌戏,绒毛,孤注一掷
senses.sentence: The **nap** of the coat has been worn off.
senses.translation: 外衣上的绒毛已经磨掉了.

senses.definition: n.记叙文,故事,叙述，记事,叙述手法
senses.sentence: The **narrative** pulls you along like a runaway train.
senses.translation: 这个故事就像一辆失控的高速列车，读起来惊险刺激。

senses.definition: n.海峡,狭路，隘路,狭窄的水道
senses.sentence: Sailing boats lay at anchor in the **narrow** waterway.
senses.translation: 帆船停泊在狭窄的水道上。

senses.definition: adj.肮脏的,下流的，令人讨厌的,恶劣的，艰险的,严重的
senses.sentence: They've picked up a really **nasty** infection from something they've eaten.
senses.translation: 他们因吃错东西而得了很严重的感染症。

senses.definition: n.国家,民族,国民,政府
senses.sentence: Albania is a small **nation** state of around 3 million people.
senses.translation: 阿尔巴尼亚是一个大约有300万人口的单一民族独立国家。

senses.definition: adj.国家的,国有的,国民的,民族主义的
senses.sentence: He will soon be back in training for next year's **National**.
senses.translation: 他将很快回来为明年的全国联赛进行特训。

senses.definition: n.国籍,国家,民族性,部落
senses.sentence: Discrimination by employers on the grounds of race and **nationality** was illegal.
senses.translation: 雇主以种族或国籍为由歧视员工是非法的。

senses.definition: adj.本国的,土著的,天生的,天真的，纯朴的
senses.sentence: Before all this the island was populated by **native** American Arawaks.
senses.translation: 在所有这一切发生之前，这个岛上居住的是印第安阿拉瓦克人。

senses.definition: adj.自然的,物质的,天生的,不做作的
senses.sentence: Mainline feminism was arguing for the inherent beauty of the **natural** woman.
senses.translation: 主流女权主义思想倡导女性天生的自然美。

senses.definition: n.自然,天性,天理,类型
senses.sentence: The **nature** of the polymer is currently a trade secret.
senses.translation: 这一聚合物的性质目前是个商业机密。

senses.definition: adj.（有）海军的，军舰的，船的
senses.sentence: In a **naval** battle your aim is to sink the enemy's ship.
senses.translation: 在海战中目标就是击沉敌船。

senses.definition: n.航行（学）,航海（术）,海上交通
senses.sentence: The expedition was wrecked by bad planning and poor **navigation**.
senses.translation: 这次探险因计划不周和导航不利而失败。

senses.definition: n.海军,船队
senses.sentence: The **Navy** is to carry out an examination of the wreck tomorrow.
senses.translation: 海军明天将对失事船只进行细查。

senses.definition: prep.（表示程度）接近,（表示位置）靠近,（表示时间）将近,接近于（某种状态）
senses.sentence: He awoke to find Charlie standing **near** the bed.
senses.translation: 他醒了过来，发现查利正站在床边。

senses.definition: adj.近的,亲密的,近似,（亲属关系）近亲
senses.sentence: Southbound traffic tailed back for twenty miles on the M5 **near** Bristol.
senses.translation: 在布里斯托尔附近的5号高速公路上，南行的车辆排成了绵延20英里的长龙。

senses.definition: adv.附近地，不远地
senses.sentence: **Nearby** there is a stretch of white sand beach perfect for sunbathing.
senses.translation: 附近有一片白色沙滩，是沐日光浴的绝佳场所。

senses.definition: adv.几乎，差不多,险乎
senses.sentence: It is **nearly** always women who are the primary care givers.
senses.translation: 从事初级保健护理工作的几乎都是女性。

senses.definition: adj.整洁的，干净的,灵巧的,匀整的,未搀水的
senses.sentence: **Neat** solutions are not easily found to these issues.
senses.translation: 很难找到解决这些问题的巧妙办法。

senses.definition: adv.必要地,必需地,必定地,必然地
senses.sentence: He is not attempting **necessarily** to reproduce the cadence of speech.
senses.translation: 他不想刻意重复那种讲话的语调。

senses.definition: n.必需品
senses.sentence: For her, books were as **necessary** to life as bread.
senses.translation: 对她来说，书就像面包一样，是生活必需品。

senses.definition: vt.使…成为必要，需要,强迫，迫使
senses.sentence: It is common that a single requirement will **necessitate** multiple interface elements.
senses.translation: 一个需求可以由多个界面元素来满足,这种情况比较普遍.

senses.definition: n.必要（性）,（迫切）需要,必需品,自然规律
senses.sentence: Some people have to lead stressful lifestyles out of **necessity**.
senses.translation: 一些人迫于生计不得不过着紧张忙碌的生活。

senses.definition: n.颈，脖子,衣领,海峡,[地]岩颈
senses.sentence: He had twined his chubby arms around Vincent's **neck**.
senses.translation: 他胖乎乎的双臂搂住文森特的脖子。

senses.definition: n.需要,需要的东西,责任,贫穷
senses.sentence: You will **need** a pot of broth for poaching.
senses.translation: 你需要一锅汤来煮。

senses.definition: n.针,针状物,<口>刺激性言行
senses.sentence: I hyperventilate when they come near me with the **needle**.
senses.translation: 当他们拿着注射针走近我时，我的呼吸急速加快。

senses.definition: adj.消极的，否认的,[数]负的,[心]反抗性的,无预期结果的
senses.sentence: Stimulate the site of greatest pain with a small **negative** current.
senses.translation: 以微弱负电流刺激疼得最厉害的部位。

senses.definition: n.玩忽,被忽略的状态,怠慢
senses.sentence: After years of **neglect** and decline the city was cleaning itself up.
senses.translation: 多年的玩忽职守和经济萧条过后，这个城市在进行自我整顿。

senses.definition: adj.可以忽略的,微不足道的,无足轻重的,不足轻重
senses.sentence: The company says the cost of relocation will be **negligible**.
senses.translation: 公司称搬迁的费用可以忽略不计。

senses.definition: vi.谈判，协商，交涉
senses.sentence: The driver failed to **negotiate** a bend and ran into a tree.
senses.translation: 司机没能顺利拐弯，撞到了树上。

senses.definition: n.<美>邻居，邻国
senses.sentence: A **neighbor** sheltered the boy for seven days.
senses.translation: 一个邻居收留了这个男孩在他家藏了7天。

senses.definition: n.地区,某地区的人,与某处邻近的地区,临近街坊
senses.sentence: It is a **neighborhood** beset by all the usual inner-city problems.
senses.translation: 这是个为各种内城常见问题所困扰的社区。

senses.definition: n.邻居,邻近的人[物],邻国,世人
senses.sentence: Surprise a new **neighbour** with one of your favourite home-made dishes.
senses.translation: 做一道拿手的家常小菜，给你的新邻居一个惊喜。

senses.definition: n.居住区,周边地区,大约,在…附近
senses.sentence: He was born and grew up in the Flatbush **neighbourhood** of Brooklyn.
senses.translation: 他出生在布鲁克林的弗拉特布什一带，并在那儿长大成人。

senses.definition: adj.（两者）都不的
senses.sentence: The report concludes that I acted **neither** fraudulently nor improperly.
senses.translation: 报告最后认为我的行为既没有欺骗性也没有任何不妥。

senses.definition: n.神经,勇气，胆量,[植] 叶脉,中枢
senses.sentence: He had the **nerve** to ask me to prove who I was.
senses.translation: 他竟敢要求我证明我自己的身份。

senses.definition: adj.焦虑的,紧张不安的,神经质的
senses.sentence: I get very **nervous** because I'm using a lot of expensive equipment.
senses.translation: 因为正在使用很多昂贵的设备，所以我非常紧张。

senses.definition: n.（鸟）窝,温床,（套叠在一起的）一套物件,藏匿处
senses.sentence: The **nest** contained eight little mice that were naked and blind.
senses.translation: 窝里有8只还没长毛、眼睛尚未睁开的小老鼠。

senses.definition: n.网,网状织物,球网,网罩
senses.sentence: There was a **net** outflow of about £50m in short-term capital.
senses.translation: 短期资金净流出额大约为5,000万英镑。

senses.definition: n.网,（电视与计算机）网络,网状物,广播网
senses.sentence: An American **network** says it has obtained the recordings.
senses.translation: 美国一家广播网声称已经得到了那些录音材料。

senses.definition: adj.中立的,（化学中）中性的,暗淡的,不带电的
senses.sentence: Graham put the van in **neutral** and jumped out into the road.
senses.translation: 格雷厄姆把货车挂到空挡，自己跳到马路上。

senses.definition: n.[物]中子
senses.sentence: A **neutron** star has a gravitational field strong enough to generate X-rays.
senses.translation: 中子星上存在强大的重力场，足以产生X射线。

senses.definition: adv.从不，从来没有,一点也不，决不,<口>不会…吧，没有,不曾
senses.sentence: Failure is **never** quite so frightening as regret.
senses.translation: 比失败更令人恐惧的是懊悔。

senses.definition: conj.然而,尽管如此
senses.sentence: Our defeat was expected but it is disappointing **nevertheless**.
senses.translation: 我们的失败是意料中的事，尽管如此，还是令人失望。

senses.definition: adj.新的，崭新的,新鲜的，新到的,现代的,初次（听到）的
senses.sentence: She was afraid in a way that was quite **new** to her.
senses.translation: 她感到从未有过的害怕。

senses.definition: n.新闻,消息,（可当作新闻内容的）人,物
senses.sentence: The **news** will come as a great relief to the French authorities.
senses.translation: 这个消息会让法国当局大大松一口气。

senses.definition: n.报纸，报,旧报纸,新闻纸
senses.sentence: Under the **newspaper**, atop a sheet of paper, lay an envelope.
senses.translation: 在报纸下面的一张纸上放着一个信封。

senses.definition: n.下一位,下一个
senses.sentence: I would prefer him to be with us **next** season.
senses.translation: 我更希望他下一个赛季和我们在一起。

senses.definition: adj.美好的，愉快的,正派的,友好的，亲切的,细致的
senses.sentence: She met Mr and Mrs Ricciardi, who were very **nice** to her.
senses.translation: 她见到了里恰尔迪夫妇，他们对她非常友好。

senses.definition: n.[化]镍,五分镍币
senses.sentence: In the squares place a penny, **nickel**, dime and quarter in that order. The object is to reverse the order of these coins.
senses.translation: 在这些方块中按顺序放置1分、5分、10分和25分的硬币各一枚。目标是颠倒这些硬币的顺序。

senses.definition: n.绰号,诨名,昵称
senses.sentence: Andrew roared with delight when he heard Rachel's **nickname** for the baby.
senses.translation: 安德鲁听到雷切尔给婴儿起的绰号时，不禁高兴得大笑起来。

senses.definition: n.夜,晚上,（举行盛事的）夜晚
senses.sentence: Two men were helping police with their inquiries at Salisbury last **night**.
senses.translation: 两名男子昨天夜里在索尔兹伯里接受了警方盘问。

senses.definition: n.噩梦,<口>可怕的事情，无法摆脱的恐惧,泛滥成灾,紧张
senses.sentence: In practice a graduate tax is an administrative **nightmare**.
senses.translation: 毕业税具体操作起来不啻一场行政噩梦。

senses.definition: num.九,九个,第九
senses.sentence: Seventy-**nine** voted in the affirmative, and none in the negative.
senses.translation: 79人投赞成票，没有人投反对票。

senses.definition: num.十九,十九个,第十九
senses.sentence: He was a kid really, not more than eighteen or **nineteen**.
senses.translation: 他实际上还是个孩子，最多不过十八九岁。

senses.definition: num.九十
senses.sentence: Almost **ninety** per cent of all rapes and violent assaults went unreported.
senses.translation: 几乎90%的强奸案和暴力侵害案都没有报案。

senses.definition: n.[化]氮，氮气
senses.sentence: The atmosphere consist of more than 70 % of **nitrogen**.
senses.translation: 大气中含有70%以上的氮气.

senses.definition: adv.不,否,一点也没有
senses.sentence: I have $100m hidden away where **no** one will ever find it.
senses.translation: 我把1亿美元藏到了一个永远没人会找到的地方。

senses.definition: adj.高尚的,贵族的,外表庄严和庄重的,表现出崇高的
senses.sentence: We'll always justify our actions with **noble** sounding theories.
senses.translation: 我们总会用听起来非常高尚的理论为我们的行动辩护。

senses.definition: pron.没有人，无人
senses.sentence: **Nobody** else believed that they had tried to rub out the pope.
senses.translation: 其他人都不相信他们试图杀死教皇。

senses.definition: vi.点头,打瞌睡,上下摆动,变得粗心大意
senses.sentence: He turned with a little **nod** and I watched him walk away.
senses.translation: 他边点了点头边转过身，我看着他走了。

senses.definition: n.点头,点头同意,打瞌睡，打盹,粗心大意
senses.sentence: A quick **nod** of approval would have done nicely.
senses.translation: 要是当时立即点头同意就好了。

senses.definition: n.噪音,嘈杂声，喧闹声,声音，声响,杂音
senses.sentence: Sightseers may be a little overwhelmed by the crowds and **noise**.
senses.translation: 拥挤的人群和喧闹的噪音可能会让游客有些茫然不知所措。

senses.definition: adj.嘈杂的,喧闹的,充满噪音的,吵吵闹闹的
senses.sentence: His daughter was very active and **noisy** in the mornings.
senses.translation: 他的女儿一到上午就很好动，吵吵闹闹的。

senses.definition: adj.名义上的,微不足道的,票面上的,名字的，列名的
senses.sentence: All the ferries carry bicycles free or for a **nominal** charge.
senses.translation: 所有的渡船都免费或以极低的收费运载自行车。

senses.definition: vt.提名…为候选人,任命,挑选,指定（时间、日期、名称等）
senses.sentence: The public will be able to **nominate** candidates for awards such as the MBE.
senses.translation: 公众将可以推荐诸如英帝国勋章之类的奖项的候选人。

senses.definition: pron.没有人，没有一人,没有一个,没有一部分，没有一点
senses.sentence: She exhibited **none** of the narcissistic and nihilistic tendencies of her peers.
senses.translation: 她一点儿都没表现出同龄人那种自恋和虚无主义的性格倾向。

senses.definition: adv.虽然如此，但是
senses.sentence: The book is too long but, **nonetheless**, informative and entertaining.
senses.translation: 这本书篇幅太长，但是很有知识性和趣味性。

senses.definition: adj.不住在住所的
senses.sentence: Local banks also see a growing market in **nonresident** citizens.
senses.translation: 本地银行还在非居民的本国公民中看到了增长市场.

senses.definition: n.胡说，废话,荒谬的念头,愚蠢的行为,胡闹
senses.sentence: She is fascinated by algebra while he considers it meaningless **nonsense**.
senses.translation: 她对代数非常着迷，而他却认为代数毫无意义。

senses.definition: n.正午，中午,全盛期，顶点,〈古〉午夜,晌午
senses.sentence: There is a ceaseless struggle from **noon** to night.
senses.translation: 从中午到夜晚，争斗没有停歇。

senses.definition: conj.也不,也不是,和neither 或 not 连用,去甲
senses.sentence: The report concludes that I acted neither fraudulently **nor** improperly.
senses.translation: 报告最后认为我的行为既没有欺骗性也没有任何不妥。

senses.definition: n.标准,规范,准则,（劳动）定额
senses.sentence: Families of six or seven are the **norm** in Borough Park.
senses.translation: 在区公园住宅区六口或七口之家十分普遍。

senses.definition: adj.正常的,正规的，标准的,[数学]正交的,精神健全的
senses.sentence: The device can discriminate between the cancerous and the **normal** cells.
senses.translation: 这台仪器可以辨别癌细胞和正常的细胞。

senses.definition: n.正常化,标准化,正态化
senses.sentence: The visIt ' signalled the **normalization** of relations between the two countries.
senses.translation: 这次 访问显示 两国关系已经正常化.

senses.definition: n.北方,北部,（美国南北战争时与南方作战的）北部各州,北方发达国家（尤指欧洲和北美各国）
senses.sentence: Two trains collided head-on in **north**-eastern Germany early this morning.
senses.translation: 今天早上德国东北部两列火车迎面相撞。

senses.definition: n.东北，东北方向,东北部
senses.sentence: I was born in the **northeast**.
senses.translation: 我出生于东北部.

senses.definition: adj.北方的，北部的,来自北方的,北风
senses.sentence: The film takes no position on the politics of **Northern** Ireland.
senses.translation: 这部电影未在北爱尔兰政治问题上选择站边。

senses.definition: adv.向北方
senses.sentence: Tropical storm Marco is pushing **northward** up Florida's coast.
senses.translation: 热带风暴“马可”正沿佛罗里达海岸向北推进。

senses.definition: adv.向北
senses.sentence: The path angled downhill and **northwards**.
senses.translation: 小路向山下伸展，然后向北延伸。

senses.definition: n.西北，西北方向,西北部
senses.sentence: Take the **northwest** road; it is the shortest way.
senses.translation: 走向西北的那条路, 那是最近的路.

senses.definition: adj.在西北的,西北部的,向西北的,（风、光线）来自西北方的
senses.sentence: Three people have been killed in a bomb explosion in **northwest** Spain.
senses.translation: 在西班牙西北部的炸弹爆炸事件中，已有3人死亡。

senses.definition: n.鼻子,嗅觉,芳香，香气,突出的部分
senses.sentence: She wrinkled her **nose**, piqued by his total lack of enthusiasm.
senses.translation: 她皱皱鼻子，为他毫无热情而感到不快。

senses.definition: adv.不,[用以表示否定、否认、拒绝、禁止等]不是,几乎不,未必，没有[用于否定后面的词或短语]
senses.sentence: Success is **not** guaranteed. It is **not** handed to you. Success is earned.
senses.translation: 成功无法保证，并非唾手可得。成功必须靠自己去争取。

senses.definition: adj.值得注意的,显著的,著名的
senses.sentence: Several **notable** researchers are studying the effects of hyperventilation.
senses.translation: 几位著名的研究人员正在研究通气过度的后果。

senses.definition: n.笔记簿,笔记本电脑,手册,笔记本
senses.sentence: Tamsin materialized at her side, **notebook** at the ready.
senses.translation: 塔姆辛从她身旁冒了出来，且备好了笔记本。

senses.definition: pron.没有东西,没有事情,无关紧要的东西,毫无趣味的事
senses.sentence: Beauty is an attitude. It has **nothing** to do with age.
senses.translation: 美是一种态度，与年龄无关。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.注意
senses.sentence: Precious few homebuyers will **notice** any reduction in their monthly repayments.
senses.translation: 极少数购房者会注意到他们月还款额的减少。

senses.definition: vt.通知,留心,关照,注意到
senses.sentence: It's not a case of whether anyone would **notice** or not.
senses.translation: 这不是会不会有人注意到的问题。

senses.definition: adj.显而易见的，明显的,引人注目的，令人瞩目的,显著的，重要的,可以察觉的
senses.sentence: There's also been a **noticeable** rise in the political temperature.
senses.translation: 政治气氛也明显升温了。

senses.definition: vt.通知,布告
senses.sentence: I don't suppose it occurred to you to **notify** the police.
senses.translation: 我看你没想过要去通知警察。

senses.definition: n.概念，观念,意见，见解,奇想,打算
senses.sentence: The **notion** that art should be controlled by intellectuals sickened him.
senses.translation: 他讨厌艺术应由知识分子所掌控的观点。

senses.definition: adj.臭名昭著的,臭名远扬的,声名狼藉的,恶名昭著
senses.sentence: The accident happened on a **notorious** black spot on the A43.
senses.translation: 事故发生在A43号公路上一个出了名的事故多发地段。

senses.definition: prep.尽管,虽然
senses.sentence: He despised William Pitt, **notwithstanding** the similar views they both held.
senses.translation: 尽管他和威廉·皮特看法相似，却瞧不起他。

senses.definition: adv.尽管如此，仍然,还是
senses.sentence: **Notwithstanding** some major financial problems, the school has had a successful year.
senses.translation: 虽然有些重大的经费问题，这所学校一年来还是很成功。

senses.definition: vt.滋养，施肥于,抚养，教养,怀抱（希望、怨恨）,使健壮
senses.sentence: They needed good food to **nourish** their bodies.
senses.translation: 他们需要好食品滋养身体.

senses.definition: n.（长篇）小说,[法]新法，附律
senses.sentence: The scriptwriter helped him to adapt his **novel** for the screen.
senses.translation: 编剧帮助他将其所著小说改编成电影。

senses.definition: n.新奇,新奇的事物,新颖小巧而价廉的物品
senses.sentence: They're treating it like a game, a **novelty**. That's got to stop.
senses.translation: 他们把这件事当成了一个游戏，觉得很新鲜。不能再那样下去了。

senses.definition: n.十一月,通讯中用以代替字母n 的词
senses.sentence: Troops were sent to the islands to restore order last **November**.
senses.translation: 去年11月，军队被派往这些岛屿以恢复秩序。

senses.definition: adv.现在,其时,立刻,（改变话题或要对方做某事前，引起对方注意）喂
senses.sentence: Husband and wife are **now** taxed separately on their incomes.
senses.translation: 现在夫妻双方分别按各自的收入纳税。

senses.definition: n.现在,目前,目前
senses.sentence: Husband and wife are **now** taxed separately on their incomes.
senses.translation: 现在夫妻双方分别按各自的收入纳税。

senses.definition: adv.现在，当今
senses.sentence: The term "early retirement" is nearly always a euphemism for redundancy **nowadays**.
senses.translation: 现在“提前退休”几乎就是裁员的委婉说法。

senses.definition: adv.任何地方都不，无处,毫无结果
senses.sentence: The bowlers at the eye of the storm were **nowhere** in evidence.
senses.translation: 处于风口浪尖的那些投手不见了踪影。

senses.definition: adj.原子核的，原子能的,[细胞]细胞核的
senses.sentence: It will produce electricity more cheaply than a **nuclear** plant.
senses.translation: 它的发电成本要比核电站低。

senses.definition: n.中心，核心,（原子）核,起点，开始,[微]细胞核
senses.sentence: The repulsive force within the **nucleus** is enormous.
senses.translation: 核子内部的斥力是巨大的。

senses.definition: n.讨厌的东西（人，行为）麻烦事,非法妨害，损害,麻烦事
senses.contextMeaning: 讨厌的东西（人，行为）麻烦事
senses.sentence: He spent three days making an absolute **nuisance** of himself.
senses.translation: 他3天时间就把自己变成了个地地道道的“讨人嫌”。

senses.definition: adj.麻木的，失去感觉的,无动于衷的，没感情的
senses.sentence: First he had been **numb**. Then the **numbness** gave way to anger.
senses.translation: 起初他只是麻木，接着转为了愤怒。

senses.definition: n.数字,数量,号码,编号
senses.sentence: Accidents are still the **number** one cause of premature death for Americans.
senses.translation: 交通事故仍然是造成美国人过早死亡的头号因素。

senses.definition: adj.数字的，用数字表示的，数值的
senses.contextMeaning: 数字的，用数字表示的，数值的
senses.sentence: This consolidation meant having to reduce the **numerical** strength of the Army.
senses.translation: 这次合并意味着不得不削减陆军的兵力。

senses.definition: adj.很多的，许多的,数量庞大的数量庞大的,数不清的
senses.sentence: The doctors gave **numerous** examples of patients being expelled from hospital.
senses.translation: 医生们列举了大量病人被逐出医院的实例。

senses.definition: n.婴儿室，幼儿园,苗圃,临时托儿所,温床，滋生地
senses.sentence: We have started a campaign for better **nursery** and school services.
senses.translation: 我们已发起一场要求改善幼儿园和中小学教育服务的运动。

senses.definition: vt.养育,培育,滋养,培植
senses.sentence: The human organism learns partly by nature, partly by **nurture**.
senses.translation: 人的学习能力部分是天生的，部分是后天培养的。

senses.definition: n.螺母，螺帽,坚果，坚果果仁,难对付的人,[乐]弓根
senses.sentence: Getting out there is in many ways the hardest **nut** to crack.
senses.translation: 从很多方面来说，出去交际是最难以做到的事了。

senses.definition: n.营养，滋养,营养品,营养学,食物
senses.sentence: The **nutrition** plays a role in the prevention of nearsightedness.
senses.translation: 这种营养剂对预防近视有一定作用.

senses.definition: n.[纺]尼龙,尼龙织品,〈口〉尼龙长袜
senses.sentence: I slowly zipped and locked the heavy black **nylon** bags.
senses.translation: 我慢慢地把那些沉重的黑色尼龙袋的拉链拉上并锁好。

senses.definition: n.栎树,橡木色,栎木，橡木,橡木家具
senses.sentence: He was a huge man, built like an **oak** tree.
senses.translation: 他是个大块头，结实得像棵橡树。

senses.definition: n.桨，橹,划手
senses.sentence: Then he took up the **oar** with the knife lashed to it.
senses.translation: 然后他拿起上面绑着刀子的桨.

senses.definition: n.誓言，誓约,妄用神名，渎神的言词,[法]宣誓,诅咒，咒骂语
senses.sentence: His girlfriend had gone into the witness box and taken the **oath**.
senses.translation: 他的女朋友进入证人席并立了誓。

senses.definition: adj.顺从的，服从的,忠顺的,孝顺的,驯良的
senses.sentence: He was always **obedient** to his father's wishes.
senses.translation: 他一向顺从父亲的意愿。

senses.definition: adj.极为肥胖的，肥大的
senses.sentence: The old man is really **obese**; it can't be healthy.
senses.translation: 那位老人确实过于肥胖了, 不能算是健康.

senses.definition: vt.& vi.服从，听从
senses.sentence: He threatened to disinherit her if she refused to **obey**.
senses.translation: 他威胁说如果她拒绝服从就剥夺她的继承权。

senses.definition: n.物体,目标,宾语,客体，对象
senses.sentence: He thought of the baby almost as an inanimate **object**.
senses.translation: 他认为婴儿几乎就是毫无生命的物体。

senses.definition: n.反对,反对的话，异议,反对的理由
senses.sentence: I no longer have any **objection** to your going to see her.
senses.translation: 我不会再因为你去见她而不高兴。

senses.definition: adj.客观的，实体的,目标的,[语]宾格的,[医]他觉的
senses.sentence: Plainly, a more **objective** method of description must be adopted.
senses.translation: 显而易见，必须采用更为客观的描述方法。

senses.definition: n.义务，责任,证券，契约,债务,恩惠
senses.sentence: Co-operation was more than just an attractive option, it was an **obligation**.
senses.translation: 合作不仅仅是诱人的选择，它也是一种责任。

senses.definition: vt.强制，强迫,使负债务,使感激,施惠于
senses.sentence: Mr Oakley always has been ready to **oblige** journalists with information.
senses.translation: 奥克利先生总是乐于向记者透露消息。

senses.definition: adj.昏暗的，朦胧的,晦涩的，不清楚的,隐蔽的,不著名的，无名的
senses.sentence: These **obscure** groups were of little account in national politics.
senses.translation: 这些名不见经传的团体在国内政界无足轻重。

senses.definition: n.观察,观察力,评论,观察所得
senses.sentence: The diaries are a mixture of confession, work in progress and **observation**.
senses.translation: 这些日记里既有自白，也有当下工作记录，还有见闻评论。

senses.definition: vt.遵守,观察,庆祝
senses.sentence: The Royal Greenwich Observatory was founded to **observe** and catalogue the stars.
senses.translation: 当初创立皇家格林尼治天文台就是为了观察星体并对其进行编目。

senses.definition: n.着魔，萦绕,使人痴迷的人（或物）,摆脱不了的思想[情感等],妄想
senses.sentence: This government has developed an unhealthy **obsession** with secrecy.
senses.translation: 本届政府在保密方面做过了头。

senses.definition: vt.淘汰,废弃
senses.sentence: With technological changes many traditional skills have become **obsolete**.
senses.translation: 随着技术的革新，许多传统技艺已被淘汰。

senses.definition: n.障碍（物）,障碍物（绊脚石，障碍栅栏）
senses.sentence: A further **obstacle** has presented itself, however.
senses.translation: 然而，突然又出现了一个障碍。

senses.definition: vt.阻塞,堵塞,阻碍,阻止
senses.sentence: The defences are intended to **obstruct** any advance by tanks and other vehicles.
senses.translation: 这些防御工事用于阻止坦克等车辆前进。

senses.definition: vt.获得，得到,流行,买到，达到（目的）
senses.sentence: Gregory'sfather had implanted in him an ambition to **obtain** an education.
senses.translation: 格雷戈里的父亲早就向他灌输了要接受教育的志向。

senses.definition: adj.明显的,显著的,平淡无奇的,自明
senses.sentence: The ideological divisions between the parties aren't always **obvious**.
senses.translation: 政党之间的意识形态界线并不总是泾渭分明的。

senses.definition: n.机会，时机,场合,理由,需要
senses.sentence: It is always an important **occasion** for setting out government policy.
senses.translation: 这历来都是阐明政府政策的重要时机。

senses.definition: adj.偶尔的，不经常的,特殊场合的,临时的
senses.sentence: She saw the **occasional** glimmer of a moth's wings.
senses.translation: 她看见蛾子的翅膀偶尔会泛光。

senses.definition: n.职业，工作,占有，占领,（土地、房屋、建筑等的）使用
senses.sentence: Intellectual life in France was smothered by the **occupation**.
senses.translation: 在被占领期间法国思想界受到了压制。

senses.definition: vt.占领,使用，住在…,使从事，使忙碌,任职
senses.sentence: U.S. forces now **occupy** a part of the country.
senses.translation: 美国军队现在占领了该国的一部分。

senses.definition: vi.发生,出现,闪现
senses.sentence: If these drugs are stopped abruptly then some withdrawal symptoms may **occur**.
senses.translation: 如果突然停服这些药，则可能出现一些戒断症状。

senses.definition: n.发生，出现,遭遇，事件
senses.sentence: The greatest **occurrence** of coronary heart disease is in those over 65.
senses.translation: 65岁以上者是冠心病的最高发人群。

senses.definition: n.洋,海洋,大海,（地球上划分出的）洋
senses.sentence: It became impractical to make a business trip by **ocean** liner.
senses.translation: 乘坐远洋班轮进行商务旅行变得不合时宜了。

senses.definition: n.十月
senses.sentence: By **October** 1990, when arrested, he was hopelessly in debt.
senses.translation: 到1990年10月被捕时，他已经负债累累。

senses.definition: adj.古怪的,奇数的,剩余的,临时的
senses.sentence: These **odd** assertions were interpolated into the manuscript some time after 1400.
senses.translation: 这些奇怪的论断是于1400年后的某个时间被加入手稿的。

senses.definition: n.气味，名声
senses.sentence: The whole herb has a characteristic taste and **odor**.
senses.translation: 整株药草有种独特的味道和气味。

senses.definition: n.气味，臭气,声望，名誉
senses.sentence: The plant has an unpleasant **odour** and an acrid taste.
senses.translation: 这种植物闻着刺鼻，吃着辣口。

senses.definition: prep.关于,属于…的,由…制成
senses.sentence: Instead **of** complaining about what's wrong, be grateful for what's right.
senses.translation: 别抱怨不好的事，要对美好的事心存感恩。

senses.definition: prep.从…落下,离开,从…去掉,下班
senses.sentence: Their first car rolls **off** the production line on December 16.
senses.translation: 他们的第一辆车于12月16日下线。

senses.definition: n.犯罪，违反,冒犯，触怒,攻击
senses.sentence: I didn't mean any **offence**. It was a flippant, off-the-cuff remark.
senses.translation: 我本无意冒犯，那不过是句脱口而出的冒失话。

senses.definition: vt.触怒,得罪，冒犯,使反感令人不适
senses.sentence: Television censors are cutting out scenes which they claim may **offend**.
senses.translation: 电视节目审查官正在剪掉他们称有可能会令人反感的一些镜头。

senses.definition: n.进攻,（球队的）前锋,进攻方法,攻势
senses.sentence: Between plays the coach was talking to the **offense** in the huddle.
senses.translation: 中场时，这位教练对围拢一圈的进攻队员进行战术指导。

senses.definition: adj.无礼的，冒犯的，唐突的,讨厌的，令人不快的,进攻（性）的，攻击的，攻势的
senses.sentence: They wanted me to change the title to something less gratuitously **offensive**.
senses.translation: 他们希望我将题目修改一下，以免显得太过冒犯。

senses.definition: vt.提供，给予,提出，提议,出价，开价,表示愿意
senses.sentence: Slimming snacks that **offer** miraculous weight loss are a con.
senses.translation: 有神奇减肥效果的瘦身点心是一个骗局。

senses.definition: n.办公室,办公楼,问询处,重要官职
senses.sentence: One of the **office** girls was down with the flu.
senses.translation: 一位女职员得了流感。

senses.definition: n.军官，警官,高级职员,公务员,船长
senses.sentence: The Night Duty **Officer** was ready to clock off.
senses.translation: 值夜班的警员准备打卡下班。

senses.definition: n.行政官员,公务员,[体]裁判,高级职员
senses.sentence: There was never an **official** institution of censorship in Albania.
senses.translation: 在阿尔巴尼亚从未设立过官方审查制度。

senses.definition: vt.抵消,补偿,（为了比较的目的而）把…并列（或并置）,为（管道等）装支管
senses.sentence: The slowdown in domestic demand was **offset** by an increase in exports.
senses.translation: 国内需求放缓和出口增长互相抵消了.

senses.definition: n.后代，子孙,产物，结果,（动物的）崽,幼苗
senses.sentence: Of course, not all alcoholics and drug abusers produce deviant **offspring**.
senses.translation: 当然，并不是所有的酗酒者和吸毒者都会生育出不正常的后代。

senses.definition: adv.常常,经常,时常,再三
senses.sentence: Early American weathervanes were most **often** cut from flat wooden boards.
senses.translation: 美国早期的风向标大多截自平直的木板。

senses.definition: n.油,石油,油画,燃油
senses.sentence: The fossil fuels (coal and **oil**) are finite resources.
senses.translation: 化石燃料（如煤和石油）属于有限资源。

senses.definition: abbr.ohne kosten (German=without cost) （德语）不计价,不受约束,ola kala (Greek=all is fine, all is good) （希腊语）都很好（古代希腊水手最早使用）,outer keel 外（平板）龙骨
senses.sentence: **OK**. Now, let's talk some business.
senses.translation: 好了，我们现在言归正传吧。

senses.definition: n.认可，同意
senses.sentence: "Are you **okay**?" I asked. She nodded and smiled.
senses.translation: “你没事吧?”我问她.她点点头,笑了.

senses.definition: adj.老的,古老的,以前的,（用于指称被替代的东西）原来的
senses.sentence: Douglas was a 29-year-**old** journeyman fighter, erratic in his previous fights.
senses.translation: 道格拉斯29岁，是个技术不错的拳击手，在以前的比赛中发挥不太稳定。

senses.definition: vt.省略,遗漏,删掉,未（做）
senses.sentence: Please don't **omit** to lock the door when you leave.
senses.translation: 离开时不要忘了锁门.

senses.definition: prep.（表示方向）向,（表示对象）对,（表示位置）在…上,（表示时间）在…之时
senses.sentence: She went directly to Simon's apartment and knocked **on** the door.
senses.translation: 她直奔西蒙的房间，敲了敲门。

senses.definition: adv.一次，一趟,一倍,曾经,一旦
senses.sentence: It had **once** been the home of a wealthy nobleman.
senses.translation: 这里曾是一个有钱贵族的宅邸。

senses.definition: num.（数字）一,一个,（基数）一，第一
senses.sentence: I have $100m hidden away where no **one** will ever find it.
senses.translation: 我把1亿美元藏到了一个永远没人会找到的地方。

senses.definition: pron.自己，自身,亲自，自行,其,亲手
senses.sentence: The doll-like figures in these stories are unlike anybody, let alone **oneself**.
senses.translation: 这些故事中的玩偶形象跟谁都不像，更不用说像自己了。

senses.definition: adj.不间断的，进行的,前进的
senses.sentence: There is an **ongoing** debate on the issue.
senses.translation: 对此问题的争论一直没有间断过。

senses.definition: n.洋葱（头）
senses.sentence: Fry for about 4 minutes, until the **onion** has softened.
senses.translation: 煎4分钟左右，直到洋葱变软。

senses.definition: adj.唯一的,仅有的,最好的，最适当的
senses.sentence: The arteries are diseased and a transplant is the **only** hope.
senses.translation: 动脉已经发生病变，移植是唯一的希望。

senses.definition: prep.到…之上,对…了解,[数]映射到…上
senses.sentence: So, if we could just move **onto** something else?
senses.translation: 那么我们可不可以干脆谈点别的？

senses.definition: adj.不透明的,无光泽的，晦暗的,不传导性的,含糊的，迟钝的
senses.sentence: The complex administrative arrangements render the decision - making process somewhat **opaque**.
senses.translation: 复杂的行政协商使决策过程透明度不高.

senses.definition: adj.敞开的，开着的,公开的，公共的,坦率的,有议论余地的
senses.sentence: It's an **open** secret that the security service bugged telephones.
senses.translation: 安全部门窃听电话是人人皆知的秘密。

senses.definition: n.开幕，开始,空缺的职位,[商]开盘，交易开始时间,（职位的）空缺
senses.sentence: He squeezed through a narrow **opening** in the fence.
senses.translation: 他从围栏上的狭窄缺口里挤了过去。

senses.definition: n.歌剧,歌剧艺术， 歌剧业,作品(opus的名词复数 ),砌
senses.sentence: The following year she joined the Royal **Opera** House.
senses.translation: 次年她加入了皇家歌剧院。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.运转,操作,经营,管理
senses.sentence: They now own and **operate** a farm 50 miles south of Rochester.
senses.translation: 他们现在拥有并经营着一家位于罗切斯特以南50英里处的农场。

senses.definition: n.操作，经营,手术,[数]运算,作用
senses.sentence: The **operation** is carried out under a general anaesthetic.
senses.translation: 该手术是在全身麻醉情况下实施的。

senses.definition: adj.即可使用的,（用于）操作的,经营的,军事行动的
senses.sentence: Exports have not been halted completely because another line is **operational**.
senses.translation: 出口并没有完全停止，因为另一条生产线还能运转。

senses.definition: n.经营者,操作员,电话接线员,运算符
senses.sentence: A blade guard is fitted to protect the **operator**.
senses.translation: 为保证操作人员的人身安全安装了桨叶保护罩。

senses.definition: n.意见，主张,评价,鉴定，判定
senses.sentence: He will have been heartened by the telephone **opinion** poll published yesterday.
senses.translation: 他会为昨天公布的电话民意调查结果感到鼓舞。

senses.definition: n.对手,反对者,敌手
senses.sentence: Young and old saw in him an implacable **opponent** of apartheid.
senses.translation: 无论老少都看出他是种族隔离制度的坚决反对者。

senses.definition: n.机会,适当的时机良机,有利的环境，条件
senses.sentence: Good luck is when an **opportunity** comes along and you're prepared for it.
senses.translation: 好运就是当机会来临时，你早已做好了准备。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.反对，抗争,使相对,使对照,抵制
senses.sentence: It is illogical to **oppose** the repatriation of economic migrants.
senses.translation: 反对把经济移民遣送归国是不合逻辑的。

senses.definition: adj.相对的,对面的,对立的,[数学]（顶、边等）对的
senses.sentence: The two politicians represent **opposite** poles of the political spectrum.
senses.translation: 这两位从政者代表了政界的两个极端。

senses.definition: vt.使烦恼，使意气消沉，使气馁，使无精神,压迫，压制
senses.contextMeaning: 使烦恼，使意气消沉，使气馁，使无精神
senses.sentence: He states uncompromisingly that he is opposed to any practices which **oppress** animals.
senses.translation: 他坚决声明反对任何虐待动物的行为。

senses.definition: vi.选择，挑选
senses.sentence: To keep the cost down, **opt** for a basic model.
senses.translation: 要想花钱少些，就选择基本的型号。

senses.definition: adj.视觉的，视力的,眼睛的,光学的
senses.sentence: Sloping walls on the bulk of the building create an **optical** illusion.
senses.translation: 大楼主体的斜墙给人造成一种视错觉。

senses.definition: adj.乐观的，乐观主义的
senses.sentence: Before his first round of discussions, Mr Baker sounded an **optimistic** note.
senses.translation: 第一轮讨论前，贝克先生听上去还比较乐观。

senses.definition: adj.最适宜的
senses.sentence: Now your advice is very **optimum**.
senses.translation: 现在你的建议是很适宜的.

senses.definition: n.选择（的自由）,选项,选择权,选择能力
senses.sentence: The menu changes weekly and usually includes a vegan **option**.
senses.translation: 菜单每周都有变化，通常包含可供严格的素食者选择的菜肴。

senses.definition: prep.<古、诗>在…之前，比…更早
senses.sentence: No matter where you go in life **or** how old you get, there's always something new to learn about. After all, life is full of surprises.
senses.translation: 不管你生活在哪里，你有多少岁，总有新东西要学习，毕竟，生活总是充满惊喜。

senses.definition: adj.口头的，口述的,口服的,属于或关于嘴的,构成或使用言语的
senses.sentence: The story of King Arthur became part of **oral** tradition.
senses.translation: 亚瑟王的故事成为口头传说的一部分。

senses.definition: adj.橙色的,橘色的,桔红色的
senses.sentence: The illustration shows a cluster of five roses coloured apricot **orange**.
senses.translation: 插图上是一簇杏橙色的玫瑰，一共5朵。

senses.definition: n.轨道,势力范围,眼眶,（人生的）旅程，生活过程
senses.sentence: Yet bigger satellites will be sent up into **orbit**.
senses.translation: 更为大型的卫星将被送入轨道。

senses.definition: n.（通常指围起来的）果园,果园里的全部果树,<俚>棒球场
senses.sentence: Each bamboo house was surrounded by a thriving **orchard**.
senses.translation: 每座竹楼周围都是茂密的果园.

senses.definition: n.管弦乐队,管弦乐队的全部乐器
senses.sentence: The **orchestra** gave its first performance on Whit Monday.
senses.translation: 乐团在周一的圣灵降临节举行了首场演出。

senses.definition: n.命令,秩序,规则，制度,次序
senses.sentence: A point of **order** was raised in parliament by Mr Ben Morris.
senses.translation: 本·莫里斯先生在议会就程序问题提出质询。

senses.definition: adj.整齐的，有秩序的,有组织的，有规则的,[军]值班的,安静的
senses.sentence: It's a beautiful, clean and **orderly** city.
senses.translation: 这是一座美丽清洁、秩序井然的城市。

senses.definition: adj.普通的,平常的,一般的,平庸的
senses.sentence: It was just an **ordinary** voice, but he sang in tune.
senses.translation: 他声音很一般，但唱得都在调子上。

senses.definition: n.矿,矿石，矿砂
senses.sentence: We dowse oil and **ore** in South America for big companies.
senses.translation: 我们在南美洲为一些大公司探测石油和矿石。

senses.definition: n.机构,器官,风琴,元件
senses.sentence: The patient'simmune system would reject the transplanted **organ** as a foreign object.
senses.translation: 病人的免疫系统会对移植器官产生异质排斥反应。

senses.definition: adj.有机（体）的,有组织的，系统的,器官的,根本的
senses.sentence: Today's **organic** wine producer is typically a small, quality-conscious family concern.
senses.translation: 现今的有机葡萄酒生产商一般是注重品质的小型家族企业.

senses.definition: n.<主英>组织，机构，团体
senses.sentence: We can't do without the help of your **organisation**.
senses.translation: 我们不能没有你们机构的帮助。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.组织,筹备 ,安排
senses.sentence: Zip drives help people to **organise** their important information.
senses.translation: 压缩磁盘驱动器有助于人们管理重要信息。

senses.definition: n.有机体,生物体,微生物,有机体系，有机组织
senses.sentence: The human **organism** learns partly by nature, partly by nurture.
senses.translation: 人的学习能力部分是天生的，部分是后天培养的。

senses.definition: n.组织,机构,团体
senses.sentence: I had obtained the authentic details about the birth of the **organization**.
senses.translation: 我已经掌握了有关该组织诞生的可靠的详细资料。

senses.definition: v.组织,安排,规划,建立组织
senses.sentence: In the end, we all decided to **organize** a concert for Easter.
senses.translation: 最终，我们一致决定组织一场复活节音乐会。

senses.definition: vt.标定方向,使…向东方,以…为参照,使熟悉或适应
senses.sentence: The climbers stopped to **orient** themselves before descending the mountain.
senses.translation: 登山者先停下来确定所在的位置,然后再下山.

senses.definition: adj.东方的,东方人的,东方文化的,优质的
senses.sentence: The **Oriental** is a comfortable hotel, but rather inconveniently situated.
senses.translation: 东方大酒店是个舒适的宾馆，但地理位置却非常不方便。

senses.definition: n.方向，定位，取向，排列方向,任职培训,（外交等的）方针[态度]的确定,环境判定
senses.contextMeaning: 方向，定位，取向，排列方向
senses.sentence: They give their new employees a day or two of perfunctory **orientation**.
senses.translation: 他们对新员工进行了一两天例行公事的培训。

senses.definition: n.起源，根源,出身,[数]原点，起点,[解]（筋，神经的）起端
senses.sentence: There are some areas of wetland which are of ancient **origin**.
senses.translation: 有一些湿地在古代就形成了。

senses.definition: adj.原始的,独创的,最初的,新颖的
senses.sentence: Any faults in the **original** cider stood out sharply after distillation.
senses.translation: 原先苹果酒里的任何杂质在蒸馏后都会凸现出来。

senses.definition: vt.引起,创始，创作,开始，发生,发明
senses.sentence: Many species, for example, **originate** in small populations.
senses.translation: 例如, 不少生物种就起源于一个很小的群体.

senses.definition: n.装饰,装饰物,[乐]装饰音
senses.sentence: The flowers were put on the table for **ornament**.
senses.translation: 花放在桌子上做装饰用.

senses.definition: adj.规范的, 公认的, 普遍赞同的,正统的
senses.sentence: It doesn't sound exactly **orthodox**, if I may say so.
senses.translation: 恕我直言，那听起来不太符合常规。

senses.definition: adj.别的,其他的,（两个中的）另一个,其余的
senses.sentence: You can chat to **other** people who are online.
senses.translation: 你可以和其他在线的人聊天。

senses.definition: adv.否则,另外,别的方式
senses.sentence: Psychological twists perk up an **otherwise** predictable story line.
senses.translation: 心理转折使原本老套的故事情节变得生动有趣。

senses.definition: n.盎司,<口>少量，一点儿,雪豹
senses.sentence: This little ball of gold weighs a quarter of an **ounce**.
senses.translation: 这个小金球重0.25盎司。

senses.definition: pron.我们的，we的所有格形式,<口>我们家,敝
senses.sentence: Drugs are a scourge that is devastating **our** society.
senses.translation: 毒品是破坏我们社会的一大祸害。

senses.definition: pron.我们的
senses.sentence: The world of the gods is anthropomorphic, an imitative projection of **ours**.
senses.translation: 神界是拟人化的，是模仿我们人类世界的一个投影。

senses.definition: pron.“myself”的复数,我们自己,（把）我们自己
senses.sentence: We sat round the fire to keep **ourselves** warm.
senses.translation: 我们围坐在火边取暖。

senses.definition: adv.出局,在外，在外部,完全，彻底,出版
senses.sentence: Barry had his nose put **out** of joint by Lucy's aloof sophistication.
senses.translation: 露西的冷淡与世故使得巴里十分不快。

senses.definition: n.（战争，怒气等的）爆发,突然发生
senses.sentence: The other unspoken fear here is of an **outbreak** of hooliganism.
senses.translation: 这其中另一个未言明的担忧是足球流氓可能突然闹事。

senses.definition: n.结果,成果,出路
senses.sentence: Jockeys are forbidden to bet on the **outcome** of races.
senses.translation: 职业赛马骑师禁止对赛马结果下注。

senses.definition: adj.户外的，露天的,喜欢户外活动的,（医院等）院外的,室外
senses.sentence: There is an inviting restaurant with an **outdoor** terrace.
senses.translation: 有一家诱人的带露天阳台的饭馆。

senses.definition: adj.外面的，外部的,远离内部（中心）的,[哲]客观外界的，物质的
senses.sentence: Taper the shape of your eyebrows towards the **outer** corners.
senses.translation: 把你的眉毛修剪成越往外眼角越细的月牙形。

senses.definition: n.全套装备,一套服装,集体,组织
senses.sentence: She could change into a different **outfit** in two minutes.
senses.translation: 她能在两分钟内换上一套不同的行头。

senses.definition: v.伸出( out的现在分词),揭露
senses.sentence: The gay and lesbian rights group, Stonewall, sees **outing** as completely unhelpful.
senses.translation: 男女同性恋权益组织“石墙”认为公开揭露同性恋者身份毫无益处。

senses.definition: n.出口，出路,批发商店,排水口，通风口,发泄（情感）的方法
senses.sentence: Her father had found an **outlet** for his ambition in his work.
senses.translation: 她父亲在工作中找到了施展抱负的机会。

senses.definition: vt.概述,略述,画轮廓，打草图，描略图
senses.sentence: Here we **outline** some of the some-times conflicting forces moulding the debate.
senses.translation: 在此我们概述一些有时影响争论的相互对立的力量。

senses.definition: vt.比…长寿,度过…而健在
senses.sentence: The world has **outlived** much, and will **outlive** a great deal more.
senses.translation: 世界已经存在了很久, 而且还将更久远地存在下去.

senses.definition: n.前景，展望,观点，见解,景色,眺望处
senses.sentence: The changed **outlook** entails higher economic growth than was previously assumed.
senses.translation: 观念的改变势必会使得经济增长高于之前预计的水平。

senses.definition: n.产量,输出,作品,[计]输出信号
senses.sentence: Government statistics show the largest drop in industrial **output** for ten years.
senses.translation: 政府统计数据显示这是10年来工业产量最大幅度的滑坡。

senses.definition: n.义愤,愤慨,暴行,骇人听闻的事件
senses.sentence: The decision provoked **outrage** from women and human rights groups.
senses.translation: 这一决定激起了妇女和人权组织的强烈愤慨。

senses.definition: n.开始，开端
senses.sentence: Almost from the **outset**, the extravaganza was beset with difficulties.
senses.translation: 几乎从一开始, 这一盛事就被种种困难所困扰.

senses.definition: n.外面,（弯曲路面或轨道的）外道,（靠近路中央的）外侧,（建筑物等的）周围
senses.sentence: The **outside** air was heavy and moist and sultry.
senses.translation: 外面的空气沉滞、潮湿而闷热。

senses.definition: prep.（表示位置）在[向]…的外面,（表示范围）超出…的范围,（表示排斥）除了（某人）
senses.sentence: The President's unescorted vehicle was ambushed just **outside** the capital.
senses.translation: 刚出首都，总统无人护卫的汽车就遭到了伏击。

senses.definition: n.郊外,市郊，郊区,从外围经过,边缘
senses.sentence: From Wrexham centre take the Chester Road to the **outskirts** of town.
senses.translation: 从雷克瑟姆市中心出发，沿着切斯特路到达市郊。

senses.definition: adj.杰出的,显著的,凸出的,未完成的
senses.sentence: You have to pay your **outstanding** bill before joining the scheme.
senses.translation: 在参加该项目之前必须结清余账。

senses.definition: adj.向外的,外面的,公开的,[宗]肉体上的
senses.sentence: Other poor countries looked **outward**, strengthening their ties to the economic superpowers.
senses.translation: 其他贫穷国家将目光投向国外，加强与经济强国的联系。

senses.definition: n.椭圆形,椭圆运动场（等）,椭圆，美式足球用球,[物]卵形线
senses.sentence: The leaf is **oval** in shape.
senses.translation: 叶呈椭圆形.

senses.definition: n.烤箱，烤炉，灶
senses.sentence: You'll be amazed at the culinary creations possible in a Dutch **oven**.
senses.translation: 荷兰烤箱能够做的食物之多会让你感到惊奇。

senses.definition: prep.（表示方向）越过,（部份或全部覆盖）在…上面,由于,（表示论及）关于
senses.sentence: **Over** a given period, the value of shares will rise and fall.
senses.translation: 股票的价值在某一特定的时期内会有涨跌。

senses.definition: adj.全部的,全体的,一切在内的,综合的
senses.sentence: **Overall**, barter is a very inefficient means of organizing transactions.
senses.translation: 总之，易货贸易是一种效率很低的交易形式。

senses.definition: n.大衣,外套,保护层，护膜
senses.sentence: It was freezing out there even in his buttoned-up **overcoat**.
senses.translation: 外面非常冷，即使穿上大衣扣上扣子也不顶事。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.战胜，克服,压倒，制服，…不堪
senses.sentence: I would **overcome** any weakness, any despair, any fear.
senses.translation: 我要克服所有的软弱、绝望和恐惧。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.溢出，淹没,挤满，充满,洋溢,资源过剩
senses.sentence: Tents have been set up next to hospitals to handle the **overflow**.
senses.translation: 医院旁搭起了帐篷以安置容纳不下的人员。

senses.definition: vt.彻底检查,翻修，检修,赶上（他船）,解松（船的）绳索
senses.sentence: **Overhaul** your body with a cleansing detox.
senses.translation: 通过清洁排毒法对身体进行“大扫除”。

senses.definition: adj.上面的，高架的,头顶上的,（费用等）经常的，管理的
senses.sentence: **Overhead**, the chopper roared and the big blades churned the air.
senses.translation: 头顶上，直升机在呼啸，巨大的螺旋桨叶片搅动着空气。

senses.definition: vt.偶然听到,无意中听到,偷听
senses.sentence: They were shut away in a little room where nobody could **overhear**.
senses.translation: 他们被关在一个小屋里，没人能听到他们的动静。

senses.definition: vt.重叠,与…部分相同
senses.sentence: Social structures are not discrete objects; they **overlap** and interweave.
senses.translation: 社会结构之间不是离散的，他们相互重叠交织。

senses.definition: vt.忽视，忽略,瞭望,检查,远眺
senses.sentence: You cannot live in a cocoon and **overlook** these facts.
senses.translation: 你不能自己缩在套子里而忽略这些事实。

senses.definition: adv.在晚上,在夜里,突然,很快
senses.sentence: There were two bomb explosions in the city **overnight**.
senses.translation: 一夜之间城里发生了两起炸弹爆炸事件。

senses.definition: adj.外国的，海外的
senses.sentence: It's a terror of the seasonal **oversea** seanutriment is reasonable.
senses.translation: 以为季节性的内地海鲜的价格是符合逻辑的根本那是背叛.

senses.definition: adv.在[向]海外，在[向]国外
senses.sentence: A lot hinges on how we are viewed by **overseas** investors.
senses.translation: 很多事都取决于海外投资者对我们的看法。

senses.definition: vt.追上，赶上,压倒,（不愉快的事）突然降临
senses.sentence: Pulling out to **overtake**, the car collided head-on with a van.
senses.translation: 越线超车时，轿车和一辆厢式货车迎面相撞。

senses.definition: vt.打倒，推翻,使屈服，征服,使瓦解,撞倒
senses.sentence: The **overthrow** of the military regime was followed by a period of anarchy.
senses.translation: 军事统治政权被推翻以后，接着是一段时期的无政府状态。

senses.definition: n.超出的时间，额外的时间,加班,加时赛,加班费
senses.sentence: He would work **overtime**, without pay, to finish a job.
senses.translation: 他会为了完成工作无偿加班。

senses.definition: vt.淹没,压倒,覆盖,压垮
senses.sentence: After my lecture, the students began to **overwhelm** me with questions.
senses.translation: 讲课之后, 学生们开始问一系列问题,使我不知所措.

senses.definition: adj.势不可挡的，压倒一切的，巨大的,压倒一切的欢乐
senses.contextMeaning: 势不可挡的，压倒一切的，巨大的
senses.sentence: He has exhibited symptoms of anxiety and **overwhelming** worry.
senses.translation: 他表现出焦躁不安和过度忧虑的症状。

senses.definition: vt.欠…债,感激,应归功于,怀有情感
senses.sentence: I'm broke, Livy, and I **owe** a couple of million dollars.
senses.translation: 我破产了，莉薇，而且我欠了几百万美元的债。

senses.definition: adj.欠着的，应付的，未付的
senses.sentence: He could take what was **owing** for the rent.
senses.translation: 他可以把自己欠的钱抵作对方的租金。

senses.definition: n.自己的事物,自己人
senses.sentence: Amy's **own** Republican sympathies strengthened as the days passed.
senses.translation: 埃米个人对共和党的支持与日俱增。

senses.definition: n.物主，所有人
senses.sentence: The former **owner** had not left any forwarding address.
senses.translation: 以前的房主没有留下任何转递地址。

senses.definition: n.物主身份,所有权,所有制,所有
senses.sentence: Brazil says its constitution forbids the private **ownership** of energy assets.
senses.translation: 巴西称其宪法禁止个人占有能源资产。

senses.definition: n.牛，公牛,牛属动物
senses.sentence: Seize a horse by the mane, and lead an **ox** by the nose.
senses.translation: 马儿抓鬃牛牵鼻.

senses.definition: n.[化]氧化物
senses.sentence: **Oxide** is usually seen in our daily life.
senses.translation: 在我们的日常生活中氧化物很常见.

senses.definition: n.[化]氧，氧气
senses.sentence: Ozone is a highly reactive form of **oxygen** gas.
senses.translation: 臭氧是一种非常活跃的氧气形态。

senses.definition: n.[化]臭氧,清新空气
senses.sentence: **Ozone** is a highly reactive form of oxygen gas.
senses.translation: 臭氧是一种非常活跃的氧气形态。

senses.definition: n.一步,长度单位,步幅，步调,快步
senses.sentence: With four laps to go, he kept **pace** with the leaders.
senses.translation: 还剩4圈的时候，他紧紧咬住领先者。

senses.definition: n.一群,包裹,（纸牌的）一副,一组
senses.sentence: It shows a fox being disembowelled by a **pack** of hounds.
senses.translation: 画面中一只狐狸正被一群猎狗撕咬得肠子外流。

senses.definition: n.包裹,包装袋,包装盒,一组建议
senses.sentence: It is listed among the ingredients on the **package**.
senses.translation: 它是包装盒标明的成分之一。

senses.definition: n.小包,信息包,邮船,大笔款项
senses.sentence: He had smoked half a **packet** of cigarettes.
senses.translation: 他已经吸了半包香烟。

senses.definition: vt.给…装衬垫， 加垫子,填塞,踏平
senses.sentence: I moved on round the big house to reach my **pad**.
senses.translation: 我绕过大房子走向我的公寓。

senses.definition: n.[航海] 宽叶短桨,桨状物,搅拌金矿的铁器，类似铁铲的工具,洗衣板，扁板
senses.sentence: Wear sandals when you **paddle**.
senses.translation: 玩水的时候穿上凉鞋。

senses.definition: n.页,（计算机的）页面,年史,<文>重要事件
senses.sentence: Be sure to read about how mozzarella is made, on **page** 65.
senses.translation: 务必看看莫泽雷勒干酪是怎么制成的，在第65页。

senses.definition: n.痛苦,刻苦,令人厌烦的人[事物],身体某部分的疼痛[不适]
senses.sentence: After the **pain** of defeat passes, England have some thinking to do.
senses.translation: 失败的痛苦过去以后，英国人应该认真反思一下。

senses.definition: adj.痛苦的,（肉体）疼的,费力的，（工作）困难的,讨厌的，使人厌烦的
senses.sentence: Economic reform will continue to be **painful** and ineffective.
senses.translation: 经济改革仍将举步维艰，毫无成效。

senses.definition: adj.无痛的，不引起痛苦的,无并发症的
senses.sentence: There are no easy or **painless** solutions to the nation's economic ills.
senses.translation: 这个国家的经济弊病没有轻松便捷的解决办法。

senses.definition: n.颜料，涂料,绘画作品,胭脂等化妆品,色彩，装饰
senses.sentence: Rust and flaking **paint** mean the metalwork is in poor condition.
senses.translation: 生锈和掉漆说明金属配件损毁严重。

senses.definition: n.画家，着色者,油漆匠,（系船的）缆绳,破诡计
senses.sentence: A **painter** may exaggerate or distort shapes and forms.
senses.translation: 画家可能会对线条和形状进行夸大或扭曲。

senses.definition: n.绘画,油画,上色，着色,颜料，油漆
senses.sentence: I lay the **painting** flat to stop the wet paint running.
senses.translation: 我把油画平放以防止未干的颜料流动。

senses.definition: n.一副,一对男女,套在一起的两匹马,雌雄成对的动物
senses.sentence: His surgical instruments were a knife and a **pair** of pincers.
senses.translation: 他的外科手术器械是一把刀和一把钳子。

senses.definition: n.宫，宫殿,（主教）邸宅，宏伟大厦,华丽的娱乐场所
senses.sentence: He recounted how heavily armed soldiers forced him from the presidential **palace**.
senses.translation: 他讲述了自己是怎样被全副武装的士兵从总统官邸里赶出来的。

senses.definition: adj.苍白的,无力的,暗淡的,浅色的
senses.sentence: In the background, dressed in **pale** green, stood Eunice.
