senses.translation: 尤妮斯穿着浅绿色的衣服站在后面不起眼的地方。

senses.definition: n.手掌,手心,棕榈树 ,由Palm公司发明的一种PDA上的操作系统
senses.sentence: She placed her hands **palm** uppermost in her lap.
senses.translation: 她把手掌心向上放在大腿上。

senses.definition: n.小册子,活页文选
senses.sentence: Over a thousand copies of the **pamphlet** have now been given out.
senses.translation: 现在已分发了一千多本小册子.

senses.definition: n.平底锅,盘状的器皿,淘盘子，金盘，秤盘
senses.sentence: Grate a tablespoonful of fresh ginger into a **pan**.
senses.translation: 磨碎一汤匙鲜姜，放入平底锅。

senses.definition: n.镶板,面,（门、墙等上面的）嵌板,控制板
senses.sentence: He was not listed under his real name on the residents **panel**.
senses.translation: 他未以真名在居民名册上登记。

senses.definition: n.恐慌，惊慌,（金融方面）大恐慌,成功,〈俚〉非常滑稽的人
senses.sentence: A wall collapsed and 39 people, were killed in the **panic**-stricken stampede.
senses.translation: 一堵墙倒了，慌乱中有39人死于踩踏事故。

senses.definition: n.全景画,全景照片,一连串景象或事,概论
senses.sentence: There is a superb **panorama** of the mountains from the hotel.
senses.translation: 从旅馆可饱览峰峦叠嶂的雄伟景观。

senses.definition: n.喘气，喘息,气喘,喷气声
senses.sentence: When he bent over, he split his **pant**.
senses.translation: 他一弯腰就把裤裆裂开了.

senses.definition: n.<英>（紧身的）短裤,<美> 裤子,喘气(pant的名词复数 )
senses.sentence: He was wearing cotton **pants** and an open-necked shirt.
senses.translation: 他穿着纯棉裤子和开领衬衫。

senses.definition: n.纸,文件,论文,文章
senses.sentence: He wiped away the blood with a **paper** napkin.
senses.translation: 他用纸巾将血迹擦去。

senses.definition: n.降落伞,降落伞状物,[植]风散种子
senses.sentence: He was almost strangled by his **parachute** harness straps.
senses.translation: 他差点被自己的降落伞吊带勒死。

senses.definition: n.检阅,游行,一系列,炫耀
senses.sentence: People stood waiting for the kick-off of the **parade**.
senses.translation: 人们站着等候游行的开始。

senses.definition: n.范例，样式，模范,词形变化表
senses.sentence: He had become the **paradigm** of the successful man.
senses.translation: 他已经成为成功人士的典范。

senses.definition: n.天堂,伊甸园,乐园,极乐
senses.sentence: To the former Belgian colonizers, Rwanda was a **paradise**.
senses.translation: 对于以前的比利时殖民者来说，卢旺达就是个天堂。

senses.definition: n.反论，悖论,似非而是的论点,自相矛盾的人或事,[物]佯谬
senses.sentence: He was a **paradox**—a loner who loved to chat to strangers.
senses.translation: 他真是个矛盾人物，生性孤僻却又喜欢和陌生人闲聊。

senses.definition: n.段落,分段符号
senses.sentence: The length of a **paragraph** depends on the information it conveys.
senses.translation: 段落的长度取决于它所传达的信息。

senses.definition: adj.平行的,相同的，类似的,[电]并联的,[计]并行的
senses.sentence: Farthing Lane's just above the High Street and **parallel** with it.
senses.translation: 法辛巷刚好在大街的北面，与大街平行。

senses.definition: vt.使瘫痪[麻痹],使不能正常活动,[电]关闭
senses.sentence: Software invalidation has become the main cause of the system **paralyse**.
senses.translation: 软件失效已成为系统瘫痪的主要原因.

senses.definition: vt.使瘫痪，使麻痹,使不能正常活动
senses.sentence: The snake uses its venom to stun or **paralyze** its victims.
senses.translation: 蛇用其毒液使受害者失去知觉或瘫痪.

senses.definition: n.[数]参数,<物><数>参量,限制因素,决定因素
senses.sentence: One **parameter** which always comes into play is the national economy.
senses.translation: 国民经济是一个经常起作用的参量.

senses.definition: n.寄生物，寄生虫,食客,寄生植物,天线反射器
senses.sentence: One of the ways the **parasite** spreads is through fecal matter.
senses.translation: 寄生虫传播的一种方式是通过排泄物。

senses.definition: n.包袱，包裹,（土地的）一块,一批，一群,（货物的）一宗
senses.sentence: There's a **parcel** and some letters for you.
senses.translation: 有你的一个包裹和几封信。

senses.definition: vt.宽恕,原谅,赦免,劳驾
senses.sentence: It's enough to make you wet yourself, if you'll **pardon** the expression.
senses.translation: 这足以吓得你尿裤子了，请原谅我这么说。

senses.definition: n.父亲（或母亲）,先辈,根源，起源,保护者
senses.sentence: Many children are now born into or raised in one-**parent** families.
senses.translation: 现在很多孩子在单亲家庭中出生或成长。

senses.definition: n.议会，国会
senses.sentence: The Estonian **parliament** has passed a resolution declaring the republic fully independent.
senses.translation: 爱沙尼亚议会已经通过了宣布共和国完全独立的决议。

senses.definition: n.部分,零件,参加,地区
senses.sentence: He was in large **part** a journalist and propagandist.
senses.translation: 他很大程度上是个新闻记者和宣传者。

senses.definition: adj.部分的,偏爱的,偏袒的,钟爱的
senses.sentence: I am **partial** to desserts that combine fresh fruit with fine pastry.
senses.translation: 我偏爱加有新鲜水果的精致油酥甜点。

senses.definition: n.参加者，参与者,与会代表,参与国,关系者
senses.sentence: The engineer was an eager **participant** in technical co - operation.
senses.translation: 那位工程师热心参与技术合作.

senses.definition: vi.参加某事,分享某事
senses.sentence: Over half the population of this country **participate** in sport.
senses.translation: 这个国家一半以上的人口参加体育锻炼。

senses.definition: n.微粒，颗粒,[数，物]粒子，质点,极小量,小品词
senses.sentence: A proton is an elementary **particle** of matter.
senses.translation: 质子是物质的基本粒子。

senses.definition: adj.特别的,详细的,独有的,挑剔的
senses.sentence: A **particular** source of contention is plans to privatise state-run companies.
senses.translation: 发生争执的一个根源就是国营公司的私有化方案。

senses.definition: adv.特别,尤其,异乎寻常地
senses.sentence: Be **particularly** fastidious about washing your hands before touching food.
senses.translation: 接触食物前尤其对洗手不能有半点马虎。

senses.definition: adv.在一定程度上,部分地,不完全地,半
senses.sentence: I feel **partly** responsible for the problems we're in.
senses.translation: 我觉得应为我们遭遇的问题负部分责任。

senses.definition: n.伙伴,同伙,同伴,配偶
senses.sentence: Hampton had been given the bills for safekeeping by a business **partner**.
senses.translation: 一个生意伙伴曾将账单交给汉普顿代为保管。

senses.definition: n.社交聚会,党，党派,当事人,同类，伙伴
senses.sentence: He's been a keen supporter of the Labour **Party** all his life.
senses.translation: 他一生都是工党的热情拥护者。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.走过,通过,批准,度过
senses.sentence: He stood emotionless as he heard the judge **pass** sentence.
senses.translation: 他面无表情地站在那里，听法官宣布判决。

senses.definition: n.（文章的）一段,经过,通路，通道,旅程，行程
senses.sentence: It's been 200 years since the **passage** of the Bill of Rights.
senses.translation: 《人权法案》通过已经200年了。

senses.definition: n.乘客，旅客,行人，过路人,碍手碍脚的人
senses.sentence: Most of our flights have a baggage allowance of 44lbs per **passenger**.
senses.translation: 我们大多数航班行李限重为每位乘客44磅。

senses.definition: n.激情，热情,热心，爱好,热恋,酷爱
senses.sentence: His abiding **passion** was ocean racing, at which he scored many successes.
senses.translation: 他一直酷爱海上赛艇，并多次在比赛中获胜。

senses.definition: adj.被动的,消极的,不抵抗的,冷漠的
senses.sentence: She hates playing the sweet, **passive** women that audiences identify her with.
senses.translation: 她讨厌扮演那些漂亮可爱、消极被动的女人，观众们已把她定型为这类角色。

senses.definition: n.护照，通行证,手段
senses.sentence: **Passport** checks will remain the first line of defence against terrorists.
senses.translation: 护照检查仍将是对付恐怖分子的第一道防线。

senses.definition: prep.超过，超出,远于,越过
senses.sentence: I must have driven **past** that place thousands of times.
senses.translation: 我得有上千次开车经过那里。

senses.definition: n.面团,糨糊,肉（或鱼等）酱（作涂抹料或烹饪用）,（制作人造宝石的）铅质玻璃
senses.sentence: Blend a little milk with the custard powder to form a **paste**.
senses.translation: 往蛋奶沙司粉里加入一点儿牛奶，搅成糊糊。

senses.definition: n.消遣，娱乐
senses.sentence: Learning should no longer be an elitist **pastime** for the chosen few.
senses.translation: 学习不应再是少数人的高级消遣。

senses.definition: n.牧草地，牧场,牲畜饲养，放牧
senses.sentence: I'm retiring next month. They're putting me out to **pasture**.
senses.translation: 我下个月退休。他们要我养老去了。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.轻拍，爱抚,拍成，拍至
senses.sentence: **Pat** was a tower of strength to our whole family.
senses.translation: 帕特是我们全家人的主心骨。

senses.definition: n.补丁，补片,眼罩,斑点,小块
senses.sentence: They tried digging in a **patch** just below the cave.
senses.translation: 他们试着在洞穴正下方的一块地上挖掘。

senses.definition: n.专利,专利品,专利权,专利证
senses.sentence: It sued Centrocorp for **patent** infringement.
senses.translation: 它诉Centrocorp公司侵犯专利权。

senses.definition: n.小路，路,路线，路程,〈比喻〉（人生的）道路,（思想，行为，生活的）途径
senses.sentence: Stewart was trying to clear a **path** for the stretcher.
senses.translation: 斯图尔特在努力给担架开路。

senses.definition: adj.令人同情的，可怜的,又笨又可怜的，无价值的,荡气回肠
senses.sentence: We encountered the **pathetic** sight of a family packing up its home.
senses.translation: 我们目睹了一家人正在收拾家当准备离开的凄惨景象。

senses.definition: n.耐心，耐性,忍耐,单人纸牌游戏
senses.sentence: Non-violence and **patience** are the central tenets of their faith.
senses.translation: 非暴力和忍耐是他们的信仰的核心原则。

senses.definition: n.患者,病人,病号
senses.sentence: The **patient** is sedated with intravenous use of sedative drugs.
senses.translation: 静脉注射了镇静剂后病人安然入睡。

senses.definition: n.巡逻，巡查,巡逻队，侦察队,童子军小队
senses.sentence: The men apparently opened fire after they were challenged by a **patrol**.
senses.translation: 显然，那些人是在受到一支巡逻队的盘问后开的火。

senses.definition: n.赞助人，资助人,顾客，老主顾,保护人,[宗]守护神
senses.sentence: Catherine the Great was a **patron** of the arts and sciences.
senses.translation: 叶卡捷琳娜大帝资助发展艺术和科学。

senses.definition: n.模式,花样，样品,图案,榜样，典范
senses.sentence: The kinked line in chart 1 represents this **pattern**.
senses.translation: 图表1中的曲线表现了这一模式。

senses.definition: n.暂时的停顿,犹豫,（诗中）节奏的停顿,[乐]延长号
senses.sentence: After a **pause** he asked, "You got any identification?"
senses.translation: 稍稍停顿了一下，他问道，“你有任何身份证明吗？”

senses.definition: n.人行道,硬路面,铺过的路面,[动]铺石状构造[密生的齿列等]
senses.sentence: Crews stray outside to film the view from the **pavement**.
senses.translation: 工作人员移到人行道上拍摄这一景色。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.付款,偿还,补偿,（对…）有利
senses.sentence: If they value these data, let them **pay** for them.
senses.translation: 他们要是看重这些数据，就让他们出钱买。

senses.definition: n.付款，支付,报酬，报答,偿还,惩罚，报应
senses.sentence: The rate of disconnections following non-**payment** of water charges is rising.
senses.translation: 不缴水费引起的断水的比率正在上升。

senses.definition: n.和平,和睦,治安,安心
senses.sentence: The road to **peace** will be long and drawn-out.
senses.translation: 通往和平的道路将很漫长。

senses.definition: adj.和平的,爱好和平的,安静的,平静的
senses.sentence: Altogether, it was a delightful town garden, **peaceful** and secluded.
senses.translation: 总体上说，这是个令人愉快的城市花园，宁静而偏僻。

senses.definition: n.山峰,最高点,尖端,帽舌
senses.sentence: Calls cost 36p (cheap rate) and 48p (**peak** rate) per minute.
senses.translation: 电话每分钟36便士（优惠费率）和48便士（高峰费率）。

senses.definition: n.梨（树）,梨树
senses.sentence: In gardens, cankers are most prominent on apples and **pear** trees.
senses.translation: 花园里，苹果树和梨树患枯枝病最明显。

senses.definition: n.珍珠,珍品,人造珍珠,珠状物
senses.sentence: On the table sat a box decorated with little **pearl** triangles.
senses.translation: 桌上有一只用珠子串成的小三角形作装饰的盒子。

senses.definition: n.农民,农夫,佃农,粗俗的人
senses.sentence: Economic reform has brought relative wealth to **peasant** farmers.
senses.translation: 经济改革给农民带来了相对的财富。

senses.definition: n.卵石,水晶,水晶透镜,卵石花纹
senses.sentence: The bird mistook the **pebble** for egg and tried to hatch it.
senses.translation: 这只鸟错把卵石当蛋,想去孵它.

senses.definition: adj.奇怪的，古怪的,异常的,特有的，特殊的
senses.sentence: Flying at 1,000 ft. he heard a **peculiar** noise from the rotors.
senses.translation: 在1,000英尺的高度飞行时，他听到旋翼发出一种奇怪的噪音。

senses.definition: n.踏板,脚蹬子,垂足线
senses.sentence: Your foot falls off the **pedal** and you stall the car.
senses.translation: 你的脚离开踏板，汽车便会熄火。

senses.definition: n.步行者,行人
senses.sentence: More than a third of all **pedestrian** injuries are to children.
senses.translation: 所有受伤的行人中有1/3以上是儿童。

senses.definition: vt.剥皮,覆盖层脱落，剥落
senses.sentence: Blend in the lemon extract, lemon **peel** and walnuts.
senses.translation: 调入柠檬汁、柠檬皮和核桃。

senses.definition: n.同辈，同等的人,贵族,同伴，伙伴
senses.sentence: Lord Swan was made a life **peer** in 1981.
senses.translation: 斯旺勋爵于1981年受封终身贵族。

senses.definition: n.笔，笔尖,笔法，文笔,作家,围栏
senses.sentence: Use different colours of felt **pen** on your sketch to avoid confusion.
senses.translation: 用不同颜色的毡头笔画草图，以免搞混。

senses.definition: n.惩罚,刑罚,害处,足球点球
senses.sentence: It was a crime of espionage and carried the death **penalty**.
senses.translation: 这是间谍罪，应判死刑。

senses.definition: n.铅笔，彩色铅笔,笔状物,画风，画法,[物]光线锥
senses.sentence: Give your brows extra definition with Outdoor Girl'sEyebrow **Pencil** in Brown.
senses.translation: 用“户外女孩”品牌的棕色眉笔更加清晰地勾勒出眉形。

senses.definition: n.摆，钟摆,摇摆不定的事态（或局面）
senses.sentence: In education, the **pendulum** has swung back to traditional teaching methods.
senses.translation: 教育界又恢复了传统教学法。

senses.definition: vt.穿透，刺入,渗入,秘密潜入,洞悉，明了
senses.sentence: She could **penetrate** what I was thinking.
senses.translation: 她了解我在想什么.

senses.definition: n.半岛,[史]伊比利亚半岛，（第一次世界大战中指）加利波利半岛,（第一次世界大战中指）加利波利半岛
senses.sentence: The boat was anchored off the northern coast of the **peninsula**.
senses.translation: 这艘船停泊在离该半岛北部海岸不远的地方。

senses.definition: n.便士,（美国、加拿大的）一分钱,少量的钱
senses.sentence: The directors of this company feel he's worth every **penny**.
senses.translation: 这家公司的主管们觉得他值得栽培。

senses.definition: n.退休金，养老金,膳宿费,生活津贴,寄宿学校
senses.sentence: The main beneficiaries of **pension** equality so far have been men.
senses.translation: 迄今为止，退休金均等政策的主要受益者一直是男性。

senses.definition: n.人，人类,居民,人民,种族
senses.sentence: She spent a period of time working with **people** dying of cancer.
senses.translation: 她有一段时间曾帮助垂危的癌症患者。

senses.definition: n.胡椒,辣椒,胡椒粉
senses.sentence: She sprinkled **pepper** on my grub, watching me nosh.
senses.translation: 她在我的食物上撒了点胡椒粉，看着我吃。

senses.definition: prep.由,（表示根据）依照,（表示比率）（尤指数量，价格，时间）每
senses.sentence: Most of our flights have a baggage allowance of 44lbs **per** passenger.
senses.translation: 我们大多数航班行李限重为每位乘客44磅。

senses.definition: v.意识到,察觉，发觉,理解
senses.sentence: Voters **perceive** him as a decisive and resolute international leader.
senses.translation: 投票者认为他是一位坚定果断的国际领导人。

senses.definition: adv.以百分之…地，每一百中有…地
senses.sentence: The rate of inflation is running at about 2.7 **percent**.
senses.translation: 通货膨胀率大约为2.7%。

senses.definition: n.百分比，百分率,比例，部分,[数]百分法,[商]手续费
senses.sentence: The **percentage** of girls in engineering has increased substantially.
senses.translation: 学工科的女孩的比例已经大大增加了。

senses.definition: n.知觉,觉察（力）,观念,（农作物的）收获
senses.sentence: Television has irreversibly changed our **perception** of the Royal Family.
senses.translation: 电视不可逆转地改变了我们对皇室的印象。

senses.definition: adj.完美的,正确的,优秀的,极好的
senses.sentence: He mixed business and pleasure in a **perfect** and dynamic way.
senses.translation: 他以互动的方式将工作和娱乐完美地结合起来。

senses.definition: n.完美,完善,最后加工,圆满
senses.sentence: Like the old trouper he is, he timed his entry to **perfection**.
senses.translation: 作为一名老戏骨，他上场的时间把握得恰到好处。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.执行,履行,表演,扮演
senses.sentence: He can **perform** an astonishing variety of acts, including mime and juggling.
senses.translation: 他能表演好几种令人惊叹的把戏，包括哑剧和玩杂耍。

senses.definition: n.表演,演技,表现,执行
senses.sentence: At the highest executive levels earnings and **performance** aren't always correlated.
senses.translation: 在最高管理层，收入与工作表现并不总是相关的。

senses.definition: n.香水,香料,香味，香气
senses.sentence: She dabbed a drop of the musky **perfume** behind each ear.
senses.translation: 她在两耳后分别擦上一小滴麝香香水。

senses.definition: adv.或许,（表示不确定）也许,（用于粗略的估计）或许,（表示勉强同意或其实不赞成）也许
senses.sentence: The horrors he experienced are imprinted, **perhaps** indelibly, in his brain.
senses.translation: 他经历的恐怖事件在他脑海中刻下了深深的，或许是难以磨灭的印记。

senses.definition: n.时期,（一段）时间,学时,句号
senses.sentence: Over a given **period**, the value of shares will rise and fall.
senses.translation: 股票的价值在某一特定的时期内会有涨跌。

senses.definition: n.期刊,杂志
senses.sentence: They have already put out a new **periodical**.
senses.translation: 他们已经出版了一种新的期刊.

senses.definition: vi.死亡，丧生,毁灭,腐烂，枯萎,老化
senses.sentence: Crowns and thrones may **perish**.
senses.translation: 王权不会永存.

senses.definition: adj.永久（性）的，永恒的，不变的，耐久的，持久的，经久的,稳定的,常务的，常设的
senses.contextMeaning: 永久（性）的，永恒的，不变的，耐久的，持久的，经久的
senses.sentence: Don't get me wrong, it's interesting work. But it's not **permanent**.
senses.translation: 别误会我的意思，这个工作很有意思，可惜不是长期性的。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.弥漫,遍布,渗入,渗透
senses.sentence: Eventually, the water will **permeate** through the surrounding concrete.
senses.translation: 最终，水会渗透进周围的混凝土中。

senses.definition: n.允许,批准，正式认可，认可
senses.sentence: Police said **permission** for the march had not been granted.
senses.translation: 警方说游行并未得到批准。

senses.definition: adj.永久的,不断的,无期限的,四季开花的
senses.sentence: Little by little she lost the taut, strained air of **perpetual** anxiety.
senses.translation: 长期焦虑带来的紧张而疲惫的神色从她脸上慢慢消失了。

senses.definition: vt.使迷惑，使混乱,使复杂化
senses.sentence: We're dismal enough without conjuring up ghosts and visions to **perplex** us.
senses.translation: 用不着招神现鬼来缠我们,我们已够惨的啦.

senses.definition: vt.（尤指宗教或政治信仰的）迫害,烦扰，困扰,强求，死缠着要
senses.contextMeaning: （尤指宗教或政治信仰的）迫害
senses.sentence: They **persecute** those who do not conform to their ideas.
senses.translation: 他们迫害那些不信奉他们思想的人.

senses.definition: vi.坚忍，熬住,坚持,百折不回，不屈不挠,支撑
senses.sentence: They are determined to **persevere** in the fight.
senses.translation: 他们决心坚持战斗.

senses.definition: v.坚持,固执,存留,继续存在
senses.sentence: If the symptoms **persist**, it is important to go to your doctor.
senses.translation: 如果这些症状持续存在，一定要去看医生。

senses.definition: n.人,（语法）人称,身体,容貌
senses.sentence: She is a long way from being the richest **person** in Britain.
senses.translation: 比起英国首富，她还差得远呢。

senses.definition: adj.个人的，私人的,身体的,亲自的,人身攻击的
senses.sentence: Every line etched on her face told a story of **personal** anguish.
senses.translation: 她脸上的每条皱纹都讲述了一次痛苦的经历。

senses.definition: n.生而为人,人格，人品，个性,人物,名人
senses.sentence: They testify to the extraordinary potency of his **personality**.
senses.translation: 这些事情证明了他非凡的人格魅力。

senses.definition: n.全体员工,（与复数动词连用）人员，员工,人事部门
senses.sentence: I looked your address up in the **personnel** file.
senses.translation: 我在人事档案里找到了你的地址。

senses.definition: n.透镜，望远镜,观点，看法,远景，景色,洞察力
senses.sentence: The Telegraph puts the union in a historical **perspective**.
senses.translation: 《电讯报》从历史的角度对该工会进行了报道。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.说服,劝说,使相信,使信服
senses.sentence: Somehow, he'd managed to **persuade** Kay to buy one for him.
senses.translation: 不知用了什么方法，他成功说服凯给他买了一个。

senses.definition: adj.悲观的，厌世的,悲观主义的
senses.sentence: Hardy has often been criticised for an excessively **pessimistic** view of life.
senses.translation: 哈代由于对生活持过度悲观的态度而常常受到批评。

senses.definition: n.讨厌的人或事,有害动植物,瘟疫
senses.sentence: One hundred million rats are killed each year by **pest** exterminators.
senses.translation: 每年灭鼠人员都会杀死1亿只老鼠。

senses.definition: n.杀虫剂，农药
senses.sentence: Male workers were made permanently sterile by this **pesticide**.
senses.translation: 这种杀虫剂使得男性工人终生不育.

senses.definition: n.宠物,宠儿,受宠的人,生气
senses.sentence: They would sell the meat off as **pet** food.
senses.translation: 他们将把肉当作宠物食品卖掉。

senses.definition: vi.祈求，请求,请愿
senses.sentence: We recently presented the government with a **petition** signed by 4,500 people.
senses.translation: 最近我们向政府递交了有4,500人签名的请愿书。

senses.definition: n.汽油
senses.sentence: The crowds became violent and threw **petrol** bombs at the police.
senses.translation: 人群变得狂暴起来，并向警察投掷汽油弹。

senses.definition: n.石油
senses.sentence: **Petroleum** engineers plan and manage the extraction of oil.
senses.translation: 石油工程师规划并管理石油的提炼。

senses.definition: adj.不重要的,卑鄙的，小气的,小的，一点点,小规模的
senses.sentence: Donaldson was a **petty** crook with a string of previous offences.
senses.translation: 唐纳森有一系列小的犯罪前科，但没犯过大事。

senses.definition: n.药房,配药学，药学,制药业,一批备用药品
senses.sentence: Modern **pharmacy** has solved the problem of sleeplessness.
senses.translation: 现代制药学已经解决了失眠问题.

senses.definition: n.相，周相,阶段,[物理学]相位,方面，侧面
senses.sentence: The crisis is entering a crucial, critical **phase**.
senses.translation: 目前危机正进入决定性的关键阶段。

senses.definition: n.现象，事件,奇迹,非凡的人
senses.sentence: This **phenomenon** is not as outrageous as it seems.
senses.translation: 这种现象并不像它看上去那样骇人。

senses.definition: n.哲学家，哲人,思想家，学者,豁达的人,爱卖弄大道理者
senses.sentence: He is a teacher by occupation but a **philosopher** by inclination.
senses.translation: 他的职业是教师,但他的本心是成为哲学家.

senses.definition: n.哲学,哲学体系，哲学思想,生活信条,哲理
senses.sentence: Apart from criminal investigation techniques, students learn forensic medicine, **philosophy** and logic.
senses.translation: 除罪案调查技巧外，学生们还要学习法医学、哲学和逻辑学。

senses.definition: n.电话,听筒,（发声或使用声音的）工具,说某种语言的
senses.sentence: Rather taken aback by such forwardness, I slammed down the **phone**.
senses.translation: 如此无礼的言语让我火冒三丈，我砰的一下把电话挂了。

senses.definition: n.照片，相片
senses.sentence: They said, after digging around, the **photo** was a fake.
senses.translation: 在搜集了有关情况后，他们说照片是伪造的。

senses.definition: n.照片，相片
senses.sentence: Our **photograph** shows how the plants will turn out.
senses.translation: 我们的照片展示了植物的生长状况。

senses.definition: n.<语>短语,成语,说法,乐句
senses.sentence: A **phrase** from the conference floor set my mind wandering.
senses.translation: 会上发言者的一句话让我思绪飘远。

senses.definition: adj.自然（界）的,身体的,物质的,自然规律的
senses.sentence: Character is not separable from **physical** form but is governed by it.
senses.translation: 性格和外表是分不开的，而且观其形知其性。

senses.definition: n.医生，内科医生,<口>医学博士,（精神创伤的）医治者，抚慰者
senses.sentence: I'm a practicing **physician** trying to help people here and now.
senses.translation: 我是一名此时此刻只想治病救人的执业医师。

senses.definition: n.物理学家,唯物论者,<古>自然科学家,宇宙机械论者
senses.sentence: I think he's a **physicist** or something of that nature.
senses.translation: 我想他大概是物理学家或那一类的人.

senses.definition: n.物理学,物理现象,物理成分
senses.sentence: **Physics** isn't just about pure science with no immediate applications.
senses.translation: 物理学并非只是一门不能直接运用的纯科学。

senses.definition: n.生理学,生理机能
senses.sentence: The medicine chemically affects your **physiology**.
senses.translation: 这种药会通过化学作用影响生理机能。

senses.definition: n.钢琴,<美俚>囚犯工作席,轻奏乐段
senses.sentence: He started **piano** lessons at the age of 7.
senses.translation: 他7岁开始上钢琴课。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.挑选，挑拣,挖，采，摘，剔，扒,挑剔
senses.sentence: See our selection of autumn favourites and take your **pick**.
senses.translation: 看看我们的秋季精选，然后挑出你想要的。

senses.definition: n.野餐郊游,供野餐吃的食品,猪的肩肉,轻松的工作
senses.sentence: They were tidying up the remains of their **picnic**.
senses.translation: 他们正在收拾野餐后剩下的东西。

senses.definition: n.照片，画像,图画，图片,影片,情景
senses.sentence: But as with other charitable bodies, these figures mask the true **picture**.
senses.translation: 但和其他慈善机构一样，这些数字掩盖了实情。

senses.definition: n.馅饼，派,爱说话的人,[动]喜鹊,<美俚>容易得到的称心东西，容易的工作
senses.sentence: They have begun carving the country up like a **pie**.
senses.translation: 他们已经开始像切馅饼一样瓜分这个国家。

senses.definition: vt.刺穿，戳穿,刺破,洞察,深深打动
senses.sentence: Producers decided to end her on-screen romance with **Pierce** Lawton.
senses.translation: 制片人决定结束她在影片中与皮尔斯·劳顿的恋情。

senses.definition: n.猪,猪肉,令人不快（或讨厌）的人,金属块（锭）
senses.sentence: I am not sure whether this was courage or **pig**-headedness.
senses.translation: 我不能肯定这是一种勇气，还是一种固执。

senses.definition: n.桩,一堆,绒头,摞
senses.sentence: On the table beside an empty plate was a **pile** of books.
senses.translation: 桌上空盘子的旁边是一堆书。

senses.definition: n.香客，朝圣者,旅行者,追寻者,〈美〉新来移民，1620年移居美洲的英国清教徒
senses.sentence: They read stories about the Indians and the **Pilgrim**.
senses.translation: 他们阅读有关印第安人和那些朝圣者的故事。

senses.definition: n.柱，台柱，顶梁柱,墩，柱脚,（组织、制度、信仰等的）核心
senses.sentence: She strove to read the name on the stone **pillar**.
senses.translation: 她费劲地读着石柱上的名字。

senses.definition: n.枕头,垫子,花边垫子
senses.sentence: I have a **pillow** with my name embroidered on it.
senses.translation: 我有一个绣着我名字的枕头。

senses.definition: n.飞行员,引航员,向导,[机械学]导向器（或轴）
senses.sentence: The minutes towards departure ticked by, until finally the **pilot** arrived.
senses.translation: 离出发的时间越来越近，最后飞行员终于到了。

senses.definition: n.钉,别针，扣针，饰针,大头针,没价值的东西
senses.sentence: Zita was herself unconventional, keeping a safety-**pin** stuck through her ear lobe.
senses.translation: 齐塔自己就不守传统，在一只耳垂上穿了一根别针。

senses.definition: vt.捏，掐,挤痛，夹痛,使（植物）枯萎，凋谢,使紧缺，节制
senses.sentence: Season with salt, pepper and a **pinch** of cayenne.
senses.translation: 调以盐、胡椒和少许辣椒粉。

senses.definition: n.松树,松木,凤梨，菠萝
senses.sentence: Battered **pine** floors slanted down to a Georgian window.
senses.translation: 破旧的松木地板歪歪斜斜地铺到一个乔治王时代风格的窗户跟前。

senses.definition: adj.粉红色的,淡红色的,略带左翼政治观点的,与同性恋者有关的
senses.sentence: He was holding a cloth that dripped **pink** drops upon the floor.
senses.translation: 他正拿着一块布，布上粉红色的水滴落在地板上。

senses.definition: n.拓荒者,开发者,先驱者,创始者
senses.sentence: She was a suffragette and a birth control **pioneer**.
senses.translation: 她参加争取妇女选举权的运动，也是节育倡导者。

senses.definition: n.管子,烟斗,管乐器,（管风琴的）音管
senses.sentence: He nodded and puffed on a stubby **pipe** as he listened.
senses.translation: 他边听边点头，还吸着一支粗短的烟斗。

senses.definition: n.海盗，强盗,海盗船,侵害版权者,盗版者
senses.sentence: **Pirate** copies of the video are already said to be in Britain.
senses.translation: 该录像带的盗版版本据说已在英国出现。

senses.definition: n.<机>活塞
senses.sentence: Let's get the lathe to turn the new **piston**.
senses.translation: 咱们用车床车[加工]新的活塞吧.

senses.definition: n.井,煤矿,麻子,（赛车道旁的）修理加油站
senses.sentence: He had to make four **pit** stops during the race.
senses.translation: 他不得不在比赛过程中4次停车进站。

senses.definition: n.场地,最高点,音高,说教
senses.sentence: The ground staff do all they can to prepare the **pitch**.
senses.translation: 运动场管理员全力整备球场。

senses.definition: n.怜悯,同情,可惜的事,憾事
senses.sentence: She summoned up all her **pity** for him, to smother her self-**pity**.
senses.translation: 她抑制着心中的自怜，将满腔的怜悯之情都倾注在了他的身上。

senses.definition: n.位,地方,职位,座位
senses.sentence: The United States plans to tighten the economic sanctions currently in **place**.
senses.translation: 美国计划加大现有经济制裁的力度。

senses.definition: n.瘟疫,灾害，折磨
senses.sentence: I normally avoid cheap wine like the **plague**.
senses.translation: 我一般对廉价的葡萄酒敬而远之。

senses.definition: n.计划,打算,平面图,示意图
senses.sentence: The **plan** hinges on a deal being struck with a new company.
senses.translation: 该计划完全取决于正在和一家新公司洽谈着的一项交易。

senses.definition: n.水平,平面,飞机,木工刨
senses.sentence: The **plane** has been kept in service far longer than originally intended.
senses.translation: 这架飞机已经超期服役很长时间了。

senses.definition: n.[天]行星,[占星]（左右人命运的）星相
senses.sentence: The blue whale is the largest living thing on the **planet**.
senses.translation: 蓝鲸是地球上体型最大的生物。

senses.definition: n.种植园，大农场,栽植,<史>殖民，殖民地
senses.sentence: On the left was a **plantation** of almond trees.
senses.translation: 左边是一个杏树园。

senses.definition: n.灰泥，涂墙泥,石膏,膏药
senses.sentence: The bullet slammed into the ceiling, spraying them with bits of **plaster**.
senses.translation: 子弹砰地射进了天花板，掉落的石膏碎片落了他们一身。

senses.definition: n.塑料制品,〈口〉（使用）信用卡,整形,可塑体
senses.sentence: She even had **plastic** surgery to change the shape of her nose.
senses.translation: 为改变鼻子的形状，她甚至接受了整形手术。

senses.definition: n.盘子，盆子,金属板,均匀厚度的片状硬物体,[摄]底片，感光版
senses.sentence: On the table beside an empty **plate** was a pile of books.
senses.translation: 桌上空盘子的旁边是一堆书。

senses.definition: n.高原,平稳时期，稳定水平,停滞期
senses.sentence: The US heroin market now appears to have reached a **plateau**.
senses.translation: 美国的海洛因市场现在似乎已到了停滞期。

senses.definition: n.台,站台,平台,纲领
senses.sentence: Nick finished what he was saying and jumped down from the **platform**.
senses.translation: 尼克讲完后，从讲台上跳了下来。

senses.definition: adj.貌似真实的,貌似有理的,花言巧语的,有眉有眼
senses.sentence: Some of the ideas are very intriguing and sound intuitively **plausible**.
senses.translation: 有些想法非常吸引人，听起来觉得很有道理。

senses.definition: n.比赛,游戏,戏剧,赌博
senses.sentence: Charlton are about to **play** an important away match.
senses.translation: 查尔顿队即将在客场进行一场重要比赛。

senses.definition: n.操场，尤指提供如秋千等设备的户外场地,游乐场,（某些集体聚会游乐的）园地
senses.sentence: There was a sandpit, a seesaw and a swing in the **playground**.
senses.translation: 游乐场上有一处沙坑、一块跷跷板和一个秋千架。

senses.definition: n.恳求，请求,（被告或被告律师的）抗辩，答辩,借口，托辞,请愿
senses.sentence: Her **plea** of guilty to manslaughter through provocation was rejected.
senses.translation: 她因受到挑衅而过失杀人的有罪答辩被驳回。

senses.definition: vi.恳求,辩论
senses.sentence: It was no defence to **plead** that they were only obeying orders.
senses.translation: 辩称他们只是在服从命令站不住脚。

senses.definition: adj.可爱的,令人愉快的,有趣的,晴朗的
senses.sentence: Lloyd George was most anxious to be agreeable and **pleasant**.
senses.translation: 劳埃德·乔治极力想表现得平易近人、和蔼亲切。

senses.definition: int.请
senses.sentence: I know this is an imposition. But **please** hear me out.
senses.translation: 我知道这是强人所难。但是请听我说完。

senses.definition: n.愉快,娱乐,令人高兴的事
senses.sentence: He mixed business and **pleasure** in a perfect and dynamic way.
senses.translation: 他以互动的方式将工作和娱乐完美地结合起来。

senses.definition: n.保证，誓言,[法]抵押权,公约,（表示友谊的）干杯
senses.sentence: I **pledge** that by next year we will have the problem solved.
senses.translation: 我保证来年之前我们将解决这个问题。

senses.definition: adj.丰富的,富产的,丰饶的,充沛
senses.sentence: There is a **plentiful** supply of arms on the black market.
senses.translation: 黑市上有大量武器出售。

senses.definition: adv.大量,十分,很多,足够有余
senses.sentence: There were **plenty** of servants to wait on her.
senses.translation: 有很多仆人服侍她。

senses.definition: n.境况，困境,誓约
senses.sentence: They bore their **plight** with stoicism and fortitude.
senses.translation: 他们以坚忍刚毅的精神直面困境。

senses.definition: n.地基，基址图,（戏剧、小说等的）情节,一块地,测算表
senses.sentence: The Tories have lost the **plot** on law and order.
senses.translation: 保守党人在治安问题上不知所措。

senses.definition: n.耕作，耕地,犁,[天]北斗七星,〈英俚〉（主考人评定）不及格
senses.sentence: The soil sticks to the blade and blocks the **plough**.
senses.translation: 土粘在犁铧上，卡住了犁。

senses.definition: n.犁,犁型铲雪机
senses.sentence: At this time of the year farmers **plow** their fields.
senses.translation: 每年这个时候农民们都在耕地.

senses.definition: n.塞子,插头,消防栓,（内燃机的）火花塞
senses.sentence: A **plug** had been inserted in the drill hole.
senses.translation: 钻孔已塞上了塞子。

senses.definition: vt.用力插入,使陷入
senses.sentence: Local residents saw it **plunge** towards Earth with a deafening roar.
senses.translation: 当地的居民看见它伴着一声震耳欲聋的巨响撞向地面。

senses.definition: n.复数,复数形式,复数词
senses.sentence: "Data" is the Latin **plural** form of "datum".
senses.translation: data在拉丁文中是datum的复数形式。

senses.definition: prep.（表示运算）加,（表示包容）外加,[口语]和,（表示数目）在零（度）以上
senses.sentence: All vessels were to be built on a cost-**plus** basis.
senses.translation: 所有的船只都将在成本加利润的基础上制造。

senses.definition: n.口袋，钱袋,金钱，财富,容器,凹处
senses.sentence: We agreed to give her £6 a week **pocket** money.
senses.translation: 我们同意每周给她6英镑零花钱。

senses.definition: n.诗,韵文,诗一样的作品,富有诗意的东西
senses.sentence: At my brother's high school graduation the students recited a **poem**.
senses.translation: 在我弟弟的高中毕业典礼上，学生们朗诵了一首诗。

senses.definition: n.诗人,空想家,古典芭蕾舞大师
senses.sentence: The concept of the Rose continued to inform the **poet**'s work.
senses.translation: 玫瑰的概念持续贯穿于诗人的作品中。

senses.definition: n.点,要点,得分,标点
senses.sentence: I don't see the **point** in it really. It's just stupid.
senses.translation: 我真的不理解这到底有什么意义，简直是愚蠢透顶。

senses.definition: n.毒药,酒,极糟的食物,极有害的思想（或心情等）
senses.sentence: **Poison** from the weaver fish causes paralysis, swelling, and nausea.
senses.translation: 龙的毒素会引起瘫痪、肿胀和恶心。

senses.definition: adj.有毒的,有害的,恶意的,<口>讨厌的
senses.sentence: **Poisonous** smoke had got into the water supply.
senses.translation: 毒烟已经进入供水系统。

senses.definition: vt.戳，捅,推,拨火,〈美俚〉打，殴
senses.sentence: We don't like strangers who **poke** their noses into our affairs.
senses.translation: 我们不喜欢陌生人干预我们的事务。

senses.definition: adj.极地的，两极的,正好相反的,[化，物]磁极的，有磁性的
senses.sentence: The parents' position is often the **polar** opposite of the child's.
senses.translation: 父母的观点常与孩子的完全相反。

senses.definition: n.[物]极点，顶点,地极,杆,两极端
senses.sentence: The north **pole** is slightly tipped towards the sun.
senses.translation: 北极略微向太阳倾斜。

senses.definition: n.警察部门,警方,警察,治安
senses.sentence: He then held the man in an armlock until **police** arrived.
senses.translation: 然后他反扭住那名男子的手臂让他动弹不得，直到警察赶到。

senses.definition: n.（男）警察，警员,看守矿井的人,[化] 淀帚
senses.sentence: The two policemen were joined by another **policeman** also carrying a pistol.
senses.translation: 另一名持枪警察和那两名警察会合了。

senses.definition: n.政策,策略,保险单,策略性
senses.sentence: It was not the **policy** of the government to repatriate genuine refugees.
senses.translation: 遣返真正的难民回国并非政府的政策。

senses.definition: v.擦光,磨光,修改,润色
senses.sentence: The president persuaded the West to write off **Polish** debts.
senses.translation: 总统说通西方免除波兰的债务。

senses.definition: adj.有礼貌的,有教养的，文雅的,上流社会的,应酬的，客套的
senses.sentence: He's a man of few words, very **polite** and unassuming.
senses.translation: 他话不多，很有礼貌，为人谦和。

senses.definition: adj.政治的,政党的,对政治有兴趣的
senses.sentence: It was time now to show more **political** realism.
senses.translation: 现在是拿出更多政治务实精神的时候了。

senses.definition: n.政治家,政客，玩弄权术者,<蔑>政客，<美>政治贩
senses.sentence: He is widely regarded as Hungary's most skilful **politician**.
senses.translation: 他是公认的匈牙利最有手腕的政治家。

senses.definition: n.政治,政治事务,政治观点,权术
senses.sentence: He closed down the business and went into **politics**.
senses.translation: 他关闭公司投身政治。

senses.definition: n.民意调查,投票选举,投票数,头部
senses.sentence: He will have been heartened by the telephone opinion **poll** published yesterday.
senses.translation: 他会为昨天公布的电话民意调查结果感到鼓舞。

senses.definition: vt.污染,玷污，亵渎,破坏（品性），使堕落
senses.sentence: Mining would **pollute** the lake and denude the forest.
senses.translation: 采矿会污染湖水，毁掉森林。

senses.definition: adj.多中心的
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **polycentric** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【polycentric】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: adj.多音节的
senses.sentence: Among these **polysyllabic** conjunctions, there are 186 disyllabic and 31 trisyllable and 7 quadrisyllable.
senses.translation: 在这些复音连词中, 有186个双音节连词、31个三音节连词及7个四音节连词.

senses.definition: n.池塘
senses.sentence: There was an unappealing film of slime on top of the **pond**.
senses.translation: 池塘表面有一层黏腻腻的污泥。

senses.definition: vt.思索，衡量
senses.sentence: They would do well to pause and **ponder** upon their new responsibilities.
senses.translation: 人们最好还是停一停,好好地想一想自己所负的新责任.

senses.definition: adj.贫穷的，贫乏的,令人怜悯的，可怜的,匮乏的,低劣的
senses.sentence: This courtroom battle has been a **poor** advert for English justice.
senses.translation: 这场法庭上的争论为英格兰的司法制度做了一次拙劣的广告。

senses.definition: adv.爆炸；砰地
senses.sentence: Somalia, **pop**. 7.9 million, income per head about £1.60 a week.
senses.translation: 索马里，人口790万，人均收入大约每周1.60英镑。

senses.definition: adj.流行的，大众化的,民众的，大众的，公众的,通俗的，普通的，平易的,〈美俚〉自以为了不得的，骄傲的
senses.sentence: The military government has been unable to win **popular** support.
senses.translation: 军政府一直未能赢得广泛的支持。

senses.definition: vt.使受欢迎,普及,使通俗化,使易懂
senses.sentence: The company is trying to **popularise** its new products.
senses.translation: 公司努力推广新产品.

senses.definition: vt.使受欢迎,普及,使通俗化,使流行
senses.sentence: The programme did much to **popularize** little-known writers.
senses.translation: 这个节目大力宣扬不太知名的作家。

senses.definition: n.人口,全体居民,特定[生物]种群,[物]布居
senses.sentence: An earthquake hit the capital, causing panic among the **population**.
senses.translation: 首都发生了地震，引发民众恐慌。

senses.definition: n.瓷，瓷器
senses.sentence: Place them in a jam jar, **porcelain** bowl, or other similar container.
senses.translation: 将它们装入果酱罐、瓷碗或其他类似容器中。

senses.definition: n.门廊,游廊，走廊
senses.sentence: We'd eat during the hot summer evenings on the front **porch**.
senses.translation: 在炎热的夏夜，我们会在屋前走廊上吃晚饭。

senses.definition: n.猪肉,〈美俚〉支持政党上台所分到的好处，政治分肥,〈古〉猪
senses.sentence: Legs of **pork** were cured and smoked over the fire.
senses.translation: 在火上熏制猪腿。

senses.definition: n.港口,（事情的）意义,（计算机与其他设备的）接口,（船、飞机等的）左舷
senses.sentence: Captain David Clement and 150 commandos stormed the **port** this morning.
senses.translation: 戴维·克莱门特上尉和150名突击队员今天早上对港口展开突袭。

senses.definition: adj.手提的,轻便的
senses.sentence: A small-screen **portable** TV can be a good investment.
senses.translation: 小屏幕的便携式电视机很值得买。

senses.definition: n.门童,搬运工人,（医院里护送病人的）护工,（尤指卧铺车厢的）列车服务员
senses.sentence: A **porter** relieved her of the three large cases.
senses.translation: 一个行李搬运工替她扛了3个大包。

senses.definition: n.公文包,代表作品集,证券投资组合,部长[大臣]的职位
senses.sentence: He was appointed government leader in the senate, and minister without **portfolio**.
senses.translation: 他被任命为政府驻参议院领袖，政务委员。

senses.definition: n.一部分,一份遗产（或赠与的财产）,嫁妆,分得的财产
senses.sentence: I have spent a fairly considerable **portion** of my life here.
senses.translation: 我生命中相当长的一段时光是在这里度过的。

senses.definition: n.肖像，肖像画,模型，标本,半身雕塑像,人物描写
senses.sentence: Today his picture goes on show at the National **Portrait** Gallery.
senses.translation: 今天他的画作在国家肖像美术馆展出。

senses.definition: vt.画像,描述,描绘,描画
senses.sentence: He has worked hard in recent months to **portray** New York in a better light.
senses.translation: 最近几个月里他努力从更积极的角度来描绘纽约。

senses.definition: n.姿势,姿态,装腔作势,伪装
senses.sentence: She'd flung herself in a **pose** of melodramatic exhaustion.
senses.translation: 她一下子摆出一副筋疲力尽的夸张姿势。

senses.definition: n.位置，方位,地位，职位,态度,状态
senses.sentence: Mack seemed to uncoil slowly up into a standing **position**.
senses.translation: 麦克慢慢直起身站了起来。

senses.definition: adj.积极的,确实的，肯定的,[数]正的,[医]阳性的
senses.sentence: Remember, keep a **positive** attitude and good things will happen.
senses.translation: 记住：保持乐观的心态，好事自然会发生。

senses.definition: vt.拥有,掌握，懂得,主宰,缠住，迷住
senses.sentence: This figure has long been held to **possess** miraculous power.
senses.translation: 这个数字长时间以来都被认为拥有神奇的力量。

senses.definition: n.有，所有，拥有,领地,财产，所有权，占有物，所有物,持有违禁物
senses.sentence: **Possession** of cannabis will no longer be an arrestable offence.
senses.translation: 持有大麻将不再会被拘捕。

senses.definition: n.可能，可能性,希望，可能发生的事物
senses.sentence: There is the **possibility** that hypothermia can go unrecognized.
senses.translation: 人们有可能察觉不到体温的过低。

senses.definition: adj.可能的,可接受的,合理的，可以允许的,不坏的
senses.sentence: It was imperative that he act as naturally as **possible**.
senses.translation: 最重要的是他要做到尽可能自然。

senses.definition: adv.可能地,也许，或许,敢是,容许
senses.sentence: **Possibly** we are accustomed, biologically speaking, to this background radiation.
senses.translation: 从生物机理上说，我们可能已经习惯了这种本底辐射。

senses.definition: n.邮费，邮资
senses.sentence: Send a cheque for £18.99 plus £2 for **postage** and packing.
senses.translation: 请寄上18.99英镑的支票，外加2英镑的邮资和包装费。

senses.definition: n.明信片
senses.sentence: For more details about these products, send a **postcard** marked HB/FF.
senses.translation: 要了解这些产品的详细信息，请寄来标明HB/FF字样的明信片。

senses.definition: n.海报，招贴，公告,招贴画,张贴者,[古语]急行的人，匆忙赶路的人
senses.sentence: The current national **poster** child is a tiny, freckle-faced redhead.
senses.translation: 现在的那个全国广告代言人个头不高，红头发，脸上有雀斑。

senses.definition: n.研究生
senses.sentence: The self-catering flats are usually reserved for **postgraduate** students.
senses.translation: 可以自己做饭的公寓一般留给研究生住。

senses.definition: vt.使延期，延缓,把…放在次要地位,把…放在后面
senses.sentence: It is totally out of the question to **postpone** the midnight deadline.
senses.translation: 想要推迟午夜的最后期限是完全不可能的。

senses.definition: n.姿势,看法, 态度,立场
senses.sentence: If bad **posture** becomes habitual, you risk long-term effects.
senses.translation: 不良姿势一旦定型，日后可就有你受的了。

senses.definition: adj.战后的
senses.sentence: During the **postwar** years in Germany, many honours were heaped upon Einstein.
senses.translation: 在战后的岁月里,爱因斯坦在德国得到了种种荣誉.

senses.definition: n.罐,一罐,（某种用途的）容器,陶盆
senses.sentence: The republic is a melting **pot** of different nationalities.
senses.translation: 这个共和国是多民族的大熔炉。

senses.definition: n.马铃薯， 土豆，洋芋,土豆块茎
senses.sentence: The **potato** cakes should be crisp outside and meltingly soft inside.
senses.translation: 土豆饼应该外面酥脆,里面嫩软.

senses.definition: adj.潜在的，有可能的,[语法学]可能语气的，表示可能性的,有能力的
senses.sentence: We are aware of the **potential** problems and have taken every precaution.
senses.translation: 我们已意识到潜在的问题，并采取了全面的预防措施。

senses.definition: n.〈集合词〉家禽
senses.sentence: Most **poultry** farmers have to rely on commercially manufactured feeds.
senses.translation: 多数饲养家禽的农场主不得不依赖商业化生产的饲料。

senses.definition: n.英镑,磅,兽栏,重击声
senses.sentence: There was a sharp fall in the value of the **pound**.
senses.translation: 英镑大幅贬值。

senses.definition: vt.涌出,倾，倒
senses.sentence: Stir the sauce and **pour** it over the top.
senses.translation: 搅拌调味汁，把它浇在上面。

senses.definition: n.贫穷,缺乏，不足,贫瘠，不毛,低劣
senses.sentence: Mr Dunn's pleas of **poverty** are only partly justified.
senses.translation: 邓恩先生贫穷的托词只是部分成立。

senses.definition: n.[机]动力，功率,力量,政权，权力,强国，大国
senses.sentence: Generosity is its own form of **power**.
senses.translation: 别低估了慷慨的力量。

senses.definition: adj.强大的,权力大的,（药）有效地
senses.sentence: The social cachet of some form of qualification in India is **powerful**.
senses.translation: 在印度，具有某种资格享有巨大的社会威望。

senses.definition: adj.实践的，实际的,可实现的，实用的,注重实际的,可用的
senses.sentence: After half an hour's commis-eration, we turned to more **practical** matters.
senses.translation: 惺惺相惜了半个小时后，我们转而讨论一些更为实际的问题。

senses.definition: adv.实际上,几乎,事实上
senses.sentence: We all knew by then that the affair was **practically** over.
senses.translation: 到那时，我们都知道事情实际上已经结束了。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.练习,实习,积极从事,执业
senses.sentence: They righteously maintain that they do not **practise** rationing.
senses.translation: 他们一本正经地坚称不实行定量配给制度。

senses.definition: n.从业者,执业医生,习艺者,专门人才
senses.sentence: She was a medical **practitioner** before she entered politics.
senses.translation: 从政前她是个开业医生.

senses.definition: n.赞扬，称赞,崇拜,赞词
senses.sentence: Prince Sadruddin lavished **praise** on Britain's contributions to world diplomacy.
senses.translation: 萨德鲁丁王子大力赞扬英国对世界外交作出的贡献。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.布道，讲道,宣扬,说教,讲（道）
senses.sentence: He realized that his calling was to **preach** the gospel.
senses.translation: 他体悟到宣讲福音是他的使命。

senses.definition: n.预防，防备，警惕,预防措施,避孕措施
senses.sentence: We are aware of the potential problems and have taken every **precaution**.
senses.translation: 我们已意识到潜在的问题，并采取了全面的预防措施。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.在…之前发生或出现，先于,在…之上，优于,给…作序,处于…前面的位置
senses.contextMeaning: 在…之前发生或出现，先于
senses.sentence: He gestured to Alice to **precede** them from the room.
senses.translation: 他给艾丽斯做手势，让她在他们前面离开房间。

senses.definition: n.前例,先例
senses.sentence: They're keenly aware that whatever they decide will set a **precedent**.
senses.translation: 他们深知无论他们的决定是什么，都将开创先例。

senses.definition: adj.（时间或地点上）在先的，在前的，前面的,前述的,上述的
senses.contextMeaning: （时间或地点上）在先的，在前的，前面的
senses.sentence: Repeat the exercises described in the **preceding** section.
senses.translation: 把前一节要求的练习重做一遍。

senses.definition: adj.宝贵的，珍贵的,贵重的,矫揉造作的,可爱的，宝贝的
senses.sentence: After four months in foreign parts, every hour at home was **precious**.
senses.translation: 在国外呆了4个月后，在家的每一刻都是宝贵的。

senses.definition: adj.清晰的,精确的,正规的,精密
senses.sentence: Elgar supplied his works with **precise** indications of tempo.
senses.translation: 埃尔加给自己的作品标上了精确的节奏标记。

senses.definition: n.精确度，准确（性）,[语]精确
senses.sentence: Her **precision** became a standing joke with colleagues.
senses.translation: 她事事讲究精确，同事们经常拿这事开玩笑。

senses.definition: n.以掠夺为生的人,捕食其他动物的动物，食肉动物
senses.sentence: The arrival of this South American **predator** threatened the survival of native species.
senses.translation: 这种南美肉食动物的到来威胁到了当地物种的生存.

senses.definition: n.前任，前辈,原有事物，前身,<古>祖先
senses.sentence: He has never exhibited the self-confidence, bordering on arrogance, of his **predecessor**.
senses.translation: 他从未表现出他前任的那种近乎傲慢的自信。

senses.definition: vt.预言，预测,预示，预告
senses.sentence: There's no way to **predict** the future health of the banking industry.
senses.translation: 银行业未来是否会兴旺发达根本无法预测。

senses.definition: adj.可预言的,可预报的,可预见的,可预料的
senses.sentence: Psychological twists perk up an otherwise **predictable** story line.
senses.translation: 心理转折使原本老套的故事情节变得生动有趣。

senses.definition: adj.主要的，占主导地位的,占优势的，卓越的,有影响的,特优种
senses.sentence: Yellow is the **predominant** colour this spring in the fashion world.
senses.translation: 黄色是今春时装界的流行颜色。

senses.definition: n.序言，引语,开端，前奏,[宗]（弥撒的）序诵，序祷
senses.sentence: The **preface** to this book is on the preceding page.
senses.translation: 前边一页是这本书的序言.

senses.definition: vt.更喜欢,提升，提拔,给予（债权人）优先权,提出（控告）
senses.sentence: I think more customers probably **prefer** a soft sell.
senses.translation: 我认为更多的顾客也许更喜欢软性推销。

senses.definition: adj.更好的，更可取的,略胜一筹的
senses.sentence: Anything was **preferable** to the tense atmosphere at home.
senses.translation: 什么都比家里的紧张气氛好。

senses.definition: n.偏爱,优先权,偏爱的事物,（债权人）受优先偿还的权利
senses.sentence: The Pentagon will give **preference** to companies which do business electronically.
senses.translation: 美国国防部将会优先考虑那些能够进行电子商务的公司。

senses.definition: adj.怀孕的,孕育着…的,富于想象的,富于成果的
senses.sentence: The number of women who become **pregnant** after adopting children is legion.
senses.translation: 领养小孩后怀孕的妇女比比皆是。

senses.definition: n.成见，偏见，歧视,侵害,伤害
senses.sentence: I'm calling in reference to your series on **prejudice**.
senses.translation: 我打电话是要谈谈你写的有关“偏见”的系列文章。

senses.definition: adj.初步的，初级的,预备的,开端的,序言的
senses.sentence: **Preliminary** results show the Republican party with 11 percent of the vote.
senses.translation: 初步结果显示共和党获得了11%的选票。

senses.definition: n.总理,首相
senses.sentence: The Prime Minister played host to French **Premier** Jacques Chirac.
senses.translation: 首相接待了法国总理雅克·希拉克。

senses.definition: n.前提,[复数]房屋,[复数][合同、契约用语]上述各点,（逻辑学中的）大[小]前提
senses.sentence: Let me **premise** my argument with a bit of history.
senses.translation: 让我引述一些史实作为我立论的前提.

senses.definition: n.额外费用,保险费,附加费
senses.sentence: Callers are charged a **premium** rate of 48p a minute.
senses.translation: 打电话要支付每分钟48便士的附加费。

senses.definition: n.准备，预备,准备工作,配制品,制剂
senses.sentence: You could never eliminate risk, but **preparation** and training could attenuate it.
senses.translation: 风险不可能完全消除，但可以通过防范和培训来降低。

senses.definition: vt.准备,预备（饭菜）,配备,使（自己）有准备
senses.sentence: President Castro has warned Cubans to **prepare** for a profound economic emergency.
senses.translation: 卡斯特罗主席已经提醒古巴人民为严重的经济危急状况做准备。

senses.definition: vt.预付，先付,预付（邮资等）
senses.sentence: Normally, the seller is obligated to **prepay** the ocean freight.
senses.translation: 通常情况下, 卖方有义务预付海运费.

senses.definition: vt.指定，规定,指定，规定
senses.sentence: Therapists cannot **prescribe** drugs as they are not necessarily medically qualified.
senses.translation: 由于治疗师不一定具有行医资格，所以他们不可以开处方。

senses.definition: n.[医]药方，处方,处方药,训令，指示,法规
senses.sentence: The **prescription** Ackerman gave me isn't doing any good.
senses.translation: 阿克曼给我开的药没有任何疗效。

senses.definition: n.出席,仪表,风度,鬼魂，神灵
senses.sentence: We had kept its **presence** hidden with a strategically placed chair.
senses.translation: 我们用一张摆放得很巧妙的椅子将它隐藏了起来。

senses.definition: adj.现在的,目前的,出席的,[语法学]现在时的
senses.sentence: They said the **present** system of military conscription should be phased out.
senses.translation: 他们说，当前的征兵体系应当逐步废除。

senses.definition: n.提交,演出,陈述，报告,颁奖仪式
senses.sentence: The ideas in the show's **presentation** were good, but failed in execution.
senses.translation: 那场展览陈述的想法很好，但是没能实现。

senses.definition: vt.保护,保持，保存,腌制食物,防腐处理
senses.sentence: The park was created to **preserve** some of the forests upstate.
senses.translation: 这个公园是为了保护该州最北部地区的一些森林而建的。

senses.definition: vi.主持，指挥,担任会议主席
senses.sentence: They asked if I would **preside** at the committee meeting.
senses.translation: 他们问我是否会主持委员会会议。

senses.definition: n.校长,总统,总裁,董事长
senses.sentence: The **President**'s speeches are regularly reproduced verbatim in the state-run newspapers.
senses.translation: 总统的讲话通常会被一字不差地刊登在国有报纸上。

senses.definition: n.压（力）,压力,气压（或血压）（的缩略形式）,压（迫）感
senses.sentence: He was under **pressure** to resign and was about to be sidelined.
senses.translation: 他承受着被迫辞职的压力，很快就要被排挤出去了。

senses.definition: n.威信，威望，声望,声誉,（财势的）显赫,信望
senses.sentence: It was his responsibility for foreign affairs that gained him international **prestige**.
senses.translation: 他在负责处理外交事务的过程中赢得了国际声望。

senses.definition: adv.据推测,大概,可能,想来
senses.sentence: He had gone to the reception desk, **presumably** to check out.
senses.translation: 他已经去前台了，可能是要办理退房手续。

senses.definition: vt.以为，认为,假定，假设,推测,意味着
senses.sentence: They're resentful that outsiders **presume** to meddle in their affairs.
senses.translation: 他们对外人擅自干预他们的事务非常愤慨。

senses.definition: vt.假装，伪装,假称,装扮
senses.sentence: The children **pretend** to be different animals dancing to the music.
senses.translation: 孩子们扮成不同的动物，随着音乐起舞。

senses.definition: n.借口，托辞,假象，掩饰
senses.sentence: The incident was used as a **pretext** for intervention in the area.
senses.translation: 这次事件成了干涉那个地区的借口。

senses.definition: adj.漂亮的,机灵的，聪明的
senses.sentence: His new government looks **pretty** much like the old one.
senses.translation: 他的新政府看起来和旧政府没什么两样。

senses.definition: vi.流行，盛行,获胜，占优势,说服，劝说
senses.sentence: We must, each of us, **prevail** upon our congressman to act.
senses.translation: 我们每一个人都必须说服我们各自的国会议员采取行动。

senses.definition: adj.流行的，盛行的,普遍存在的，普遍发生的
senses.sentence: This condition is more **prevalent** in women than in men.
senses.translation: 这种病症在女性当中比在男性当中更为普遍。

senses.definition: vt.预防,阻碍,阻止,[宗教]引领
senses.sentence: The security zone was set up to **prevent** guerrilla infiltrations.
senses.translation: 设立了安全区以防止游击队员的渗入。

senses.definition: adj.先前的,以前的,过早的,（时间上）稍前的
senses.sentence: Douglas was a 29-year-old journeyman fighter, erratic in his **previous** fights.
senses.translation: 道格拉斯29岁，是个技术不错的拳击手，在以前的比赛中发挥不太稳定。

senses.definition: adj.战前的
senses.sentence: The matrix of abundant cropland group is **prewar** Feng Tian joint venture.
senses.translation: 丰田集团的母体是战前的丰田联合企业.

senses.definition: vi.捕食,（疾病等）使人慢慢衰弱,折磨,（人）靠欺诈为生
senses.sentence: Children in evacuation centres are falling **prey** to disease.
senses.translation: 疏散中心的孩子正受到疾病的折磨。

senses.definition: n.价格，价钱,代价,价值,赏金
senses.sentence: There are intangible benefits beyond a rise in the share **price**.
senses.translation: 除股价上升之外还有无形利益。

senses.definition: n.自尊,骄傲,自满,（狮）群
senses.sentence: The expectant mothers that Amy had encountered positively glowed with **pride**.
senses.translation: 埃米遇见的准妈妈们个个洋溢着自豪和喜悦。

senses.definition: adj.首要的，主要的,最早的，原始的,[地质学]原生的,基本的
senses.sentence: His misunderstanding of language was the **primary** cause of his other problems.
senses.translation: 他对语言的误解是引起其他问题的主要原因。

senses.definition: adj.最好的,首要的,最初的,基本的
senses.sentence: The **Prime** Minister has been briefed by her parliamentary aides.
senses.translation: 首相已听取了她议会助手的简要汇报。

senses.definition: adj.原始的,发展水平低的,落后的,[生物学]原生的
senses.sentence: It's using some rather **primitive** technology.
senses.translation: 它使用的是非常古老的技术。

senses.definition: n.王子,巨头,（某些欧洲国家的）贵族,小国的君主
senses.sentence: At tea-time, Victoria sang duets with her Consort, **Prince** Albert.
senses.translation: 喝下午茶的时候，维多利亚与其夫君艾伯特亲王表演了二重唱。

senses.definition: adj.最重要的,主要的,资本的,本金的
senses.sentence: The students passed a motion of no-confidence in the college **principal**.
senses.translation: 学生们通过了对校长进行不信任投票的动议。

senses.definition: n.原则，原理,准则，道义,道德标准,本能
senses.sentence: Observance of the law is a matter of **principle** for us.
senses.translation: 守法是我们的一个原则问题。

senses.definition: n.（由底片印出的）照片,印刷字体,印痕,印成的图画
senses.sentence: I paid a visit to my local **print** shop.
senses.translation: 我去了我们当地的照片冲洗店.

senses.definition: adj.优先的,占先的,在…之前
senses.sentence: Just phone in your order three or more days **prior** to departure.
senses.translation: 在出发的三天之前打电话预订即可。

senses.definition: n.优先，优先权,（时间，序上的）先，前,优先考虑的事,[数]优先次序
senses.sentence: Spain's top **priority** is the signing of an EMU treaty.
senses.translation: 西班牙的当务之急是签署《欧洲经济和货币联盟条约》。

senses.definition: n.监狱,牢笼,监禁,入狱
senses.sentence: He was returned to **prison** in 1977 for impersonating a police officer.
senses.translation: 他1977年因冒充警官而再次入狱。

senses.definition: n.囚犯,犯人,俘虏,刑事被告
senses.sentence: His men made a sortie to Guazatan and took a **prisoner**.
senses.translation: 他的士兵袭击了瓜扎坦，擒获了一名俘虏。

senses.definition: n.隐私，秘密,隐居,私事,不受公众干扰的状态
senses.sentence: The newspaper breached the code of conduct on **privacy**.
senses.translation: 该报违反了保护隐私的行为准则。

senses.definition: adj.私有的，私人的,秘密的,内心的,平民的，无官职的，士兵的
senses.sentence: At Miss Garbo's request there was a crema-tion after a **private** ceremony.
senses.translation: 应嘉宝小姐的要求，在私人悼念仪式结束后将进行火葬。

senses.definition: n.特权,（因财富和社会地位而仅有部分人享有的）权益,免责特权,特殊荣幸
senses.sentence: She was cocooned in a private world of **privilege**.
senses.translation: 她生活在一个与世隔绝的特权世界里。

senses.definition: n.可能性,几率，概率,或然性
senses.sentence: Formal talks are still said to be a possibility, not a **probability**.
senses.translation: 据称正式会谈仍有可能，但可能性不大。

senses.definition: adj.可能的,大概的
senses.sentence: The **probable** outcome of the talks is a compromise.
senses.translation: 会谈的结果很可能是妥协.

senses.definition: n.[医]（对伤处等的）针探，探查,[医]探针，取样器,探头,探测仪
senses.sentence: A doctor used a **probe** to remove metal fragments from a wound.
senses.translation: 医生用探针将伤口中的金属碎片取出.

senses.definition: n.问题,疑难问题,习题,引起麻烦的人
senses.sentence: The letter was short — a simple recitation of their **problem**.
senses.translation: 信写得很短——只是简单地说了一下他们的问题。

senses.definition: n.程序，手续,工序，过程，步骤,诉讼程序，（议会的）议事程序,〈罕〉进行
senses.sentence: British Parliamentary **procedure** is perplexing at the best of times.
senses.translation: 即使在最好情况下，英国议会的程序也很费解。

senses.definition: vi.进行,前进,（沿特定路线）行进,（尤指打断后）继续说
senses.sentence: The best way to **proceed** is by a process of elimination.
senses.translation: 继续进行下去的最佳方式是实行淘汰制。

senses.definition: v.进行( proceed的现在分词),前进,（沿特定路线）行进,（尤指打断后）继续说
senses.sentence: It hasn't stopped the British Navy **proceeding** on its merry way.
senses.translation: 这没有阻止英国海军继续得意扬扬地前进的步伐。

senses.definition: n.过程,工序,做事方法,工艺流程
senses.sentence: The **process** is not a circle but rather a spiral.
senses.translation: 这个过程不是一个圆周运动而是螺旋上升型的。

senses.definition: n.队伍，行列,一列，一排,列队行进
senses.sentence: The parson, heading the **procession**, had just turned right towards the churchyard.
senses.translation: 走在行进队伍最前面的教区牧师刚刚向右转弯，朝着教堂墓地走去。

senses.definition: vt.宣告，公布,表明,赞扬，称颂
senses.sentence: His classic boyish looks seemed to **proclaim** his good humour and openness.
senses.translation: 他的长相非常孩子气,显得性情很好且诚实坦率.

senses.definition: vt.& vi.生产,产生,制作,创作
senses.sentence: It will **produce** electricity more cheaply than a nuclear plant.
senses.translation: 它的发电成本要比核电站低。

senses.definition: n.产品,结果,乘积,作品
senses.sentence: A series of technical foul-ups delayed the launch of the new **product**.
senses.translation: 一系列技术问题延误了新产品的上市。

senses.definition: n.生产，制作,产品,产量,夸张的行动或形象，小题大做
senses.sentence: Their first car rolls off the **production** line on December 16.
senses.translation: 他们的第一辆车于12月16日下线。

senses.definition: adj.富有成效的,多产的,生产性的,具有创造性的
senses.sentence: More **productive** farmers have been able to provide cheaper food.
senses.translation: 农民提高产量就能使食物更加便宜。

senses.definition: n.生产率，生产力,[经济学] 生产率,[生态学]生产率
senses.sentence: The obverse of rising unemployment is continued gains in **productivity**.
senses.translation: 失业率上升，相对应的是生产率进一步提高。

senses.definition: n.职业，专业,同行,宣称,信念，信仰
senses.sentence: The attitude of the medical **profession** is very much more liberal now.
senses.translation: 现在，医务人员的态度开明多了。

senses.definition: n.专业人士
senses.sentence: Support for monogamy and marriage was strongest among the **professional** classes.
senses.translation: 专业人士阶层最支持一夫一妻制。

senses.definition: n.教授,（大学的）讲师，教员,自称者，宣称者
senses.sentence: **Professor** Baker is unacquainted with the idea of representative democracy.
senses.translation: 贝克教授并不熟悉“代议制民主”这一思想。

senses.definition: n.熟练，精通，娴熟
senses.sentence: His **proficiency** as a surgeon is well known.
senses.translation: 他作为一名外科医生的水平是有名的.

senses.definition: n.侧面，半面,外形，轮廓,[航]翼型,人物简介
senses.sentence: Tony has now been thrust into the limelight, with a high-**profile** job.
senses.translation: 托尼现在一下子成了众人关注的中心，因为他有一份经常出镜、见报的工作。

senses.definition: n.收益，得益,利润,红利,净值利润率
senses.sentence: Shares slid 11p to 293p after brokers downgraded their **profit** estimates.
senses.translation: 股票经纪人降低了他们的利润预期之后，股价下跌了11便士至293便士。

senses.definition: adj.有利可图的，有益的,可赚钱的，合算的
senses.sentence: Drug manufacturing is the most **profitable** business in America.
senses.translation: 制药业是美国利润最丰厚的业务。

senses.definition: adj.深厚的,意义深远的,严重的,知识渊博的
senses.sentence: It's a quite **profound** story, with powerful religious overtones.
senses.translation: 这个故事寓意深远，具有强烈的宗教色彩。

senses.definition: n.程序,节目，节目单,计划，安排
senses.sentence: Finding a volunteer to write the computer **program** isn't a problem.
senses.translation: 找个志愿者编这个计算机程序不成问题。

senses.definition: n.（演出或活动的）程序,计划,节目,课程
senses.sentence: That **programme** will include live commentary on the England-Ireland game.
senses.translation: 那个节目将包括英格兰与爱尔兰比赛的实况报道。

senses.definition: n.进步,前进,[生物学]进化,（向更高方向）增长
senses.sentence: Social **progress** is normally a matter of struggles and conflicts.
senses.translation: 社会进步通常是斗争和冲突的结果。

senses.definition: adj.不断前进的,进步的,进行的
senses.sentence: These weaknesses negated his otherwise **progressive** attitude towards the staff.
senses.translation: 这些缺点抵消了他在其他方面对待员工还算开明的态度。

senses.definition: vt.禁止，阻止，防止,不准许
senses.sentence: In most of the residence halls we visited, rules **prohibit** disorderly conduct.
senses.translation: 在我们走访的学生宿舍里，大多明令禁止胡作非为。

senses.definition: vt.放映,计划,发射,展现，使突出
senses.sentence: The total cost of the **project** would be more than $240 million.
senses.translation: 该项目的总成本会超过2.4亿美元。

senses.definition: n.放映机，幻灯机,投影仪,设计者,放映技师
senses.sentence: A light pointer is often useful with a slide **projector**.
senses.translation: 光指示器经常与幻灯片放映机一起使用.

senses.definition: vt.延长，拉长,拖延，延期
senses.sentence: A long drawn out war would likely deepen and **prolong** the recession.
senses.translation: 一场旷日持久的战争很可能会使衰退程度加剧，时间延长。

senses.definition: adj.突出的，杰出的,突起的,著名的
senses.sentence: His stomach had grown more **prominent** with every passing year.
senses.translation: 他的肚子一年比一年鼓。

senses.definition: vt.允诺，许诺,给人以…的指望或希望
senses.sentence: I'm hoping you'll keep your **promise** to come for a long visit.
senses.translation: 我希望你遵守诺言来这儿多呆几天。

senses.definition: adj.有前途的,有希望的,光明,有为
senses.sentence: This small part was taken with elan by a **promising** young tenor.
senses.translation: 这一小段由一位大有前途的青年男高音倾情演绎。

senses.definition: vt.促进，推进,提升，助长,促销,使（学生）升级
senses.sentence: She refused to **promote** Colin above the low rank of "legal adviser".
senses.translation: 她拒绝把科林由“法律顾问”这一低级别往上提。

senses.definition: n.促进，增进,提升，升级,（商品等的）推广,发扬
senses.sentence: The advertising campaign will be supported by a PR and below-the-line **promotion**.
senses.translation: 广告宣传活动将采取公关和线下促销的形式。

senses.definition: adj.敏捷的,迅速的,立刻的,准时的
senses.sentence: There are many emergencies which need **prompt** first aid treatment.
senses.translation: 有很多紧急情况需要进行迅速的急救处理。

senses.definition: n.激励,提示符,提词,提示
senses.sentence: Her blushes were saved by a **prompt** from one of her hosts.
senses.translation: 幸亏一位主持人提示，她才不至于尴尬脸红。

senses.definition: adj.易于…的,俯卧的,有…倾向的,倾斜的，坡陡的
senses.sentence: Bob slid from his chair and lay **prone** on the floor.
senses.translation: 鲍勃从椅子上滑下来，趴在了地板上。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.发音，读
senses.sentence: Men feel perfectly free to **pronounce** on the way women should look.
senses.translation: 男人随心所欲地对女性美的标准发表看法。

senses.definition: n.发音,读法,发音方法,发音方式
senses.sentence: I thought a phonetic spelling might aid in **pronunciation**.
senses.translation: 我想语音拼写可能有助于发音。

senses.definition: n.证明,校样,检验,（酒的）标准酒精度
senses.sentence: Training is worthless unless there is **proof** that it works.
senses.translation: 除非能证明训练有效，否则就是白搭。

senses.definition: n.宣传，宣传运动
senses.sentence: Politicians want a lap-dog press which will uncritically report their **propaganda**.
senses.translation: 政客们想要的是不问是非、甘为他们搞宣传的哈巴狗一样的新闻媒体。

senses.definition: vt.推进,推动,驱动,驱使
senses.sentence: Paddles are used especially to **propel** canoes and kayaks.
senses.translation: 短桨特别用于划独木舟和小艇.

senses.definition: adj.适当的，相当的，正当的，应该的，正式的，正常的,固有的，特有的，独特的,本来的，真正的，严格意义上的,〈古〉漂亮的，优美的
senses.contextMeaning: 适当的，相当的，正当的，应该的，正式的，正常的
senses.sentence: Britain imposed fines on airlines which bring in passengers without **proper** papers.
senses.translation: 英国会对运载证件不齐全的乘客进入国内的航空公司课以罚款。

senses.definition: n.特性，属性,财产，地产,[戏]道具,所有权
senses.sentence: You have to take capital appreciation of the **property** into account.
senses.translation: 你必须将该处房产的资本增值考虑在内。

senses.definition: n.预言家，先知,倡导者，主张者
senses.sentence: He holds the belief that he is a latter-day **prophet**.
senses.translation: 他深信自己是当代先知。

senses.definition: n.比，比率,[数学]比例（法）,面积,相称，平衡
senses.sentence: A substantial **proportion** of the population speak a French-based patois.
senses.translation: 人口中有一大部分说以法语为基础的混合语。

senses.definition: n.提议,建议,求婚,〈美〉投标
senses.sentence: After a three-weekend courtship, Pamela accepted Randolph's **proposal** of marriage.
senses.translation: 经过3个周末的追求之后，帕梅拉接受了伦道夫的求婚。

senses.definition: vt.提议，建议,打算，计划,推荐，提名,求婚
senses.sentence: I asked Robin Balfour and Derek Haig to **propose** and second me.
senses.translation: 我请罗宾·鲍尔弗和德里克·黑格提名并支持我。

senses.definition: n.命题,建议,主张
senses.sentence: He had allegedly tried to **proposition** a colleague.
senses.translation: 据说他曾试图向一名同事求欢。

senses.definition: v.控告,起诉,继续从事,担任控方律师
senses.sentence: The attorney who will **prosecute** the case says he cannot reveal how much money is involved.
senses.translation: 将对此案提起公诉的律师说他不能透露具体的涉案金额。

senses.definition: n.前景,期望,眺望处,景象
senses.sentence: The **prospect** of easy profits has attracted the wrong kind of businessman.
senses.translation: 轻松捞取利润的可能性吸引了一拨不良商人。

senses.definition: adj.预期的,未来的,可能的,有希望的
senses.sentence: **Prospective** buyers should study the small ads in the daily newspaper.
senses.translation: 打算购物的人应该研究研究日报上的小广告。

senses.definition: vi.繁盛，成功
senses.sentence: The high street banks continue to **prosper**.
senses.translation: 商业街上的银行仍旧一派繁荣景象。

senses.definition: adj.繁荣的，兴旺的,富裕的,幸福的，运气好的,良好的
senses.sentence: Padua and Vicenza are **prosperous**, well-preserved cities, not overrun by tourists.
senses.translation: 帕多瓦和维琴察两市商业繁荣，建筑古迹保存良好，也没有蜂拥而至的游客。

senses.definition: vt.保护，保卫,贸易保护,备款以支付
senses.sentence: Such laws could **protect** the consumer from harmful or dangerous remedies.
senses.translation: 这样的法规可以保护消费者免受有害或者危险药品的威胁。

senses.definition: n.[化]朊，蛋白（质）
senses.sentence: Milk products are an excellent source of calcium and **protein**.
senses.translation: 奶制品富含钙与蛋白质。

senses.definition: n.抗议,反对,申明
senses.sentence: Teachers staged a sit-down **protest** in front of the president's office.
senses.translation: 老师们在校长办公室门前举行了一场静坐抗议。

senses.definition: n.礼仪,（外交条约的）草案,（数据传递的）协议,科学实验报告（或计划）
senses.sentence: According to **protocol**, he first reported to the Director of the hospital.
senses.translation: 根据礼节，他先向医院院长报到。

senses.definition: n.原型，雏形，蓝本
senses.sentence: We plan to release a **prototype** this autumn for trial in hospitals.
senses.translation: 我们计划今年秋天在各医院推出一个模型进行试验。

senses.definition: adj.自豪的，得意的,光荣的，高尚的,傲慢的,有自尊心的
senses.sentence: Derek is now the **proud** father of a bouncing baby girl.
senses.translation: 德里克现在为有一个健康活泼的女宝宝而骄傲。

senses.definition: vt.证明，证实,[法]验证，检定,显示
senses.sentence: If they **prove** ineffective they should be demoted or asked to retire.
senses.translation: 如果事实证明他们已无力胜任，应该将他们降级或让他们退休。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.提供，供给，供应
senses.sentence: Poland **provide** the opposition for the Scots' last warm-up match at home.
senses.translation: 苏格兰队在国内最后一场热身赛的对手是波兰队。

senses.definition: conj.如果,假如,在…的条件下
senses.sentence: Free room and board are **provided** for all hotel staff.
senses.translation: 宾馆的所有员工都可享受免费膳宿。

senses.definition: n.省份,大行政区,范围,职责
senses.sentence: Most of those who left the **province** to work abroad were unskilled.
senses.translation: 那些离开该省出国打工的人大部分都未经专门训练。

senses.definition: n.规定，条项，条款,预备，准备，设备,供应，（一批）供应品,生活物质，储备物资
senses.sentence: There is no **provision** for funding performance-related pay rises.
senses.translation: 没有为与业绩挂钩的加薪预作资金准备。

senses.definition: vt.激起，挑起,煽动,招致,触怒，使愤怒
senses.sentence: If one firm goes under it could **provoke** a cascade of bankruptcies.
senses.translation: 如果一家公司倒闭，便有可能引发一连串的破产。

senses.definition: adj.小心的，慎重的,精明的，节俭的,顾虑周到的，稳健的,世故的，精明的
senses.sentence: Tone down your kamikaze tendencies and take more **prudent** risks.
senses.translation: 别那么玩命，冒险时要谨慎些。

senses.definition: n.假名，化名，（尤指）笔名
senses.sentence: Eric Blair wrote under the **pseudonym** of George Orwell.
senses.translation: 埃里克·布莱尔用乔治·奧威尔这个笔名写作.

senses.definition: n.伪科学,假科学
senses.sentence: Biosphere 2 was ultimately ridiculed as a research debade, as exfravagant **pseudoscience**.
senses.translation: 生物圈2号最终被讥讽为科研上的大失败, 代价是昂贵的伪科学.

senses.definition: n.精神病专家，精神病医生,精神病医生
senses.contextMeaning: 精神病专家，精神病医生
senses.sentence: The **psychiatrist** must learn to maintain an unusual degree of objectivity.
senses.translation: 精神科医生务必要学会保持超乎寻常的客观态度。

senses.definition: n.精神病学,精神病治疗法
senses.sentence: **Psychiatry** is an accepted branch of medicine.
senses.translation: 精神病学是公认的医学分支。

senses.definition: adj.心理的,精神上的，精神（现象）的,心理学（上）的,关于心理学的
senses.sentence: John received constant physical and **psychological** abuse from his father.
senses.translation: 约翰不断遭到父亲身体和心理上的双重虐待。

senses.definition: n.心理学,心理特点,心理状态,心理影响
senses.sentence: That may be two-bit **psychology**, but it's the only explanation I have.
senses.translation: 那可能是不值一提的心理，但它却是我唯一的解释。

senses.definition: n.酒馆，酒店,客栈
senses.sentence: It was five long miles to the nearest **pub**.
senses.translation: 离最近的酒吧有长长的5英里的路程。

senses.definition: adj.公众的，公共的,公开的,政府的,人人知道的，知名的
senses.sentence: He was headmaster of a **public** school in the West of England.
senses.translation: 他是英格兰西部一所公学的校长。

senses.definition: n.出版,出版物,公布,发表
senses.sentence: The Tundra Times, a weekly newspaper in Alaska, ceased **publication** this week.
senses.translation: 阿拉斯加的周报《苔原时报》本周停刊了。

senses.definition: n.公众信息,宣传效用,宣传,公诸于众的状况
senses.sentence: The company was privatised with a fanfare of **publicity**.
senses.translation: 公司的私有化搞得沸沸扬扬。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.出版，发行,发表，宣布（结婚等）,公布，颁布,出版…的著作
senses.sentence: My object was to **publish** a scholarly work on Peter Mourne.
senses.translation: 我的目标是出版一本关于彼得·莫恩的学术著作。

senses.definition: n.一阵（气味，烟雾等）,粉扑,酥皮点心,夸奖，吹嘘
senses.sentence: He took a **puff** on his pipe and shook his head.
senses.translation: 他抽了口烟斗，摇了摇头。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.拉,扯,拉过来,划（船）
senses.sentence: The **pull**-out of the army paves the way for independence.
senses.translation: 军队的撤出为独立铺平了道路。

senses.definition: n.脉搏,[无线电]（电磁波等）脉动,活力,有节奏的跳动（或拍打）
senses.sentence: There was no breathing or **pulse** and he was lifeless.
senses.translation: 没有呼吸，也没有脉搏，他已经死了。

senses.definition: n.抽水机,打气筒,泵,轻软舞鞋
senses.sentence: Somebody else lent me a **pump** and helped me mend the puncture.
senses.translation: 别人借给我一个打气筒，又帮我补好了轮胎。

senses.definition: vt.用拳猛击,打孔,（用压穿器）穿孔，冲孔,用肘推
senses.sentence: The guards, he said, would **punch** them for no reason.
senses.translation: 他说警卫会无缘无故殴打他们。

senses.definition: adj.严守时刻的， 准时的，正点的
senses.contextMeaning: 严守时刻的， 准时的，正点的
senses.sentence: I have to go now because I must be **punctual** for class.
senses.translation: 我现在不得不走了,因为我得准时去上课.

senses.definition: v.处罚,严厉对付,贪婪地吃喝
senses.sentence: Current employment laws will be changed to reward effort and **punish** laziness.
senses.translation: 现行雇佣法要变，要奖勤罚懒。

senses.definition: n.学生,[解]瞳孔,未成年人,[法]被监护人
senses.sentence: After his education, Goldschmidt became a **pupil** of the composer Franz Schreker.
senses.translation: 学业结束后，戈尔德施米特成了作曲家弗朗兹·施雷克尔的学生。

senses.definition: n.木偶,傀儡,受他人操纵的人
senses.sentence: When the invasion occurred he ruled as a **puppet** of the occupiers.
senses.translation: 外敌入侵时，他作为占领者的傀儡行使统治。

senses.definition: v.购买,采购,换得,依靠机械力移动
senses.sentence: Investors can borrow an amount equal to the property's **purchase** price.
senses.translation: 投资者可以获得与房产购买价格相等的借款额。

senses.definition: n.购买,购买行为,购置物,紧握
senses.sentence: When her deal is done, the client emerges with her **purchase**.
senses.translation: 交易完成后，委托人会出现并将她购买的东西交给她。

senses.definition: adj.纯的,单纯的,纯真的,干净的
senses.sentence: Somehow she'd always been a child in his mind, **pure** and virginal.
senses.translation: 不知何故，她在他心里一直是个天真无邪的孩子。

senses.definition: vt.使纯净，净化,精炼,使（语言）纯正,给…赎罪，使纯洁
senses.sentence: I take wheat and yeast tablets daily to **purify** the blood.
senses.translation: 我每天服用干酵母片以净化血液。

senses.definition: n.[化学]纯度,纯洁，纯净,清洁，清白，清廉,（语言）纯正
senses.sentence: Human life weighed more with him than **purity** of policy.
senses.translation: 人类生命对他而言比政策的纯洁性更重要。

senses.definition: adj.紫色的,帝王的,词藻华美的
senses.sentence: The avenues lined with jacaranda trees burst into a carnival of **purple**.
senses.translation: 大街的两旁种着蓝花楹，绽放的花朵汇成一片紫色的海洋。

senses.definition: n.紫色,紫（红）衣，紫袍,帝位，皇权,皇族
senses.sentence: All shades of mauve, lilac, lavender and **purple** were fashionable.
senses.translation: 深深浅浅的各种木槿色、丁香色、熏衣草色和紫色都是流行色。

senses.definition: n.意志,目的,作用,（进行中的）行动
senses.sentence: The **purpose** of the visit was to navigate into an ice-filled fiord.
senses.translation: 这次出行是为了能驶入冰雪覆盖的峡湾。

senses.definition: n.钱包，钱袋,财力，财源,和包或钱袋相似的东西,女用小提包
senses.sentence: She folded it up, and tucked it into her **purse**.
senses.translation: 她将其折叠起来，塞进了钱包里。

senses.definition: vt.继续,追求,进行,追捕
senses.sentence: She had come to England to **pursue** an acting career.
senses.translation: 她来英格兰投身演艺事业。

senses.definition: n.追赶,工作
senses.sentence: Moreau took gold in the five-kilometre individual **pursuit** competition.
senses.translation: 莫罗在个人五公里追逐赛中获得金牌。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.推，推动
senses.sentence: The new Chancellor has the guts to **push** through unpopular tax increases.
senses.translation: 新总理有勇气推动不受欢迎的增税方案获得通过。

senses.definition: vt.放,表达,给予（重视、信任、价值等）,使处于（某种状态）
senses.sentence: A changing world has **put** pressures on the corporation.
senses.translation: 日新月异的世界使这家公司感到了压力。

senses.definition: vt.使迷惑，使难解
senses.sentence: A rather neat option allows you to design your own fiendish **puzzle**.
senses.translation: 只要干净利落地做一个选择，你就能自己设计出难以解开的谜题。

senses.definition: n.金字塔,角锥状物
senses.sentence: There rose before us the great **pyramid** of Gaza.
senses.translation: 雄伟的加沙金字塔矗立在我们面前。

senses.definition: n.资格，授权,条件，限制,合格证书
senses.sentence: That time with him is my **qualification** to write this book.
senses.translation: 我和他曾经相处过一段时间，所以才能写出这本书。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.（使）具有资格,有权,达标
adj.定性的，定质的,性质上的,质量的
senses.sentence: That's the whole difference between quantitative and **qualitative** research.
senses.translation: 那就是定量研究和定性研究之间的重大差别。

senses.definition: n.质量，品质,美质，优点,才能，能力，技能，素养,品种
senses.sentence: Today's organic wine producer is typically a small, **quality**-conscious family concern.
senses.translation: 现今的有机葡萄酒生产商一般是注重品质的小型家族企业.

senses.definition: vt.确定…的数量,[逻辑学] 用量词限定
senses.sentence: The risks to health are impossible to **quantify**.
senses.translation: 健康的风险是无法用数量表示的。

senses.definition: adj.定量的,数量（上）的
senses.sentence: That's the whole difference between **quantitative** and qualitative research.
senses.translation: 那就是定量研究和定性研究之间的重大差别。

senses.definition: n.量，数量,定量，大批,数目,[语音学、韵律学]音量（指元音或音节的长短）
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **quantity** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【quantity】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.争吵，口角,反目,抱怨…的原因（理由）,[史]方镞箭，角镞箭
senses.sentence: It could have happened during a **quarrel** between them over Naomi.
senses.translation: 这件事可能是在他们为娜奥米争吵的过程中发生的。

senses.definition: n.夸脱（液体或固体的容积单位）
senses.contextMeaning: 夸脱（液体或固体的容积单位）
senses.sentence: Pick up a **quart** of milk or a loaf of bread.
senses.translation: 拿1夸脱牛奶或一条面包。

senses.definition: n.四分之一,一刻钟,地区,（美式足球的）一节
senses.sentence: The time was recorded at a **quarter** after five.
senses.translation: 时间显示是5点15分。

senses.definition: n.季刊,季考
senses.sentence: In 1987 Congressional **Quarterly** published a series of guidebooks to American politics.
senses.translation: 1987年《国会季刊》出版了一系列美国政治指南读物。

senses.definition: n.[矿]石英
senses.sentence: The prospectors have discovered such minerals as calcite, **quartz** and asbestos here.
senses.translation: 探矿人员在这里发现了方解石 、 石英、石棉等矿藏.

senses.definition: n.女王,王后,杰出女性,（纸牌中的）王后， （国际象棋中的）后
senses.sentence: Chefs at the St James Court restaurant have cooked for the **Queen**.
senses.translation: 圣詹姆斯皇家饭店的厨师们曾经为女王烹制菜肴。

senses.definition: adj.古怪的,可疑的,不适的,〈俚〉同性恋的
senses.sentence: I could not help but think this is a very **queer** life.
senses.translation: 我忍不住会认为这是一种非常怪异的生活。

senses.definition: vt.解（渴）,终止（某事物）,（用水）扑灭（火焰等）,将（热物体）放入水中急速冷却
senses.sentence: Firemen tried to **quench** the flames raging through the building.
senses.translation: 消防队员奋力扑救大楼中熊熊的火焰。

senses.definition: n.探索,追求,远征,验尸陪审团
senses.sentence: Waite spent his life on a spiritual **quest**.
senses.translation: 韦特毕生都在进行精神探索。

senses.definition: n.问题,疑问,怀疑,议题
senses.sentence: One more **question** and I'll leave you in peace.
senses.translation: 再问一个问题，我就不打扰你了。

senses.definition: n.调查表,调查问卷
senses.sentence: We ask candidates to complete a psychometric **questionnaire**.
senses.translation: 我们让候选人填写一份心理测试问卷。

senses.definition: n.（人或车辆）行列，长队,辫子
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **queue** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【queue】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: adj.快的，急速的,聪明的，凌厉的,灵活的,短时间做成的
senses.sentence: I looked at what he'd given me and did a **quick** subtraction.
senses.translation: 我看着他给我的东西，快速做了个减法。

senses.definition: n.宁静,寂静
senses.sentence: The wine towns encountered are, on the whole, **quiet** and modest.
senses.translation: 所到的酒镇总的来说都是宁静祥和的。

senses.definition: vt.离开,放弃，抛弃,停止，中断,偿清
senses.sentence: Well, parenthetically, I was trying to **quit** smoking at the time.
senses.translation: 嗯，插一句，我那时正在努力戒烟。

senses.definition: adv.相当，很,非常,确实如此
senses.sentence: Failure is never **quite** so frightening as regret.
senses.translation: 比失败更令人恐惧的是懊悔。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.微颤，抖动
senses.sentence: I felt a **quiver** of panic.
senses.translation: 我内心感到一阵恐慌。

senses.definition: n.提问，询问,小型考试,简单的小测验,恶作剧
senses.sentence: We'll have a **quiz** at the end of the show.
senses.translation: 节目的最后我们要举行一次智力竞赛。

senses.definition: n.（正式限定的）定量，定额,配额,指标
senses.sentence: Be sure you get your daily **quota** of calcium.
senses.translation: 要确保每天的钙摄入量。

senses.definition: n.引用,报价,引号
senses.sentence: Always get a written **quote** for any repairs needed.
senses.translation: 每次进行修理都索要一份书面的报价单。

senses.definition: n.兔子，野兔,兔子皮毛,兔子肉,〈俚〉新手，弱手
senses.sentence: He'd snared a **rabbit** earlier in the day.
senses.translation: 那天早一点的时候，他设套捉了一只兔子。

senses.definition: n.行李架,支架,刑架,（羊、猪等带前肋的）颈脊
senses.sentence: The old house soon went to **rack** and ruin.
senses.translation: 这所旧房子很快就毁坏了.

senses.definition: n.（网球等）球拍,〈美俚〉勒索金钱，讹诈，敲诈，骗局,（四周有围墙的）拍打回力网球，硬壁回力球,喧骚，吵闹，嚷闹，扰嚷，喧骚嘈杂的集会，狂欢
senses.sentence: The **racket** of drills and electric saws went on past midnight.
senses.translation: 钻孔机和电锯的噪声过了半夜还继续响着。

senses.definition: n.雷达,雷达装置,无线电探测器
vt.辐射,发射,使向周围扩展
senses.sentence: Avenues **radiate** from the Arc de Triomphe in Paris.
senses.translation: 在巴黎,街道以凯旋门为中心向四方伸展.

senses.definition: adj.根本的，基本的,激进的,彻底的,[植]根生的
senses.sentence: **Radical** feminism is currently the fashionable topic among the chattering classes.
senses.translation: 激进的女权主义是时下清淡阶层热议的话题。

senses.definition: n.无线电,收音机,无线电广播台,无线电收发报机
adj.放射性的
senses.sentence: The waste is safely locked away until it is no longer **radioactive**.
senses.translation: 废料被安全储存起来，直到其不再有辐射性。

senses.definition: n.半径（距离）,用半径度量的圆形面积,半径范围,桡骨
n.愤怒,激烈，猛烈,渴望，疯狂,〈口〉战争狂
senses.sentence: Our father's face had reddened with **rage** and he began to sputter.
senses.translation: 我们的父亲气得涨红了脸，说话开始语无伦次。

senses.definition: n.（骑兵队等的）急袭，突然袭击，突击，（军舰等的）游击,劫掠，劫夺，（盗贼，狐等的）侵入,突然查抄[搜捕]，围捕
senses.contextMeaning: （骑兵队等的）急袭，突然袭击，突击，（军舰等的）游击
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **raid** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【raid】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.围栏,轨道，钢轨,扶手,[动]秧鸡
senses.sentence: The government is spending billions of dollars on new urban **rail** projects.
senses.translation: 政府正把数十亿元花在新城市铁路项目上。

senses.definition: n.铁路,铁道,铁路系统,铁道部门
senses.sentence: Across the river the **railway** track ran up to the pithead.
senses.translation: 铁轨跨过这条河直达矿井口。

senses.definition: n.雨,（热带地区的）雨季，雨天,雨点般降落的东西,<俚>电子流
senses.sentence: He stared at the **rain** spattering on the glass.
senses.translation: 他凝视着雨点溅落在玻璃上。

senses.definition: n.彩虹
senses.sentence: The moon was casting a **rainbow** through the spray from the waterfall.
senses.translation: 月亮在瀑布溅起的水雾上照出了一道彩虹。

senses.definition: v.提升,增加,养育,筹集
senses.sentence: Every year we have charity days to **raise** money for unfortunate people.
senses.translation: 每年我们都有慈善日来筹款帮助贫困人群。

senses.definition: vt.召集，集合,重整,重振，恢复
senses.sentence: We were very keen when the 1954 **Rally** came round.
senses.translation: 1954年的集会开始时，我们都非常热切。

senses.definition: n.随意,偶然的行动
senses.sentence: Any decent shot with telescopic sights could pick us off at **random**.
senses.translation: 任何借助望远镜瞄准器的像样射手都可以随意把我们逐个干掉。

senses.definition: n.范围,射程,类别,（山脉，房屋等的）排列
senses.sentence: The company manufactures a **range** of innovative light-weight cycles.
senses.translation: 这家公司生产一系列的新型轻便自行车。

senses.definition: n.阶层，等级,军衔,次序，顺序,行列
senses.sentence: There was widespread support for him among the **rank** and file.
senses.translation: 那些普通职员们都普遍支持他。

senses.definition: adj.快速的,[摄]感光快的,险峻的
senses.sentence: The company made a **rapid**-fire series of settlements with 25 States.
senses.translation: 公司同25个州进行了一连串迅速的结算。

senses.definition: adj.罕见的，特殊的,半熟的；半生的,稀薄的，经过稀化的,三分熟
senses.sentence: It remained an exceptionally **rare** book until it was reprinted in 1918.
senses.translation: 在1918年再版之前，这本书一直非常罕见。

senses.definition: adv.很少地,罕有地,极精彩地,珍奇地，绝佳地
senses.sentence: Adolescent suicide is **rarely** an impulsive reaction to immediate distress.
senses.translation: 青少年自杀很少是由于突然发生不幸而作出的冲动反应。

senses.definition: adj.鲁莽的，轻率的,性急的,不顾后果的
senses.sentence: Mr. Major is making no **rash** promises.
senses.translation: 梅杰先生没有作出轻率的承诺。

senses.definition: n.速度,比率,等级,（利息等的）费率
senses.sentence: The **rate** of inflation is running at about 2.7 percent.
senses.translation: 通货膨胀率大约为2.7%。

senses.definition: adv.稍微，有点,相当，颇,宁愿,相反地
senses.sentence: I gradually got **rather** disillusioned with the whole setup of the university.
senses.translation: 渐渐地，我对大学的整个体制感到相当失望。

senses.definition: n.比，比率,比例,系数
senses.sentence: The adult to child **ratio** is 1 to 6.
senses.translation: 成人与儿童的比例为1比6。

senses.definition: adj.神智清楚的,理性的,理智的,合理的
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **rational** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【rational】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: adj.生的，未加工的,无经验的,新近完成的,发炎的，疼痛的
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **raw** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【raw】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.（热或其他能量的）射线,光束，光线,微量,伞形花序柄
senses.sentence: **Ray** will earn his keep on local farms while studying.
senses.translation: 雷求学期间会在当地的农场干活赚取生活费。

senses.definition: n.剃刀，刮面刀
senses.sentence: I want to buy an electric **razor** this weekend.
senses.translation: 这个周末我想买一个电动剃须刀.

senses.definition: v.到达，走到,够…，抓…,完成
vi.反应，作出反应,影响,起反作用
senses.sentence: Someone allergic to milk is likely to **react** to cheese.
senses.translation: 对牛奶过敏的人可能对奶酪也有不良反应。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.阅读，朗读,显示,研究,看得懂
senses.sentence: I thought you might like to **read** the enclosed.
senses.translation: 我想你或许想要读一下信封里的内容。

senses.definition: n.读者，朗读者,读本,讲读者，讲师,审稿人
adv.乐意地,快捷地,轻而易举地,便利地
senses.sentence: The document is expressed in terms that are **readily** understood and agreed.
senses.translation: 文件用语浅显易懂，让人易于接受。

senses.definition: n.阅读,宣读,读物,读数
senses.sentence: They will concentrate on teaching the basics of **reading**, writing and arithmetic.
senses.translation: 他们将集中教授阅读、写作和算术基础知识。

senses.definition: adj.准备好的，现成的,即时的，敏捷的,情愿的,即将的
senses.sentence: Fraud squad officers had bugged the phone and were **ready** to pounce.
senses.translation: 反诈骗小组的警员们已在电话上安装了窃听器，并随时准备突击。

senses.definition: adj.真的,真实的，现实的,事实上的,真诚的
senses.sentence: A child may not differentiate between his imagination and the **real** world.
senses.translation: 儿童可能无法将自己的幻想与真实世界区分开来。

senses.definition: vt.实现,了解，认识到
senses.sentence: I **realise** that an Englishman who generalises about Ireland invites trouble.
senses.translation: 我意识到英国人如果对爱尔兰问题加以泛化的话会招惹麻烦。

senses.definition: adj.现实的,[艺] 现实主义的，[哲]实在论（者）的,逼真的,栩栩如生的
senses.sentence: He does not have any **realistic** chance of winning the election.
senses.translation: 他没有一点儿赢得选举的现实机会。

senses.definition: n.现实，现实性,真实情况，实际情形,实体，实在,事实
senses.sentence: The **reality** of mothering is frequently very different from the romantic ideal.
senses.translation: 养育孩子的现实经常与浪漫的理想大相径庭。

senses.definition: vt.实现,了解，意识到,（所担心的事）发生,以…价格卖出
senses.sentence: The Emperor must **realize** that he has us at his mercy.
senses.translation: 皇帝必须意识到我们任由他处置。

senses.definition: adv.真，真正,实在，果真,实际上,事实上
