senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **really** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【really】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.领域，范围,王国,（学术的）部门，界,（动植物分布的）圈，带
senses.sentence: This is a target which is surely within the **realm** of possibility.
senses.translation: 这是一个完全有可能实现的目标。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.收割,获得,得到（报偿）
senses.sentence: We are not in this to **reap** immense financial rewards.
senses.translation: 我们从事这一行不是为了获得巨大的经济回报。

senses.definition: vt.饲养,养育,抚养,养育
senses.sentence: Those electing to smoke will be seated at the **rear**.
senses.translation: 那些想吸烟的人将坐在后排。

senses.definition: adj.合理的，公道的,明白道理的,适当的,有理性的
senses.sentence: They will need a **reasonable** amount of desk area and good light.
senses.translation: 他们将需要一个面积较大的摆放办公桌的地方和充足的照明。

senses.definition: vt.使安心，使消除疑虑,再对…进行保险,再保证
senses.sentence: Banks are built to look solid to **reassure** their customers.
senses.translation: 银行往往建得看上去很坚固，好让顾客放心。

senses.definition: n.造反，叛乱,反抗
senses.sentence: A little adolescent **rebellion** is commonly believed to be healthy.
senses.translation: 大家一致认为，青少年有点叛逆是正常的。

senses.definition: vt.叫回，召回,使想起，回想,取消,调回工厂
senses.sentence: I **recall** many discussions with her on these and kindred topics.
senses.translation: 我回想起多次同她就这些问题及类似话题进行的讨论。

senses.definition: vi.后退,减弱,（价值，品质等）跌落，低落，变坏,收回意见，退出（某种活动）
senses.sentence: If untreated, the gums **recede**, become swollen and bleed.
senses.translation: 如果不进行治疗，牙龈会开始萎缩、红肿和出血。

senses.definition: n.收据，发票,收入
senses.sentence: Proof of postage will not be accepted as proof of **receipt**.
senses.translation: 邮资单据不能当作收据。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.收到,接到,接纳,接待
senses.sentence: She went to New York to **receive** the award in person.
senses.translation: 她亲自前往纽约领奖。

senses.definition: adj.最近的,新近的,近代的,[地]全新世的
senses.sentence: Specialists see various reasons for the **recent** surge in inflation.
senses.translation: 专家们认为目前通货膨胀加剧有多种原因。

senses.definition: n.接待,欢迎,招待会,接待处
senses.sentence: Mr Mandela was given a tumultuous **reception** in Washington.
senses.translation: 曼德拉先生在华盛顿受到热情的款待。

senses.definition: n.接待员
senses.sentence: The **receptionist** recognized him at once.
senses.translation: 接待员一眼就认出他了。

senses.definition: n.经济衰退，不景气,后退，撤退,凹处,退场
senses.sentence: The economy remains deep in **recession** with few signs of a pick-up.
senses.translation: 经济仍深陷衰退之中，几乎没有好转的迹象。

senses.definition: n.食谱,处方,秘诀
senses.sentence: Each **recipe** specifies the size of egg to be used.
senses.translation: 每种菜谱都具体规定了所用鸡蛋的大小。

senses.definition: n.接受者,容器,容纳者
senses.sentence: The Phoumi regime became the **recipient** of American military aid.
senses.translation: 富米政权成了美国军事援助的接受者.

senses.definition: adj.相互的,互惠的,倒数的
senses.sentence: Our relationship is based on **reciprocal** respect.
senses.translation: 我们的关系是以互相尊重为基础的.

senses.definition: vt.& vi.背诵,叙述,列举
senses.sentence: All he could do was **recite** a list of Government failings.
senses.translation: 他能做的只是列举政府的种种不是。

senses.definition: vi.背诵,叙述
senses.sentence: Each child had to **recite** a poem to the class.
senses.translation: 每个孩子都得在班上背诵一首诗。

senses.definition: adj.鲁莽的，不顾危险的,粗心大意的,满不在乎的,胆大妄为
senses.sentence: Many people believe **reckless** drivers are treated too leniently.
senses.translation: 很多人认为对鲁莽驾驶的司机处罚过轻。

senses.definition: vt.测算，估计,认为,计算,评定，断定
senses.sentence: Don't **reckon** upon the weather being fine for your garden party.
senses.translation: 不要指望你举行游园会时会是好天气.

senses.definition: vt.开拓，开垦,感化,取回,沙化
senses.sentence: What I've tried very subtly to do is to **reclaim** language.
senses.translation: 我费尽心机在做的就是改造、拯救语言。

senses.definition: vt.认出，识别出某人[某事物],承认…有效[属实],认可,承认[认清]（某事物）
senses.contextMeaning: 认出，识别出某人[某事物]
senses.sentence: The fusty old establishment refused to **recognise** the demand for popular music.
senses.translation: 这一古板的老旧机构拒绝承认人们对流行音乐的需求。

senses.definition: n.认识，识别,承认，认可,褒奖,酬劳
senses.sentence: But by the year 2020 business computing will have changed beyond **recognition**.
senses.translation: 但是到了2020年，商业计算会变得面目全非。

senses.definition: vt.认出,识别,承认
vt.记起，想起
senses.sentence: She could no longer **recollect** the details of the letter.
senses.translation: 她想不起那封信的细节了。

senses.definition: vi.推荐,建议
senses.sentence: Most authorities **recommend** letting the baby nurse whenever it wants.
senses.translation: 大部分权威人士建议婴儿饿了就随时喂奶。

senses.definition: vt.使和好，使和解,调停，排解（争端等）,[宗]使（场所等）洁净,[船]使（木板）接缝平滑
senses.sentence: Negotiators must now work out how to **reconcile** these demands with American demands for access.
senses.translation: 谈判人员现在必须想办法调和这些要求和美国人想要参与的要求。

senses.definition: n.记录，记载,档案，履历,唱片,最高纪录
senses.sentence: Exports in June rose 1.5% to a **record** $30.91 billion.
senses.translation: 6月份的出口额上升了1.5%，创下309.1亿美元的历史最高纪录。

senses.definition: n.录音机,直笛,记录员,刑事法院法官
senses.sentence: Two out of every three Britons already own a video **recorder**.
senses.translation: 每3个英国人中就有两个已经有了录像机。

senses.definition: vt.恢复,重新获得,找回,<正>恢复（适当的状态或位置）
senses.sentence: Firms need a breathing space if they are to **recover**.
senses.translation: 这些公司需要短暂休整才能恢复元气。

senses.definition: n.恢复，复原,重获,痊愈,矫正
senses.sentence: Interest rates would come down as the **recovery** gathered pace.
senses.translation: 随着复苏的加速，利率会降下来。

senses.definition: n.消遣（方式）,娱乐（方式）,重建，重现
senses.sentence: There are plans to enlarge the **recreation** area.
senses.translation: 已经有了扩大娱乐场地的计划。

senses.definition: n.新兵,（机构中的）新成员,新学生
senses.sentence: The police are trying to **recruit** more officers from ethnic minorities.
senses.translation: 警察机关正试图从少数民族中征募更多的新警员。

senses.definition: n.[数]长方形，矩形
senses.sentence: Suppose the width of a **rectangle** is x metres.
senses.translation: 设长方形的宽是x米.

senses.definition: vt.改正，校正,[化]精馏,[电]整流
senses.sentence: Only an act of Congress could **rectify** the situation.
senses.translation: 只有国会法案才能矫正这种形势。

senses.definition: vi.再发生,复发,重现,回想
senses.sentence: The same old favorites **recur** year in year out with monotonous regularity.
senses.translation: 相同的决心以单调的规律年复一年地出现.

senses.definition: vt.回收利用,使再循环
senses.sentence: The power of the Green movement in Germany has made that country a leader in the drive to **recycle** more waste materials.
senses.translation: 德国环保运动的影响力使得该国率先发起了回收利用更多废品的运动。

senses.definition: adj.红色的,（脸）涨红的,烧红的,红头发的
senses.sentence: His exercise books were full of well deserved **red** ticks.
senses.translation: 他的练习本上尽是些红钩钩，都是他应得的。

senses.definition: vt.赎回，挽回,履行,偿还,兑现
senses.sentence: The amount required to **redeem** the mortgage was £358,587.
senses.translation: 需要偿还的抵押贷款总计358,587英镑。

senses.definition: vi.减少,节食,蒸发,（液体）浓缩变稠
senses.sentence: The plan is designed to **reduce** some of the company's mountainous debt.
senses.translation: 该计划旨在减少公司堆积如山的债务。

senses.definition: n.减少,降低,[数学]约简,[摄影术]减薄
senses.sentence: The company has made heroic efforts at cost **reduction**.
senses.translation: 公司在降低成本方面付出了艰苦卓绝的努力。

senses.definition: adj.多余的，累赘的,（因人员过剩）被解雇的，失业的,重沓,衍
senses.sentence: Changes in technology may mean that once-valued skills are now **redundant**.
senses.translation: 技术上的革新可能意味着曾经被重视的技术现在已变得多余。

senses.definition: n.芦苇,芦苇杆,[乐]舌簧
senses.sentence: Referee Michael **Reed** had no hesitation in awarding a penalty.
senses.translation: 裁判迈克尔·里德毫不犹豫地判了点球。

senses.definition: n.卷轴,卷盘,卷筒,绕在卷轴上的线（或金属丝、胶卷等）
senses.sentence: The rod bent double, the **reel** shrieked and ratcheted.
senses.translation: 操作杆进一步弯曲，线轴发出刺耳的吱吱声。

senses.definition: vi.提到,针对,关系到,请教
senses.sentence: But he then went on to **refer** very directly to the argument.
senses.translation: 不过接下来他就直切主题提到了那场争论。

senses.definition: n.参考,参考书,提及，涉及,证明人，介绍人
senses.sentence: I'm calling in **reference** to your series on prejudice.
senses.translation: 我打电话是要谈谈你写的有关“偏见”的系列文章。

senses.definition: vt.提炼,改善,使高雅
senses.sentence: We shall have to **refine** on our methods of advertising.
senses.translation: 我们得进一步改进做广告的方法.

senses.definition: vt.& vi.反射（光、热、声或影像）,考虑
senses.sentence: Their success does not necessarily **reflect** a leftward shift in politics.
senses.translation: 他们的成功并不一定表示政治气候转向亲左。

senses.definition: vt.改革,重组
senses.sentence: The finance minister will continue to mastermind Poland's economic **reform**.
senses.translation: 财政部长将继续策划波兰的经济改革。

senses.definition: adj.改革的
senses.sentence: The government took another step on the road to political **reform**.
senses.translation: 政府在实现政治改革的路上又迈进了一步。

senses.definition: vt.抑制，克制
senses.sentence: I made a terrific effort to **refrain** from tears.
senses.translation: 我狠着心把泪止住.

senses.definition: vt.使恢复，使振作,使焕然一新，翻新,给（电池）充电
senses.sentence: I looked at the map to **refresh** my memory of the road.
senses.translation: 我看看地图以唤起对这条路的回忆.

senses.definition: n.提神，精神恢复,提神物,点心，茶点
senses.sentence: He needs to stop fairly often for **refreshment**.
senses.translation: 他须时不时地停下来喘口气.

senses.definition: n.冰箱,冷藏库,制冰机，冷冻机
senses.sentence: He went to the **refrigerator** and removed a bottle of wine.
senses.translation: 他走到冰箱处拿出一瓶酒。

senses.definition: n.避难,避难所,庇护者,[医]救急疗法
senses.sentence: We climbed up a winding track towards a mountain **refuge**.
senses.translation: 我们沿着一条蜿蜒的小道爬向山上的一处避难所。

senses.definition: n.避难者，难民
senses.sentence: Many of the **refugee** villages are in isolated areas.
senses.translation: 很多难民村落都在偏远地区。

senses.definition: n.资金偿还,偿还数额
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **refund** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【refund】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.拒绝,优先取舍权
senses.sentence: They cited Alex's **refusal** to return to the marital home.
senses.translation: 他们引证了亚历克斯拒绝回到婚后的家中一事。

senses.definition: n.废弃物,垃圾
senses.sentence: The District Council made a weekly collection of **refuse**.
senses.translation: 区政务委员会每周收取一次垃圾。

senses.definition: vt.驳斥，驳倒,否认真实性
senses.sentence: Isabelle is quick to **refute** any suggestion of intellectual snobbery.
senses.translation: 伊莎贝尔对于任何关于她恃才傲物的暗示都迅速予以否认。

senses.definition: vt.认为,注视,涉及,尊敬
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **regard** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【regard】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: prep.关于,就…而论,至于
senses.sentence: She has said nothing **regarding** your request.
senses.translation: 关于你的要求，她什么也没说。

senses.definition: adv.不顾后果地,不管怎样，无论如何,不惜费用地
senses.sentence: The weather was terrible but we carried on **regardless** .
senses.translation: 天气非常恶劣，但我们并不理会，照常进行。

senses.definition: n.政治制度，政权，政体,管理，方法,[医]养生法,（病人等的）生活规则
senses.sentence: The military **regime** in power was unpopular and repressive.
senses.translation: 当权的军政府压制人民，不得人心。

senses.definition: n.地区，地域，地带,行政区，管辖区,（大气，海水等的）层，界，境,（学问等的）范围，领域
senses.sentence: The power stations burn coal from the Ruhr **region**.
senses.translation: 发电站烧的煤产自鲁尔地区。

senses.definition: n.登记，注册,记录,登记簿,自动记录器
senses.sentence: She was ringing up her sale on an ancient cash **register**.
senses.translation: 她正用一台老掉牙的收银机记账。

senses.definition: vt.后悔，悔恨,遗憾，抱歉,悼念，哀悼
senses.sentence: Failure is never quite so frightening as **regret**.
senses.translation: 比失败更令人恐惧的是懊悔。

senses.definition: adj.有规律的,规则，整齐的,不变的,合格的
senses.sentence: Check the oil at **regular** intervals, and have the car serviced **regularly**.
senses.translation: 定期检查汽油，并对车辆进行定期维护。

senses.definition: vt.调节，调整,校准,控制，管理
senses.sentence: The AA called for laws to **regulate** clamping firms.
senses.translation: 英国汽车协会呼吁立法，规范夹车公司的行为。

senses.definition: n.管理,控制,规章,规则
senses.sentence: Infringement of the **regulation** is punishable by a fine.
senses.translation: 违反规则应处以罚款。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.排练，排演,公开练习
senses.sentence: Anticipate any tough questions and **rehearse** your answers.
senses.translation: 预先考虑可能遇到的各种棘手问题，并且自己练习回答。

senses.definition: vi.当政，统治,占主导地位
senses.sentence: The commanders accused him of carrying out a **reign** of terror.
senses.translation: 指挥官们谴责他实行恐怖统治。

senses.definition: vt.加固,强化,增援
vt.拒绝,抛弃，扔掉,排斥,吐出或呕吐
senses.sentence: The United States is certain to **reject** the proposal as a non-starter.
senses.translation: 美国肯定会以无成功希望为由拒绝这项提案。

senses.definition: vi.有联系,涉及,符合,发生共鸣
senses.sentence: Other recommendations **relate** to the details of how such data is stored.
senses.translation: 其他建议涉及此类信息储存方面的一些细节。

senses.definition: n.关系,联系,关联,亲属
senses.sentence: Watercolour still seems somehow to be the poor **relation** of oil painting.
senses.translation: 水彩画似乎仍比油画略逊一筹。

senses.definition: n.关系,联系,浪漫关系,血缘关系
senses.sentence: A good **relationship** involves concern and sensitivity for each other's feelings.
senses.translation: 一段美满的恋情需要彼此关心并体恤对方的情感。

senses.definition: adj.相关的,相对的,相互有关的,比较而言的
senses.sentence: Economic reform has brought **relative** wealth to peasant farmers.
senses.translation: 经济改革给农民带来了相对的财富。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.（使）轻松,（使）松弛,放宽,（使）放松
senses.sentence: Massage is used to **relax** muscles, relieve stress and improve the circulation.
senses.translation: 按摩可以使肌肉放松，缓解压力和促进血液循环。

senses.definition: n.接替人员，替班,传递,接力赛,继电器
senses.sentence: This metal tower is used to **relay** television signals to distant villages.
senses.translation: 这个金属塔是用于向遥远的村子转播电视讯号的.

senses.definition: vt.释放,放开,发布,发行
senses.sentence: Her kidnapper successfully extorted a £75,000 ransom for her **release**.
senses.translation: 绑匪成功地勒索了7.5万英镑才将她释放。

senses.definition: adj.有关的，中肯的,相关联的,确切的,有重大意义[作用]的，实质性的
senses.sentence: We are trying to make politics more **relevant** to younger people.
senses.translation: 我们试图使政治活动更加贴近年轻人。

senses.definition: n.可靠的人
senses.sentence: Both of them, I may say, are thoroughly **reliable** men.
senses.translation: 可以说，他俩都是绝对可靠的人。

senses.definition: n.依靠，依赖,信任，信赖，信心,所信赖的人或物
senses.sentence: **Reliance** on sponsorship can have a malign effect on theatre groups.
senses.translation: 对赞助的依赖会给剧团带来不良的影响。

senses.definition: n.宽慰，安心,免除，减轻,救援物资,代班人
senses.sentence: The news will come as a great **relief** to the French authorities.
senses.translation: 这个消息会让法国当局大大松一口气。

senses.definition: vt.解除,缓解,换班,（去厕所的一种委婉说法）方便
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **relieve** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【relieve】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.宗教,支配自己生活的大事,教派,心爱的事物
adj.虔诚的,笃信宗教的,宗教的,谨慎的
senses.sentence: The teenager may have been abducted by a **religious** cult.
senses.translation: 这个少年可能被一个异教组织绑架了。

senses.definition: vt.品尝，品味,给…加佐料，调味,欣赏
senses.sentence: The three men ate with **relish**.
senses.translation: 这3个人吃得津津有味。

senses.definition: adj.不情愿的，勉强的,顽抗的,难处理的,厌恶的
senses.sentence: We were **reluctant** to start the long trudge home.
senses.translation: 我们很不愿意踏上如此漫长艰辛的回家之路。

senses.definition: vi.依靠，倚赖，仗恃,信任，信赖
senses.sentence: He can **rely** on my support when the crunch comes.
senses.translation: 关键时刻，他可以依靠我的支持。

senses.definition: vi.留下,保持,留待,依然
senses.sentence: The price of oil should **remain** stable for the rest of 1992.
senses.translation: 油价会在1992年剩下的时间里保持稳定。

senses.definition: n.剩余物,其他人员,差数,廉价出售的图书
senses.sentence: I kept some of his books and gave away the **remainder**.
senses.translation: 我保留了一些他的书，其他的都送人了。

senses.definition: v.留下( remain 的第三人称单数),保持,留待,仍然是
senses.sentence: He **remains** the anchor of the country's fragile political balance.
senses.translation: 他仍然是维系该国脆弱的政治平衡的支柱。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.评论,觉察
senses.sentence: I feel the **remark** was inappropriate for such a serious issue.
senses.translation: 我认为对如此严肃的问题来说，该评论不合时宜。

senses.definition: adj.异常的，引人注目的，,卓越的,显著的,非凡的，非常（好）的
senses.sentence: He made a **remarkable** recovery from a shin injury.
senses.translation: 他的胫骨伤恢复得相当不错。

senses.definition: vt.改正，纠正，改进,补救,治疗
senses.sentence: Their **remedy** lay within the range of existent technology.
senses.translation: 他们的治疗方法利用现有技术可以实现。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.记得,牢记
senses.sentence: I distinctly **remember** wishing I had not got involved.
senses.translation: 我清楚地记得希望自己没有被牵扯进去。

senses.definition: vt.使想起，使记起,提醒
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **remind** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【remind】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.剩余部分,残余,幸存者,零料，零头布
senses.sentence: The Ainu settlers in Hokkaido are the last **remnant** of a prehistoric race.
senses.translation: 北海道的阿伊努人是史前某个种族的最后残存者.

senses.definition: n.远程操作,遥控器
senses.sentence: He reached for the **remote** control and pressed the "play" button.
senses.translation: 他伸手拿过遥控器，按下“播放”键。

senses.definition: n.免职,除去,移走,搬迁
vt.开除,去除,脱掉，拿下,迁移
senses.sentence: **Remove** from the heat, add the parsley, toss and serve at once.
senses.translation: 端离炉子，加上欧芹，颠起翻面后就立刻上桌。

senses.definition: n.文艺复兴,文艺复兴时期,文艺复兴时期（欧洲 14、15 和 16 世纪时，人们以古希腊罗马的思想文化来繁荣文学艺术）,（某一学科或艺术形式等衰落后的）复兴
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **renaissance** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【renaissance】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: v.使成为,递交,给予,表达
senses.sentence: The Board had been slow to **render** its verdict.
senses.translation: 董事会迟迟未能作出决定。

senses.definition: vt.重新开始,使更新,使恢复,补充
senses.sentence: People had to **renew** their motor vehicle registrations through the mail.
senses.translation: 人们必须以书信方式重新登记机动车辆。

senses.definition: vt.翻新，修复，整修,革新，更新,恢复（精神）
n.租金,地租,（意见等的）分裂，分歧,（衣服等的）裂缝
senses.sentence: He could take what was owing for the **rent**.
senses.translation: 他可以把自己欠的钱抵作对方的租金。

senses.definition: n.修理,修理工作,维修状态,经修理的东西
senses.sentence: It would be uneconomic to try and **repair** it.
senses.translation: 花钱修理不合算。

senses.definition: n.（节目）重演,重复,重复的事物
senses.sentence: I'll **repeat** that so you can commit it to memory.
senses.translation: 我会重复一下，好让你们记住。

senses.definition: adv.反复地，重复地,再三地,屡次地,不停地
senses.sentence: A list of items is **repeatedly** flashed up on the screen.
senses.translation: 一个选项列表反复出现在屏幕上。

senses.definition: vt.击退,使厌恶,抵制,使不愉快
senses.sentence: Two like electric charges **repel** each other.
senses.translation: 同性的电荷互相排斥.

senses.definition: n.全部节目,全部本领,（计算机的）指令表
senses.sentence: Meredith D'Ambrosio has thousands of songs in her **repertoire**.
senses.translation: 梅雷迪思·丹布罗西奥会唱几千首歌曲。

senses.definition: n.重复，反复,背诵,复制品，副本,[乐]复唱，复奏，重奏
senses.sentence: Her prose style is not always felicitous; she tends to **repetition**.
senses.translation: 她的行文风格并非总是恰到好处，往往爱重复。

senses.definition: vt.替换,代替,把…放回原位,（用…）替换
senses.sentence: Around 1910 motorized carriages were beginning to **replace** horse-drawn cabs.
senses.translation: 大约从1910年起，机动车开始取代马车。

senses.definition: n.代替,归还，，复位,替代者,补充兵员
senses.sentence: Hormone **replacement** therapy is very important and should be instituted early.
senses.translation: 激素替代治疗非常重要，应该及早开始。

senses.definition: n.回答，答复,反应,报复（行动）,[法律]答辩
senses.sentence: They went ahead without waiting for a **reply** from the Germans.
senses.translation: 他们没等德国人答复就接着往下推进。

senses.definition: n.报告,成绩报告单,传闻,流言蜚语
senses.sentence: Many areas in the country'sinterior are unable to **report** Aids cases immediately.
senses.translation: 该国内地的很多地区无法即时报告艾滋病病例。

senses.definition: vi.代表,提出异议
senses.sentence: These 50,000 arrears cases **represent** a tiny fraction of all home owners.
senses.translation: 这5万个欠款案例只代表所有业主中的一小部分人。

senses.definition: n.代表,继任者,议员,类似物
senses.sentence: Voters are interested in the **representative**'s ability to bring home the bacon.
senses.translation: 选民感兴趣的是代表能否兑现承诺。

senses.definition: vt.责备，责骂,使丢脸,申斥,损伤…的体面
senses.sentence: You've no reason to **reproach** yourself, no reason to feel shame.
senses.translation: 你没有理由自责，也没有理由感到惭愧。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.复制，重现，再版,生殖，繁殖
senses.sentence: We are grateful to you for permission to **reproduce** this article.
senses.translation: 非常感谢您允许我们复印这篇文章。

senses.definition: n.爬行动物,卑鄙的人
n.共和国,共和政体,（成员具有平等权利的）团体
senses.sentence: The Estonian parliament has passed a resolution declaring the **republic** fully independent.
senses.translation: 爱沙尼亚议会已经通过了宣布共和国完全独立的决议。

senses.definition: adj.共和国的,共和政体的,共和主义的,<美>共和党员
senses.sentence: Amy's own **Republican** sympathies strengthened as the days passed.
senses.translation: 埃米个人对共和党的支持与日俱增。

senses.definition: n.名气，名声,好名声,信誉，声望,荣誉，名望
senses.sentence: He had a **reputation** for being bloody-minded and difficult.
senses.translation: 他为人刻薄、难相处是出了名的。

senses.definition: n.要求,需要,所请求的事物,申请书
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **request** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【request】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: vt.要求,需要,想要,命令
senses.sentence: That does not **require** "massive" military intervention, as some have mischievously claimed.
senses.translation: 那并不需要像某些不怀好意者所主张的那样进行“大规模的”军事干预。

senses.definition: n.要求,必要条件,必需品，需要量,资格
senses.sentence: The **requirement** for work permits violates the spirit of the 1950 treaty.
senses.translation: 对工作许可证的要求违反了1950年条约的精神。

senses.definition: vt.营救，救援，使免遭损失,[法律] 非法劫回
senses.sentence: The air **rescue** operation has now been scaled down.
senses.translation: 空中救援行动的规模现在已经有所缩小。

senses.definition: n.研究，追究,探讨，探测,调查,探索
senses.sentence: Faculty members devote most of their time to scholarly **research**.
senses.translation: 全院教师大部分时间都用来从事学术研究。

senses.definition: vt.与…相像，类似于
senses.sentence: The pattern so obtained will not **resemble** any of the others.
senses.translation: 所得到的这个图样将不同于其他各种特征图样.

senses.definition: vt.对…感到愤怒,怨恨,愤恨,厌恶
senses.sentence: It is only natural that he should **resent** you.
senses.translation: 他怨恨你是很自然的事。

senses.definition: n.保留,预订，预约,保留地，专用地
senses.sentence: After three days, the strikers' demands were met almost without **reservation**.
senses.translation: 3天以后，罢工人员的要求几乎全部得到了满足。

senses.definition: n.储备,保护区,保留,替补队员
n.蓄水池,贮液器,储藏,蓄积
senses.sentence: This **reservoir** was formed by damming the River Blith.
senses.translation: 这个水库是通过在布莱斯河上筑坝形成的。

senses.definition: n.住处，住宅,居住时间，居住,公馆,驻地
senses.sentence: They had entered the country and had applied for permanent **residence**.
senses.translation: 他们已经入境该国，并申请了永久居留权。

senses.definition: adj.定居的，常驻的,[计]常驻的，常存于内存中的,[动]不迁徙的（鸟兽等）,固有的，内在的
senses.sentence: Non-**resident** guests are welcome to use the hotel swimming pool.
senses.translation: 欢迎非旅馆住客使用本旅馆的游泳池。

senses.definition: v.辞职,放弃,屈从,勉强接受
senses.sentence: He was under pressure to **resign** and was about to be sidelined.
senses.translation: 他承受着被迫辞职的压力，很快就要被排挤出去了。

senses.definition: v.抵抗，抗拒,忍耐,反对，抵制
senses.sentence: In her place I wouldn't have been able to **resist** it.
senses.translation: 如果我是她就可能抗拒不了。

senses.definition: n.抵抗,阻力,抗力,电阻
senses.sentence: In the end the Kurds surrendered without putting up any **resistance**.
senses.translation: 最后库尔德人没有作任何抵抗就投降了。

senses.definition: adj.有抵抗力的，抵抗的,顽固的
senses.sentence: The majority have a built-in Luddite mentality; they are **resistant** to change.
senses.translation: 大部分人天生有种反对技术进步的心理。他们抗拒变革。

senses.definition: adj.坚决的，刚毅的,不动摇的
senses.sentence: He described the situation as very dangerous and called for **resolute** action.
senses.translation: 他将形势描述得非常危险，并号召采取果断行动。

senses.definition: n.决心,解决,坚决,分辨率
senses.sentence: The Estonian parliament has passed a **resolution** declaring the republic fully independent.
senses.translation: 爱沙尼亚议会已经通过了宣布共和国完全独立的决议。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.决定,决心
senses.sentence: This merely strengthens our **resolve** to win the league.
senses.translation: 这只会更加坚定我们赢得联赛的决心。

senses.definition: vi.求助于或诉诸某事物，采取某手段或方法应急或作为对策
senses.contextMeaning: 求助于或诉诸某事物，采取某手段或方法应急或作为对策
senses.sentence: The **resort** is surrounded by extensive national and regional parklands.
senses.translation: 那个度假胜地被广阔的国家和地区绿地所环绕。

senses.definition: n.资源,物力，财力,办法,智谋
senses.sentence: A country's principal **resource** is its brainpower.
senses.translation: 一个国家的首要资源是其人才资源。

senses.definition: vt.尊重,尊敬,关心,遵守
senses.sentence: I **respect** his judgement and I'll follow any advice he gives me.
senses.translation: 我尊重他的判断能力，会接受他提出的任何建议。

senses.definition: adj.各自的，分别的
senses.sentence: It is important that we dovetail our **respective** interests.
senses.translation: 让我们各自的利益相吻合很重要。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.回答，响应
senses.sentence: Some cases of arthritis **respond** to a gluten-free diet.
senses.translation: 无麸质饮食对一些关节炎患者有疗效。

senses.definition: n.反应,回答，答复,[宗]回应经文，应唱圣歌
senses.sentence: The agency was heavily criticised for its tardy **response** to the hurricane.
senses.translation: 该机构因对飓风反应迟缓，受到严厉批评。

senses.definition: adj.尽责的,承担责任,负有责任的,懂道理的
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **responsible** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【responsible】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.饭店,餐馆,饭馆,菜馆
senses.sentence: He insisted we stop at a small **restaurant** just outside of Atlanta.
senses.translation: 他坚持让我们在亚特兰大市外不远的一家小餐馆歇歇脚。

senses.definition: adj.焦躁不安的,不耐烦的,坐立不安的,难以入睡的
senses.sentence: The unity of our society is threatened by troublesome and **restless** minorities.
senses.translation: 我们社会的团结遭到了一小撮滋扰生事、不安分守己的群体的威胁。

senses.definition: vt.归还,交还,使恢复,修复
vt.抑制，压抑,限定，限制,制止,监禁
senses.sentence: Unable to **restrain** herself, she rose and went to the phone.
senses.translation: 她没能克制住自己，起身走向电话。

senses.definition: vt.限制，限定,约束，束缚
senses.sentence: Villagers say the fence would **restrict** public access to the hills.
senses.translation: 村民们说这个围栏将限制公众进入山区。

senses.definition: n.结果,（尤指足球比赛的）胜利,[体]比分,成功实现的事
senses.sentence: Many motor accidents are the **result** of unthinkingly mixing speed and alcohol.
senses.translation: 许多机动车事故都是不计后果地酒后开快车造成的。

senses.definition: adj.因而发生的，结果必然产生的,[物]组合的，合成的
senses.contextMeaning: 因而发生的，结果必然产生的
senses.sentence: The **resultant** material was to be pored over by experts in psychology.
senses.translation: 这样的一份材料要由心理学专家精心研究.

senses.definition: v.重新开始,继续,恢复职位
senses.sentence: They thought that he should **resume** his kingly duties.
senses.translation: 他们认为他应该继续履行君主的职责。

senses.definition: n.零售
senses.sentence: The news from Body Shop rattled the rest of the **retail** sector.
senses.translation: 从“美体小铺”传来的消息令整个零售行业不安。

senses.definition: vt.零售,零卖,转述,传播
senses.sentence: He now controls the largest **retail** development empire in southern California.
senses.translation: 他现在掌管着加州南部最大的零售发展企业。

senses.definition: vt.保持,留在心中，记住,雇用,付定金保留
senses.sentence: Daily facial exercises help her to **retain** the skin's elasticity.
senses.translation: 每天做面部运动帮助她保持皮肤弹性。

senses.definition: vi.退休,撤退,后退，退却
senses.sentence: It would be nice to be able to afford to **retire** earlier.
senses.translation: 无后顾之忧而能提早退休当是件幸事。

senses.definition: n.退休，退职,引退，隐居,退隐处
senses.sentence: He spent the last fourteen years of his life in **retirement**.
senses.translation: 他一生中最后的14年是在退休中度过的。

senses.definition: vt.反驳,报复,杀菌釜
senses.sentence: He scored a bull's - eye in their argument with that witty **retort**.
senses.translation: 在他们的辩论中他那一句机智的反驳击中了要害.

senses.definition: vi.回嘴,反驳
senses.sentence: His sharp **retort** clearly made an impact.
senses.translation: 他尖刻的反驳显然起了作用。

senses.definition: vi.撤退，后退,撤销，作罢,（眼睛等）凹进,[航]向后倾斜
senses.sentence: Their soldiers had to **retreat** ignominiously after losing hundreds of lives.
senses.translation: 损失数百人之后，他们的士兵被迫灰溜溜地撤退。

senses.definition: vt.取回,恢复,[计]检索,重新得到
senses.sentence: Computers can instantly **retrieve** millions of information bits.
senses.translation: 计算机可以立即检索到数百万条信息。

senses.definition: n.回顾，回想
senses.sentence: In **retrospect** it's obvious how we went wrong.
senses.translation: 回想起来,我们是如何出的错就很明显了.

senses.definition: v.回转，返回,复发，又来,送还,言归正传
senses.sentence: Ellery's **return** will help to chase away some of the gloom.
senses.translation: 埃勒里的归来可以驱散一些抑郁的情绪。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.再次联合,使重聚,使再结合
senses.sentence: She is trying her best to **reunite** with her father.
senses.translation: 她想方设法与父亲团聚.

senses.definition: vt.再用，重新使用
senses.sentence: Copper, brass and aluminium are separated and remelted for **reuse**.
senses.translation: 铜、黄铜和铝被分门别类重新熔化以进行再利用。

senses.definition: vt.显露,揭露,泄露,[神]启示
senses.sentence: Companies should be made to **reveal** more about their financial position.
senses.translation: 应该要求公司使其财务状况更为透明化。

senses.definition: n.[宗]天启，启示,揭发，暴露,被揭露出来的事物,意外的发现
senses.sentence: I was shocked, brought down to earth by this **revelation**.
senses.translation: 真相的披露让我深感震惊，我被带回了现实。

senses.definition: n.报仇，报复
senses.sentence: She took **revenge** on her ex-boyfriend by smashing up his home.
senses.translation: 为了报复，她砸了前任男友的家。

senses.definition: n.（国家的）岁入，税收，（土地，财产等的）收入，收益，所得，（个人的）固定收入,[复数]总收入,税务署，〈美俚〉税务官,税务局
senses.sentence: Tax frauds are dealt with by the Inland **Revenue**.
senses.translation: 税务欺诈由国内税务局负责处理。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.（使）反转,（使）颠倒,掉换，交换,[法]撤消，推翻
senses.sentence: Amis tells the story in **reverse**, from the moment the man dies.
senses.translation: 埃米斯以倒叙的方式讲述了这个故事，从这个男人死去的时候开始讲起。

senses.definition: n.复习,回顾,（报刊的）评论,[法]复审
senses.sentence: The president ordered a **review** of US economic aid to Jordan.
senses.translation: 总统下令对美国向约旦提供的经济援助进行审查。

senses.definition: vt.修订,改变,修正,[主英国英语]复习
senses.sentence: I can see I will have to **revise** my opinions of his abilities now.
senses.translation: 我明白我现在不得不改变对他的能力的看法了。

senses.definition: vt.使复活，使恢复,使振奋，复原,使再生，使重新流行,唤醒，唤起
senses.sentence: They failed to **revive** her sagging spirits.
senses.translation: 他们未能让她从萎靡消沉中振作起来。

senses.definition: vt.（使）厌恶
senses.sentence: Soon the entire armed forces were in open **revolt**.
senses.translation: 很快，整个武装部队开始公然抗命。

senses.definition: n.革命,彻底改变,旋转,运行，公转
senses.sentence: The vehicle that permitted both communication and acceptability was social **revolution**.
senses.translation: 既能实现交流又能被广为接受的手段就是社会革命。

senses.definition: adj.革命的,革命性的，创新的,旋转的
vt.& vi.使旋转,反复考虑,使循环
senses.sentence: Mars takes longer to **revolve** on its axis than the earth.
senses.translation: 火星自转一周的时间比地球长。

senses.definition: n.报酬,报答,赏金,酬金
senses.sentence: Jenkins would **reward** all investors, no matter when they made their investment.
senses.translation: 无论投资人何时投资，詹金斯都会让他们得到回报。

senses.definition: n.[诗]节奏，韵律,[医]节律，规律,[乐]节拍,[艺]调和
senses.sentence: The ship adjusted herself to the roll and **rhythm** of the sea.
senses.translation: 船随着海水的起伏节奏时起时落。

senses.definition: n.带,（打印机的）色带,绶带,带状物
senses.sentence: I covered the scroll in sealing wax, and affixed a red **ribbon**.
senses.translation: 我用封蜡将卷轴封好，并系上一根红丝带。

senses.definition: n.稻,稻米， 大米
senses.sentence: Fish and **rice** were the mainstays of the country's diet.
senses.translation: 鱼和米是该国的主要食品。

senses.definition: adj.富有的,肥沃的,丰富多彩的,油腻的
senses.sentence: He hoped to strike it **rich** by investing in ginseng.
senses.translation: 他希望通过投资人参发大财。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.乘，骑，驾
senses.sentence: If you want a cheap **ride**, take a minicab.
senses.translation: 要想出行便宜，就坐小型出租车吧。

senses.definition: n.背脊，峰，隆起线,山脊，山脉，海脊,高压脊,皱摺，田埂
senses.sentence: Every man who could fight was now committed to defend the **ridge**.
senses.translation: 每个能够参加战斗的男子现在都决心要保卫这条山脊。

senses.definition: adj.可笑的，荒谬的,荒唐的，愚蠢的,胡枝扯叶
senses.sentence: The deal seems so attractive it would be **ridiculous** to say no.
senses.translation: 这笔交易看上去太诱人了，要是拒绝它简直是笑话。

senses.definition: adv.立刻，马上,向右，右边,恰当地,一直
senses.sentence: Instead of complaining about what's wrong, be grateful for what's **right**.
senses.translation: 别抱怨不好的事，要对美好的事心存感恩。

senses.definition: adj.严格的,僵硬的,（规则、方法等）死板的,刚硬的，顽固的
senses.sentence: She was a fairly **rigid** person who had strong religious views.
senses.translation: 她相当顽固，宗教观念极强。

senses.definition: adj.严密的,缜密的,严格的,枯燥的
senses.sentence: Taxis must conform to the **rigorous** standards laid down by the police.
senses.translation: 出租车必须遵守警方的严格规定。

senses.definition: n.（圆形器皿的）边，缘，框,轮缘
senses.sentence: Far up the west **rim** of the canyon, a coyote yipped twice.
senses.translation: 远处峡谷的西缘，一只丛林狼嚎叫了两声。

senses.definition: n.戒指，指环,铃声，钟声,环形物,拳击场
senses.sentence: Any minute now, that phone is going to **ring**.
senses.translation: 那部电话随时可能响。

senses.definition: n.骚乱，暴动，暴乱，骚动，混乱,放荡，闹饮，嘈闹的宴会，喝酒狂闹,五色缤纷，喧嚣嘈杂,（想像，感情等的）奔放
senses.contextMeaning: 骚乱，暴动，暴乱，骚动，混乱
senses.sentence: **Riot** police are being deployed throughout the city to prevent any trouble.
senses.translation: 正在全城部署防暴警察以防止发生骚乱。

senses.definition: n.裂口,废物,[美国俚语]偷窃,浪子
senses.sentence: Underneath this image of normalcy, addiction threatened to **rip** this family apart.
senses.translation: 在这一切正常的表象下潜伏的是将使这个家庭四分五裂的毒瘾。

senses.definition: adj.成熟的,醇美可口的,老练的,时机成熟的
senses.sentence: Haig's message was that victory was **ripe** for picking.
senses.translation: 黑格传达的意思是说胜利唾手可得。

senses.definition: vi.上升,增强,（数量）增加,休会
senses.sentence: There are intangible benefits beyond a **rise** in the share price.
senses.translation: 除股价上升之外还有无形利益。

senses.definition: n.危险，冒险,保险额,被保险人或物
senses.sentence: Smoking places you at serious **risk** of cardiovascular and respiratory disease.
senses.translation: 吸烟会大大增加罹患心血管和呼吸道疾病的风险。

senses.definition: n.（宗教等的）仪式,例行公事，老规矩,典礼
senses.sentence: These ceremonies were already part of pre-Christian **ritual** in Mexico.
senses.translation: 这些仪式已经成为墨西哥基督教时期以前的宗教仪式的一部分。

senses.definition: n.对手,竞争者
senses.sentence: He polled four times as many votes as his **rival**.
senses.translation: 他得到的选票数量是竞选对手的4倍。

senses.definition: n.河，江,溪，巨流
senses.sentence: The **river** widens considerably as it begins to turn east.
senses.translation: 河流转向东流时河道大幅度变宽。

senses.definition: n.路,通路,途径,方法
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **road** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【road】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: vi.咆哮,喧闹,吼叫,混乱或吵闹
senses.sentence: A **roar** of approval resounded through the Ukrainian parliament.
senses.translation: 一片赞成声在乌克兰议会中回响。

senses.definition: n.烤肉,户外烧烤野餐
senses.sentence: Come into the kitchen. I've got to put the **roast** in.
senses.translation: 到厨房来。我得把烤肉放进去。

senses.definition: vt.抢劫,抢夺，掠夺,非法剥夺,使丧失
senses.sentence: They **rob** us, they infringe our rights, they kill us.
senses.translation: 他们劫掠我们，侵犯我们的权利，对我们实施杀戮。

senses.definition: n.机器人,遥控装置,自动机,机械呆板的人
senses.sentence: They have docked a **robot** module alongside the orbiting space station.
senses.translation: 他们已经将一个自动操作舱与沿轨道运行的空间站并行对接上了。

senses.definition: adj.精力充沛的,坚定的,粗野的，粗鲁的,需要体力的
senses.sentence: The Neanderthals were very **robust** and quite different from us.
senses.translation: 尼安德特时期的人非常强壮，和我们迥然不同。

senses.definition: n.火箭,火箭发射器,火箭发动机,芝麻菜
senses.sentence: First a house took a direct hit and then the **rocket** exploded.
senses.translation: 先是一幢房子被直接击中，然后火箭弹就爆炸了。

senses.definition: n.杆，拉杆,惩罚，体罚,（责打人用的）棍棒,手枪
senses.sentence: The **rod** bent double, the reel shrieked and ratcheted.
senses.translation: 操作杆进一步弯曲，线轴发出刺耳的吱吱声。

senses.definition: n.作用,地位,角色
senses.sentence: The Prime Minister has promised that Israel will play a constructive **role**.
senses.translation: 首相承诺以色列将发挥积极的作用。

senses.definition: vt.辗,使（眼球等）左右转动,（使）原地转圈,滚动
senses.sentence: Rock'n'**roll** has become so commercialised and safe since punk.
senses.translation: 摇滚乐自从朋克乐以后就已经过于商业化而缺乏新意了。

senses.definition: n.浪漫史,爱情小说,恋爱,传奇色彩
senses.sentence: It is ridiculous to suggest we are having a **romance**.
senses.translation: 暗示我们正在谈恋爱的说法真是太荒谬了。

senses.definition: adj.浪漫的，谈情说爱的，多情的，风流的，香艳的,空想的，虚构的，怪诞的，想入非非的，不实际的，难实行的（计划等）,传奇（式）的，小说般的，情节离奇的,浪漫主义的
senses.contextMeaning: 浪漫的，谈情说爱的，多情的，风流的，香艳的
senses.sentence: She clings to a **romantic** fantasy of wedded bliss.
senses.translation: 她沉醉于婚后幸福的浪漫幻想。

senses.definition: n.屋顶，房屋,最高部，顶部,最高限度,口腔顶部
senses.sentence: Goldsmith has repaired the **roof** to ensure the house is wind-proof.
senses.translation: 戈德史密斯修理了屋顶，以确保房屋能够抗风。

senses.definition: n.根，根源,原因，本质,祖先,[乐]和弦基音
senses.sentence: The forces of National Socialism were transforming Germany **root** and branch.
senses.translation: 纳粹主义势力当时正在彻底改变德国。

senses.definition: n.粗绳,绳索,一串,学会决窍，知道决窍
senses.sentence: The King has merely given the politicians enough **rope** to hang themselves.
senses.translation: 国王只不过是给了这些政客自缚的绳子。

senses.definition: n.玫瑰,粉红色,蔷薇（花）,粉红色的葡萄酒
senses.sentence: The powdery dust **rose** in a cloud around him.
senses.translation: 一团粉尘在他周围扬起。

senses.definition: n.腐烂，腐朽
senses.sentence: The trees were in bad shape from dry **rot**.
senses.translation: 树木得了干腐病，状况堪忧。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.（使某物）旋转,使转动,使轮流，轮换,交替
senses.sentence: **Rotate** the shoulders in their sockets five times.
senses.translation: 让肩膀绕臼部转动5次。

senses.definition: adj.腐烂的,恶臭的,堕落的,极坏的
senses.sentence: They made the treacherous journey across stormy seas in **rotten** boats.
senses.translation: 他们乘着破旧的小船穿越风大浪急的海面，完成了这次危险之旅。

senses.definition: adj.粗糙的，崎岖不平的,粗鲁的,狂暴的，汹涌的,未经加工的
senses.sentence: A fishing vessel and a cargo ship collided in **rough** seas.
senses.translation: 一艘捕鱼船和一艘货船在波涛汹涌的海上相撞了。

senses.definition: prep.大约,绕过，环绕,（表示位置）在…四周,附近
senses.sentence: He tramped hurriedly **round** the lake towards the garden.
senses.translation: 他匆匆地迈着沉重的步伐绕过湖边向花园走去。

senses.definition: n.绕道,环形交通枢纽,旋转木马
senses.sentence: At the **roundabout**, take the second exit.
senses.translation: 到环岛后，走第二个出口。

senses.definition: v.叫醒，惊醒,鼓励，鼓舞,使发脾气,使振奋
senses.sentence: He did more to **rouse** the crowd there than anybody else.
senses.translation: 他比其他任何人都更积极地鼓动那里的群众。

senses.definition: n.路,（公共汽车和列车等的）常规路线,航线,渠道，途径
senses.sentence: Tens of thousands lined the **route** from Dublin airport.
senses.translation: 从都柏林机场出来的道路两边站着数万人。

senses.definition: n.常规,例行程序,生活乏味,（演出中的）一套动作
senses.sentence: He continued to mow the lawn and do other **routine** chores.
senses.translation: 他继续剪草坪，并做些其他日常杂务。

senses.definition: n.行，排,划船,吵闹,路，街
senses.sentence: He finished second in the championship four years in a **row**.
senses.translation: 他连续4年获得锦标赛亚军。

senses.definition: adj.王国的，王室的,高贵的，庄严的,盛大的,敕许的，敕定的
senses.sentence: All the **royal** cars are fitted with electronic homing devices.
senses.translation: 所有的皇家轿车都装有电子自导引装置。

senses.definition: n.王族成员,版税,王位，王权,堂皇，庄严
senses.sentence: She bowed her head in a gesture somehow reminiscent of **royalty**.
senses.translation: 她低头的姿势让人想起皇室风范。

senses.definition: vt.擦，摩擦,用…擦,触怒,（使）相互磨擦
senses.sentence: I was hoping some of his genius might **rub** off.
senses.translation: 我希望他的才华也可以影响他人。

senses.definition: n.橡胶,橡皮,决胜局,避孕套
senses.sentence: **Rubber** bullets were used to break up the demonstration.
senses.translation: 橡皮子弹被用来驱散示威人群。

senses.definition: n.垃圾,无意义的东西,废话,劣质的东西
senses.sentence: They depend on the goodwill of visitors to pick up **rubbish**.
senses.translation: 他们相信游客会自觉捡起垃圾。

senses.definition: n.小块地毯,〈英〉（围盖膝的）围毯，车毯,〈美俚男子假发
senses.sentence: His shoe had rucked up one corner of the pale **rug**.
senses.translation: 他的鞋子把浅色地毯的一角弄皱了。

senses.definition: vi.被毁灭,破产,堕落
senses.sentence: She wasn't going to let her plans go to **ruin**.
senses.translation: 她不会让她的计划破产的。

senses.definition: vt.统治,规定,管理,裁决
senses.sentence: The North has been under Communist **rule** since 1954.
senses.translation: 北方自1954年起就一直处于共产党的统治之下。

senses.definition: vi.统治,管辖,裁定
senses.sentence: Senior officers could be considering a coup to restore authoritarian **rule**.
senses.translation: 高官们可能会策划一场政变来复辟独裁统治。

senses.definition: n.尺,直尺,统治者
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **ruler** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【ruler】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: vt.谣传,传说
senses.sentence: **Rumor** has it that he is having an affair with his secretary.
senses.translation: 谣传他和他的秘书有暧昧关系.

senses.definition: vt.谣传
senses.sentence: **Rumour** has it that tickets were being sold for £300.
senses.translation: 据谣传，票卖到了300英镑。

senses.definition: adj.乡下的，农村的,田园的,地方的,农业的
senses.sentence: The lure of **rural** life is proving as strong as ever.
senses.translation: 事实证明，乡村生活的魅力丝毫未减。

senses.definition: vi.（使）急速行进，仓促完成,猛攻,急速流动，奔腾
senses.sentence: I hate to **rush** you but I have another appointment later on.
senses.translation: 我真不想催你，但我稍后还有一个约会。

senses.definition: n.铁锈,锈病，锈菌,荒废，停滞,锈，锈色
senses.sentence: Ray painted below the waterline with a special anti-**rust** paint.
senses.translation: 雷用专门的防锈涂料涂船的吃水线以下的部位。

senses.definition: adj.无情的，冷酷的,残忍的,狠,辣
senses.sentence: Successfully merging two banks requires a fast and **ruthless** attack on costs.
senses.translation: 成功合并两家银行需要坚决快速地着手解决费用问题。

senses.definition: n.麻袋,洗劫,<英俚>解雇
senses.sentence: Thieves ransacked the office, taking a **sack** of loose change.
senses.translation: 窃贼洗劫了办公室,拿走了一口袋散币.

senses.definition: adj.宗教的,神圣的,受崇敬的，值得崇敬的,有宗教性质的
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **sacred** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【sacred】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.牺牲,献祭，供奉,牺牲行为,[宗]基督的献身
senses.sentence: He was willing to make any **sacrifice** for peace.
senses.translation: 他愿意为和平作出任何牺牲。

senses.definition: vt.献祭,奉献,牺牲,亏本出售
senses.sentence: No one is worth a great deal of **sacrifice**.
senses.translation: 没有谁值得付出重大的牺牲。

senses.definition: adj.悲哀的,糟糕的,可悲的,令人遗憾的
senses.sentence: This condition is called seasonal affective disorder, or **SAD** for short.
senses.translation: 这种病情叫做季节性情感失调症，或简称SAD。

senses.definition: n.马鞍,（自行车或摩托车的）车座,鞍形架，鞍状物,（动物的）脊肉
senses.sentence: Naomi was given a pony and taught to ride side-**saddle**.
senses.translation: 别人给娜奥米一匹小型马并教会她如何侧骑马。

senses.definition: n.保护，保卫,防护措施,安全设施
senses.sentence: Many people took second jobs as a **safeguard** against unemployment.
senses.translation: 许多人为防失业都干两份工作。

senses.definition: n.安全,安全性,安全处所,中卫
senses.sentence: The built-in **safety** device compensates for a fall in water pressure.
senses.translation: 该内置式安全装置在水压下降时能提供保护。

senses.definition: n.帆船,航行,帆状物,航行距离
senses.sentence: They were going to **sail** around the little island, against the tide.
senses.translation: 他们打算绕着小岛逆潮航行。

senses.definition: n.水手，海员,驾船人
senses.sentence: The **sailor** went through all the motions smartly.
senses.translation: 这个水手机灵地走了走过场。

senses.definition: n.缘故,理由,日本米酒,目的
senses.sentence: Economic change for its own **sake** did not appeal to him.
senses.translation: 经济变化本身对他并没有吸引力。

senses.definition: n.色拉
senses.sentence: He hadn't eaten a thing except for one forkful of **salad**.
senses.translation: 除了一餐叉色拉，他什么都没吃。

senses.definition: n.薪水，薪金，薪俸
senses.sentence: His **salary** was obscene for three 40-minute shows a week.
senses.translation: 他一周只有3次节目，每次40分钟，但他的薪水实在高得离谱。

senses.definition: n.卖，出卖,销售额，销售,销路,拍卖
senses.sentence: The **sale** is a big coup for the auction house.
senses.translation: 这笔交易是该拍卖行的一大成功之举。

senses.definition: n.盐湖，盐泉,盐溶液
senses.sentence: Wash the lenses in **saline** solution.
senses.translation: 用盐溶液清洗镜片。

senses.definition: n.盐,风趣,机智，讽刺,药用盐，泻盐
senses.sentence: **Salt** the stock to your taste and leave it simmering very gently.
senses.translation: 根据自己的口味给原汤加点盐，然后用文火慢炖。

senses.definition: n.致敬，欢迎,敬礼,举枪，举刀（礼）
senses.sentence: As a second lieutenant, he had to **salute** damned near everybody.
senses.translation: 身为少尉，他几乎是逢人便得敬礼。

senses.definition: adj.同一的,相同的，同样的
senses.sentence: Driving a boat is not the **same** as driving a car.
senses.translation: 驾船和开车不是一回事。

senses.definition: n.样品，华样,标本，榜样,（化验的）取样,[信]信号瞬时值
senses.sentence: They asked me to do some **sample** drawings.
senses.translation: 他们请我画些样品图。

senses.definition: vt.批准,鼓励，容忍
senses.sentence: He seemed to be preparing to **sanction** an increase in public borrowing.
senses.translation: 他似乎正准备批准增加公共贷款。

senses.definition: n.沙,沙滩,沙色
senses.sentence: The **sand** martin is a brown bird with white underneath.
senses.translation: 崖沙燕是一种褐羽白腹的鸟。

senses.definition: n.三明治,夹心面包,状似三明治的东西
senses.sentence: A surprising number of customers order the same **sandwich** every day.
senses.translation: 每天点同一种三明治的顾客多得惊人。

senses.definition: adj.心智健全的,神志正常的,明智的,稳健的
senses.sentence: I alone was **sane**, I thought, in a world of crazy people.
senses.translation: 我认为，在一群疯子的世界里只有我自己是理性的。

senses.definition: adj.讥讽的，讽刺的，挖苦的
senses.sentence: In certain conditions, answering back **sarcastically** is necessary.
senses.translation: 在某种情况下, 反唇相讥是必要的.

senses.definition: n.卫星,人造卫星,卫星国,卫星区
adj.令人满意的,符合要求的,[神]赎罪的
senses.sentence: As a result, the satisfiable degree values of the given Methods: Were also greater titan 95 %.
senses.translation: 结果表明两种预报方法公众的满意度都在95%以上.

senses.definition: vt.& vi.使满意，满足
senses.sentence: I found wood carving **satisfying**.
senses.translation: 我觉得木雕能给人带来满足感。

senses.definition: vt.浸湿，浸透,使充满,[化]使饱和,使渗进，使湿透
senses.sentence: His work clothes, having become **saturated** with oil, had to be cleaned.
senses.translation: 他的工作服已经被油浸透，该洗洗了。

senses.definition: n.星期六，周六
senses.sentence: On Tuesdays and **Saturdays** the market comes to town.
senses.translation: 每逢周二与周六，镇上就会有集市。

senses.definition: n.调味汁,酱汁,〈非〉莽撞无礼,〈俚〉烈酒
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **sauce** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【sauce】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.茶杯托，茶碟,（放花盆的）垫盘（等）,浅碟形盆地,〈美〉拳击场
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **saucer** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【saucer】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.香肠，腊肠,〈口〉德国人
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **sausage** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【sausage】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: adj.未开化的,野蛮的,凶猛的,残忍的
senses.sentence: The writing is brutally tough and **savagely** humorous.
senses.translation: 该作品带有残酷的强悍和野性的幽默感。

senses.definition: n.节约,节俭,储蓄金,挽救
senses.sentence: The film company collapsed, leaving Chris jobless and minus his life **savings**.
senses.translation: 电影公司垮了，克里斯没了工作，也失去了他一生的积蓄。

senses.definition: n.锯,谚语，格言
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **saw** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【saw】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: vi.说， 讲,表明，宣称,假设,约莫
senses.sentence: **Saya** sungguh bahagia dapat menyatukan orang yang pada awalnya tidak saling mengenal.
senses.translation: 我很开心,我可以让不认识的人联系起来.

senses.definition: n.规模,比例（尺）,鱼鳞,级别
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **scale** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【scale】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: vt.<计>扫描,细看,细查,（雷达）对…进行扫描
senses.sentence: His government began to unravel because of a banking **scandal**.
senses.translation: 他的政府由于一起金融丑闻而开始瓦解。

senses.definition: n.丑闻，丑名，丑事，丑行，丢脸的事件，舞弊案件，耻辱,流言蜚语,闲话,诽谤
senses.contextMeaning: 丑闻，丑名，丑事，丑行，丢脸的事件，舞弊案件，耻辱
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **scandal** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【scandal】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: adj.缺乏的，罕见的
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **scarce** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【scarce】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: adv.几乎不，简直不,刚刚，才,决不,（刚）一…就
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **scarcely** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【scarcely】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: vt.使惊恐，惊吓,使害怕，使恐惧,把…吓跑
senses.sentence: I don't mean to be married to that old **scarecrow**.
senses.translation: 我可不愿意嫁给那个老稻草人.

senses.definition: n.围巾，领巾,嵌接,桌巾，台巾,（木材，金属，皮革的）嵌接
senses.sentence: His **scarfpin** was a large diamond, oddly set.
senses.translation: 他的领带别针是一颗很大的钻石, 不过镶嵌得奇特古怪.

senses.definition: vt.（使）散开，（使）分散，驱散
senses.sentence: Aunt Mary is such a **scatterbrain** that she always forgets something.
senses.translation: 玛丽阿姨糊里糊涂的,她总是忘东忘西.

senses.definition: n.（行动的）方案,剧情概要,分镜头剧本
senses.sentence: It is coexisted that if I am scenarist, I will let robot and mankind harmonious.
senses.translation: 如果我是编剧, 我将会让机器人与人类和谐共处.

senses.definition: n.场面，现场,（戏剧的）一场,景色，风景,事件
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **scene** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【scene】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.风景，景色,舞台布景,风景画,舞台面
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **scenery** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【scenery】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.香味，气味,嗅觉,（动物的）臭迹,痕迹，踪迹
senses.sentence: I let my lungs fill with the **scented** air.
senses.translation: 我呼吸着芬芳的空气.

senses.definition: adj.怀疑的,怀疑论者的
senses.sentence: He curled his upper lip in a show of scepticism.
senses.translation: 他撇嘴表示怀疑。

senses.definition: n.时刻表，进度表,清单，明细表,预定计划,目录
senses.sentence: Execution by lethal injection is **scheduled** for July 30th.
senses.translation: 定于7月30日执行注射死刑。

senses.definition: n.计划,体系,阴谋
senses.sentence: He's a **schemer**, and now his plot struck back.
senses.translation: 他是个阴谋家, 而现在他搞的阴谋却反过来害了他自己.

senses.definition: n.奖学金获得者,学者,聪颖勤奋的学生,〈俚〉有文化的人，有某种文科知识的人
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **scholar** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【scholar】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.奖学金,学术,学识
senses.sentence: We use standardized tests to measure scholastic achievement.
senses.translation: 我们用标准化考试来衡量学生的学业成绩.

senses.definition: n.科学,技术，知识,学科,理科
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **science** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【science】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: adj.科学的,有系统的,应用科学的,精通学理的，有学问的
senses.sentence: We want to have more **scientifically** literate people running our television stations.
senses.translation: 我们想增加一些通晓科学的人手来运作电视台。

senses.definition: n.科学家,科学工作者
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **scientist** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【scientist】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.剪刀,两腿前后错跃
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **scissors** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【scissors】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.（处理、研究事务的）范围,眼界，见识,（活动或能力的）余地,广袤，地域
senses.sentence: Nickel naphthenate is used broadly in petrochemical and chemical **scopes**.
senses.translation: 环烷酸镍是石油化工领域内的重要助剂.

senses.definition: n.鄙视,轻蔑,不屑一顾,笑柄
senses.sentence: She flung him a **scornful** look.
senses.translation: 她轻蔑地看了他一眼.

senses.definition: vt.轻视,看不起,蔑视,不屑做
senses.sentence: He is deeply **scornful** of politicians.
senses.translation: 他非常看不起政客。

senses.definition: n.搜索，侦察,侦察员， 侦察机， 侦察舰 , 童子军,（牛津大学的）校工
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **scout** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【scout】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.废料,残余物,小片,吵架
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **scrap** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【scrap】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: vt.擦，刮,擦去,擦伤，刮破,挖空
senses.sentence: They started to kick around the idea of an electric **scraper**.
senses.translation: 他们开始讨论弄一个电铲。

senses.definition: vt.擦，刮,擦痛，擦伤,在…处搔痒,抓破
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **scratch** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【scratch】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: vi.尖叫,发出尖锐刺耳的声音
senses.sentence: A. Should we try to ski The **Screamer**?
senses.translation: 我们要不要去试滑[尖叫坡]? )

senses.definition: vt.掩藏,庇护,检查,放映
senses.sentence: The airline had been **screening** baggage on X-ray machines.
senses.translation: 该航空公司已采用X光机对行李进行安全检查。

senses.definition: n.螺丝钉,螺旋桨，螺旋状物,（螺丝的）转，扭,吝啬鬼
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **screw** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【screw】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.脚本，手迹,书写体铅字,剧本、广播稿或者电影剧本
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **script** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【script】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.细看，细阅,仔细的观察,监督
senses.sentence: Master, they've split up. I humbly suggest we scry on the leader.
senses.translation: 大人, 他们分头行动了. 在下谨建议集中探知那个队长.

senses.definition: n.雕刻（术），塑像,雕刻品,刻纹
senses.sentence: I was attracted by the **sculpturesque** beauty of David's face.
senses.translation: 我被大卫脸上精雕细凿的美所吸引.

senses.definition: n.海,海洋,许多,大量
senses.sentence: Draining and reinforcing material for reclaiming **seabeach** and swamp.
senses.translation: 海滩和沼泽地开垦的排水材料和加固材料.

senses.definition: n.密封,印章,海豹,封条
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **seal** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【seal】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.接缝，接合处,煤层,线缝,裂缝
senses.sentence: The **Seaman** was a bar for pool players and hard drinkers.
senses.translation: “水手”是供台球玩家和酒徒消遣的酒吧。

senses.definition: n.搜索,调查,探求
senses.sentence: He's not a real **searcher** after truth.
senses.translation: 他不是一个真正探求真理的人。

senses.definition: n.海滨,海边
senses.sentence: Season with salt, pepper and a pinch of cayenne.
senses.translation: 调以盐、胡椒和少许辣椒粉。

senses.definition: n.季节，季,时期,活动期，时令,暂时
senses.sentence: This adjustment was not only very **seasonable** but also extremely successful.
senses.translation: 这种调整是非常及时的,也是很成功的.

senses.definition: n.席位，座位,所在地,场所,臀部
senses.sentence: The room was empty apart from one man **seated** beside the fire.
senses.translation: 除了有个男人坐在火炉边，房间里空荡荡的。

senses.definition: adj.第二的,次要的,居第二位的,另外的
senses.sentence: Their differences are only **secondarily** about policy. They hold each other's values in contempt.
senses.translation: 双方在政策上的分歧还只是次要的, 他们鄙视的是彼此的价值观.

senses.definition: adv.第二,其次,以第二位
senses.sentence: China first learned it mainly from the U.S. and **secondarily** from Europe.
senses.translation: 中国首先是向美国,其次是向欧洲学习到这一点的.

senses.definition: adj.第二的，中等的,助手，副手,中等教育的,间接的
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **secondary** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【secondary】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.秘密，机密,秘诀,奥秘
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **secret** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【secret】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.秘书,干事，书记员, 部长，大臣
senses.sentence: He resigned **secretaryship** on the ostensible ground of health.
senses.translation: 他借口身体不好,辞去书记的职务.

senses.definition: n.部分,节,部件,部门
senses.sentence: He criticized the selfish attitude of certain **sectional** interests.
senses.translation: 他批评了某些利益团体自私自利的态度。

senses.definition: n.部门,领域,防御地区,扇形
senses.sentence: The church can only go so far in secular matters.
senses.translation: 教会在世俗事务上只能做这么多。

senses.definition: adj.安全的,牢固的,有把握的,安心的
senses.sentence: Builders must fasten down roofs of newly-built homes more **securely**.
senses.translation: 建造工人必须把新建房屋的屋顶固定得更牢靠些。

senses.definition: n.安全,保证，担保,保护，防护,有价证券
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **security** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【security】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.看见,领会，理解,查看,参观
senses.sentence: Same faction players in stealth are **seeable** by any other player of that faction.
senses.translation: 潜行玩家对同阵营的其它玩家可见.

senses.definition: n.种子,子孙,起源,（尤指网球比赛）种子选手
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **seed** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【seed】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: vt.寻找，探寻,追求，谋求,往或朝…而去,[废语]考察
senses.sentence: He was a **seeker** for truth.
senses.translation: 他是一个追求真理的人.

senses.definition: v.好像，仿佛,似乎,装作,看来好像
senses.sentence: Whatever troubles arise, we'll have peace of mind amidst **seeming** chaos.
senses.translation: 无论出现什么样的麻烦，我们都会在貌似混乱的情形中保持平和的心态。

senses.definition: adv.看来似乎,表面上看来,貌似
senses.sentence: For barrier and immunity of enteric, select seemliness time and composition enteral nutrition is very importance.
senses.translation: 由于肠道具有屏障、免疫等各项功能,因此恰当选择肠内营养的时机及给予合理营养成分是十分重要的.

senses.definition: n.部分，段落,环节,[计算机]（字符等的）分段,[动物学]节片
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **segment** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【segment】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: vt.（使）分开,分离,隔离,隔离并区别对待（不同种族、宗教或性别的人）
senses.sentence: The Supreme Court unanimously ruled that racial segregation in schools was unconstitutional.
senses.translation: 联邦最高法院一致裁定学校实行的种族隔离措施违反宪法。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.抓住,逮捕,捉拿,俘获
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **seize** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【seize】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: adv.很少，罕见,难得,不大
senses.sentence: The floorcovering you select will need to be impervious to water.
senses.translation: 挑选的地板材料必须是防水的。

senses.definition: vt.选择,挑选,选拔
senses.sentence: Price quotes on **selected** product categories will be sent on request.
senses.translation: 所选产品类别的报价承索即寄。

senses.definition: n.选择,被选中者,可供选择的事物
senses.sentence: The semantic meaning of a sentence is governed by rules called **selectional** restrictions.
senses.translation: 句子在语义上是否有意义是受被称为选择限制的规则支配的.

senses.definition: n.自己,本人,本性,私利
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **self** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【self】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: adj.自私的，利己的
senses.sentence: Cabinet Ministers are **selfishly** pursuing their own vested interests.
senses.translation: 内阁大臣们正在自私地追逐他们自己的既得利益。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.卖，售,使好卖,使接受，使赞成,销售
senses.sentence: These items are most **sellable** in our market.
senses.translation: 这些产品在我们的市场中有售.

senses.definition: n.（尤指美国的大专院校的）学期,半学年
senses.contextMeaning: （尤指美国的大专院校的）学期
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **semester** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【semester】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.半圆形，半圆形的周长，半圆形的东西
senses.sentence: Semicircular seating arrangements are ideal for comfort, interaction and line of sight.
senses.translation: 半圆形的座位安排对于参与者的互动、视线和舒适度都是十分理想的.

senses.definition: n.半决赛
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **semifinal** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【semifinal】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.研讨班，讲习会,研讨小组,研讨会,培训会
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **seminar** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【seminar】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: vt.送,使作出（某种反应）,派遣,使进入（某状态）
senses.sentence: The Tanabata Festival in **Sendai** is among the most famous in Japan.
senses.translation: 仙台的七夕庆典是日本最有名的庆典之一.

senses.definition: adj.（级别、地位等）较高的,资深的,年长的,<美>最高年级的
senses.sentence: He has said he will fire editorial employees without regard to **seniority**.
senses.translation: 他说过不管资历如何，任何编辑人员他都有可能解雇。

senses.definition: n.感觉,直觉,知觉,轰动
senses.sentence: Experts agreed that this was a truly **sensational** performance.
senses.translation: 专家们一致认为这的确是一场精彩绝伦的演出。

senses.definition: n.感觉，官能,意识，观念,理性,识别力
senses.sentence: I **sensed** her wistfulness when she talked about vacations her relatives took.
senses.translation: 她谈起她的亲戚度假时，我觉得她心里酸酸的。

senses.definition: adj.明智的,合乎情理的,通情达理的,意识到的，能感觉到的
senses.sentence: He sensibly decided to lie low for a while.
senses.translation: 他明智地决定暂时保持低调。

senses.definition: adj.敏感的,感觉的,[仪]灵敏的,易受影响的
senses.sentence: The rectory has been **sensitively** restored and tastefully furnished.
senses.translation: 教区长的故居已被精心修复，里面的陈设也颇为雅致。

senses.definition: n.句子,宣判
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **sentence** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【sentence】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.感情，情绪,情操,意见，观点,感伤
senses.sentence: Beneath the **sentimental** psychobabble, there's a likeable movie trying to get out.
senses.translation: 在多愁善感的心理学呓语之下，一部本有可能受到喜爱的电影挣扎欲出。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.分开,（使）分离,区分,隔开
senses.sentence: Free gifts are dispatched **separately** so please allow 28 days for delivery.
senses.translation: 赠品会分开发送，所以请预留28天的送货期。

senses.definition: n.九月,[电影]情怀九月天
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **september** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【september】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.[数]数列，序列,顺序,连续,片断插曲
senses.sentence: Full - function 768 ppt **sequencer** with 16 song and 16 arrangement tracks.
senses.translation: 全功能768西洋参多糖编曲的16首歌曲和16日安排轨道.

senses.definition: adj.连续的,连载的,顺序排列的,分期偿付的
senses.sentence: Will every film now be released like a Dickens **serialisation**, one chapter a time?
senses.translation: 将来是不是每一部电影都会像狄更斯的长篇小说一样, 每次发布一章?

senses.definition: n.系列，连续,串联,（广播或电视上题材或角色相同的）系列节目,级数
senses.sentence: The harmonious blendofancientcalligraphy and modern sans serif fonts works like a charm.
senses.translation: 古代书法和现代饰线字体的协调融会充斥魔力.

senses.definition: adj.严肃的，严重的,认真的，庄重的,重要的,危险的
senses.sentence: Yasin had **seriously** hurt himself while trying to escape from the police.
senses.translation: 亚辛试图从警察手中逃脱时受了重伤。

senses.definition: n.仆人，佣人，雇工,[美]奴仆，奴隶,官吏，公务员，服务员,随员，献身…的人
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **servant** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【servant】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.（为…）服务,任（职）,提供,端上
senses.sentence: You're a turncoat, a time - **server**, a shameful, unscrupulous opportunist.
senses.translation: 你是一个变节分子, 是个趋炎附势之徒! 是个肆无忌惮不要脸的机会主义者!

senses.definition: n.服务，服侍,服务业,维修服务,服役
n.开会，会议,（法庭的）开庭,会期，学期,（进行某活动连续的）一段时间
senses.sentence: **Sessional** result is Ke Dexi won lawsuit.
senses.translation: 开庭的结果是柯德希赢了官司.

senses.definition: vt.放置，安置,使处于某种状况,设置,摆放餐具
senses.sentence: **SETA** automatically **sets** a precise alignment for each Timing option.
senses.translation: SETA自动设置精确对准每一个时序的选择.

senses.definition: n.挫折,阻碍,退步,逆流
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **setback** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【setback】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.镶嵌,环境,装置,（某事、戏剧、小说等的）背景
senses.sentence: Sincere performances and gritty Boston **settings** add to the film's realism.
senses.translation: 真诚的表演和对波士顿这一背景城市的真实刻画增添了电影的现实主义色彩。

senses.definition: vt.解决,安排,使定居,使沉淀
senses.sentence: The settling zone portion of the pretreatment system provides for removal of **settleable** and floatable materials.
senses.translation: 预处理系统的沉淀区可以去除具有沉降性能和悬浮的物质.

senses.definition: n.解决,结算,<律>金钱或财产的转让（契约）,沉淀,定居点
senses.sentence: The settler got the house at a nominal price.
senses.translation: 移居者象征性地花点钱买下了这栋房子.

senses.definition: num.七,七个,第七
senses.sentence: If Cain shall avenged **sevenfold**, truly Lamech **seventy** and **sevenfold**.
senses.translation: 24若杀该隐,遭报七倍, 杀拉麦,必遭报七十七倍.

senses.definition: adj.几个的,专有的,各自的,分别的
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **several** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【several】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: adj.严峻的,严厉的,剧烈的,苛刻的
senses.sentence: He was diagnosed as **severely** dyslexic but extraordinarily bright.
senses.translation: 他被诊断患有严重的阅读困难症，但是却绝顶聪明。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.缝，做针线活,缝纫,装钉（书籍）
senses.sentence: **Sewage** nutrients do increase algal growth in the harbour.
senses.translation: 污水中的营养物确实会加快港口的海藻生长。

senses.definition: n.性别,两性之一,性，性特征,性活动
senses.sentence: The **sexagenarian** population is growing.
senses.translation: 六十岁以上的老年人人数正在增加.

senses.definition: adj.破旧的，衣衫褴褛的,卑鄙的,悭吝的,低劣的，下流的
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **shabby** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【shabby】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.遮阳，遮棚,挡风物,玻璃罩,（画的）阴暗部分
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **shade** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【shade】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.阴影,影子,鬼，幽灵,隐蔽处
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **shadow** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【shadow】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: adj.背阴的,隐蔽的,名声不好的,可疑的
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **shady** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【shady】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.柄，轴,矛，箭,〈非〉嘲笑,光线
senses.sentence: **Shafting** system is an important part of ship power installation.
senses.translation: 船舶轴系是船舶动力装置的重要组成部分.

senses.definition: vt.动摇,摇头,使发抖,使心绪不宁[烦恼，惊吓]
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **shake** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【shake】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: v.将要,必须,可以,应该
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **shall** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【shall】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: adj.浅的，肤浅的,表面的，皮毛的,（水，器物等）浅的,（呼吸）浅的
senses.sentence: Software Description : About Shalom , This saver includes various religious pictures and text.
senses.translation: 这个屏幕保护程序包括不同宗教的图画和文本.

senses.definition: n.赝品,假冒,骗子,套,枕套
senses.sentence: A black suitcase containing a number of untraceable blood diamonds will change hands at the **Shamal**.
senses.translation: 一个装有不定数额血腥钻石的手提箱将在夏马风酒店转手.

senses.definition: n.羞愧,羞辱,可耻的人,羞愧感
senses.sentence: And a While , the young man stood by , **shamefaced** , and downat - heel , submitting.
senses.translation: 年轻男人一直低头站在那里,满脸羞涩, 唯唯诺诺.

senses.definition: n.洗发剂,洗发香波,（洗地毯、家具罩套、汽车等的）洗涤剂,洗头
senses.sentence: Your shamrock necklace? Cindy, I can't wear this.
senses.translation: 你的酢浆草项链? 辛蒂, 这我可不能戴.

senses.definition: n.形状,模型,状态,身材
senses.sentence: This pair of shoes are **shapeable**.
senses.translation: 这双鞋的样子很好看.

senses.definition: n.股,（参与、得到等的）份,（分享到的或贡献出的）一份,市场占有率
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **share** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【share】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.鲨鱼,坑蒙拐骗的人，诈骗者,[俚]老手
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **shark** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【shark】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: adj.敏锐的,锋利的,狡猾的，聪明的,尖锐的
senses.sentence: She needs to **sharpen** up before next month's competition.
senses.translation: 下个月比赛之前,她的水平需要提高一下.

senses.definition: vt.使破碎，使碎裂，砸碎,使…成为泡影,使…痛不欲生,使…散开
senses.sentence: Made by Nike , features anti - fog **shatterproof** polycarbonate lenses, UV protection.
senses.translation: 防雾, 防紫外线,防碎的聚碳酸酯镜片, 硅胶镜带及垫圈!

senses.definition: vt.& vi.剃须，剃毛
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **shave** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【shave】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: pron.她，它
senses.sentence: Ingredient: **Shea** butter, sea salt and sweet almond oil etc.
senses.translation: 主要成份: 乳木果、海盐、甜杏仁油 、 杏仁颗粒、溶角蛋白酶.

senses.definition: vt.剪羊毛,切断,剪切,剥夺
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **shear** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【shear】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.棚，库,分水岭
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **shed** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【shed】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.羊，绵羊,胆小鬼,易受人摆布的人,缺乏主见或轻易盲从的人
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **sheep** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【sheep】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: v.（使）偏航，（使）转向
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **sheer** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【sheer】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.纸,被单,一张（通常指标准尺寸的纸）,一大片（覆盖物）,表格
senses.sentence: The firm puts out 1000 bales of cotton **sheeting** every week.
senses.translation: 这家公司每周生产出1000包棉质被单布.

senses.definition: n.架子，搁板,棚,沙洲，暗礁,格，层
senses.sentence: He bought a **shelfful** of books.
senses.translation: 他买了一书架的书.

senses.definition: n.（贝、卵、坚果等的）壳,外壳,炮弹,（人的）表面性格
senses.sentence: She wanted to **shellac** the desk to protect it from water spots.
senses.translation: 她想在桌子上涂虫漆以防水滴斑点.

senses.definition: n.居所,避难所,（无家可归者或受虐待者的）收容所,遮蔽
senses.sentence: The Three North **Shelterbelt** is a forestation undertaking.
senses.translation: 三北防护林带是一项造林事业.

senses.definition: n.牧羊人，羊倌,牧师,指导者
senses.sentence: A china statuette of a **shepherdess** stood on the table.
senses.translation: 桌上有一个牧羊女的小瓷像.

senses.definition: n.盾,护罩,盾形奖牌,保护人
senses.sentence: Their success does not necessarily reflect a leftward shift in politics.
senses.translation: 他们的成功并不一定表示政治气候转向亲左。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.改变,去掉,摆脱掉,换挡
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **shift** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【shift】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.先令（英国1971年以前的货币单位，为一镑的二十分之一）
senses.contextMeaning: 先令（英国1971年以前的货币单位，为一镑的二十分之一）

senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【shilling】的用法非常重要。

n.不足，缺点,缺少,缺少量,不足额

senses.definition: adv.立刻，马上,简单地，扼要地,唐突地，简慢地,在即

senses.translation: 这个剧本里的商人夏洛克借给安东尼奥3000块金币.

senses.translation: 西格弗里德畏缩了，退避到墙根。

senses.translation: 这个质量相似, 但更便宜.

senses.definition: adj.松（弛）的,清淡的,不活跃的,懈怠的
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **slack** in IELTS reading tests.

senses.definition: n.掌掴,掌掴声,侮辱
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **slap** in IELTS reading tests.

senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **slender** in IELTS reading tests.

senses.translation: 精细清洁复制罚款书套.

senses.definition: n.拖鞋，（室内）便鞋,（马车的）煞车，[机]滑动部分，滑屐,（小孩的）围兜，放猎狗的猎人
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **slipper** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【slipper】的用法非常重要。

senses.translation: 服务员, 给这位先生来一杯葡萄酒, 快一点.

senses.definition: vt.切开，撕开,使有狭缝

senses.definition: n.标语，口号,呐喊声,（商业广告上用的）短语

senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【slogan】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.位置,狭槽，水沟,[人名] 斯洛特,硬币投币口
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **slot** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【slot】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: vt.放慢,阻碍

senses.definition: n.贫民窟，贫民区

senses.definition: adj.小的,难为情的,低级的，卑劣的,细微的，微弱的
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **small** in IELTS reading tests.

senses.definition: n.嗅觉,气味,臭味,发出臭气的人[东西]

senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【smell】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.微笑，笑容
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **smile** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【smile】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.烟雾,烟尘,烟雾污染
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **smog** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【smog】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.烟,吸烟

senses.definition: vi.走私,偷带

senses.translation: 这名走私犯今晚在监狱, 等待引渡到英国.

senses.definition: n.快餐，点心,加餐

senses.definition: n.蛇,奸险的人,卑劣的人,蛇形浮动汇率制
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **snake** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【snake】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.猛地咬住,呵斥,折断
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **snap** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【snap】的用法非常重要。

senses.translation: 对影响蚕豆浸泡的各个因素进行研究.提出适宜的浸泡工艺和条件.

senses.definition: n.肥皂,肥皂剧,[化]皂，脂肪酸盐

senses.translation: 另外在泡沫浴产品中添加肥皂树及丝兰成分以增强泡沫.

senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **sober** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【sober】的用法非常重要。

senses.translation: 那个喜好交际的新邻居邀请街区的每个人去喝咖啡.

senses.translation: 我们保证你们会找到自己的交际圈。

senses.definition: n.社会主义

senses.translation: 牙买加的社会主义政府正在仿效美国实行自由市场。

senses.definition: n.社会,上流社会,社团,社群
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **society** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【society】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.社会学,群体生态学
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **sociology** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【sociology】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.短袜,（尤指用拳头）猛击，重击
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **sock** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【sock】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.苏打,碳酸钠,苏打水，汽水,苏打点心
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **soda** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【soda】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.沙发
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **sofa** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【sofa】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: adj.软的，柔软的,温和的，柔和的,不含酒精的,轻松的

senses.translation: 这种书曾经畅销一时，现在推出了平装本。

senses.definition: n.软件,软体,软设备

senses.translation: 床垫用软木材架子支撑着。

senses.definition: n.泥土,土地，国土,滋生地，温床,粪尿，肥料
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **soil** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【soil】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: adj.太阳的，日光的,利用太阳能的,根据太阳决定或测定的
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **solar** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【solar】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.士兵,军人,战士

senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【soldier】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: adj.单独的,惟一的,专有的，独占的

senses.translation: 他沿着车架纵梁慢慢地走.

senses.definition: adj.庄严的，严肃的,庄重的,隆重的，神圣的,犹豫的，阴沉的
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **solemn** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【solemn】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: adj.固体的,实心的,结实的，可靠的,可信赖的
senses.sentence: Objective To identify **solidago** decurrens lour, Achyranthes Root in Yantongling Mixture.
senses.translation: 目的鉴别咽痛灵合剂中的一枝黄花 、 土牛膝.

senses.definition: n.团结
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **solidarity** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【solidarity】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: adj.独自的，独立的,单个的,唯一的,隐居的
senses.sentence: Imagine long golden beaches where you can wander in solitude.
senses.translation: 想象一下那长长的金色海滩吧，在那里你可以独自徜徉。

senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **solo** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【solo】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: adj.[化] 可溶的,可以解决的,可以解释的,[数]可解的
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **soluble** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【soluble】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.解决,溶解,溶液,答案
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **solution** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【solution】的用法非常重要。

senses.translation: 对银行偿付能力出现恐慌更加速了经济的崩溃.

senses.translation: 虽然出现过一些问题，但这基本上仍不失为一个好系统。

senses.definition: pron.某人，有人

senses.translation: 有一天我会走段好运.

senses.definition: adv.以某种方式，用某种方法,<非正>不知怎么地，不知道怎样，不晓得什么缘故,设法，想办法，想个方法,莫明其妙地
senses.contextMeaning: 以某种方式，用某种方法
senses.sentence: I denied my father because I wanted to become someone else.
senses.translation: 我和父亲断绝了关系，因为我想成为一个不一样的自己。

senses.definition: pron.某人，有人
senses.sentence: Maybe if we could go someplace together, just you and I.
senses.translation: 也许我们可以一起去某个地方，就我和你。

senses.definition: pron.某物，某事,重要的事物[人]，有一定意义的事物
senses.sentence: Cecile was in her early thirties, a sometime actress, dancer and singer.
senses.translation: 塞茜尔三十出头，曾经做过演员、舞蹈演员和歌手。

senses.definition: adv.将来某个时候,过去某个时候,改天,来日
senses.sentence: You must have noticed how tired he **sometimes** looks.
senses.translation: 你一定注意到他有时候显得特别疲惫。

senses.definition: adv.有时，间或,时而
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **sometimes** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【sometimes】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: adv.稍微,有点,达到某种程度
senses.sentence: I wanted to get her away to somewhere safe.
senses.translation: 我想带她逃到一个安全的地方。

senses.definition: adv.某处，在某处,在[到]某处,不知道在[到]什么地方,某地
senses.sentence: I was divorced somewhile ago.
senses.translation: 不久前我离婚了.

senses.definition: n.儿子,孩子,男性后裔,圣子（耶稣基督）
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **son** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【son】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.歌曲,歌唱（艺术）,诗歌，韵文,鸟叫声，鸟语
senses.sentence: American **songbird**; male is black and orange or yellow.
senses.translation: 美洲歌鸟; 其雄鸟为黑色和桔黄色或黄色.

senses.definition: adv.立刻，马上,一会儿，不久,快,宁愿
senses.sentence: Soot is the product of the imperfect combustion of fuel.
senses.translation: 煤烟是燃料不完全燃烧的产物.

senses.definition: adj.复杂的,精致的,富有经验的,深奥微妙的
senses.sentence: Barry had his nose put out of joint by Lucy's aloof sophistication.
senses.translation: 露西的冷淡与世故使得巴里十分不快。

senses.definition: adj.疼痛的,使人伤心的,恼火的，发怒的
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **sore** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【sore】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.悲痛,悔恨，惋惜,伤心事
senses.sentence: Roy told his **sorrowful** tale with simple words anybody could understand.
senses.translation: 罗伊用简单的、人人都能理解的语言讲述了他那个伤感的故事。

senses.definition: adj.对不起的,无价值的，低等的,遗憾的,感到伤心的
senses.sentence: I really feel aggrieved at this sort of thing.
senses.translation: 我真为这种事感到委屈。

senses.definition: n.分类，类别,品质，本性,方法,一群
n.灵魂,精神,幽灵,人
senses.sentence: A vegetable little girl's heart was awakened by her brother's **soulful** song.
senses.translation: 一个植物人小女孩被她哥哥来自心灵的歌声唤醒了!

senses.definition: adj.有酸味的,敌对的,坏脾气的,别扭的
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **sour** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【sour】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.根源，本源,源头，水源,原因,提供消息的人
senses.sentence: A truly unique and inspirational **sourcebook** for all the design and advertising world.
senses.translation: 对于设计和广告界的从业人员是一本真正独特的富有创意的参考资料.

senses.definition: n.南方,南部,美国南方各州,（南半球的）发展中国家
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **south** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【south】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.东南，东南方，（美国）东南部,东南地区
senses.contextMeaning: 东南，东南方，（美国）东南部
senses.sentence: Recently too much rain fell for some crops in the **southeaster** plains.
senses.translation: 对东南部平原的一些农作物来说,最近的降雨量太大了.

senses.definition: adj.南方的，南部的,来自南方的
senses.sentence: His accent proclaimed him a **southerner**.
senses.translation: 他的口音表明他是南方人。

senses.definition: n.西南，西南方，,西南部
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **southwest** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【southwest】的用法非常重要。

senses.definition: n.君主,最高统治者,独立国,旧时价值为一镑的英国金币
senses.sentence: Lacking **sovereignty**, they could organise no defence against their oppressors.
senses.translation: 没有主权他们就无法组织起来反抗压迫者。

senses.definition: vt.& vi.播（种），播种于
senses.sentence: It is essential to understand the usage of **sow** in IELTS reading tests.
senses.translation: 在雅思阅读考试中理解【sow】的用法非常重要。
